items.title_en: Event Preview | Why and How to File a Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) Report
items.title_zh: 活动预告 | 为何及如何申报公司受益所有权信息（BOI）报告？
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _November 22, 2024, 16:34_ Shaanxi **To identify the real owners behind companies and prevent criminals from using shell companies for money laundering, financing terrorism, and other illegal activities, the US government, under the Corporate Transparency Act that took effect on January 1, 2024, requires all companies formed and registered in the United States to file a Beneficial Ownership Information report -- so-called "BOI Reporting" -- by January 1, 2025.** However, questions such as who must file, what company information must be reported, and who must be reported as a beneficial owner have caused considerable confusion. **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOT6cTTfibwqkegVOqjH1Q6giaLRokbypTW3XMtoI59icZKHRLicMt8u8Bo7CwPffRWt4icym9JCNyjwDw/640?wx_fmt=other&from=appmsg&wxfrom=5&wx_lazy=1&wx_co=1&tp=webp)** **About the Speaker:** **Attorney Cai Qing is a senior licensed attorney in Washington State** **who provides professional services to numerous cross-border companies and high-net-worth individuals** **on US corporate matters, investment matters, and cross-border wealth succession matters.** **Attorney Cai will address audience questions of concern in this session, including the following filing questions:** 1. Who is a reporting company? 2. Who is a beneficial owner? 3. After the initial filing, is annual compliance filing required? 4. What changes in information require an updated report to be filed? 5. Will the reported information be made public or shared with other countries? 6. How should an LLC file when it is "member-managed" versus "manager-managed"? 7. How should individual shareholders and corporate shareholders within a company file? 8. How should filing be handled when a shareholder holds equity on behalf of another person? 9. How should a company's ultimate controlling person file? 10. How should filing be handled when equity is held through a family trust? 11. How should filing be handled when a company is wholly owned by an overseas company that is itself a publicly listed overseas company? 12. How should filing be handled when a company is held by a Chinese state-owned enterprise? 13. A comparison of China's "Measures for the Administration of Beneficial Owner Information," effective November 1, 2024, with the filing requirements of the US Corporate Transparency Act. Given that Chinese individuals commonly engage in business and investment activities in the United States, and that US companies often have Chinese individual and corporate shareholders, failing to file, or filing information that is inaccurate or incomplete, can result in significant civil or criminal penalties, as well as negative effects on a company's reputation and its ability to obtain bank loans, and can seriously disrupt normal business operations. CCCWA is therefore holding this event and has invited Attorney Cai Qing to share her experience. **Organizer: Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA)** **Event Time: December 3, 3:00-5:00 PM (US time)** **Event Location: 12509 Bel-Red Rd. #100, Bellevue, WA 98005**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年11月22日 16:34_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ ** 为了识别企业背后真实所有者，以防止犯罪分子利用空壳公司洗钱、资助恐怖主义和从事其他非法活动，美国政府根据于2024年1月1日生效的“企业透明法”，要求所有在美国设立和登记公司必须在2025年1月1日前递交受益所有权信息申报报告，即所谓的“BOI Reporting”。 ** 但由谁来申报、需要申报哪些公司信息、以及需要把谁作为受益所有权人申报等问题令人疑虑和困惑。 **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOT6cTTfibwqkegVOqjH1Q6giaLRokbypTW3XMtoI59icZKHRLicMt8u8Bo7CwPffRWt4icym9JCNyjwDw/640?wx_fmt=other&from=appmsg&wxfrom=5&wx_lazy=1&wx_co=1&tp=webp) ** ** 分享人简介： ** ** 蔡清律师为华州资深执业律师 ** **为众多跨境公司和高净值群体在美国公司事务、投资事务、跨境财富 传承事务 ** ** 提供专业服务。 ** ** 蔡清律师将通过分享回答听众关注问题，包括以下申报问题： ** 1、谁是申报公司？ 2、谁是受益所有权人？ 3、初次申报后，是否每年需要合规申报？ 4、哪些信息变更时需要递交更新报告？ 5、申报信息会被公开吗或被交换给他国吗？ 6、LLC公司为“股东管理”或“经理管理”不同公司类型时如何申报？ 7、公司中的个人股东和企业股东如何申报？ 8、股东为他人代持股权时如何申报？ 9、公司实控人如何申报？ 10、股权由家庭信托持有时如何申报？ 11、公司由境外公司独资持有，而境外公司是境外上市公司时如何申报？ 12、公司由中国国有企业持有时，如何申报？ 13、于2024年11月1日生效的中国《受益所有人信息管理办法》与美国《企业透明法》申报要求比较。 鉴于华人在美国从事商业和投资活动较普遍，加上美国公司中也往往会有中国个人和企业股东参股，如未申报、申报信息不真实或不完整都将导致重大民事或刑事处罚，以及也会对公司声誉、申请银行贷款产生负面影响并会严重影响公司正常经营活动，华盛顿州中国总商会特此举办本次活动邀请蔡清律师分享他的经验。 ** 举办方：华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA） ** ** 活动时间：12月3日15:00-17:00（美国时间） ** ** 活动地点：12509 Bel-Red Rd. #100 Bellevue WA 98005 **

items.title_en: CCCWA Real Estate Development & Investment Salon, Session 1: On-Site Tour and Discussion at a Lakefront Villa Construction Site!
items.title_zh: CCCWA房地产开发与投资沙龙第一期：湖畔别墅产品施工现场参观与交流!
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _October 30, 2024 17:13_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ ▲ 5ft2 Studio Lakefront house construction tour This event offers an up-close look at the complete journey—from design concept to construction—of the soon-to-be-completed **5ft2 Studio Lakefront house private residence**. During the event, an experienced architect will draw on the project's **design highlights, material innovations, construction progress, cost budgeting, and cost control** to share an in-depth look at the self-build process, along with the rewards and challenges a homeowner may encounter along the way. **This event is limited to 16 participants—please register in advance.** **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOkbialY8XZtL5MiaGp4YDaagHe2chF3icdT5Z72WWbefSBQRaxbn6mQw9jjDet37MicjspaRPwjMViavw/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg) ** **About the Speaker** **Bili Peng — Registered Architect, Washington State** Bili has over 20 years of professional architectural experience and a rich international background. She worked for many years at architecture firms in Singapore and the Netherlands, founded 5ft2 Studio Architects in Amsterdam, and later put down roots in Seattle while expanding her practice to Kuala Lumpur. Today, Bili focuses on bringing her international design experience to the local architecture and interior design field; her deep understanding of local building codes and local culture allows her to bring a unique and engaging perspective to every project. The design philosophy of 5ft2 Studio Architects reflects the founder's own character—**compact yet far-reaching, with a people-centered, interactive approach and design as its main focus**—dedicated to creating value for clients and making quality design accessible to everyone. **Time: November 8, 2024, 2:30–5:00 pm** **Location: 11855 Holmes Point Dr NE, Kirkland, WA 98034** **Please park in the parking lot at O.O. Denny Park** **Sponsor: Xinju Real Estate Development & Management — Riverside Garden Villa Community**
items.body_zh: 此次活动将带您近距离了解即将竣工的 **5ft2 Studio Lakefront house湖畔私宅** 从设计构想到建造实施的完整过程。活动中,经验丰富的建筑师将结合该项目的 **设计亮点、材料创新、施工进度、造价预算、成本控制等** ，深入分享自建房的流程,以及房主在此过程中可能遇到的收获与挑战。 ** 此次活动活动仅限16人，请提前报名。 ** **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOkbialY8XZtL5MiaGp4YDaagHe2chF3icdT5Z72WWbefSBQRaxbn6mQw9jjDet37MicjspaRPwjMViavw/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg) ** **主讲人介绍** **彭碧莉 -- 华盛顿州注册建筑师** 碧莉拥有20年以上的建筑专业经验和丰富的国际实践背景。她曾在新加坡、荷兰的建筑事务所工作多年，并在阿姆斯特丹创办了5ft2 Studio Architects，而后在西雅图扎根，并将业务扩展至吉隆坡。如今，碧莉专注于将她过去的国际设计经验融入在本地的建筑与室内设计领域，她对于本地建筑法规和风土人情的深入理解让她得以为每个项目带来独特而有趣的视角。 5ft2 Studio Architects 的设计理念体现了创始人本身的特质 -- **小巧而深远，并以以人为本的互动模式和设计为主要方向** ，致力于为客户创造价值，让优质设计大众化。 **时间：2024年11月8日下午2:30-5:00** **地点：11855 Holmes Point Dr NE， Kirkland, WA 98034** **请将车停在O.O.Denny公园的停车场** ** 赞助单位：新居地产开发管理-河畔花园别墅社区 **

items.title_en: Event Preview | Safeguarding the US Expansion of Chinese Multinational Companies -- A Legal Seminar
items.title_zh: 活动预告 | 为中资跨国企业在美国发展保驾护航——相关法律讲座
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _September 28, 2024, 16:51_ Shaanxi Changes in the current international landscape have brought both tremendous opportunities and challenges for Chinese multinational companies expanding in the United States. TikTok, the international version of Douyin, has taken North America by storm; fast-fashion brand Shein has filed for a US listing; and Pinduoduo's cross-border platform Temu has become the most-downloaded shopping app in the US market -- all setting examples of Chinese companies "going global." However, in this process of "going global," companies will inevitably face legal challenges. To address this, CCCWA has specially invited the Chamber's General Legal Counsel, Attorney Cao Xiaohe, to share insights and lead a discussion on immigration planning for multinational companies going global. **Speaker: Attorney Cao Xiaohe** **Founder, Law Offices of Xiaohe Cao (USA)** **Founder, International Law Society** CCCWA General Legal Counsel Attorney Cao Xiaohe holds a Bachelor of Laws in International Economic Law from the China University of Political Science and Law and a Juris Doctor from the United States, and is licensed to practice law in both China and the US. For 18 years she has focused on US immigration law, representing hundreds of investors through numerous regional centers and direct investment immigration programs, and helping corporate executives and skilled professionals settle in the United States. Drawing on US policy, she has designed immigration plans for individuals of extraordinary ability and National Interest Waiver applicants, and has provided integrated planning for companies' short- and long-term work and visitor visas. For over a decade she has appeared as an immigration expert guest on Sino Radio and Seattle Chinese Radio, and as an expert guest for the "Attorney Cao's Mailbox" program. **Seminar Overview** This seminar aims to share and analyze practical advice on the immigration policy, business environment, and legal issues encountered during immigration planning or when settling in the United States. The intended audience includes executives of multinational companies, technical experts, investors, entrepreneurs, and professionals across industries hoping to "go global." **Understanding Immigration Policy and Its Changes: Designing Multinational Staff Transfers and US Recruitment** In today's globalized business environment, a thorough understanding of US immigration options is essential to career development. This seminar will offer entrepreneurs, executives, and professionals diverse advice and support for pathways to the United States, covering comprehensive solutions ranging from temporary work visas (such as H-1B, L-1, and O categories) to permanent residency (such as EB-1A, EB-1C, EB-5, PERM, and NIW). **Event Time: October 3, 3:00 PM (US time)** **Event Location: Mari Bellevue (The Sky Club)** **10232 NE 10th St, Bellevue, WA 98004** **Parking: Park in the Mira Flat garage. From the intersection of 10th St and 103rd St, turn onto 103rd St and continue straight for about 100 meters; the garage entrance is on the left. Walk from there to MARI Phase II.** MARI The Sky Club **Event Sponsor: MARI Boutique School-District Residences**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年09月28日 16:51_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 当前国际形势的变化为中资跨国企业在 美国发展带来了巨大的机遇与挑战。 抖音国际版TikTok在北美爆火，快时尚品牌Shein已申请美国上市，拼多多跨境平台已经成为美国市场下载量最高的购物应用，都给出了中国企业"出海"的榜样。 然而，在这"走出去"的过程中，企业无疑会面临法律方面的挑战。 为此，华盛顿州中国总商会特 邀商会法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师，就跨国企业出海过程中的移民规划进行分享与探讨。 **讲座主讲人：曹霄鹤律师** ** 美国曹霄鹤律师事务所创始人 ** ** 国际法律联盟（International Law Society ）创始人 ** 华盛顿州中国总商会 （CCCWA）法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师是中国政法大学国际经济法学士，美国法学博士，中美两国执业资格。18年专注美国移民法律，代表多家区域中心和直接投资移民项目数百个投资人移民，帮助企业高管和技术人才落户美国，结合美国政策为特殊人才，国家利益豁免人才制定移民方案，为企业做长短期工作及访问签证统一规划。美国中文电台和西雅图中文电台十几年来移民专家嘉宾，曹律师信箱专家嘉宾。 **讲座主旨** 本次讲座旨在分享和剖析移民规划中或在美定居遇到的移民政策、商业环境和 法律信息等相关问题与实用建议。受众人群包括 跨国公司高管、技术 专家、投资者、创业者，以及各行业希望“出海”的人才。 **掌握移民政策及变化，设计跨国企业人员调动与美国招募** 在全球化的商业环境中，深入了解美国的移民选项对职业发展至关重要。本次讲座将为企业家、高管及专业人士提供通往美国的多元化建议与支持，涵盖从临时工作签证（如H-1B、L-1、O类）到永久居留权（如 EB-1A EB-1C、Eb-5、 PERM、NIW）的全面解决方案。 ** 活动时间：10月3号 下午3:00（美国时间） ** ** 活动时间：Mari Bellevue（The Sky Club会所） ** ** 10232 NE 10th St, Bellevue, WA 98004 ** ** ** ** 停车在Mira Flat车库：从10街与103街交界路口拐进103街，直行100米左右，车库入口在左手边，步行前往MARI二期。 ** MARI The Sky Club会所 ** 讲座活动赞助商：MARI精品学区公寓 ** ** **

items.title_en: Event Preview | Seminar on the Relationship Between US Property Title-Holding Methods and Family Wealth Succession
items.title_zh: 活动预告 | 美国房产产权持有方式与家庭财富传承的关系分享会
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _July 18, 2024, 12:27_ Shaanxi Due to factors such as immigration policy, educational goals, investment returns, asset protection, and permanent ownership rights, a high proportion of Chinese individuals in the United States purchase homes to live in or rent out. Real estate has always been a major component of Chinese family wealth. However, because the US property title system and its related tax, transfer, gift, and inheritance rules differ significantly from those in China, the manner in which US property is held and disposed of can have a substantial effect on whether family wealth grows or shrinks. The organizer is therefore holding this seminar and has invited Attorney Cai Qing to explain these issues. **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOT6cTTfibwqkegVOqjH1Q6giaLRokbypTW3XMtoI59icZKHRLicMt8u8Bo7CwPffRWt4icym9JCNyjwDw/640?wx_fmt=other&from=appmsg&wxfrom=5&wx_lazy=1&wx_co=1&tp=webp)** **Speaker** **Attorney Cai Qing** **Cai & Cai Law Offices** Attorney Cai Qing is a licensed attorney in Washington State who provides services for clients' cross-border wealth succession matters; helps clients draft trusts, prenuptial agreements, wills, and financial powers of attorney; and assists clients with Washington State property title change documents and registration procedures. **Seminar Topics** 1. Comparison of property ownership methods in China and the United States 2. A detailed explanation of property title-holding methods in Washington State 3. Advantages and disadvantages of holding title as an individual, a married couple, a company, or a trust 4. How to qualify for exemptions from the real estate excise tax when changing property title in Washington State 5. Key considerations when buying, holding, selling, gifting, and inheriting property in Washington State 6. Title-holding considerations when parents provide funds for their children to purchase a home 7. Inheritance issues for Washington State residents holding property both in-state and out-of-state 8. The pros and cons of disposing of property through a will, a trust, a prenuptial agreement, or a transfer-on-death deed **How to Use Financing to Invest in US Real Estate in a High-Interest-Rate Environment?** **Steve Lo** **Business Relationship Manager, Pacific Northwest Region, East West Bank** Steve has worked in banking for over 20 years and is an accomplished international banker with a strong track record of driving outstanding revenue growth through careful relationship cultivation. He has extensive knowledge of asset-based lending, client management, international trade finance, and global correspondent banking. **Topics** • Bridge to Home Loan mortgage financing • Low down payment loans • Traditional fixed-rate loans • Flexible loan terms • Home equity loans • Competitive interest rates • Home purchases, refinancing, and cash-out refinancing **Event Time** Friday, August 2, 2024, 10:00 AM-12:00 PM **Event Location** 12509 Bel-Red Rd. #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 **Host** CCCWA - Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State **Co-Organizers** Seattle Real Estate Investors Club; AAIFPA - Asian American Insurance and Financial Professionals Association, Northwest Chapter
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年07月18日 12:27_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 因为移民政策、教育目的、投资回报、资产保护和永久产权等因素，华人在美国购房自住或出租的比例相当高。 房产始终是华人家庭财富的主要组成部分。但因为美国房产产权制度及相关的税收、转让、赠与和继承制度与中国差异较大，以何种方式持有和处置美国房产会对家庭财富的增值或缩水有相当大的影响。举办方特此举办本分享会，邀请蔡清律师予以讲解。 **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOT6cTTfibwqkegVOqjH1Q6giaLRokbypTW3XMtoI59icZKHRLicMt8u8Bo7CwPffRWt4icym9JCNyjwDw/640?wx_fmt=other&from=appmsg&wxfrom=5&wx_lazy=1&wx_co=1&tp=webp) ** ****主讲人** ** **蔡清律师** **蔡和蔡律师事务所** 蔡清律师为华州执业律师，为客户跨境财富传承事宜提供服务； 帮助客户起草信托、婚前协议、遗嘱、财务授权书；帮助客户办理华州房产权变更文件和登记手续。 **分享内容** 1、中国房产权与美国房产权持有方式比较 2、华州房产权持有方式详解 3、以个人、夫妻、公司、信托名义持有房产权的利弊 4、华州房产权变更时如何可以豁免房产过户税 5、购买、持有、出售、赠与和继承华州房产时应注意事项 6、父母出资给子女购房需考虑的产权持有方式 7、华州居民持有州内和州外房产继承时的问题 8、用遗嘱、信托、婚前协议或死后转让地契处置房产的利弊 **高利率市场环境下，如何使用贷款投资美国房地产？** **Steve Lo** **华美银行太平洋西北地区的业务关系经理** Steve 已在银行业工作了 20 多年，是一位卓有成就的国际银行家，在通过精心培育创造卓越收入增长方面有着良好的记录。拥有基于资产的贷款、客户管理、国际贸易融资和全球代理银行业务的丰富知识。 **分享内容** • Bridge to Home Loan 房屋贷款 • 低头期款贷款• 传统固定利率贷款 • 弹性灵活的贷款条件 • 房屋净值贷款 • 优惠的利率 • 购置房屋、重新贷款及套现再融资 **活动时间** 2024年8月2日（星期五） AM 10:00-12:00 **活动地点** 12509 Bel-Red Rd. #100 Bellevue WA 98005 **主办单位** CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 **协办单位** 西雅图房地产投资俱乐部 AAIFPA，美国亚裔保险与理财协会西北分会

items.title_en: CCCWA Member Salon | "Spring Warmth in the Emerald City, Beauty in Togetherness" Women Entrepreneurs Gathering
items.title_zh: CCCWA会员沙龙 | “春暖翠城 美雅与共” 女企业家聚会
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _March 13, 2024, 15:12_ Shaanxi On the afternoon of March 10, US time, CCCWA held the "Spring Warmth in the Emerald City, Beauty in Togetherness" Women Entrepreneurs Gathering at the rooftop clubhouse of The Emerald luxury residences in Seattle. The event was co-hosted by CCCWA President Ms. Lyu Lili and Ms. Michelle Zou, a Microsoft Global Trainer and certified Global Instructor at the HAS Happiness Studies Academy. ▲ Left: Ms. Lyu Lili; Right: Ms. Michelle Zou Michelle Zou spoke about Dr. Tal Ben-Shahar's study of happiness and how to apply methods for happiness simply and practically in daily life, and used a highly entertaining icebreaker game to quickly bring the group together, guiding the attending women entrepreneurs to reflect on their entrepreneurial journeys and life experiences and deepen their mutual understanding. This event's sponsor and keynote speaker was Nini Wu, currently a private banking wealth planning advisor at Morgan Stanley. She is a CFA charterholder with more than a decade of experience in wealth and asset management in both China and the United States. She shared her views on the current state and trends of a range of investment products, including real estate, public equities, pre-IPO opportunities, and digital currencies, along with some of her investment philosophies. ▲ Ms. Nini Wu Washington State licensed permanent makeup artist and makeup artist Coco Zhu, along with anti-aging medical aesthetics expert Aimi Jiang, also shared insights on the current state of the medical aesthetics industry as well as some anti-aging and beauty knowledge. The attending women entrepreneurs showed great interest in the topics discussed, speaking openly across a range of subjects including business management, investment and wealth planning, well-being, and children's education. Afterward, attendees toured The Emerald oceanview condominiums, developed by member company Tuohong USA Real Estate Development, and took group photos at the clubhouse. **Thanks to: THE Emerald** **for providing venue support at its downtown Seattle waterfront residences** ▲ Photos of The Emerald [The Emerald Project Details: A 5-Minute Life Circle in Downtown Seattle! Redefining the Ideal Urban Lifestyle](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA3MjU5NTEwMw==&mid=2651726406&idx=1&sn=7854dc6fc91c25cdab7ad4b52a2947f2&scene=21#wechat_redirect)
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年03月13日 15:12_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 美国时间3月10日下午，华盛顿州中国总商会在西雅图市美丽岸高端公寓顶层会所举办 “春暖翠城 美雅与共” 女企业家聚会活动, 本次座谈会由华盛顿州中国总商会会长 吕莉莉女士 和微软全球讲师及人才教练、HAS幸福研究学院认证全球讲师 邹英毅（Michelle Zou）女士 联合主持。 ▲ 图左/吕莉莉女士，图右/邹英毅女士 邹英毅讲述沙哈尔博士的幸福学及如何将幸福的方法简单易行地运用到日常生活中，并用一个非常有趣的游戏方式使大家快速破冰，引导参会的女企业家回顾创业历程及生活感悟，相互加深了解。 此次活动的赞助及主讲嘉宾是目前在摩根斯丹利就职的私人银行财富规划顾问 Nini Wu ，她是CFA特许金融分析师，有十余年中美财富管理，资产管理经验。她分享了对目前的房地产、二级市场股票、Pre- IPO、数字货币等多种投资产品的现状、趋势的看法及一些投资理念。 ▲ Nini Wu 女士 华州持牌纹绣师、化妆师 Coco Zhu 和抗衰老医学领域美容达人 Aimi Jiang 也分享了医美行业现状及一些抗衰、美容知识。 现场与会女企业家们对此次座谈会交流的相关主题表现出了非常浓厚的兴趣，大家畅所欲言，交流了企业管理、投资理财、幸福生活、子女教育等多领域话题。会后，大家参观了会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发公司开发的 美丽岸海景公寓 ，并在会所合影留念。 **鸣谢：THE Emerald（美丽岸）** ** 西雅图市中心一线海景公寓提供场地支持 ** ▲美丽岸实景拍摄图 [ 美丽岸项目详情 ：西雅图市中心 5分钟生活圈！定义理想都市新生活 ](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA3MjU5NTEwMw==&mid=2651726406&idx=1&sn=7854dc6fc91c25cdab7ad4b52a2947f2&scene=21#wechat_redirect)

items.title_en: CCCWA and AllBright Law Offices Successfully Host Spring Symposium on New Trends in China-US Investment and Trade
items.title_zh: CCCWA联合锦天城律师事务所圆满举办“中美投资与贸易新趋势新春座谈会”
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _March 1, 2024, 16:40_ Shaanxi On the afternoon of February 19, 2024, Seattle time, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA) and member firm AllBright Law Offices' Seattle office jointly hosted a Spring Symposium on New Trends in China-US Investment and Trade. This was also the first session of CCCWA's 2024 Member Salon series. AllBright Law Offices was founded in 1999 as a comprehensive law firm offering one-stop legal services, with leading strengths in its core practice areas. Originating in Shanghai, China, AllBright now has thirty offices across 24 cities including Beijing, Hangzhou, Shenzhen, and Guangzhou, as well as in Hong Kong, London, Seattle, Singapore, and Tokyo. AllBright's Seattle office was formally established on July 15, 2020, to support AllBright's broad client base in matters related to North America, marking an important step in AllBright's global strategic expansion. The symposium was co-hosted by CCCWA President Ms. Lyu Lili and AllBright Senior Partner and head of the Seattle office, Attorney Wang Qinghua. (Center: CCCWA President Ms. Lyu Lili) Seattle office head Attorney Wang Qinghua opened the keynote session with a presentation titled "New Trends and Case Studies in China-US Bilateral Direct Investment." Attorney Wang analyzed the total volume of China-US bilateral investment, the leading industry sectors involved, the geographic distribution of investment, and representative transactions, and walked guests through two direct investment case studies to break down the main features of China-US bilateral direct investment. AllBright Senior Partner and member of the Seattle office management committee, Attorney Zhu Sidong, drew on years of practical experience to share with attendees how companies with Chinese backgrounds can raise capital in the United States through IPOs. AllBright Senior Partner and member of the Seattle office management committee, Attorney Jiang Yigang, focused his remarks on introducing AllBright's overview and background, along with the Seattle office's future development plans, and expressed hope for greater exchange with local US businesses and closer ties with CCCWA going forward. The speakers shared a wealth of valuable experience, and the attending business representatives were highly engaged, showing strong interest in the topics discussed. Together they exchanged views on issues in China-US investment and on how Chinese enterprises can better leverage the US market for growth, making the symposium a great success.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年03月01日 16:40_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 美国西雅图当地时间2024年2月19日下午，华盛顿州中国总商会与会员单位锦天城律师事务所西雅图办公室联合主办中美投资与贸易新趋势新春座谈会。这也是CCCWA会员沙龙2024第一期活动。 锦天城律师事务所成立于1999年，是一家提供一站式法律服务的综合性律师事务所，在核心业务领域具备行业领先优势。发轫于中国上海的锦天城，目前在北京、杭州、深圳、广州等24个城市以及香港、伦敦、西雅图、新加坡和东京开设了三十个办公室。上海市锦天城律师事务所美国西雅图办公室于2020年7月15日注册成立，旨在为锦天城的广大客户在北美的相关业务提供支持，并在锦天城的全球性战略部署方面迈出了重要一步。 本次座谈会由 华盛顿州中国总商会会长 ** 吕莉莉 ** 女士和 锦天城高级合伙人、西雅图办公室负责人 ** 王清华 ** 律师 联合主持。 （中： 华盛顿州中国总 商会会长 ** 吕莉莉 ** 女士） 西雅图办公室负责人 ** 王清华 ** 律师 在主题演讲阶段，首先由西雅图办公室负责人 ** 王清华 ** 律师发表了题为“中美双边直接投资新趋势及案例分析”的主旨演讲。王律师通过分析中美双边投资总金额、投资主要行业类型、投资的地区分布、投资的代表性交易，并通过两个直接投资的案例等内容向现场来宾剖析了中美双边直接投资的主要情况。 锦天城高级合伙人、西雅图办公室管委会成员 ** 朱思东 ** 律师以其多年来的实践经验向现场与会者分享了中资背景的企业如何在美国通过IPO进行融资。 锦天城高级合伙人、西雅图办公室管委会成员 ** 蒋毅刚 ** 律师的发言则着重介绍了锦天城律所的概况及背景，同时介绍了西雅图办公室未来的发展规划，并表达了希望将来跟美国当地企业有更多的交流，跟华盛顿州中国总商会形成更多的联系。 演讲嘉宾精彩纷呈地分享经验，现场与会企业代表都表现得十分踊跃，并对此次座谈会交流的相关主题表现出了非常浓厚的兴趣。他们共同交流中美之间投资的问题，及对中资企业如何更好地利用美国市场进行发展等内容，本次座谈会获得圆满成功。

items.title_en: CCCWA Member Salon | Spring Festival Roundtable on New Trends in U.S.-China Investment and Trade
items.title_zh: CCCWA会员沙龙|中美投资与贸易新趋势新春座谈会
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _February 17, 2024 16:55_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ **The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA)** and member company **AllBright Law Offices' Seattle Office** jointly hosted a Spring Festival roundtable on new trends in U.S.-China investment and trade. This was also the first installment of the CCCWA Member Salon series for 2024. AllBright Law Offices was founded in 1999 and is a comprehensive law firm offering one-stop legal services, holding a leading position in its core practice areas. Originating in Shanghai, China, AllBright now has thirty offices across 24 cities including Beijing, Hangzhou, Shenzhen, and Guangzhou, as well as in Hong Kong, London, Seattle, Singapore, and Tokyo, and operates jointly with Hong Kong's Stevenson, Wong & Co., while maintaining a strategic partnership with the international law firm Bird & Bird LLP. AllBright's Seattle office was registered and established on July 15, 2020, to support its broad client base's business in North America, marking an important step in AllBright's global strategic expansion. As China continues to deepen its all-around opening to the outside world and cross-border trade grows increasingly vibrant, the scope, practice areas, and role of foreign-related legal services continue to expand. Going forward, AllBright's Seattle office will provide more convenient, high-quality, and efficient legal services and support for Chinese clients' business activities in the U.S., North America, and around the world, as well as for international clients' investment and development in China. AllBright has never stopped upgrading and iterating its legal services, continuously refining its practice-area system. The firm maintains twenty specialized, industry, and practice committees, covering areas such as securities and capital markets, banking and finance, corporate and M&A, litigation and arbitration, intellectual property, and international trade and cross-border investment. AllBright has repeatedly been recognized by China's Ministry of Justice and its affiliated judicial administrative bodies, bar associations, and internationally renowned legal media and authoritative rating agencies such as Chambers, Asia Law and Legal500, as one of China's top legal service providers, ranking among the country's top ten branded law firms. **Attorney Zhu Sidong** **Senior Partner, AllBright Law Offices** Attorney Zhu's main practice areas are corporate listings and financing, mergers and acquisitions, and private equity funds. With more than thirty years of legal experience across China and the U.S., Attorney Zhu Sidong has been especially active representing Chinese companies in overseas listings and financing, successfully representing more than a dozen Chinese companies in listings and financings on stock exchanges in the U.S., Canada, Germany, Australia, and Hong Kong. He has also represented dozens of Chinese companies in private financing projects. **Attorney Jiang Yigang** **Senior Partner, AllBright Law Offices, Shenzhen Branch** Attorney Jiang's main practice areas include litigation and non-litigation matters in banking and finance, securities and capital markets, and corporate restructuring and cross-border M&A. He has served as an independent director for a number of listed companies and has provided legal services for corporate restructuring, listings, bond issuance, acquisitions, and reorganizations. Attorney Jiang is a licensed attorney in China and a registered Foreign Legal Consultant with the Washington State Supreme Court. **Attorney Wang Qinghua** **Senior Partner, AllBright Law Offices** **Head of the Seattle Office** Attorney Wang Qinghua is licensed to practice law in both China and the U.S. (California) and is registered as a Foreign Legal Consultant with the Washington State Supreme Court. Her main practice area is corporate investment and financing, with particular expertise in domestic and cross-border acquisitions and mergers and corporate restructuring. She has extensive experience in cross-border investment legal services, having provided full-service legal support for more than thirty overseas investment projects across roughly twenty countries in Europe, North America, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa on behalf of numerous Chinese companies. She was named one of ALB China's Top 15 Female Lawyers of 2021. **Event Location** **DeLille Cellars Winery** **14300 NE 145th St** **Woodinville, WA 98072** **Event Time** **February 19, 2024, 2:00 PM-4:00 PM (Beijing time)**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2024年02月17日 16:55_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ ** 华盛顿州中国总商会 ** 与会员单位 ** 锦天城律师事务所西雅图办公室 ** 联合主办中美投资与贸易新趋势新春座谈会。这也是CCCWA会员沙龙2024第一期活动。 锦天城律师事务所成立于1999年，是一家提供一站式法律服务的综合性律师事务所，在核心业务领域具备行业领先优势。 发轫于中国上海的锦天城，目前在北京、杭州、深圳、广州等24个城市以及香港、伦敦、西雅图、新加坡和东京开设了三十个办公室，并与香港史蒂文生黄律师事务所联营，与国际律师事务所鸿鹄（Bird & Bird LLP）建立战略合作关系。 上海市锦天城律师事务所美国西雅图办公室于2020年7月15日注册成立，旨在为锦天城的广大客户在北美的相关业务提供支持，并在锦天城的全球性战略部署方面迈出了重要一步。 随着中国全方位对外开放的不断深入，跨国贸易的愈加繁荣，涉外法律服务的范围、业务领域及作用均在逐步提升。未来锦天城美国西雅图办公室将为中国客户在美国、北美乃至全球各地的商业活动，为国际客户在中国的投资、发展，提供更加便捷、优质、高效的法律服务与支持。 锦天城从未停止进行法律专业服务的升级与迭代，持续优化业务领域体系。 锦天城设有二十大专业委员会、行业委员会和业务委员会，包括证券与资本市场、银行与金融、公司与并购、诉讼与仲裁、知识产权、国际贸易和跨境投资等。 锦天城多次被中国司法部及其下属司法行政机构、律师行业协会、钱伯斯、亚洲法律杂志和Legal500等国际知名法律媒体及权威评级机构等评选为中国最顶尖的法律服务提供者之一，位居全国十大品牌律师事务所前列。 ** 朱思东律师 ** ** 锦天城律师事务所高级合伙人 ** 朱律师的主要执业领域为公司上市和融资、 公司并购以及私募基金业务。朱思东律师有逾三十年中美两地律师执业经验，尤其活跃于代理中国公司海外上市融资，曾成功代理十余家中国公司在美国、加拿大、德国、澳大利亚和香港证券交易所上市融资。此外，他也曾代理数十家中国企业的私募融资项目。 ** 蒋毅刚律师 ** ** 锦天城律师事务所深圳分所高级合伙人 ** 蒋律师的主要执业领域为银行与金融、证券与资本市场、公司重组与跨境并购等诉讼与非诉讼业务，曾任多家上市公司独立董事，为企业的改制、上市、发债、收购、重组等提供法律服务。 蒋律师系中国执业律师和华盛顿州最高法院注册外国法律顾问。 ** 王清华律师 ** ** 锦天城律师事务所高级合伙人 ** ** 西雅图办公室负责人 ** 王清华律师持有中、美（加利福尼亚州）两国律师执照，并在华盛顿州最高法院注册为外国法律顾问。主要执业领域为公司投融资，尤其擅长境内外收购和兼并、公司改制重组，其在跨境投资法律服务方面经验尤其丰富，曾为多家中国企业涉及欧洲、北美、东南亚、中东、非洲等地区的二十几个国家的三十余个海外投资项目提供全程法律服务。曾荣获2021年度ALB中国十五佳女律师称号。 ** ** **活动地点** ** DeLille Cellars酒庄 ** ** 14300 NE 145th St ** ** Woodinville, WA 98072 ** ** ** **活动时间** ** 2024年2月19日 下午2:00-4:00（北京时间） **

items.title_en: New Year's Event Preview | Safeguarding the Growth of Chinese Multinational Companies in the U.S. — A Discussion on Legal, Operational, and Tax Issues
items.title_zh: 跨年活动预告 | 为中资跨国企业在美国发展保驾护航——相关法律、运营与税务问题探讨
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _December 27, 2023 14:04_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ Shifts in the current international landscape have brought tremendous opportunities and challenges for Chinese multinational companies expanding in the United States. TikTok, the international version of Douyin, has become hugely popular across North America; fast-fashion brand Shein has filed for a U.S. IPO; and Temu, the cross-border platform of Pinduoduo, has become the most downloaded shopping app in the U.S. market — all demonstrating the strength of Chinese companies "going global." In the course of this expansion, every company inevitably faces challenges in the legal, operational, and tax arenas. To address this, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State has specially invited four experts to share and discuss intellectual property protection, human resources management, immigration risk planning, and trends in commercial transactions for multinational companies, with the aim of helping safeguard the growth of Chinese multinational companies in the United States! **Cao Xiaohe** **Founder, Law Offices of Cao Xiaohe (U.S.); Founder, International Law Society** **Topic** **Understanding immigration policy and its changes; designing personnel transfer and U.S. recruitment strategies for multinational companies** Attorney Cao Xiaohe holds a bachelor's degree in International Economic Law from the China University of Political Science and Law and a Juris Doctor from the United States, and is licensed to practice in both China and the U.S. For 18 years she has focused on U.S. immigration law, representing numerous regional centers and hundreds of investors in direct investment immigration projects, helping corporate executives and skilled professionals settle in the United States. She designs immigration plans tailored to U.S. policy for individuals with extraordinary ability and those eligible for national interest waivers, and provides comprehensive planning for companies' short- and long-term work and visitor visas. For over a decade, she has been a recurring immigration expert guest on Chinese-language radio stations in the U.S. and in Seattle, and hosts the "Ask Attorney Cao" advice column. **Zhu Shaobin** **Partner, Morgan Lewis (U.S.)** **Topic** **How to use intellectual property to strengthen market competitiveness and reduce legal risk, and how to respond to potential and existing IP litigation** Attorney Zhu Shaobin is a partner at Morgan Lewis, co-leader of the firm's China intellectual property practice, and head of its China IP team. Focused on the technology sector, he provides legal services on intellectual property litigation in U.S. district courts (including patents, trade secrets, trademarks, domain names, and copyrights) and Section 337 investigations before the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC), as well as client counseling, IP licensing, legal opinions, patent applications, data privacy, cybersecurity, open-source software strategy, and international arbitration. Attorney Zhu has helped dozens of Chinese clients successfully resolve intellectual property disputes in the United States, using countermeasures at the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office and in the courts, as well as measures taken in China, combined with strategic negotiation, to successfully reduce losses and secure favorable outcomes for Chinese clients. **Ni Xuanlu** **Head of the China Market, Americas Region, Vialto Partners** **Topic** **An overview of how Chinese companies can plan ahead to improve their odds of success when expanding overseas, and how to avoid risk** Ni Xuanlu is a partner at Vialto Partners (formerly PwC's international assignment services practice) and head of the China Market for the Americas region. Since 2002, Ms. Ni has focused on providing globally renowned multinational corporations and global giants with services in global human resources, tax planning, and overseas business expansion, accumulating nearly 20 years of hands-on experience, including advisory services for C-suite, ultra-high-net-worth individuals at global giant companies. Ms. Ni holds an undergraduate degree from Renmin University of China and an MBA from the University of Toronto. She is a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) licensed in Washington State. **Shen Han** **Attorney, Wilson Law Firm (U.S.)** **Topic** **Capital markets activity and trends in commercial transactions for multinational companies in the United States** Attorney Shen Han has experience practicing law in both China and the United States, and is a licensed attorney in Washington State, California, and China. She primarily represents companies and investment institutions in financing, mergers and acquisitions, restructuring, IPOs, patent licensing and R&D collaboration, and energy tax credit equity financing, among other types of transactions, handling an average of more than 200 transactions per year. Attorney Shen holds a Bachelor of Laws and a Master of International Law from Peking University, and a Juris Doctor and an advanced Master of Tax Law (dual degree) from the University of Washington, graduating with the highest honors for her J.D. **Event Time** January 5, 2024, 3:00 PM-7:00 PM (U.S. time) January 6, 2024, 7:00 AM-11:00 AM (China time) **Event Location** Mercer Island Event Community, 8157 SE 24th St, Mercer Island, WA 98040. Light refreshments will be provided on-site, and parking is free.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年12月27日 14:04_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 当前国际形势的变化为中资跨国企业在美国发展带来了巨大的机遇与挑战。抖音国际版TikTok在北美爆火，快时尚品牌Shein已申请美国上市，拼多多跨境平台Temu已经成为美国市场下载量最高的购物应用，都说明了中国企业“走出去”的实力。在这“走出去”的过程中，任何企业无疑都会面临法律、运营与税务方面的挑战。为此，华盛顿州中国总商会特地邀请了四位专家，就跨国企业的知识产权保护、人力资源管理、移民风险规划、商业交易趋势进行分享与探讨，希望为中资跨国企业在美国发展保驾护航！ **曹霄鹤** **美国曹霄鹤律师事务所创始人、 国际法律联盟（International Law Society ）创始人 ** ** ** **主讲内容** **掌握移民政策及变化，设计跨国企业人员调动与美国招募** ** ** 曹霄 鹤律师是中国政法大学国际经济法学士 ，美国法学博士，中美两国执业资格。 18年专注美国移民法律，代表多家区域中心和直接投资移民项目数百个投资人移民，帮助企业高管和技术人才落户美国，结合美国政策为特殊人才，国家利益豁免人才制定移民方案，为企业做长短期工作及访问签证统一规划。 美国中文电台和西雅图中文电台十几年来移民专家嘉宾，曹律师信箱专家主持。 **朱韶斌** ** 美国摩根路易斯律师事务所合伙人 ** ** ** ** 主讲内容 ** ** 如何用知识产权增强市场竞争力，降低法律风险，以及如何应对潜在和发生的知识产权诉讼 ** 朱韶斌律师是美国摩根路易斯律师事务所 (Morgan Lewis) 合伙人，中国知识产权业务的联合负责人以及中国知识产权团队的负责人，专注于科技行业，就美国地区法院的知识产权诉讼(包括专利、商业秘密、商标、域名和版权)和美国国际贸易委员会(ITC)337 条款调查、客户咨询、知识产权许可、法律意见书、专利申请、数据隐私、网络安全、开源软件策略、和国际仲裁等事宜提供法律服务。朱律师已经帮助几十位中国客户成功解决了他们在美国的知 识产权纠纷，通过在美国专利局、法院、及中国采取反制措施和实施策略性地谈 判，成功帮助中国客户降低了损失，取得了有利的结果。 ** 倪轩璐 ** **纬迩拓国际中国市场美洲区负责人** ** ** ** 主讲内容 ** **概述中企如何提前规划布局来提高出海成功率以及如何规避风险** 倪轩璐是纬迩拓（前普华永道国际派遣业务部）合伙人和国际中国市场美洲区负责人。倪女士从2002年起专注于为国际著名大型跨国公司和全球巨头企业提供全球人力资源，税务筹划和海外业务拓展方面的相关服务。积累了近20年的丰富实战经验（包括为全球巨头企业的总裁级超高净值人士提供相关咨询服务）。倪女士拥有中国人民大学本科学位和多伦多大学工商管理硕士学位。她是美国华盛顿州注册会计师（CPA）。 **沈 寒** **美国威尔逊律师事务所律师** ** 主讲内容 ** **跨国企业在美国的资本市场活动和商业交易趋势交流** ** ** 沈寒律师具有在中美两国执业的经验，是美国华盛顿州与加州以及中国注册律师。 沈寒律师主要代表企业和投资机构参与融资、并购、重组、上市、专利许可与研发合作、能源税惠权益筹资等各类交易，平均每年参与200多起交易。 沈寒律师为北京大学法学学士、国际法学硕士，美国华盛顿大学法学博士、税法进阶硕士 (双学位)，并获得美国法学博士学位最高毕业荣誉。 ** 活动时间 ** 2024年1月5日15:00-19:00（美国时间） 2024年1月6日 7:00 -11:00（中国时间） ** 活动地点 ** Mercer Island event community 8157 Se 24th St Mercer Island,WA 98040，活动现场提供简餐，停车免费 ** **

items.title_en: Event Preview | Home Title and Estate Planning Seminar
items.title_zh: 活动预告|房屋产权和遗产规划研讨会
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _November 21, 2023 17:00_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeOT6cTTfibwqkegVOqjH1Q6giaLRokbypTW3XMtoI59icZKHRLicMt8u8Bo7CwPffRWt4icym9JCNyjwDw/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg)** **Speaker: Attorney Cai Qing** **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeM4ibgdDYXDLpum7RWjzVtYNqaDhYS7K2JbToOt53x0ic9pfLVWvWZzUp5trwZBPpibRxPfZSNAW7oPw/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg)** **Speaker: Bella Li, Tax Attorney** **Clark, Raymond & Company, CPAs** The **Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA)**, together with **East West Bank**, presents a **Home Title and Estate Planning Seminar**, and we cordially invite you to attend and learn the key points of handling home title in estate planning. The seminar will be conducted in Chinese with English translation provided on site. Refreshments will be served. Seating is limited, so please register early. **Cai & Cai Law Firm** **What Will Be Shared** For many Chinese families, their home may be the most valuable asset they own and a major component of family wealth. Over the past decade or more, as the Seattle area has become one of the top choices for Chinese people to live, study, work, travel, do business, and invest in the United States, the number of homes purchased by Chinese people in the Seattle area for owner-occupancy and investment has surged, and families owning several properties are commonplace. Yet when buying a home, little thought is often given to questions such as who should be the title holder, how title is held, how to change the title holder, how marriage and divorce affect title, how the manner of holding title relates to capital gains tax and gift tax when a home is sold or gifted, and how to transfer property to heirs after death while avoiding probate. Attorney Cai Qing will use real examples to share how home title relates to family wealth holding, tax savings, and succession planning, and its major implications. **What Will Be Shared** An introduction to federal and Washington State gift and estate tax filing. **Event Time** **U.S. time:** **Tuesday, December 5, 2023, 18:30–20:00** **Beijing time:** **Wednesday, December 6, 2023, 10:30–12:00** **In-Person Location** **Bellevue City Hall, 450 110th Ave NE, Bellevue, WA 98004** **In-Person Registration** **Registration deadline: 2023.12.4** **Registration email: Steven.Xu@eastwestbank.com** **Online Participation [Zoom Meeting]** **1. Copy the link below and open it in your browser** https://us06web.zoom.us/j/83053894396?pwd=H1bu3aeooH2bh7RglUdkdlLg49Bc5G.1 **2. Or enter the meeting ID directly in Zoom** **Meeting ID**: 830 5389 4396
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年11月21日 17:00_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 由 **CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会** 携手 **华美银行** 为大家带来 **房屋产权和遗产规划研讨会** ，诚邀您参加此研讨会。了解遗产规划中处理房屋产权的要诀。研讨会将以中文进行，现场提供英文翻译。活动将提供茶点。座位有限，请尽早报名。 ** **蔡和蔡律师事务所** ** ** **分享内容** ** ** 对于华人而言，房子可能是他们拥有的最宝贵的资产，是家庭财富主要构成部分。在过去十多年里，因西雅图地区成为华人在美国居住、留学、工作、旅游、经商和投资首选城市之一，华人在西雅图地区购房自住及用于投资数量激增。拥有数套房产的家庭比比皆是。但在购房时，对由谁作为产权人，以何种方式持有产权，如何变更产权人，结婚和离婚对产权影响，产权持有方式对房屋出售、赠予时有关资本利得税、赠予税关系，过世后如何把房产转移给继承人并避免遗嘱认证程序等等问题考虑较少。蔡清律师将结合实例分享房屋产权与家庭财富持有、省税和传承规划的关系及重大影响。 ****** ** ** **分享内容** 联邦和华州赠与税和遗产税申报介绍 ** ** ** 活动时间 ** **美国时间：** ** **2023年12月5日（星期二）** **18:30-20:00** ** ****北京时间：** ** **2023年12月6日（星期三）10:30-12:00** **线下活动地址** **Bellevue City Hall 450 110th Ave NE Bellevue，WA 98004** **线下活动报名方式** ****报名截止日期：2023.12.4** ** ****报名邮箱：Steven.Xu@eastwestbank.com** ** **线上参与方式【 **Zoom Meeting** 】 ** **1、复制下方链接在浏览器打开** https://us06web.zoom.us/j/83053894396?pwd=H1bu3aeooH2bh7RglUdkdlLg49Bc5G.1 **2、直接在zoom输入会议号** **Meeting ID** : 830 5389 4396

items.title_en: Event Recap | Online Seminar on the Latest Insights and Outlook for U.S. and Global Financial and Real Estate Markets
items.title_zh: 活动回顾|美国及全球金融和房地产市场最新解读与展望线上讲座
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _November 14, 2023 14:10_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ The online seminar co-hosted by **CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) together with East West Bank** on **"Latest Insights and Outlook on U.S. and Global Financial and Real Estate Markets"** was successfully held on November 10 U.S. time (November 11 China time) and concluded successfully. The event featured a compelling live presentation by speaker **Dr. Jason Hsu**, Chief Economist at East West Bank, covering the current U.S. financial market, government interest rate hikes, inflation, and the future direction of the real estate market. **Highlights** **Overview of the U.S. Macroeconomy** **1. How long will U.S. rate hikes continue?** U.S. interest rates will likely remain elevated for a relatively long time. Although the inflation rate has fallen from 9% to 4%, 3 percentage points of that earlier 9% figure were caused by the Russia-Ukraine war, driving up inflation through energy and food prices, while another 3 percentage points were caused by the inability of many factories in China to operate at full capacity near the end of last year. So the decline in U.S. inflation is not actually the result of rate hikes — given enough time, inflation naturally comes down on its own. The U.S. is currently facing a structural labor force decline: unemployment is at a historic low, and wages are rising sharply. Under the impact of the pandemic, many Americans around age 60 chose to retire outright after working from home for three years, while more young people are choosing gig work and are unwilling to return to traditional employment models. No major rate cuts are expected in 2024; it may not be until 2025, after a new president takes office, that this changes — if Trump has a strong chance of winning a non-consecutive second term, he would likely push rates down sharply, bringing on a bull market in stocks and real estate. **2. How long will high interest rates last, and what effect will they have on real estate and the stock market?** For now, don't be blindly optimistic about 2024, and don't chase rallies — the stock market may still be in the process of bottoming out. High interest rates of around 5%-5.5% may persist for another year or more, and long-term bonds are also a reasonable option; there's no need to bet on rate cuts, which carries considerable risk. In the long run, the incoming president will inevitably lower interest rates — the U.S. government's annual fiscal revenue may already struggle just to cover interest payments, and a new president won't want to be left without room to spend. As rates fall, a bull market in stocks and real estate will surely follow. But in the short term, there won't be dramatic swings, so expectations for rate cuts shouldn't be too high. **The Future of China's Economy** Many economists currently worry that China's economy is heading toward "Japanification" — Japan's real estate bubble led to three decades of economic stagnation there — and while high housing prices in China are indeed a social tension, they have not risen to the level of a broader socioeconomic crisis; the "Japanification" narrative is itself something of a conspiracy theory. The government has been actively deleveraging. Ordinary Chinese homebuyers themselves carry relatively low leverage — leverage is concentrated mainly among developers. Early on, the government issued the "three red lines" policy, shifting many non-compliant, overleveraged real estate developers' assets toward companies with lower leverage, reducing uncontrollable risk and the risk of a real estate blowup. Chinese people like to store their savings in real estate, Americans like to store theirs in stocks, and Indians like to store theirs in gold; if the Chinese government can steer people away from putting their money into real estate and instead into the primary and secondary capital markets, that would be more beneficial for China's long-term development. China currently has a low inflation environment, and while local government finances aren't in great shape, central government revenue is relatively strong, so it can boost the economy by printing money without triggering inflation. Internationally, China's main goal is to issue more debt and increase the renminbi's international influence, working toward internationalizing the RMB so that it becomes a "second dollar" globally. If China succeeds in issuing debt, it will also boost the A-share market and the broader economy. **Live Q&A** **Q: What about buying U.S. real estate at the bottom of the market?** Hsu: U.S. single-family homes have not really been affected by this round of rate hikes, and there's no pressure to sell, so buying in at a low price isn't really realistic right now — but there's also no need to worry about a repeat of the sharp price crash seen in 2007-2008. **Q: What impact does the Israel-Hamas war have on the global economy?** Hsu: The most obvious effect of the Israel-Hamas war is that it will keep inflationary pressure going — if the conflict were to draw in the broader Middle East and Central Europe, the impact on energy would be significant. On the negative side, it will prolong U.S. inflation; on the positive side, it may help ease U.S.-China relations. **Q: Is now a good time to invest in AI?** Hsu: Market expectations for AI currently outweigh its actual real-world application, and it won't fundamentally change daily life in the short term. Much like the internet, breakthroughs tend to come in the second or third wave. AI is absolutely a trend for the next 10 to 20 years, but in the short term the risk is too high, and the industry still has some way to go before it truly matures. **Q: Given the current global environment, how should one think about medium- to long-term asset allocation? What's the right ratio between developed and emerging markets?** Hsu: Broadly speaking, developed and emerging markets tend to take turns leading — over the past decade, developed markets have dominated and delivered higher returns, but over the next decade, there's a good chance the advantage shifts back to emerging markets. That's because price-to-earnings (P/E) ratios are relatively low by historical standards, and emerging-market growth rates are being underestimated, while developed-market P/E ratios are relatively high; based on typical market cycles, emerging markets have greater upside potential. In addition, over the past five years, amid the tug-of-war between China and the U.S., many resource-rich small and mid-sized countries have developed rapidly, pushing up commodity prices. **Q: What's the outlook for U.S. real estate going forward?** Hsu: 2024 is likely to be mostly range-bound; it may take until a new president takes office in 2025 with new policies before a fresh real estate bull market can emerge. For now, buyers should mainly focus on school-district homes and their own actual needs. **Q: Outlook for the stock market in 2024-2025** Hsu: 2024 will most likely be range-bound, so a fairly conservative approach to buying is advisable, and no major sustained rally is expected. The content and views expressed in this article are personal opinions, intended for readers' reference only and do not constitute investment advice.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年11月14日 14:10_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 由 **CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会携手华美银行** 于美国时间11月10日（中国11月11日）举办的 **美国及全球金融和房地产市场最新解读与展望线上讲座活动** 圆满结束。本次活动由主讲人 华美银行首席经济学家 ** 许仲翔博士 ** 带来了目前美国金融市场、政府加息、通货膨胀以及未来房地产走势等的精彩现场演讲。 **重点内容分享** **美国宏观经济的情况** ** ** **1、美国升息会升多久** 美国高利息水平会维持相对的久，虽然通货膨胀率从9%降至4%，但是之前9%的通货膨胀率里面的3%是俄乌战争造成的，从能源，粮食方面引发的通货膨胀，另外3%的原因是去年尾端，中国很多工厂不能全产能出货，导致的通货膨胀 。 所以美国通货膨胀率的下降，并不是升息带来的影响，时间拉的够长，通货膨胀率会自然而然下降。 美国目前面临的是结构性劳动力衰退，失业率历史新低，工资薪酬高涨，疫情影响下，很多60岁左右的美国人，在居家工作3年之后直接选择退休，而年轻人更多选择打零工，不愿意重新返回传统的工作模式。 2024年预计不会有大幅降息的情况，可能要到2025年新任总统履职或者上任之后，川普有很大几率跳届之后再次当选，会大幅压低利率，带来股市和房地产的牛市行情。 **2、高利率水平会维持多久，对房地产，对股市的影响** 目前来看， 不要对于2024年盲目乐观，不要盲目追高，股市仍旧有筑底的可能性。可能维持高利率还要1年多，5%-5.5%的利率，长债收入也是个不错的选择，不需要去赌降息，风险较大。 长期来看，新上任的总统必然会降低利率，如今美国每年的财政收入光偿还利息可能都会存在问题，新上任总统不会让自己没有钱花，利率下降，股市和房市肯定会带来一波牛市。但是短期来看，不会出现剧烈波动，大家对于降息不用期望过高。 **中国经济未来发展** 现在有很多经济学家担心中国经济走向日本化，日本房地产泡沫化带来日本30年的经济衰退，中国房地产的贵是个社会矛盾问题，并没有上升到社会经济问题，日本化的经济走向也是一种阴谋论。 政府一直非常积极的在去杠杆化，中国人本身购买房产的杠杆是很低的，杠杆主要集中在开发商，第一和第二时间政府发布三条红线把很多不合规，杠杆过高的房地产商转移给杠杆低的公司，降低不可控风险，降低房地产引爆的风险。 中国人喜欢存钱在房地产，美国人喜欢存钱在股票，印度人喜欢存钱在黄金，中国政府如果能够让大家不把钱存在房地产，而是把钱投到一级市场和二级市场，那么对中国长期发展是更有效的。 中国目前处于通胀水平低情况，虽然说地方财政不是特别好，但是中国中央财政收入较好，可以通过印钞票放水促进经济，而不会引起通膨的情况。 中国在国际上主要还是想发债，提高人民币在国际上的影响力，使人民币国际化，成为国际“ 第二美元 ”。中国发债成功，也将会促进A股股市和经济。 **线上问答** **Q：关于美国房产市场抄底？** 许：美国Single Family并没有受到这次升息的影响，也没有售出压力，如果想要低价买入还是不太容易实现的，也不需要担心类似于07,08年房价大跌的情况出现。 ** Q：巴以战争对于世界经济有什么影响？ ** 许：巴以战争带来最明显的影响是，它会让通货膨胀的压力持续，如果中东把整个中欧拉进来，对于能源的影响是显著的。从负面来讲，会延续美国的通货膨胀，从正面来讲，会缓和中美之间的关系。 ** Q：现在是一个很好的时间买AI吗？ ** 许： AI市场预期的比重大于实际应用的比重，短期内并不会对生活有本质性改变，类似于Internet，往往崛起都是在第二波，第三波，AI绝对是未来10年，20年的趋势，但是短期来看风险性太高，距离产业真正成熟还有一定时间。 ** Q：在现在的全球环境下，如何思考资产中长期配置？发达市场和新兴市场的配置比例？ ** 许：如果看大方向，发达市场和新兴市场是风水轮流转，在过去10年里面，发达市场占据主流，获利较高，后面10年，回到新兴市场的概率较高。 原因是市盈率（P/E）相对历史低点，低估了新兴市场的成长率，发达市场市盈率较高，根据市场的周期性来说新兴市场的潜力更大。 再者，在过去5年，中国和美国角力的过程中，很多拥有资源的中小国家发展很快，原物料的价格也哄抬上来。 ** Q：美国未来房地产趋势 ** 许：2024年预计是振荡为主，还是需要等2025年新总统上台之后的新政策，才可能会有新一波房地产牛市，大家现在可以主要以学区房和自身需求为主。 ** Q：2024-2025年股票走势分析 ** 许：2024年大概率是振荡，以比较保守的态度购买，预计不会有长期上涨的题材。 文章内容与看法为个人行为，仅作读者参考不作为任何投资建议。

items.title_en: Event Preview: Latest Insights and Outlook on U.S. and Global Financial and Real Estate Markets
items.title_zh: 活动预告：美国及全球金融和房地产市场最新解读与展望
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _October 31, 2023 17:40_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ **CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State), together with East West Bank, brings you** **the Latest Insights and Outlook on U.S. and Global Financial and Real Estate Markets** — everyone is welcome to attend! Seminar Overview * Federal Reserve policy and inflation * CPI and PCE * 2024 global market summary and outlook * U.S. and global real estate markets (residential and commercial) * Analysis of the consumer confidence index * Inflation forecast Speaker Introduction **Xu Zhongxiang** **Jason Hsu** **Chief Economist, East West Bank** Founder and Chief Investment Officer, Rayliant Global Advisors Professor of Finance, UCLA Anderson School of Management Dr. Jason Hsu (Xu Zhongxiang) is Chief Economist at East West Bank and the founder and Chief Investment Officer of Rayliant Global Advisors, as well as a co-founder of Research Affiliates (RA), a well-known U.S. quantitative investment firm. Dr. Hsu is a globally recognized figure in quantitative investment management, the inventor of the RAFI Fundamental Index, and a pioneer of Smart Beta investment strategies. As of the end of 2022, global assets managed using investment strategies he developed exceeded $140 billion. Dr. Hsu earned dual bachelor's degrees in Applied Physics and Economics with the highest distinction from Caltech, a master's degree in Financial Economics from Stanford University, and a PhD in Finance from UCLA. He is a Professor of Finance at the UCLA Anderson School of Management and a visiting professor at Tsinghua University and Kyoto University. **Zhou Meiling** **Meiling Elsner** **Senior Vice President, East West Bank** **Regional Manager, Private Banking and Wealth Management, Washington State** Meiling Elsner moved to the United States from Singapore in 2004. She has more than 20 years of experience in banking, having worked at Citibank, Maybank, Bank of America, and HSBC. Meiling holds a bachelor's degree in Electronic, Computer, and Communications Engineering as well as a bachelor's degree in Business Administration and Marketing. She also holds a Global Innovation MBA and was named to the 40 Under 40 list in 2018. Seminar Information **Seminar Time** **Seattle time:** Friday, November 10, 2023, 7:00 PM-8:00 PM **Beijing time:** Saturday, November 11, 2023, 11:00 AM-12:00 PM **Format** **Online via Tencent Meeting** **Meeting Link** Scan the QR code to join the meeting or log in with the Tencent Meeting ID: **726385991**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年10月31日 17:40_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ ** 由CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会携手华美银行为大家带来 ** **美国及全球金融和房地产市场最新解读与展望** ，欢迎大家参加！ 讲座概要 * 美联储政策与通货膨胀 * CPI 和 PCE * 2024 年全球市场摘要展望 * 美国和全球房地产市场（住宅与商业） * 消费者信心指数分析 * 通货膨胀预测 主讲人介绍 ** 许仲翔 ** ** Jason Hsu ** ** 华美银行首席经济学家 ** 锐联财智创办人暨首席投资官 加州大学洛杉矶分校商学院金融学教授 许仲翔(Jason Hsu) 博士是华美银行的首席经济学家, 也是锐联财智的创办人暨首席投资官，美国知名量化投资公司Research Affiliates (RA)共同创办人。许博士是全球金融界知名量化投资管理人，RAFI基本面指数的发明人，智能贝塔 (Smart Beta) 投资策略的开拓者, 截止2022年底使用他所开发投资策略管理的全球资产已经超过1400亿美金。许博士以最杰出的成绩获得美国加州理工学院应用物理与经济双学士，斯坦福大学财务经济硕士和加州大学洛杉矶分校（UCLA）金融博 士。 美国加州大学洛杉矶分校商学院任金融学教授，也是清华大学和京都大学的客座教授。 ** 周美玲 ** ** Meiling Elsner ** ** ** 华美银行高级副总裁 华盛顿州私人银行和财富管理区行长 周美玲 (Meiling Elsner)于 2004 年从新加坡移居美国。她拥有超过20年的银行业经验，曾在花旗银行、马来亚银行、美国银行、汇丰银行工作。周美玲拥有电子、计算机和通信工程学士学位以及工商管理和营销学士学位。此外，全球创新 MBA 学位, 也在2018 年获得了荣获 40 under 40奖。 讲座信息 ** 讲座时间 ** ** 西雅图时间 ** 2023年11月10日( 星期五) 19:00-20:00 **北京时间** 2023年11月11日( 星期六 ) 11:00-12:00 ** 讲座方式 ** ** 腾讯线上会议 ** ** 会议链接 ** 扫描二维码加入会议或登录腾讯会议号： **726385991**

items.title_en: Event Preview: Seminar on the Best Options for International Students to Stay in the U.S.!
items.title_zh: 活动预告：国际留学生最佳留美方案讲座！
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _August 27, 2023 10:31_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ Time flies, and graduation season is coming to an end — have you already planned ahead for staying in the U.S.? **This seminar, co-hosted by CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) and the Law Offices of Cao Xiaohe,** will be held on **September 1 U.S. time (September 2 Beijing time)** and is titled **the Seminar on the Best Options for International Students to Stay in the U.S.** It aims to provide help and support to international students who wish to remain in the United States, analyzing various pathways from different angles to help them choose the option best suited to them. **Preview of Seminar Content:** **NIW (National Interest Waiver Immigration)** The NIW National Interest Waiver, also known as immigration for advanced technical talent, requires applicants to meet EB-2 eligibility (professionals with advanced degrees or professionals with exceptional ability) and to meet the NIW (National Interest Waiver) standard, allowing them to file an immigration petition directly with USCIS. The approval process is simple and can typically be completed within a few months, requiring no U.S. employer sponsorship — applicants may file on their own. **EB-5 (New Legislation, No Backlog, Concurrent Filing)** Under the latest EB-5 legislation signed by President Biden in March 2022, 3,200 backlog-exempt visas are reserved for three categories of "reserved visa" projects. Applicants can file the I-526 petition and the I-485 adjustment of status application concurrently while in the United States. International students can apply directly for a reserved-category EB-5 visa, and once they receive their EAD work card, they can begin working — without needing to enter the H-1B lottery — resolving the difficulty international students face of trying to stay in the U.S. through the competitive H-1B lottery and long wait times. **IER (International Entrepreneur Rule)** The IER allows foreign entrepreneurs to turn their business ideas into more job opportunities. Entrepreneurs first receive a 30-month period of stay and are entitled to work for the company they founded. Each startup can have 1-3 international students/entrepreneurs obtain immigration status through it. Requirements for the number of jobs created and the amount of investment are relatively modest. **Startup (Entrepreneurship Under OPT Status)** F-1 international students can start their own business during their OPT period, provided they can demonstrate that they hold a business license and are engaged in a business related to their degree program while complying with immigration law. There are many specific procedures and considerations involved, and consulting a professional attorney is recommended. **There are also other options, such as the O-1 visa, among others.** About the Law Offices of Cao Xiaohe The Law Offices of Cao Xiaohe is an experienced immigration and business law firm. Its main areas of practice include: [Immigration] investment-based immigration, extraordinary ability immigration, national interest waivers, immigration for tech professionals, family-based immigration, various work visas, appeals and litigation; [Business Law] ongoing legal counsel, e-commerce consulting, company formation, share transfers, and real estate transactions and title transfers; [Litigation] enforcement of Chinese judgments in the United States. The firm has also partnered with Seattle Business Center to offer remote video notarization services (domestic and international), triple authentication, and remote office services. **Seminar Time** **Seattle time: September 1, 5:30 PM - 7:00 PM** **China time: September 2, 8:30 AM - 10:00 AM** **Attend Online** Copy the link below and open it in your browser (if you already have the Zoom app, you may join directly by entering the meeting ID and passcode): **https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85277056882pwd=M2ZDRWpTckg3OWt3dXFkQ21xTWNuQT09** **Zoom Meeting ID: 852 7705 6882** **Zoom Passcode: 885175** **Attend In Person** Space for in-person attendance is limited. If you would like to attend, please call: **Event phone: 425-455-9898** **Event address: 10800 NE 8th Street Suite 918 (U.S. Bank Building), Bellevue, WA 98004**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年08月27日 10:31_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 时光飞逝，毕业季即将结束，是否已经提前做好留美规划。 **此次由CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会、曹霄鹤律师事务所** 于 **美国时间9月1日（北京时间9月2日）** 联合举办 **国际留学生最佳留美方案讲座** 。旨在为有意向留在美国的留学生提供帮助和支持，从不同角度分析一些留美方式，帮助选择更适合的留美方案。 **活动内容预告：** ** NIW(国家利益豁免移民) ** NIW国家利益豁免移民也称高级技术人才移民，申请人须符合EB-2（具有高等学位的专业人士/特殊能力专业人士）资格，并达到NIW（国家利益豁免）标准，可对移民局直接提出移民申请。 审批流程简洁，通常数月即可获批，且不需要美国雇主担保，可自行申请。 ** EB-5（新法案、无排期、双递交） ** 2022年3月拜登总统签署的最新EB-5法案中，为三类“签证预留项目”预留3200个免排期名额。可以在美国境内同时递交I-526申请和I-485转换身份申请。国际留学生可直接申请预留项目的EB-5，在拿到 EAD工卡后即可工作， 无需H1B抽签，解决了留学生想通过H1B留美抽签难、等待排期长的问题。 ** ** ** IER(国际企业家特许项目) ** IEP允许外籍创业者将商业理念创造更多的就业机会。创业者首次将获得30个月的居留期限，并有权为自己创业的公司工作。 每个初创企业可以有1-3个国际留学生/企业家获得移民身份。对于创造的就业机会数量和投资金额要求不高。 ** ** ** Startup(OPT身份创业) ** F-1留学生在OPT期间可自行创业，在能够证明自己拥有营业执照并从事与学生学位课程相关的业务和遵守移民法的情况下参与企业的创立经营。具体操作和注意事项较多，需咨询专业律师。 ** 还有其他选择 ** ** ，例如O1等等。 ** 曹霄鹤律师事务所简介 曹霄鹤律师事务所是一家经验丰富的移民商务律师事务所。主要专业领域包括：【移民】投资移民，杰出人才移民，国家利益豁免，科技职业移民，亲属移民，各类工作签证，上诉及诉讼；【商务法律】常年法律顾问，电商咨询，公司成立，股份转让，房产交易过户；【诉讼】中国判决的美国执行。 同时联手《西雅图商务中心》，提供：海内外远程视频公证服务，三级认证，远程办公室服务。 ****讲座时间** ** ** ** **美国西雅图时间 9月1日 5：30 pm - 7:00 pm** **中国时间 9月2日 8：30 am - 10：00 am** **线上参与** **复制链接在浏览器打开（如有zoom会议可直接通过App输入会议ID和密码进入）：** **https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85277056882pwd=M2ZDRWpTckg3OWt3dXFkQ21xTWNuQT09** **zoom会议ID：852 7705 6882** ******zoom** ** 会议密码：885175 ** **线下参与** **线下名额有限：如有意向参加，请电话联系** ****活动电话: 425-455-9898** ** **活动地址：10800 NE 8th Street Suite 918 (U.S. Bank Building), Bellevue, WA 98004**

items.title_en: Event Preview | Practical Seminar on Handling U.S.–China Cross-Border Wealth
items.title_zh: 活动预告 | 美国跨境财富处理实务分享会
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _August 5, 2023 15:20_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ **When a commercial enterprise operates across borders and a cross-border dispute arises, what should you do? How can you effectively prevent and control U.S.–China legal risk?** **How can cross-border assets be passed on smoothly?** **How must a cross-border will be written so that it can be executed?** **How is a cross-border trust established?** **As China's high-net-worth community starts businesses, buys property, and settles in Washington State, the handling of their cross-border assets in both China and the United States has drawn great attention.** **This Practical Seminar on Handling Cross-Border Wealth is jointly hosted by CCCWA (the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State), the Seattle law firm Cai & Cai, and Xinju Real Estate (USA) Development Company.** We have specially invited visiting attorneys Sun Changgang and Meng Qingguo, senior partners at Beijing Weiheng Law Firm, along with Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, to share their practical experience helping clients handle cross-border wills, cross-border inheritance, and cross-border trusts, as well as legal issues such as cross-border disputes of commercial enterprises. The event will use numerous case studies to give clear, accessible answers to the cross-border asset-handling questions everyone cares about. **About Speaker Attorney Sun Changgang:** * Chief Attorney, Chengxin Global Family Office * Senior Partner, Beijing Weiheng Law Firm * Head of the Los Angeles Center of the China Will Registration Center * Deputy Director, Marriage and Family Law Committee, Beijing Lawyers Association * One of Beijing's Top Ten Marriage and Family Lawyers * Director, China Business Law Society * Standing Director, China Society of Private International Law * Selected in 2019 for the Ministry of Justice's Thousand Foreign-Related Lawyers program. Attorney Sun Changgang has practiced for over twenty years and has rich theoretical and practical experience in cross-border asset handling. He has published numerous academic and professional papers, which have been included in marriage and family law works such as "Lawyer Participation and Litigation Justice." Attorney Sun was invited to help discuss and draft the "Guidelines for Lawyers Handling Marriage and Family Matters," the "Guidelines for Lawyers Handling Inheritance Law Matters," and the "Lawyer's Recommended Draft of Marriage Law Interpretation (III)," and took part in compiling "Marriage, Family and Inheritance Lawyer Practice," a textbook for the juris master's degree (lawyer track) at Renmin University of China Law School. Attorney Sun has advised on and represented nearly a thousand domestic and foreign-related marriage, family, and wealth-succession disputes. **Attorney Sun's presentation will cover:** **I. Practice of Inheritance Litigation, Non-Litigation Inheritance, and Wills** 1. Practice of domestic inheritance litigation (introducing 2 typical inheritance cases) 2. Practice of U.S.-related will-inheritance litigation 3. Lawyer's practice in foreign-related notarized inheritance (U.S. real estate inheritance case) 4. Current state of cross-border will practice 5. Legal risks of wills and their expansion **II. Current State and Legal Issues of Family Trust Practice** 1. Current state of domestic family trust practice 2. "Successful" cases, current state, and risks of cross-border trusts 3. Private international law issues in cross-border trust establishment cases 4. Private international law issues in trust dispute cases 5. Approaches and solutions **About Attorney Meng Qingguo** * A practicing attorney in China, California, and New York * Holds master's degrees in law from China, the United States, and the United Kingdom * Former arbitrator at the China International Economic and Trade Arbitration Commission * Selected for the "Leading Foreign-Related Lawyers Pool" established by the All China Lawyers Association Attorney Meng has over 20 years of full-time practice experience in China and the U.S., and is especially skilled at handling major cross-border disputes, including cross-border divorce and cross-border inheritance disputes. **Attorney Meng Qingguo's topic** From the perspective of cross-border dispute resolution, how to effectively prevent and control U.S.–China commercial legal risk. **About Attorney Cai Qing** Attorney Cai Qing has been a practicing attorney in Washington State since 1991. From 1994 to 2014, she primarily provided legal services for multinational companies' investment and trade activities in China. Since 2015, she has mainly provided legal services to Chinese clients for their investments, corporate business, commercial real estate, and commercial contracts in Washington State. As Chinese clients' demand for family wealth protection and succession has grown rapidly, Attorney Cai Qing—drawing on her many years of rich experience handling U.S.–China cross-border legal matters for both companies and individuals—provides estate planning legal services, including advising on legal structures for family wealth succession, drafting various types of trust documents, and preparing wills and accompanying documents. In addition, she advises clients on gifts of real estate among family members, division, and transfer of title into trusts, drafts title-change legal documents, and handles the recording of transfers. Attorney Cai also advises clients on U.S. and Washington State individual wealth-transfer taxes. **Attorney Cai Qing's topic** Legal and tax issues when transferring or inheriting wealth by adding or removing title holders on Washington State real estate. **Seminar Time** **Friday, August 18, 2023, 3:30–5:30 pm (Seattle time)** **Saturday, August 19, 2023, 6:30–8:30 am (Beijing time)** **Seminar Location** **355 118th Ave SE, Suite 200, Bellevue, WA 98005** **Registration** **In person: U.S. contact phone: +1 425-753-5188** **Online: enter meeting ID 720192644 on Tencent Meeting, or scan the QR code below to register** **CCCWA Official WeChat Public Account**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年08月05日 15:20_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ ** 商业企业跨国经营，发生跨国争议时怎么办？如何有效防控中美法律风险？ ** ** 跨境财产如何顺利传承？ ** ** 跨境遗嘱如何书写才能执行？ ** ** 跨境信托如何设立？ ** ** 随着中国高净值群体在华盛顿州创业、置业、定居，他们在中国境内和美国境内的跨境财产处理问题受到到极大关注。 ** ** 此次由 CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会、西雅图蔡和蔡律师事务所及新居地产（美国）开发公司联合举办跨境财富处理实务分享会 ** ，特此邀请来访的北京市炜衡律师事务所高级合伙人孙长刚律师和孟庆国律师以及蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师来分享他们帮助客户处理跨境资产中涉及的跨境遗嘱、跨境继承和跨境信托的实务经验以及商业企业的跨境纠纷等法律问题。 活动将通过大量案例对大家关注的跨境财产处理问题进行深入浅出的解答。 **主讲人孙长刚律师简介：** * 承信全球家族办公室首席律师 * 北京市炜衡律师事务所高级合伙人 * 中华遗嘱库洛杉矶中心负责人 * 北京市律师协会婚姻与家庭法律专业委员会副主任 * 北京市十佳婚姻家庭法律师 * 中国商业法学会理事 * 中国国际私法学会常务理事 * 2019年入选司法部千人涉外律师‍ 孙长刚律师执业已满二十年，对跨境资产处理具有丰富的理论和实务经验。他曾发表多篇学术、业务研讨论文，被收录到《律师参与与诉讼正义》等婚姻家庭法律著作中。孙长刚律师曾应邀参与研讨、起草《律师办理婚姻家庭业务操作指引》、《律师办理继承法业务操作指引》、《婚姻法解释（三）律师建议稿》，参与中国人民大学律师学院法律硕士律师方向教材《婚姻家庭与继承律师实务》编写。孙长刚律师咨询、代理国内、涉外婚姻家庭、财富传承纠纷近千起。 ** 孙律师分享内容包括： ** ** 一、继承诉讼、非诉继承与遗嘱 实务 ** 1、国内继承诉讼实务（介绍2个典型继承案例） 2、涉美国遗嘱继承诉讼实务 3、律师办理涉外公证继承实务 （涉美房产继承案） 4、跨境遗嘱业务现状 5、遗嘱法律风险与拓展 ** 二、家族信托实务现状和法律问题 ** 1、国内家族信托实务现状 2、跨境信托的“成功”案例、现状与风险 3、跨境信托设立案例中的国际私法问题 4、信托纠纷案例中的国际私法问题 5、应对与解决思路 **孟庆国律师简介** * 中国、美国加州和纽约州的执业律师， * 拥有中国、美国和英国3司法学硕士学位。 * 中国国际经济贸易仲裁委员会前仲裁员， * 并入选中华全国律师协会组建的“涉外律师领军人库” 拥有超过 20 年的中美专职律师执业经验，尤其擅长处理重大跨国纠纷，包括跨国离婚纠纷和跨国继承纠纷等。‍ **孟庆国律师发言主题** 以跨国争议解决为视角，看如何有效防控中美商业法律风险。 **蔡清律师简介** ** ** 蔡清律师自1991年起成为华盛顿州执业律师。在1994年至2014年期间，主要为跨国公司在中国的投资及商贸活动提供法律服务。自2015年起，则主要为华人客户在华盛顿州的投资、公司业务、商业地产、商业合同提供法律服务。随着华人客户对家庭财富保护及传承需求迅速增长，蔡清律师结合其多年处理公司和个人涉及中美跨境法律事务积累的丰富经验，为客户提供遗产规划法律方面的服务，包括向客户提供家庭财富传承法律架构咨询、起草各种类型的信托文件、制作遗嘱及配套文件。另外、蔡清律师为客户家庭成员间房产赠与、分割、产权转移至信托提供咨询、起草产权变更法律文件及办理过户登记。蔡清律师还为客户提供 美国及华盛顿州有关个人财富转移税的咨询。 ** ** **蔡清律师发言主题** 通过在华盛顿州不动产房产权人增加或去除持有人来转移财富或继承财富时的法律和税务问题。 ** 讲座时间 ** ** 2023年8月18日（星期五）下午3:30-5:30（西雅图时间） ** ** 2023年8月19日（星期六）上午6:30-8:30（北京时间） ** ** 讲座地点 ** ** 355 118th Ave SE, Suite 200, Bellevue, WA 98005 ** ** 报名方式 ** ** 线下参与方式：美国联系电话：+1 425-753-5188 ** ** 线上参与方式：腾讯会议输入会议编号720192644或扫描下方二维码报名参加 ** ** ** **CCCWA官方微信公众号** **

items.title_en: Event Recap: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 19 — Disposition of Assets After Immigration, Featuring Guest Speaker Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm
items.title_zh: 活动回顾：第19期CCCWA“每周一星”: 移民资产处置问题 蔡律师事务所蔡清律师特邀嘉宾分享
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _May 22, 2023 17:16_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ The number of Chinese families settling and becoming naturalized in the United States continues to grow. After immigrating, many find it confusing how to handle the assets they held in China before obtaining immigration status. For example: with the pandemic making it impossible to return to China in person, how can one authorize relatives in China to handle the inheritance or sale of assets through remote notarization; how to complete the foreign-exchange purchase and remittance of the proceeds after the assets are disposed of; and, once those funds are remitted into the U.S., how to handle tax reporting and what to watch out for. Through its member Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State invited experts in this area to share their knowledge. **Guest Speaker:** Ms. Diao Shu, Assistant Director of the Chengdu Lüzheng Notary Office in Sichuan Province (formerly the Sichuan Provincial Notary Office), sharing "How to handle powers of attorney and other notarization procedures through overseas remote video notarization, and solutions for special situations encountered by overseas Chinese in the process." **Guest Speaker:** Coco Bai, an international banking foreign-exchange specialist with extensive hands-on experience, sharing how to handle the transfer of immigration assets after immigrating. **Guest Speaker:** Shirley Tan, a former senior tax examiner at the IRS Seattle office, sharing tax-reporting matters for U.S. citizens and permanent residents after remitting proceeds from overseas asset disposition into the United States. **Pacific Time, Friday, August 28, 8:00pm–9:30pm** **Zoom** **To watch this livestream, please click the link below:** Join Zoom Meeting https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 One tap mobile +12532158782,,4696970869# US (Tacoma) +16699006833,,4696970869# US (San Jose)
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年05月22日 17:16_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 目前在美国定居及入籍的中国家庭人数不断增加。移民后对在取得移民身份之前的中国境内财产如何处置令不少人感到困惑。例如因疫情本人无法回到国内，如何通过远程公证来委托国内亲人办理继承或出售资产事宜，对资产处置后的款项如何完成购汇和汇出境外，该款项汇入美国后如何进行税务申报及应注意问题。华州中国总商会通过其会员蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师邀请了这方面的行家来予以分享。 ** 主讲嘉宾： ** 四川省成都市律政公证处（原四川省公证处）主任助理刁姝女士分享 “ 如何通过海外远程视频公证办理委托及其它公证手续以及海外华人在办理中特殊情况处理方案 ** 主讲嘉宾： ** 有丰富实操经验的国际银行外汇专员 Coco Bai 分享移民后如何办理移民资产转移 ** 主讲嘉宾： ** 前美国联邦税务局西雅图办公室资深查税官 Shirley Tan 分享美国公民和永久居民把境外资产处置款汇入美国后税务申报事宜 ** 美西时间周五 8 月 28 日 8:00pm-9:30pm ** **zoom** ** 观看本次直播请点击以下链接： **

items.title_en: Event Recap: CCCWA and WSCRC Co-Host the 2020 Chinese Restaurant Industry Entrepreneurship Forum (Session 2)
items.title_zh: 活动回顾：CCCWA 和WSCRC联合主办2020 中餐业创业论坛 （第二期）
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _May 18, 2023 15:30_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ On August 7, 2020, the second session of the 2020 Washington State Chinese Restaurant Industry Entrepreneurship Forum was successfully held. Forum guests engaged in in-depth discussion around the challenges and opportunities the pandemic has brought to the Chinese restaurant industry, covering topics such as urban planning and architectural design, real estate investment, consumer data analysis for food delivery companies, legal matters related to restaurant industry investment, and the actual operation of restaurant brands. **President of Studio 19 Architects** **Tian Hui** Architect Tian Hui shared her perspective on urban planning and architectural design, noting that as city zoning is upgraded, demand for restaurants in cities is also increasing; at the same time, the restaurant industry and commercial real estate have a mutually reinforcing, mutually beneficial relationship, and the growth of the restaurant industry is closely tied to urban development and expansion. **CEO of Great Earth Realty** **Larry Eu** Larry shared his experience and advice on trends in commercial real estate investment, how restaurant companies choose store locations for medium- to long-term development, and strategies restaurant companies can use as tenants when negotiating and signing store lease agreements. **General Manager, Seattle Region, Chowbus Inc.** **Michelle Lei** From the perspective of the food delivery company Chowbus, Michelle shared market insights gained by analyzing data on restaurants and consumer marketing and spending, noting that Chinese restaurants are steadily expanding their non-Asian customer base, and that brand recognition and food quality are key to increasing sales and broadening the customer base. **Seattle-Area Manager, LIUYISHOU HOT POT** **Jason Huang** Drawing on more than 30 years of experience managing restaurant businesses, Jason summarized the opportunities and challenges facing the Chinese restaurant industry amid the pandemic, and shared in detail his all-around experience in restaurant operations, product standardization, operating cost structure, service standard control, and key considerations for brand franchising. **Marketing Manager, Happy Lamb Hot Pot** **David Li** From the perspective of building a new restaurant brand, David shared the measures new brands took during the pandemic to balance government requirements with consumer demand, and analyzed in detail approaches to expanding the North American consumer market, brand marketing plans, high-quality product standardization control, and potential future directions for investment and expansion. **Cai & Associates** **Attorney Cai Qing** From a legal perspective, Attorney Cai Qing summarized and shared relevant experience on topics including restaurant franchise models, government review and approval processes, and restaurant lease agreements. The attending guests communicated with one another, shared their experience, and engaged in in-depth discussion on the future development of the restaurant industry. CCCWA hopes this forum provided restaurant businesses, investors interested in the restaurant industry, and industry professionals with an efficient, high-quality platform and opportunity for exchange, helping restaurant businesses make it through this difficult pandemic period and paving the way for a new wave of restaurant industry investment in the near future. The forum was hosted by Michelle Zou, founder of Pacific Consulting, and was attended by CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) President Ms. Lu Lili and WSCRC (Washington State China Relations Council) Vice President Wang Man, who spoke on behalf of the host organizations.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年05月18日 15:30_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2020年8月7日，2020华州中餐业创业论坛第二期顺利举办，论坛嘉宾们围绕疫情给中餐业带来的挑战与机遇，从城市规划、建筑设计；地产投资；送餐企业的消费者数据分析；餐饮业投资法律相关事宜；以及餐饮品牌实际运营等多个角度，进行了深入的分享沟通。 **Studio 19 Architects 总裁** ** 田晖 ** 田晖建筑设计师从城市规划、建筑设计的角度分享了由于城市Zoning提升，城市对餐饮业的需求也在增加；同时餐饮业与商业地产拥有相辅相成互惠互利的关系，餐饮业的发展与城市的发展拓展紧密相关。 **Great Earth Realty CEO** ** Larry Eu ** Larry 从商业地产投资趋势变化，餐饮业企业中长期发展店面位置选择，餐饮业企业作为租户在店面租赁合同的谈判与签署的策略等角度分享了经验与建议。 **Chowbus Inc.西雅图地区总经理** ** Michelle Lei ** Michelle从Chowbus送餐企业的角度，分享了通过分析餐饮企业、消费者的营销及消费数据所得到的市场信息，提到了中餐业在稳步拓展非亚裔客户群体，品牌中餐知名度与餐品质量是提升销售额拓宽销售群体的重点。 ** ** **刘一手（LIUYISHOU HOT POT）西雅图负责人** ** Jason Huang ** Jason从拥有30余年餐饮企业经营管理的角度，总结了中餐业在疫情环境下面临的机遇与挑战，详细分享了餐饮业企业经营、产品标准化、运营成本结构、服务标准管控、品牌加盟关键考察点等全方面的餐饮企业运营经验。 **快乐小羊（Happy Lamb Hot Pot）市场经理** ** David Li ** David从餐饮新品牌打造的角度，分享了疫情期间新品牌企业在应对政府要求与消费者需求之间的平衡措施，详细分析了北美消费者市场拓展方式、品牌营销方案、产品标准化高品质管控、以及未来潜在的投资与拓展方向。 **蔡和蔡律师事务所（Cai &Associates） ** ** 蔡清律师 ** 蔡清律师从法律角度，从餐饮企业加盟模式、政府相关审核批准流程、餐饮业店面租赁合同等多方面，总结并分享了相关经验经历。 与会嘉宾们相互沟通、经验共享、共同对餐饮业未来的发展进行了深入的探讨与交流。CCCWA希望此次论坛，对各餐饮企业、对餐饮业感兴趣的投资人、以及对相关产业从业者，提供了高效高质量的交流共享平台及机会，帮助各餐饮企业顺利度过艰苦的疫情期，并能在不久的将来带来餐饮业投资的新热潮。 论坛由太平洋咨询创始人 Michelle Zou主持，CCCWA（华盛顿州中国总商会）会长吕莉莉女士、WSCRC（华盛顿州中国理事会）副会长王蔓出席论坛并代表主办单位讲话。

items.title_en: Event Recap: CCCWA and Bellevue Police Department Co-Host Successful Safety Seminar
items.title_zh: 活动回顾：CCCWA与贝尔维尤市警察局联合主办的安全讲座成功落幕
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _May 8, 2023 10:48_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ On May 31, 2022, CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) and the Bellevue Police Department successfully co-hosted a safety seminar. The Bellevue Police Department sent a strong lineup of nine officers and safety experts to take part in the event, answering more than thirty safety questions from the audience covering everyday work and life topics such as how to use weapons, how to improve self-defense skills, how to call the police quickly and effectively, and how to identify fake police officers, **with particular focus on the crime-prevention measures business owners can take on a regular basis, what to do if a store is robbed, and crime-prevention measures for office buildings, apartment buildings, and the surrounding areas — safety issues of particular concern to business professionals.** The turnout was large, and the audience engaged enthusiastically, creating a lively atmosphere. Live view of the safety seminar This seminar's agenda was tightly packed, and the questions discussed were all closely tied to everyday life and work; the officers' and safety experts' answers were highly practical and were widely praised. **When the final question — "If there were a school shooting, what would Bellevue police do?" — was asked, Assistant Chief Popochock answered, "The police will absolutely run into the school and let the bullets hit us instead of the children."** The audience was deeply moved, and many left comments thanking the officers for protecting community safety and for delivering such a practical seminar. After the event, many attendees felt that it was not only very helpful to the audience but also helped build strong ties and trust between police and the community, making them feel safer living or working in Bellevue and prouder of our city. Police Chief Wendell Shirley attended the event and gave opening remarks, and the event was hosted by PIO Meeghan Black. Host: PIO Meeghan Black Assistant Chief Andrew Popochock Captain David Sanabria Major Debbie Christopherson Safety Expert Ruby Daly CCCWA's current president, Ms. Lu Lili, expressed the Chamber's deep gratitude on behalf of the organization for the strong lineup sent by the Bellevue Police Department, and also gave special thanks to co-organizing partners including Seattle Immigrant Home, the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, the Seattle Entrepreneurs Association, and the Sunshine Youth Education Development Foundation.
