items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年05月08日 10:48_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2022年5月31日，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会与贝尔维尤市警察局（BellevuePoliceDepartment）联合主办的安全讲座成功举办。 贝尔维尤市警察局派出9位警员和安全专家的强大阵容参与这次活动，就听众提出的如何使用武器、如何提高自卫能力、如何快速有效地报警、如何识别假警察等日常工作和生活中的三十多个安全问题进行了解答， ** 重点讲解了企业主可以定期采取的预防犯罪措施、店铺遇到抢劫怎么办、办公楼、公寓楼及周边地区的预防犯罪措施等等商务人员关注的安全问题 ** 。现场听众较多，大家积极互动，气氛热烈。 安全讲座线上现场 本次讲座活动议程紧凑，讨论的问题都和日常的生活工作息息相关，警员和安全专家们回答的也特别具有可操作性，获得了广泛好评。 **当最后一个问题“如果发生校园枪击案，Bellevue的警察会怎么办？”Assistant Chief Popochock 回答“警察一定会冲进学校，让子弹射在我们身上，而不是射到孩子们身上”** ， 听众们深受感动，纷纷留言感谢保卫社区安全的警员们，也感激他们带来这么实用的讲座。会后多位参加者认为此次活动不仅对听众非常有帮助，而且对警民之间建立良好的联系和信任有很好的帮助作用，对在Bellevue居住或工作感觉更安全，为我们的城市感到更自豪。 警察局长Wendell Shirley出席活动并做开场讲话，活动的主持人由PIO Meeghan Black担任。 主持人 PIO Meeghan Black Assistant Chief Andrew Popochock Captain David Sanabria Major Debbie Christopherson 安全专家 Ruby Daly CCCWA现任会长吕莉莉女士代表商会对贝尔维尤市警察局派出强大阵容深表感谢，也特别鸣谢了西雅图移民之家、西雅图地产投资俱乐部、西雅图创业协会、阳光青少年教育发展基金会等协办单位。

items.title_en: Event Recap | Your Voice Matters! Join the Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan Online Community Meeting!
items.title_zh: 活动回顾 | 您的意见至关重要！参与Bellevue2044 综合规划市民线上见面会！
items.body_en: [CCC Chinese Chamber of Commerce](javascript:void(0);) _May 4, 2023 17:00_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi_ The City of Bellevue is holding a Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan community meeting specifically for members of the Chinese community, and warmly invites all Bellevue stakeholders to attend. Staff from relevant City of Bellevue departments and city councilmembers will attend this meeting to speak with you directly. At the meeting, you will also have the opportunity to fill out a related survey and share your views on housing issues in Bellevue. Topic: City of Bellevue Bellevue 2044 Information Session for Members of the Chinese Community Time: Thursday, March 9, 6:00-7:30 PM Format: Online via Zoom Registration link: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bellevue-2044-planning-for-the-future--tickets-557302927057 (copy the link and open it in your browser) **What Is the Comprehensive Plan** The Comprehensive Plan is an important tool used by the City Council, boards and commissions, and city staff to make key decisions on housing, transportation, parks, public services, the economy, and more. Such planning happens only once every 7-10 years, so for yourself and for the next generation to enjoy a safe, convenient, and healthy environment to live and work in over the next 10-20 years, your participation and input are essential! This plan is a core document that outlines the city's vision for the future and charts the course for achieving it. It is used by the City Council, boards and commissions, and city staff to make important decisions on housing, transportation, parks, and more. The city is updating its Comprehensive Plan for the sake of the high quality of life that people enjoy in Bellevue. **The goals and policies set out in the plan help ensure that people have access to:** o A range of housing options affordable across different income levels. o A variety of recreational opportunities. o Access to parks' natural resources and green spaces. o Access to jobs and economic development opportunities. o The ability to safely and conveniently drive, bike, walk, and use public transportation. o Clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment. o Other issues. **Your Input Matters** We all know that building the Chinese community requires everyone's active participation, and the Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan community meeting is a meaningful event held specifically for the Chinese community — your suggestions and needs will be heard directly by City of Bellevue staff and city councilmembers. For yourself and for every member of the Chinese community in Bellevue, we all have a responsibility to actively take part in this event and work together to create a safe and happy Chinese community.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年05月04日 17:00_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ Bellevue市政府专为华人社区成员举行 Bellevue 2044 综合规划市民见面会，诚邀所有Bellevue利益相关者参加。 Bellevue市相关部门的工作人员以及市议员会参加本次见面会，直接与您对话。在这次见面会，您还将有机会填写相关的调查问卷，表达您对Bellevue住房问题的看法。 主题：Bellevue市政府华人社区成员举行 Bellevue 2044 信息会议 时间：3 月 9 日（周四），晚上 6:00-7:30 形式：Zoom线上会议 注册链接：https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bellevue-2044-planning-for-the-future-- tickets-557302927057（复制链接在浏览器打开） ** 什么是综合规划 ** 综合规划是一个重要工具，供市议会、理事会和委员会以及市政府工作人员使用，以做出住房、交通、公园、公众服务、经济等方面的重要决策。这样的规划每7-10年才进行一次，为了自己以及年轻一代未来10-20年有一个安全、便捷、健康的生活、工作环境，您的参与和意见至关重要！ 此计划是一份核心文件，概述了未来的愿景，并为实现愿景指明方向。文件供市议会、理事会和委员会以及市政府工作人员使用，以做出住房、交通、公园等方面的重要决策。市政府要更新其综合计划 (Comprehensive Plan) 的宗旨是为了人们在 Bellevue 享有的高品质生活。 ** 计划中明确的目标和政策可确保人们获得： ** o 不同收入层级皆可负担得起的各种住房方案。 o 各种娱乐机会。 o 使用公园自然资源和绿色空间。 o 获得工作和经济发展机会。 o 能够安全方便地开车、骑自行车、步行及乘坐公共交通工具。 o 获得清洁的空气、水和良好的环境。 o 其他问题。 ** 您的意见至关重要 ** 我们都知道华人社区的建设需要每个人的积极参与，Bellevue 2044 综合规划市民见面会正是一个面向华人举办的意义非凡的活动，您的建议和需求都将被Bellevue市相关部门的工作人员以及市议员直接听到。 为了您和Bellevue的每位华人，我们都有责任积极参与这次的活动，为创造一个安全、幸福的华人社区共同努力。

items.title_en: Event Announcement: "Immunity and Health" Special Wellness Salon
items.title_zh: 活动预告：“免疫力与健康”专场健康沙龙
items.body_en: [ CCC Washington State Chamber ](javascript:void\(0\);) _May 2, 2023 17:21_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ Professor Liu Jie (**a leading figure in the field of immunotherapy for cancer prevention and treatment, a "National-Level" honoree of the New Century Talents Project, a recipient of the State Council's Special Government Allowance, and a Chang Jiang Scholar Distinguished Professor**) delivered a public welfare lecture in Seattle as early as 2018 titled **"Early Diagnosis and Precision Treatment of Cancer Based on Big Data and Artificial Intelligence."** In that lecture, he also discussed **simple, practical ways to boost immunity, prevent cancer, and improve overall bodily function and health in daily life.** Many attendees - especially busy business professionals under heavy work pressure - reported that they benefited greatly from the lecture, and many went on to pass these health principles along to those around them, with many people benefiting as a result of that public lecture. By popular request, the Chamber is once again inviting Professor Liu Jie to deliver an outstanding lecture titled **"Immunity and Health Special Wellness Salon"** on **May 9 (Beijing time)**. In addition to **presenting the latest research and clinical advances in precision cancer treatment**, this lecture will also include **targeted content on effective ways to boost immunity after recovering from COVID-19**. This event will be held both online and in person; please reserve your seat in advance. **About the Speaker** Professor Liu Jie Liu Jie holds an M.D., is a professor, chief physician, and doctoral supervisor, and heads the National Innovative Research Group for New Strategies in Immunotherapy. He is a Chang Jiang Scholar Distinguished Professor and a recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars; a "National-Level" honoree under the Organization Department's New Century Talents Project; a recipient of the State Council's Special Government Allowance; Director of the Institute of Immune Phenotyping at the Shanghai International Human Phenome Institute; Professor of Immunology at Fudan University, as well as Professor at its Institute of Metabolism and Department of Genetics; Director of the Institute of Digestive Diseases at Fudan University and Director of the Department of Gastroenterology at Huashan Hospital, its affiliated hospital; Director of the Shanghai Center for Intelligent Oncology Drug Engineering Research; Head of the Shanghai Double First-Class Immunology Interdisciplinary Innovation Research Institute; Leader of a Shanghai High-Level University Innovation Strategy Team; an Outstanding Academic Leader in Shanghai; and a Shanghai Leading Talent. His research focuses on immune recovery and reconstruction strategies, and comprehensive disease diagnosis and treatment based on immune homeostasis. He has established a system for assessing and intervening in immune aging and biological age; created a new non-invasive diagnostic method (liquid biopsy) based on epigenetic modification; and developed a PDX-based approach for selecting precision cancer treatment plans and a comprehensive immune reconstruction strategy for cancer, achieving strong clinical results. He has built a fourth-generation secretory CAR-T therapy targeting solid tumors, achieving a breakthrough in CAR-T immunotherapy for solid tumors, and has conducted AI-based research into personalized neoantigen cancer vaccines. His clinical case study published in Nature Reviews Clinical Oncology has been adopted as continuing medical education (CME) material for U.S. clinicians. He has led numerous national key research projects and has published more than 150 SCI papers, including in journals such as Cell and Nature sub-journals. He has received the National Science and Technology Progress Award (First Class) and other honors, and serves as an international editorial board member for GUT, an editorial board member for the British Journal of Pharmacology, and Deputy Editor-in-Chief of Nutrition & Metabolism. He holds the title of Chang Jiang Scholar and serves as an expert reviewer for national science and technology awards and national fund projects. **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeNkfibJfUiaR9qFyicoSmzlV6psb43r5gBz48fnV3ZgLdKicWvRRXz52vHAK9Z07V2XruOPnAgZj22IWQ/640?wx_fmt=png)** **Event Time** May 9, 2023, 9:30 AM Beijing time (6:30 PM Seattle time, May 8) **In-Person Venue** Feiyin Biotech: Academic Exchange Hall, 22nd Floor, Building 2, Future Entrepreneurship Plaza, No. 3 Gangxing Road, High-Tech Zone, Jinan, Shandong Province **Ways to Join Online** 1. Press and hold the QR code on WeChat to register. 2. Open Tencent Meeting on your phone and enter Meeting ID: 946-349-819 to register. 3. Copy the link and open it in your browser: https://meeting.tencent.com/dw/8xymG8KGP5MI **Organizers** **CCCWA - China Chamber of Commerce of Washington State** **Feiyin Biotechnology Co., Ltd.** **New Home (USA) Real Estate Development Management Co.** **Co-Organizers** **Shandong Shenghan International Hospital** **Jinan Quanmei Yangguang Catering Group**
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年05月02日 17:21_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 刘杰教授（ **免疫疗法预防及治疗肿瘤领域的领军人物、新世纪百千万人才工程“国家级”人选、国务院“特殊政府津贴”获得者、长江学者特聘教授** ）早在2018年就在西雅图做过题为 **“基于大数据和人工智能的肿瘤早期诊断及精准治疗”的公益演讲** ，演讲中，还讲述了在日常生活 ** 中如何通过简单易行的方式增强免疫力，预防癌症，增强身体机能和健康 ** 。 众多听众，尤其是工作压力大、工作繁忙的商务人士在讲座后反馈受益匪浅，后续大家又把这些健康理念传递给身边的人，很多人因那场公益讲座而受益。 应大家要求，商会再次邀请刘杰教授在 ** 北京时间5月9日 ** 带来精彩的“ ** 免疫力与健康专场健康沙龙 ** ”讲座，除了 ** 介绍癌症精准治疗的最新科研及临床进展 ** 、此次讲座还会有 ** 针对性地增加关于感染新冠康复后有效提高免疫力的方式 ** 等内容，此次活动为线上线下同时进行，请提前预约座位。 ** 主讲人介绍 ** 刘杰教授 刘杰，医学博士，教授，主任医师，博士生导师，国家免疫治疗新策略“创新研究群体”负责人， 国家“长江学者”特聘教授，及“杰出青年基金”获得者；中组部百千万人才工程“国家级”人选；国务院特殊政府津贴获得者；上海国际人类表型组研究院免疫表型研究所所长，复旦大学免疫学系教授，及代谢研究院和遗传学系教授，复旦大学消化病研究所所长，附属华山医院消化科主任；上海智能肿瘤药物工程研究中心主任；上海双一流免疫交叉科学创新研究院负责人；上海高水平高等院校创新战略团队负责人；上海市优秀学科带头人；上海市领军人才。研究方向为免疫康复及重建策略；基于免疫稳态的疾病综合诊疗。建立了免疫衰老及生物年龄评估及干预体系；创立了基于表观基因修饰的无创诊断（液体活检）新方法；开展了基于PDX的肿瘤精准治疗方案选择及肿瘤的综合免疫重建策略，取得较佳疗效；构建了第四代针对实体瘤的新型分泌型CART，使实体瘤的CART免疫治疗获得突破。开展了基于人工智能的肿瘤个体化新抗原疫苗研究。在Nature 临床实践肿瘤发表的临床病例研究被推举为美国临床医师继续医学教育教材（CME）。承担多项国家级重点项目，先后发表SCI论文150余篇，包括Cell， Nature 子刊等，获国家科技进步一等奖等奖项，为GUT国际编委，British Journal of Pharmacology编委，Nutrition & Metabolism 副主编。担任长江学者，国家科技奖及国家基金项目评审专家等。 ‍ **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/2a37FIUKQeNkfibJfUiaR9qFyicoSmzlV6psb43r5gBz48fnV3ZgLdKicWvRRXz52vHAK9Z07V2XruOPnAgZj22IWQ/640?wx_fmt=png) ** **活动时间** 北京时间2023年5月9日上午9:30（西雅图时间5月8日下午6:30） **线下活动地点** 非因生物：山东省济南市高新区港兴三路未来创业广场2号楼22楼学术交流厅 **线上参与方式** 1、 微信长按二维码，即可参与报名。 2、打开手机腾讯会议输入腾讯会议号： 946-349-819、即可参与报名。 3 、复制链接，在浏览器打开： https://meeting.tencent.com/dw/8xymG8KGP5MI **主办单位** ** CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 ** ** 非因生物科技有限公司 ** ** 美国新居地产开发管理公司 ** **协办单位** ** 山东圣翰国际医院 ** ** 济南泉美阳光餐饮集团 **

items.title_en: Event Recap | How to Safeguard Your Assets? - CCCWA Financial Seminar
items.title_zh: 活动回顾 | 如何保障资金安全？——CCCWA金融讲座
items.body_en: [ CCC Washington State Chamber ](javascript:void\(0\);) _April 28, 2023 11:58_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ In March 2023, several financial institutions ran into trouble: **Silicon Valley Bank in the U.S. collapsed and entered receivership, and Signature Bank was also shut down due to "systemic risk."** The crisis continued to spread - on March 19, Switzerland's largest bank, UBS Group, announced it would acquire the troubled Credit Suisse. **Amid this turbulent financial climate, how can you safeguard your assets?** On March 20, 2023, CCCWA - the China Chamber of Commerce of Washington State - held an in-person financial seminar, at which ICBC USA, a member of the Chamber's board of directors, analyzed recent major financial events and policies and explained its account service options. The seminar reviewed the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank, examining its underlying causes and its impact on the global economy. From the perspective of protecting the safety of your funds, it covered federal deposit insurance topics including coverage scope, insurance limits, and how to choose a bank. The seminar also introduced the features of ICBC USA's services: ICBC USA holds an S&P Global rating of A-, and its professional service team of 300 local employees provides bilingual Chinese-English service. Its current interest rates are competitive compared to major U.S. domestic banks, offering personal checking account customers an annualized rate of up to 3.5% and business checking accounts an annualized rate of up to 3.7%. The bank places strong emphasis on risk management to ensure the safety and stability of customer funds. **ICBC USA currently offers a number of distinctive services** * Fully waived fees on cross-border wire transfers to corporate accounts via the "China-U.S. ICBC Express Remittance" service; * Convenient and efficient remote check deposit and small-value payment services through corporate account cash management; * Personal credit cards available without an SSN, accepting domestic (Chinese) credit history, available on both VISA and UnionPay networks; * Personal home loans available without an SSN, accepting domestic credit history, pay stubs, and financial assets; * Loan-to-value ratio of up to 70%, with a maximum loan amount of $3.5 million; * Student checking accounts suited to international students can be opened before arriving in the U.S., enabling direct remittances and tuition and fee payments...
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年04月28日 11:58_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2023年3月，多家金融机构暴雷： **美国硅谷银行破产清算，签名银行也因“系统性风险”关门了** 。这场危机还在不断蔓延，3月19日，瑞士第一大银行瑞银集团宣布将收购陷入危机的瑞士信贷银行。 ** 在当前动荡的金融形势下，如何保障资金安全？ ** 2023年3月20日，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会举办了线下金融讲座，由商会理事单位工银美国对近期热点金融事件及政策进行分析，并讲解了账户服务方案。 讲座对硅谷银行破产事件进行复盘，分析了事件的深层原因及对世界经济产生的影响。从保障资金安全的角度分析了联邦存款保险相关知识包括承保范围、保险额度及如何选择银行等问题。 讲座也介绍了工银美国的服务特点： 工银美国标普全球评级为A-，300明本地员工组成的专业服务团队提供中英双语服务；目前利率较美国本土大银行较有竞争性，可为客户提供个人活期存款3.5%的年化利率，公司账户活期存款最高3.7%年化利率；注重风险管理，确保客户资金的安全和稳定。 ** 工银美国目前提供很多特色服务 ** * 对公账户跨境汇入汇款“中美工银速汇”手续费全免； * 对公账户现金管理服务可方便快捷进行远程支票入账和小额支付； * 个人信用卡无SSN可申请,接受国内信用记录,适用VISA和银联两个卡渠道； * 个人房贷业务无SSN可申请，接受国内信用记录、工资单和金融资产； * 最高贷款成数70%、最高贷款金额350万美元； * 适合留学生的学生支票账户可在赴美前开立账户，直接完成汇款和缴交学杂费…

items.title_en: Grateful for the Journey, Together Toward the Future | CCCWA Members Attend Private Preview of MARI Apartments Phase II Ahead of Its Launch
items.title_zh: 感恩同行，共鉴未来|CCCWA商会会员莅临美丽都公寓二期（MARI）开盘前内部品鉴会
items.body_en: [ CCC Washington State Chamber ](javascript:void\(0\);) _April 24, 2023 12:57_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ On the afternoon of April 18, 2023, CCCWA held a pre-launch gathering for board member company TOP International USA's MARI Apartments Phase II, a boutique development in Bellevue's Meilidu school-district community, with numerous members in attendance. The event was held at the MARI sales office, where guests toured the model units and heard remarks from project General Manager Yicheng Yang and Ming Zhang, President of architecture firm MZA, introducing the project. The development is located in the core of downtown Bellevue, within a top-ranked school district, with views of Mount Rainier and Lake Washington. It features well-proportioned floor plans and a full suite of amenities including a clubhouse and fitness center, with interior finishes carefully selected from around the world. **Holly Yang, a commercial real estate broker with member company Kidder Mathews, warmly congratulated MARI on its upcoming launch.** As a partner in TOP International USA's land acquisition process, she was involved throughout the acquisition of the site, and has watched TOP International USA grow into a truly local company since arriving in Seattle in 2014 - having managed five projects and successfully completed construction of three high-end apartment buildings. She expressed great happiness and pride at this achievement. **Ms. Yan of the City of Bellevue Planning Department also shared some stories from MARI's permitting process, expressing her pleasure that the project is nearing completion and heading to market, and thanking TOP International USA for its contributions to economic development and job creation in Bellevue.** **Current Chamber President Lyu Lili, who also previously served as General Manager of TOP International USA's development management company, shared some stories from the land acquisition and early stages of the project, and expressed special thanks to member companies such as MZA for their support. She noted that this project stands as a model of successful collaboration among Chamber members, and spoke highly of the project shareholders' sense of responsibility and commitment.** Attending guests offered their congratulations, delighted to witness this important milestone for the Meilidu project, and looked forward to seeing more Chamber members forge partnerships through the Chamber's platform and achieve even broader business success together.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年04月24日 12:57_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2023年4月18日下午，CCCWA举办理事单位拓宏美国Bellevue美丽都精品学区公寓 二期 （MARI）开盘前聚会活动，多位会员莅临活动现场。 该活动在MARI售楼处举办，到场嘉宾参观样板间，并听取项目总经理杨一诚先生和建筑设计公司MZA总裁张铭先生对该项目的介绍。 该项目位于Bellevue市核心地段、顶级学区、远眺雷尼尔雪山和华盛顿湖、户型方正、会所、健身房一应俱全、室内装修建材精挑细选来自世界各地…… ** 会员单位Kidder Mathews商业地产经纪人Holly Yang女士热烈祝贺MARI公寓即将开盘 ** ，她做为拓宏美国土地收购的合作伙伴全程参与了这块地的收购活动，并且看到 拓宏美国从2014年来到西雅图后已经成为本土化的公司，操盘了5个项目，并成功建造了3栋高端公寓， 她为此感到非常高兴和自豪。 ** Bellevue市政府规划部颜女士也分享了MARI审批阶段的一些故事，为即将顺利完工并上市销售感到高兴，感谢拓宏美国为Bellevue市的经济发展和就业创造做出的贡献。 ** ** 现任会长吕莉莉女士还有个身份是前任拓宏美国开发管理公司总经理，她分享了这个项目土地收购过程中及前期一些故事，尤其感谢MZA等会员单位对这个项目的支持，这个项目也是商会会员间成功合作的典范。她也高度评价项目股东们的责任与担当。 ** 与会嘉宾纷纷送上祝福，为见证美丽都项目的重要时刻感到开心，共同期待未来商会的更多会员在商会平台上达成更多合作，共同取得更广泛的商业成就。

items.title_en: Can a U.S. Asset Protection Trust Help Shield Your Assets?
items.title_zh: 美国资产保护信托能帮助资产隔离吗？
items.body_en: [ CCC Washington State Chamber ](javascript:void\(0\);) _April 21, 2023 15:46_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ **Can a U.S. asset protection trust help shield your assets?** **Lessons from the failed asset-shielding case involving Zhang Lan's family trust - how to ensure the assets in your U.S. trust are secure.** The recent case in which **Zhang Lan's family trust was "pierced," which trended on social media, drew intense attention from the Chinese community in the U.S.** Many members who have already established, or are planning to establish, a family trust have expressed interest in learning whether assets placed in a U.S. trust can actually achieve effective asset segregation. On March 31, 2023, CCCWA held an information session, inviting attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Associates, P.C. to share his experience handling clients' cross-border assets and using U.S. trusts to protect and segregate assets. **Attorney Cai Qing shared numerous case studies to clearly explain the following topics:** 1. Common methods of asset protection in the U.S. 2. Whether a conventional trust can protect trust assets 3. An overview of U.S. law on asset protection trusts 4. The current state of asset protection law in Washington State 5. The requirements, restrictions, and exceptions involved in setting up a U.S. asset protection trust for asset segregation 6. The relationships among the settlor, trustee, beneficiary, investment advisor, and protector of a U.S. asset protection trust 7. Key tax considerations when establishing a U.S. asset protection trust This event was held both online and in person, with a lively atmosphere as attendees actively engaged, asked questions, shared their own experiences, and joined in discussion. Afterward, everyone expressed heartfelt thanks to attorney Cai for his outstanding and generous presentation.
items.body_zh: [ CCC华中商会 ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2023年04月21日 15:46_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ **美国资产保护信托能帮助资产隔离吗？** **从张兰家族信托资产隔离失败案分析如何确保您美国信托中资产安全。** 近日在网上登顶热搜的 **张兰家族信托被“击穿”一案引起在美华人的极大关注** 。不少已设立或拟设立家族信托的会员朋友希望能有机会了解放在美国信托中的资产是否能达到资产隔离效果。 2023年3月31日，CCCWA举办分享会，邀请蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师来分享他在 处理客户跨境资产及利用美国信托对资产如何保护和资产隔离的经验 。 ** 蔡清律师分享了很多案例，通过案例深入浅出地讲解了以下问题： ** 1、 美国对资产保护的常用方法 2、 常规的信托能否保护信托资产 3、 美国对资产保护信托的法律概要 4、 华盛顿州对资产保护法律现状 5、 设立美国资产保护信托来资产隔离时的要求、限制和例外 6、 美国资产保护信托设立人、受托人、受益人、投资顾问和保护人的关系 7、 设立美国资产保护信托时的基本税务要点 此次活动为线上线下同时进行，气氛热烈，参会嘉宾积极互动，提问、分享、讨论，会后大家对蔡律师的精彩讲解和无私分享表示非常感谢。

items.title_en: How to Safeguard Your Assets? - CCCWA Financial Seminar
items.title_zh: 如何保障资金安全？——CCCWA金融讲座
items.body_en: _March 22, 2023 15:22_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ In March 2023, several financial institutions ran into trouble: **Silicon Valley Bank in the U.S. collapsed and entered receivership, and Signature Bank was also shut down due to "systemic risk."** The crisis continued to spread - on March 19, Switzerland's largest bank, UBS Group, announced it would acquire the troubled Credit Suisse. **Amid this turbulent financial climate, how can you safeguard your assets?** On March 20, 2023, CCCWA - the China Chamber of Commerce of Washington State - held an in-person financial seminar, at which ICBC USA, a member of the Chamber's board of directors, analyzed recent major financial events and policies and explained its account service options. The seminar reviewed the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank, examining its underlying causes and its impact on the global economy. From the perspective of protecting the safety of your funds, it covered federal deposit insurance topics including coverage scope, insurance limits, and how to choose a bank. The seminar also introduced the features of ICBC USA's services: ICBC USA holds an S&P Global rating of A-, and its professional service team of 300 local employees provides bilingual Chinese-English service. Its current interest rates are competitive compared to major U.S. domestic banks, offering personal checking account customers an annualized rate of up to 3.5% and business checking accounts an annualized rate of up to 3.7%. The bank places strong emphasis on risk management to ensure the safety and stability of customer funds. **ICBC USA currently offers a number of distinctive services** * Fully waived fees on cross-border wire transfers to corporate accounts via the "China-U.S. ICBC Express Remittance" service; * Convenient and efficient remote check deposit and small-value payment services through corporate account cash management; * Personal credit cards available without an SSN, accepting domestic (Chinese) credit history, available on both VISA and UnionPay networks; * Personal home loans available without an SSN, accepting domestic credit history, pay stubs, and financial assets; * Loan-to-value ratio of up to 70%, with a maximum loan amount of $3.5 million; * Student checking accounts suited to international students can be opened before arriving in the U.S., enabling direct remittances and tuition and fee payments...
items.body_zh: _2023年03月22日 15:22_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2023年3月，多家金融机构暴雷： **美国硅谷银行破产清算，签名银行也因“系统性风险”关门了** 。这场危机还在不断蔓延，3月19日，瑞士第一大银行瑞银集团宣布将收购陷入危机的瑞士信贷银行。 ** 在当前动荡的金融形势下，如何保障资金安全？ ** 2023年3月20日，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会举办了线下金融讲座，由商会理事单位工银美国对近期热点金融事件及政策进行分析，并讲解了账户服务方案。 讲座对硅谷银行破产事件进行复盘，分析了事件的深层原因及对世界经济产生的影响。从保障资金安全的角度分析了联邦存款保险相关知识包括承保范围、保险额度及如何选择银行等问题。 讲座也介绍了工银美国的服务特点： 工银美国标普全球评级为A-，300明本地员工组成的专业服务团队提供中英双语服务；目前利率较美国本土大银行较有竞争性，可为客户提供个人活期存款3.5%的年化利率，公司账户活期存款最高3.7%年化利率；注重风险管理，确保客户资金的安全和稳定。 ** 工银美国目前提供很多特色服务 ** * 对公账户跨境汇入汇款“中美工银速汇”手续费全免； * 对公账户现金管理服务可方便快捷进行远程支票入账和小额支付； * 个人信用卡无SSN可申请,接受国内信用记录,适用VISA和银联两个卡渠道； * 个人房贷业务无SSN可申请，接受国内信用记录、工资单和金融资产； * 最高贷款成数70%、最高贷款金额350万美元； * 适合留学生的学生支票账户可在赴美前开立账户，直接完成汇款和缴交学杂费…

items.title_en: 2023 Washington State Chinese Real Estate Developers Industry Analysis Salon Successfully Held
items.title_zh: 2023年华盛顿州房地产开发商行业分析沙龙活动成功举办
items.body_en: _March 13, 2023 11:51_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ **On March 9, CCCWA - the China Chamber of Commerce of Washington State - successfully held the 2023 Washington State Chinese Real Estate Developers Industry Analysis Salon.** Attendance for this gathering was kept to 20 people, and the venue was provided by **Cai & Associates, P.C.** Representatives from 17 Chinese-owned real estate development firms, financial companies, architecture and design firms, and law firms active in Washington State attended the gathering. Attendees shared updates on their respective projects over the past year, changes in the financial and land markets, and detailed experiences and lessons learned regarding financing, planning approval, construction costs, project timelines, and post-completion tax incentive policies during the development process. Participants also offered analysis and forecasts on the future direction of the real estate market and shared their companies' development plans. Attending companies discussed the rising cost challenges facing the current environment: interest rate hikes have significantly increased the financing costs of ongoing development projects, while last year's coordinated strike by concrete workers in Washington State halted projects for three months, and changing building requirements in cities like Bellevue - such as new energy requirements - have also driven up costs. Participants also shared recent performance across different real estate product types: due to layoffs at tech companies, office vacancy rates in cities like Seattle and Bellevue remain elevated, while the rental apartment market remains healthy, with low vacancy rates downtown and rents that have risen sharply; the hotel industry is entering a post-pandemic growth period; and industrial real estate has pulled back slightly from its peak but is still performing well. Although there are some short-term challenges, participants remain highly confident in the long-term outlook for the greater Seattle real estate market, with several developers planning to break ground soon and most companies in discussions regarding acquisitions and development partnerships.
items.body_zh: _2023年03月13日 11:51_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ ** 3月9日，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会成功举办了2023年华盛顿州华裔地产开发商行业分析沙龙。 ** 这次聚会总人数控制在20人，活动场地由 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ ** Cai & Associates, P.C. ** ** ） ** 提供。 17家活跃在华盛顿州的华裔房地产开发公司及金融企业、建筑设计公司、律师事务所代表参加了聚会， 大家分享了一年来各自的项目进展情况，金融市场、土地交易市场的变化，以及在具体开发过程中融资、规划审批、建造成本、工期、建成后税收减免政策等方面一些细节性的经验和教训。 大家也对房地产市场未来走向做了一些分析和预测，并分享了各自企业的发展计划。 参会企业分享目前形势下面临的成本增加的挑战： 加息导致正在施工的地产开发项目财务成本增加显著，同时，去年华盛顿州的混凝土工人串联罢工使项目停工3个月、 贝尔维尤等城市建筑要求发生变化例如能源要求等，都会导致成本增加。 大家也分享了最近房地产不同业态产品市场表现： 因科技公司裁员，西雅图、贝尔维尤等城市办公楼的空置率在较高水平，出租公寓市场表现健康，市区的空置率较低，租金也经历了大幅上涨； 酒店业迎来疫情后的增长期； 工业地产从峰值略有回落，但仍表现良好…… 虽然短期有一定困难，从长期来看，大家对大西雅图地区的房地产市场仍然信心十足，多个房企有近期开工计划，大部分企业在洽谈收购及开发合作。

items.title_en: Your Input Matters! Join the Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan Community Online Meeting!
items.title_zh: 您的意见至关重要！参与Bellevue2044 综合规划市民线上见面会！
items.body_en: _March 6, 2023 17:06_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ The City of Bellevue is holding a Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan community meeting specifically for members of the Chinese community, and warmly invites all Bellevue stakeholders to attend. Staff from relevant City of Bellevue departments as well as City Council members will attend this meeting to speak with you directly. At the meeting, you will also have the opportunity to fill out a related survey to share your views on housing issues in Bellevue. Topic: City of Bellevue Chinese Community Bellevue 2044 Information Meeting Time: Thursday, March 9, 6:00-7:30 PM Format: Online via Zoom Registration link: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bellevue-2044-planning-for-the-future--tickets-557302927057 (copy the link and open it in your browser) **What Is a Comprehensive Plan** A comprehensive plan is an important tool used by the City Council, boards and commissions, and city staff to make key decisions on housing, transportation, parks, public services, the economy, and more. Such plans are only updated once every 7-10 years, so for the sake of yourself and the next generation having a safe, convenient, and healthy place to live and work over the next 10-20 years, your participation and input are essential! This plan is a core document that outlines a vision for the future and points the way toward achieving it. It is used by the City Council, boards and commissions, and city staff to make key decisions on housing, transportation, parks, and more. The City's purpose in updating its Comprehensive Plan is to ensure the high quality of life people enjoy in Bellevue. **The goals and policies set out in the plan help ensure that people have access to:** o A variety of housing options affordable across different income levels. o A wide range of recreational opportunities. o Access to parks, natural resources, and green spaces. o Access to jobs and economic development opportunities. o The ability to safely and conveniently drive, bike, walk, and use public transit. o Clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment. o Other issues. **Your Input Matters** We all know that building a strong Chinese community requires the active participation of everyone. The Bellevue 2044 Comprehensive Plan community meeting is a meaningful event held specifically for the Chinese community, where your suggestions and needs will be heard directly by City of Bellevue staff and City Council members. For your sake and for every member of the Chinese community in Bellevue, we all share the responsibility to actively take part in this event and work together to create a safe, thriving Chinese community.
items.body_zh: _2023年03月06日 17:06_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ Bellevue市政府专为华人社区成员举行 Bellevue 2044 综合规划市民见面会，诚邀所有Bellevue利益相关者参加。 Bellevue市相关部门的工作人员以及市议员会参加本次见面会，直接与您对话。在这次见面会，您还将有机会填写相关的调查问卷，表达您对Bellevue住房问题的看法。 主题：Bellevue市政府华人社区成员举行 Bellevue 2044 信息会议 时间：3 月 9 日（周四），晚上 6:00-7:30 形式：Zoom线上会议 注册链接：https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bellevue-2044-planning-for-the-future-- tickets-557302927057（复制链接在浏览器打开） ** 什么是综合规划 ** 综合规划是一个重要工具，供市议会、理事会和委员会以及市政府工作人员使用，以做出住房、交通、公园、公众服务、经济等方面的重要决策。这样的规划每7-10年才进行一次，为了自己以及年轻一代未来10-20年有一个安全、便捷、健康的生活、工作环境，您的参与和意见至关重要！ 此计划是一份核心文件，概述了未来的愿景，并为实现愿景指明方向。文件供市议会、理事会和委员会以及市政府工作人员使用，以做出住房、交通、公园等方面的重要决策。市政府要更新其综合计划 (Comprehensive Plan) 的宗旨是为了人们在 Bellevue 享有的高品质生活。 ** 计划中明确的目标和政策可确保人们获得： ** o 不同收入层级皆可负担得起的各种住房方案。 o 各种娱乐机会。 o 使用公园自然资源和绿色空间。 o 获得工作和经济发展机会。 o 能够安全方便地开车、骑自行车、步行及乘坐公共交通工具。 o 获得清洁的空气、水和良好的环境。 o 其他问题。 ** 您的意见至关重要 ** 我们都知道华人社区的建设需要每个人的积极参与，Bellevue 2044 综合规划市民见面会正是一个面向华人举办的意义非凡的活动，您的建议和需求都将被Bellevue市相关部门的工作人员以及市议员直接听到。 为了您和Bellevue的每位华人，我们都有责任积极参与这次的活动，为创造一个安全、幸福的华人社区共同努力。

items.title_en: Free Guidance Seminar on Round 5 Government Grant Applications
items.title_zh: 第五轮政府拨款申请指导公益讲座
items.body_en: _August 3, 2022 17:10_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ The Washington State Legislature has allocated $70 million for Round 5 (WW5) of the Working Washington Grants program to support small businesses affected by the pandemic. Join us to learn about this new grant opportunity, opening on August 17. Both for-profit and nonprofit businesses are welcome to apply, including sole proprietors and independent artists. This webinar will offer simultaneous interpretation in American Sign Language, Korean, Mandarin Chinese, Russian, and Spanish. Seminar time: August 4, 2022, 9:00–10:30 AM. Copy the link to register: https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_ABybN3vgT36R_VGiLYfXFA **This webinar will cover the following information:** * Overview of the WW5 grant program * Eligibility criteria and permitted uses of grant funds * How to register for a Unique Entity Identifier (UEI), the federal government's new business identification system launched in April 2022 * Financial documents and other requirements For more details, visit: commercegrants.com. A Q&A session will be held as time allows — please submit questions in advance when registering. CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State), as one of the event's co-organizers, will provide Chinese-language assistance to WW5 fund applicants. **Speakers:** ### John Dicus Lead Business Opportunity Specialist, Seattle District Office/Spokane Branch, U.S. SBA ### Lynn Fetch Small Business Grant Program Manager, Washington State Department of Commerce ### Michael Wallenfels #### Communications Manager, ArtsWA ### Shannon Halberstadt Director, Creative Economy Sector, Washington State Department of Commerce ### Janie Sacco Outreach and Marketing Specialist, U.S. Small Business Administration, Seattle District Office Kate Hoy Government Contracting Assistance Specialist, Washington Procurement Technical Assistance Center (PTAC) **Host Organizations:** **Co-organizers:**
items.body_zh: _2022年08月03日 17:10_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 华盛顿州立法机构为下一轮 华盛顿州运作拨款项目提供第 5 轮 (WW5) 拨款 7000 万美元 ，以支持受疫情影响的小型企业。 请加入我们，了解将于 8 月 17 日开放的新赠款机会。 欢迎营利性和非营利性企业，包括独资经营者和独立艺术家申请。 该网络研讨会将提供美国手语、韩语、中文普通话、俄语和西班牙语的同声传译。 讲座时间：2022年8月4日9:00-10:30 复制链接注册： https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_ABybN3vgT36R_VGiLYfXFA ** 该网络研讨会将涵盖以下信息： ** * WW5 赠款计划概述 * 资格标准和赠款资金的使用 * 如何注册实体标识代码 (UEI) ，即联邦政府于 2022 年 4 月推出的企业识别系统 * 财务文件和其他要求 详细情况请登录：commercegrants.com 将在时间允许的情况下举办问答环节——请注册时提前提交问题。 CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会做为此次活动的协办单位之一，将为WW5资金申请者提供中文服务。 ** 主讲人： ** ### John Dicus 首席商业机会专家西雅图地区办事处/斯波坎分公司美国 SBA ### Lynn Fetch 华盛顿州商务部小企业补助计划经理 ### Michael Wallenfels #### Communications Manager, ArtsWA ### Shannon Halberstadt 华盛顿州商务部创意经济部门负责人 ### Janie Sacco 美国小企业管理局西雅图地区办公室外展和营销专家 Kate Hoy 华盛顿州采购技术援助中心(PTAC) 政府合同援助专家 ** 主办单位： ** ** 协办单位： **

items.title_en: Counselor Wu Peimin and Consul Fu Lin Visit CCCWA
items.title_zh: 邬沛民参赞和付琳领事到访CCCWA
items.body_en: _June 3, 2022 13:42_ __ _ _ _ _ _ Shaanxi _ On June 1, 2022, Counselor Wu Peimin and Consul Fu Lin of the Commercial Office of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco visited CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) and held a warm discussion with member representatives via video conference. Counselor Wu Peimin and Consul Fu Lin hold a warm online discussion with CCCWA members. At the meeting, President Lu Lili introduced the Chamber's overall situation. During the pandemic, **the Chamber never stopped promoting exchange and interaction among members, holding more than 30 online events,** and in terms of community service organized donation drives for pandemic-prevention supplies and the Food with Love program, which provided $400,000 worth of meals with love. Since the start of this year: * The Chamber has continued to grow in scale; * Institutional work that had been delayed by the pandemic has resumed and is proceeding in an orderly manner; * Community ties among members have been strengthened, and member services continue to be innovated; * The Chamber has partnered with more nonprofit organizations for collaborative development. Representatives from various member companies described how their businesses had developed amid tense U.S.-China relations and the severe pandemic, the difficulties they had encountered, and their future plans. Several representatives noted that the difficulty of returning to China over the past two years due to travel restrictions had greatly affected their business development and personal lives, and expressed hope of being able to travel to China soon for business or to visit family. Others spoke about the impact of U.S.-China relations on their businesses and the effects of the pandemic on their operations and staff. Everyone spoke candidly, and the event lasted 150 minutes. Counselor Wu Peimin and Consul Fu Lin engaged warmly with attendees, noting that the participating companies had been operating in the United States for many years, each with its own strengths and deep experience in its field. They expressed strong understanding of the difficulties these businesses face, praised their efforts to integrate into local society, operate in compliance with regulations, and actively give back to their local communities, and carefully noted everyone's views. Counselor Wu Peimin. Consul Fu Lin. Counselor Wu also praised the Chamber's past work and expressed hope that it would continue to provide greater support to member companies going forward, safeguard the legitimate interests of member companies, help them gain recognition and a voice within local society, and serve as a bridge by maintaining strong coordination with both the Chinese government and local U.S. governments.
items.body_zh: _2022年06月03日 13:42_ __ _ _ _ _ _ 陕西 _ 2022年6月1日，中国驻旧金山总领馆经商处邬沛民参赞和付琳领事到访CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会，通过视频方式与商会的会员单位代表亲切座谈。 邬沛民参赞和付琳领事 与CCCWA商会会员于线上亲切座谈 在座谈会上，吕莉莉会长介绍了商会的基本情况，在疫情期间， ** 商会在不间断地促进会员间的交流与互动，举办过30多次线上活动 ** ，在公益活动方面组织了防疫用品及Food with Love 40万美元爱心餐的捐赠活动， 今年以来： * 商会规模不断发展壮大； * 因疫情延误的商会的制度化工作重启并有序进行； * 加强会员的社群联系，服务会员工作不断创新； * 与更多的非营利组织合作。协同发展。 各会员单位代表介绍了在中美关系紧张、疫情严重的情况下各自企业的发展情况、遇到的困难、未来的计划等 ，多位代表提出近两年来由于旅行限制令导致的回国难对商务发展及个人生活的极大影响，期待近期能顺利回到中国进行商务活动或探亲；也有代表讲到中美关系对业务的影响，疫情对业务及公司人员的影响等等，大家畅所欲言，活动持续进行了150分钟， 邬沛民参赞和付琳领事与大家亲切互动，认为参会的 企业在美国发展多年，各有所长，在各自的专业领域都很有经验，对企业面临的困难非常理解，对他们融入当地社会、合规发展及为当地社区积极奉献的精神非常赞赏，并认真记录了大家的心声 。 邬沛民参赞 付琳领事 邬沛民参赞也赞扬了商会过去所做的工作，希望未来商会继续为会员企业提供更多帮助，维护会员企业的应得利益，在当地社会获得认可及发声，并做好与中国政府及美国当地政府的对接工作，发挥桥梁作用。

items.title_en: U.S. Representative Adam Smith and Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee Visit CCCWA
items.title_zh: 联邦众议员Adam Smith先生和Bellevue市政议员Conrad Lee先生来访CCCWA
items.body_en: _February 28, 2022 15:50_ __ _ _ _ _ On February 25, 2022, U.S. Representative Adam Smith and Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee visited the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), bringing New Year's greetings to members, **and held a discussion with member representatives from industries including computer technology, real estate development, building materials, international trade, and investment on topics of shared concern such as U.S.-China relations, the Russia-Ukraine war, and community safety.** Representative Smith shared his views on key national security issues and issues affecting U.S.-China relations. Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee moderated the discussion. Adam Smith and Conrad Lee pose for a photo with CCCWA members. Adam Smith: Representative Smith represents Washington's 9th Congressional District and serves as Chairman of the Armed Services Committee. He also co-chairs the Congressional Effective Foreign Assistance Caucus, a caucus he helped create. As a longtime advocate for strengthening U.S. diplomacy and development, **Representative Smith holds many important views on how to improve U.S.-China relations.** **Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee has long cared about and supported the development of the local Chinese American community, backing numerous community service activities.** Adam Smith (left) and Conrad Lee (right). They also listened to some of the business difficulties and challenges raised by attending representatives and offered practical, actionable suggestions, noting that the greater Puget Sound region holds tremendous potential for long-term growth, and encouraged everyone to overcome temporary difficulties and achieve greater business success. **Special thanks to member company iSoftStone for providing the venue for this event.**
items.body_zh: _2022年02月28日 15:50_ __ _ _ _ _ 2022 年 2 月 2 5 日，联邦众议员 Adam Smith 先生和 Bellevue 市政议员 Co nr ad Lee 先生来访华盛顿州中国总商会（ CCCWA ），给会员们送来新春祝福， **并对大家关心的中美关系、俄乌战争、社区安全等问题，与来自计算机科技、房地产开发、建材、国际贸易、投资等多个行业的会员单位代表进行了座谈** 。 史密斯众议员分享了他对关键国家安全问题以及影响美中关系的问题的看法。 Bellevue 市政议员 Co nrad Lee 先生主持会谈。 Adam Smith先生和Conrad Lee先生 与CCCWA会员合影留念 Adam Smith先生 史密斯议员代表华盛顿州的第9国会选区，并担任武装部队的主席。史密斯众议员还担任有效对外援助国会核心小组的联合主席，这个小组是他帮助创建的核心小组。作为加强美国外交与发展的长期倡导者， **史密斯众议员就如何改善美中关系有很多重要看法。** ** Bellevue市政议员Conred Lee先生一直关心和支持当地华裔社区的发展，支持了华裔社区的大量公益活动。 ** 左Adam Smith先生、右Conrad Lee先生 他们还倾听了参会代表的一些商务方面的困难和挑战 , 并给出切实可行的建议 , 认为普吉特湾地区未来长远发展有极大潜力，鼓励大家克服暂时的困难，取得更大的商业成就。 ** 鸣谢会员单位软通动力（ISoftStone ）公司提供活动场地。 **

items.title_en: Years Change, but Our Founding Spirit Remains | CCCWA Wishes Everyone a Happy New Year
items.title_zh: 更迭的是岁月、不变的是初心|CCCWA祝大家新年快乐
items.body_en: _December 31, 2021 17:02_ __ _ _ _ _ HAPPY NEW YEAR Friends from all social circles who care about and support the development of Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State: Flick away the dust of the years, and let laughter and tears, love and sorrow settle in our hearts into a thick, crystalline amber. The year 2021, full of difficulties and challenges, is coming to an end, and the year 2022, full of hope, is about to begin. On this special day, we send you our warm greetings and best wishes for the New Year. We have shared so much together, and you have always pulled us through. Thank you for standing behind us in everything we do. Wish you special joy for the holidays and all year long. Follow your passion and make it come true. Happy New Year!
items.body_zh: _2021年12月31日 17:02_ __ _ _ _ _ HAPPY NEW YEAR Friends from all social circles who care about and support the development of Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State： 关心和支持美国华盛顿州中国总商会发展的各界朋友们： Flick the years of dust, let laughters and tears, love and sorrow cement in the minds of a thick crystal amber. 拂去岁月之尘，让欢笑和泪水、爱与哀愁在心中凝成一颗厚重的晶莹琥珀。 The year 2021, full of difficulties and challenges，is coming to an end, and the year 2022 which is full of hope is coming. 充满困难和挑战的2021年即将过去，充满希望的2022年即将到来。 On this special day I send you warm greetings and best wishes for the New Year. 在这特殊的日子，向你致以衷心的感谢和新年的祝福。 We share so much together. And you always pull us through. Thank you for standing behind us in all that we do. 我们一起分享过那么多，感谢你一直支持着我们。 Wish you special joy for the holidays and all year. 祝你在节日和新的一年中，万事吉祥如意！ Follow your passion and make it come true. 发挥你的热情，让理想变为现实。 Happy New Year! 新年快乐！

items.title_en: Chinese Americans Should Stay Alert to Telecom and Online Fraud
items.title_zh: 在美华人需谨慎防范电信网络诈骗
items.body_en: _November 22, 2021 17:05_ __ _ _ _ _ **Case Study 1: Not Who They Claimed to Be** In May 2021, an elderly woman surnamed K living in the San Francisco Bay Area received a call from someone claiming to be Chinese police, telling her she was suspected of a crime in China and that she needed to transfer all funds under her name to a police-designated account for "security verification." The caller also said the case would be reported to U.S. police for enforcement. A few days later, several people claiming to be U.S. police officers came to Ms. K's home to "handle the case," instructing her on the spot to transfer roughly $200,000 in lifetime savings to a so-called safe account, and took her passport, green card, and Social Security card. Only after a family member alerted her did Ms. K realize she had been scammed — by then she could no longer reach the so-called "police," and when she contacted the receiving bank she was told the funds had already been quickly transferred overseas by the criminals. **Prevention Tips** Scammers commonly fabricate a story that you are suspected of a crime in order to create psychological fear. As long as you abide by the law, do not believe any "case" you could never plausibly be involved in. U.S. law enforcement follows established procedures for arrests and deportations; do not readily believe anyone on the phone who claims to have "official standing," no matter what reason they give or what pressure they apply. Do not believe any phone claim that you are about to be arrested or deported, and do not panic because of it. In particular, do not rush to wire money under pressure without first thoroughly discussing the situation with family or friends. **Case Study 2: Hello, You Have a Package** In August 2021, a woman surnamed L living in the San Francisco Bay Area received a call from someone claiming to be DHL customer service, saying that an unusual package addressed to her had arrived from China containing 24 undeclared Chinese passports, in violation of the law. The caller accurately recited Ms. L's address, name, and other personal information, gave unfamiliar "sender" details, and offered to transfer the call to a local police station in China so she could file a report. Ms. L was highly alert and hung up, but the "customer service representative" kept calling repeatedly over several days, insisting the situation was extremely serious and that she would face legal consequences. This was a classic telecom scam — the best response is simply not to believe it and not to answer such calls. **Prevention Tips** Recently, there has been a growing number of cases in which Chinese citizens have been targeted by scam rings impersonating DHL, FedEx, and other courier companies using claims of abnormal packages. Scammers commonly fabricate a story that you are suspected of a crime in order to create psychological fear. Chinese law enforcement never handles cases over the internet, phone, chat apps, or fax, and never sends arrest warrants, detention orders, or other legal documents directly to suspects through these channels. As long as you abide by the law, do not believe any "case" you could never plausibly be involved in.
items.body_zh: _2021年11月22日 17:05_ __ _ _ _ _ **典型案例一：来的不是客** 2021年5月，在旧金山湾区居住的一位老年女士K，接自称中国警方电话表示，她涉嫌在中国犯罪，必须把名下所有存款转至警方指定账户进行安全验证。来电者还称将通报美国警方进行执法。几日后，数位自称美国警方的人来到K的住所进行“办案”，现场指导K女士把约20万美元毕生积蓄转至所谓安全账户，并收走K女士护照、绿卡、SSN卡。直到K女士在家人提醒下发觉遭遇诈骗后，已无法联系到所谓“警方”，联系收款银行被告知该款项已很快被犯罪分子跨境转出。 **防范提醒** 诈骗分子的常用套路是编造你涉嫌犯罪的故事情节，给你造成心理恐惧。只要你遵纪守法，就不要听信任何你从未有任何涉入可能的“案件”。美国执法部门对当事人进行拘捕、遣返有既定程序，不要轻信电话中任何人声称的“官方背景”，无论对方以何种理由，向你施加何种压力，不要相信任何通过电话声称要对你进行拘捕、遣返的说法，更不要因此惊慌失措。尤其是不要在未与亲友进行充分沟通商量的情况下，迫于压力而匆忙决定汇款。 **典型案例二：您好！有您的快递** 2021年8月，在旧金山湾区居住的L女士，她接到自称DHL公司的客服电话，称她名下有一个从中国来美国的异常包裹，内有24本未申报的中国护照，违反了有关法律。来电人详细说出了L女士的地址和姓名等信息，提供了陌生的“寄件人”信息，并称可以帮L女士转接电话至中国当地派出所报警。C女士十分警觉，挂掉电话，但“客服人员”连续多日不停地致电，表示情况十分严重，L女士需承担法律后果。此系典型电信诈骗，最好的做法就是不信、不接听有关来电。 **防范提醒** 近来，中国公民关于遭遇诈骗集团假冒DHL、FedEx快递公司以包裹异常等理由行骗的现象不断增加。诈骗分子的常用套路是编造你涉嫌犯罪的故事情节，给你造成心理恐惧。中国执法部门也绝对不会通过网络、电话、聊天工具、传真等形式办案，不会通过这些渠道点对点地给违法犯罪当事人发送通缉令、拘留证、逮捕证等法律文书。只要你遵纪守法，就不要听信任何你从未有任何涉入可能的“案件”。

items.title_en: China Town Hall National Annual Webcast to Be Held Online on October 19
items.title_zh: China Town Hall全美年会网络直播活动将于10月19日举行
items.body_en: _October 11, 2021 12:03_ __ _ _ _ _ The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State is proud to promote this year's CHINA Town Hall, which will take place online on Tuesday, Oct. 19th, 2021, from 4-6pm PDT. CNN host and best-selling author Fareed Zakaria will be the featured speaker. Following Zakaria's live webcast, a panel of China experts will offer a local perspective on US-China relations and the issues that are having an impact on the Seattle community, its institutions, and the people themselves. This event is sponsored by the National Committee on U.S.-China Relations, Seattle University, and the University of Washington. **Event Details** **Time** Tuesday, October 19, 2021 / 4:00 – 6:00 pm PST **This event is held as an online meeting.** **To attend, please scan the QR code to register.** **Host** National Committee on U.S.-China Relations - www.ncuscr.org **Co-host / Sponsor** Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State - CCCWA - http://www.ccc-wa.org/ **Contact:** **Local:** Aaron Rose 206-650-8004; aaron.rose@roi3.com **National:** Joseph Weed, Director of Communications, National Committee on U.S.-China Relations 646-604-8001; jweed@ncuscr.org

CNN host and best-selling author Fareed Zakaria will be the featured speaker . Following Zakaria's live webcast, a panel of China experts will offer a local perspective on US-China relations and the issues that are having an impact on the Seattle community, its institutions, and the people themselves . 本次活动由美中关系全国委员会、西雅图大学和华盛顿大学主办。由CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会等多个非营利组织协办。 This event is sponsored by the National Committee on U.S.-China Relations, Seattle University, and the University of Washington. ** 活动参加详情如下 ** ** 时间 ** Tuesday, October 19, 2021 / 4:00 – 6:00 pm PST ** 本次活动为网络会议形式， ** ** 意向参会请扫码进行注册 ** **

items.title_en: Washington State Chinese American Real Estate Developers Industry Salon Successfully Held
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州房地产开发商行业分析沙龙活动成功举办
items.body_en: _September 10, 2021 09:56_ __ _ _ _ _ **On September 8, CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) resumed in-person gatherings, successfully hosting a Washington State Chinese American Real Estate Developers Industry Analysis Salon.** Since Washington State issued its stay-at-home order in March 2020, CCCWA's gatherings had all been held online — **this was the first in-person gathering since the pandemic began.** Attendance was limited to 15 people, and the event was held at the scenic Bellevue Botanical Garden. **More than 10 Chinese American real estate development companies active in Washington State attended the gathering.** Participants shared updates on their respective projects during the pandemic, changes in the financial and land markets, and detailed lessons learned in financing, permitting and approvals, construction costs, project timelines, and post-completion tax abatement policies. Discussion was lively, comparing similarities and differences between the greater Seattle real estate market and the national market, changes in suburban versus urban markets within greater Seattle, and shifts across industrial, hotel, office, rental apartment, and for-sale condominium sectors. **With ample market liquidity and relatively low interest rates, the U.S. real estate market overall is performing well.** Since late spring this year, commercial real estate in the greater Seattle area has recovered quickly, land transactions have been active, and multiple property types have returned to pre-pandemic levels or even reached new highs. Looking to the long term, attendees remain very optimistic about the greater Seattle real estate market. This event was co-hosted by **CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State)** and the **Seattle Real Estate Investment Club**, and co-organized by **MZA Architecture** and **Kidder Mathews**, a commercial real estate brokerage.
items.body_zh: _2021年09月10日 09:56_ __ _ _ _ _ **9月8日，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会重启线下聚会活动，成功举办了华盛顿州华裔地产开发商行业分析沙** **龙** 。自2020年3月华州颁发居家令以来，CCCWA的聚会活动都是线上聚会形式， **这是疫情后的第一次线下聚会** ，这次聚会总人数控制在15人，地点选在了风景优美的贝尔维尤植物园。 **超过10家活跃在华盛顿州的华裔房地产开发公司参加了聚会** ， 大家分享了疫情期间各自的项目进展情况，金融市场、土地交易市场的变化，以及在具体开发过程中融资、规划审批、建造成本、工期、建成后税收减免政策等方面一些细节性的经验和教训。 大家热烈互动， 讨论比较了大西雅图地区和全美国房地产市场的异同、大西雅图地区郊区市场和市区市场的不同变化，工业地产、酒店、办公楼、出租型公寓、销售型公寓等多种业态的市场变化。 **在当前市场流动性充裕、利率水平较低的情况下，全美房地产市场走势良好。** 今年春末开始， 大西雅图地区商业地产复苏速度很快，土地市场交易活跃，多种业态的地产恢复到疫情前的水平甚至再创新高。从长期来看，大家对大西雅图地区的房地产市场仍然非常看好。 本次活动由 ** CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 ** 和 ** 西雅图地产投资俱乐部 ** 联合主办，由 ** MZA建筑设计事务所 ** 和 ** 基德（Kidder Mathews）商业地产经纪公司 ** 协办。

items.title_en: China Town Hall National Annual Webcast to Be Held Online on November 10
items.title_zh: China Town Hall全美年会网络直播活动将于11月10日举行
items.body_en: _November 5, 2020 14:54_ __ _ _ _ _ The China Town Hall national annual webcast, jointly hosted by the National Committee on U.S.-China Relations, Seattle University, and the University of Washington, will be held on November 10, 2020, from 4:00 to 6:00 pm U.S. Pacific Time. The event features a keynote by renowned American investor, philanthropist, and New York Times best-selling author Ray Dalio, offering an in-depth discussion of the key issues, risks, and opportunities in U.S.-China relations against today's complex global backdrop, and their relationship to local community interests. After the keynote, a panel of China experts from both the U.S. and China will share their views on U.S.-China relations in a group discussion. Attendees can interact with the guests through the livestream. The event has two parts: the first is an online discussion of the key factors, risks, and opportunities in U.S.-China relations; the second is an interactive session. **Event Details** **Time** Tuesday, November 10, 2020 / 4:00 – 6:00 pm PST **Speaker Information** https://www.ncuscr.org/event/CTH2020-ray-dalio **This event is held as an online meeting.** **To attend, please click the link below to register** https://washington.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_dicnY3TuRVeLIf-w0ZvndQ **Host** National Committee on U.S.-China Relations - www.ncuscr.org **Co-host / Sponsor** Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State - CCCWA - http://www.ccc-wa.org/ **Contact:** **Local:** Aaron Rose 206-650-8004; aaron.rose@roi3.com **National:** Joseph Weed, Director of Communications, National Committee on U.S.-China Relations 646-604-8001; jweed@ncuscr.org
items.body_zh: _2020年11月05日 14:54_ __ _ _ _ _ 由 National Committee on U.S. - China Relations 、 Seattle University 和 University of Washington 共同主办的China Town Hall全美年会网络直播活动将于 2020年11月10日美国太平洋时间下午四点到六点举行 。活动由美国著名的投资家、慈善家以及纽约时报最畅销作者Ray Dalio做主题演讲， 就当今复杂的全球关系背景下，深入探讨中美关系中的关键问题、风险和机遇及与当地社区利益关系 。在主题演讲后，由来自中美的多位中国问题专家将在小组讨论中对美中关系提出自己的看法。参会者可以通过直播与嘉宾互通交流。 活动分为两部分： 第一部分为线上讨论中美关系的关键因素、风险以及机会；第二部分为互动环节。 ** 活动参加详情如下 ** ** 时间 ** Tuesday, November 10, 2020 / 4:00 – 6:00 pm PST ** 主讲人信息 ** https://www.ncuscr.org/event/CTH2020-ray-dalio ** 本次活动为网络会议形式， ** ** 意向参会请点击以下链接进行注册 ** https://washington.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_dicnY3TuRVeLIf-w0ZvndQ ** 主办方信息 ** National Committee on U.S.-China Relations - www.ncuscr.org ** 协办赞助商 ** 华盛顿州中国总商会 - CCCWA - http://www.ccc-wa.org/ ** 联系方式: ** ** Local: ** Aaron Rose 206-650-8004; aaron.rose@roi3.com ** National: ** Joseph Weed Director of Communications National Committee on U.S.-China Relations 646-604-8001;

items.title_en: CCCWA and WSCRC Co-Host the 2020 Chinese Restaurant Industry Entrepreneurship Forum (Session Two)
items.title_zh: CCCWA 和WSCRC联合主办2020 中餐业创业论坛 （第二期）
items.body_en: _August 28, 2020, 12:54_ __ _ _ _ _ On August 7, 2020, the second session of the 2020 Washington State Chinese Restaurant Industry Entrepreneurship Forum was successfully held. Speakers engaged in in-depth discussion of the challenges and opportunities the pandemic has brought to the Chinese restaurant industry, addressing multiple perspectives including urban planning and architectural design, real estate investment, consumer data analysis for food-delivery companies, legal matters related to restaurant industry investment, and the practical operation of restaurant brands. **President of Studio 19 Architects** **Hui Tian** Architect Hui Tian shared, from the perspective of urban planning and architectural design, that as city zoning has been upgraded, demand for restaurants within cities has also increased; at the same time, the restaurant industry and commercial real estate share a mutually reinforcing, mutually beneficial relationship, with restaurant industry growth closely tied to urban development and expansion. **CEO of Great Earth Realty** **Larry Eu** Larry shared his experience and advice on shifting trends in commercial real estate investment, site selection strategies for restaurant companies' medium- to long-term development, and negotiation and signing strategies for restaurant tenants in lease agreements. **Seattle-area General Manager of Chowbus Inc.** **Michelle Lei** Michelle shared, from the perspective of the food-delivery company Chowbus, market insights drawn from analyzing restaurant and consumer marketing and spending data, noting that the Chinese restaurant industry is steadily expanding its non-Asian customer base, and that brand recognition and food quality are key to increasing sales and broadening the customer base. **Seattle Manager of LIUYISHOU HOT POT** **Jason Huang** Drawing on more than 30 years of experience managing restaurant businesses, Jason summarized the opportunities and challenges facing the Chinese restaurant industry amid the pandemic, and shared comprehensive restaurant operating experience covering business operations, product standardization, operating cost structure, service standard control, and key considerations for brand franchising. **Marketing Manager of Happy Lamb Hot Pot** **David Li** From the perspective of building a new restaurant brand, David shared the measures new-brand companies have taken during the pandemic to balance government requirements with consumer demand, and offered a detailed analysis of ways to expand in the North American consumer market, brand marketing plans, high-quality product standardization control, and potential future directions for investment and expansion. **Cai & Associates** **Attorney Cai Qing** From a legal perspective, Attorney Cai Qing summarized and shared relevant experience regarding restaurant franchise models, government approval and review processes, and restaurant lease agreements, among other topics. Attendees exchanged ideas, shared experience with one another, and engaged in in-depth discussion of the future development of the restaurant industry. CCCWA hopes that this forum provided restaurant companies, investors interested in the restaurant industry, and industry professionals with an efficient, high-quality platform and opportunity for exchange and sharing, helping restaurant businesses successfully weather the difficult pandemic period and bring a new wave of restaurant industry investment in the near future. The forum was moderated by Michelle Zou, founder of Pacific Consulting, and was attended by Ms. Lily Lyu, President of CCCWA (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State), and Ms. Wang Man, Vice President of WSCRC (Washington State China Relations Council), who spoke on behalf of the host organizations.
items.body_zh: _2020年08月28日 12:54_ __ _ _ _ _ 2020年8月7日，2020华州中餐业创业论坛第二期顺利举办，论坛嘉宾们围绕疫情给中餐业带来的挑战与机遇，从城市规划、建筑设计；地产投资；送餐企业的消费者数据分析；餐饮业投资法律相关事宜；以及餐饮品牌实际运营等多个角度，进行了深入的分享沟通。 **Studio 19 Architects 总裁** ** 田晖 ** 田晖建筑设计师从城市规划、建筑设计的角度分享了由于城市Zoning提升，城市对餐饮业的需求也在增加；同时餐饮业与商业地产拥有相辅相成互惠互利的关系，餐饮业的发展与城市的发展拓展紧密相关。 **Great Earth Realty CEO** ** Larry Eu ** Larry 从商业地产投资趋势变化，餐饮业企业中长期发展店面位置选择，餐饮业企业作为租户在店面租赁合同的谈判与签署的策略等角度分享了经验与建议。 **Chowbus Inc.西雅图地区总经理** ** Michelle Lei ** Michelle从Chowbus送餐企业的角度，分享了通过分析餐饮企业、消费者的营销及消费数据所得到的市场信息，提到了中餐业在稳步拓展非亚裔客户群体，品牌中餐知名度与餐品质量是提升销售额拓宽销售群体的重点。 ** ** **刘一手（LIUYISHOU HOT POT）西雅图负责人** ** Jason Huang ** Jason从拥有30余年餐饮企业经营管理的角度，总结了中餐业在疫情环境下面临的机遇与挑战，详细分享了餐饮业企业经营、产品标准化、运营成本结构、服务标准管控、品牌加盟关键考察点等全方面的餐饮企业运营经验。 **快乐小羊（Happy Lamb Hot Pot）市场经理** ** David Li ** David从餐饮新品牌打造的角度，分享了疫情期间新品牌企业在应对政府要求与消费者需求之间的平衡措施，详细分析了北美消费者市场拓展方式、品牌营销方案、产品标准化高品质管控、以及未来潜在的投资与拓展方向。 **蔡和蔡律师事务所（Cai &Associates） ** ** 蔡清律师 ** 蔡清律师从法律角度，从餐饮企业加盟模式、政府相关审核批准流程、餐饮业店面租赁合同等多方面，总结并分享了相关经验经历。 与会嘉宾们相互沟通、经验共享、共同对餐饮业未来的发展进行了深入的探讨与交流。CCCWA希望此次论坛，对各餐饮企业、对餐饮业感兴趣的投资人、以及对相关产业从业者，提供了高效高质量的交流共享平台及机会，帮助各餐饮企业顺利度过艰苦的疫情期，并能在不久的将来带来餐饮业投资的新热潮。 论坛由太平洋咨询创始人 Michelle Zou主持，CCCWA（华盛顿州中国总商会）会长吕莉莉女士、WSCRC（华盛顿州中国理事会）副会长王蔓出席论坛并代表主办单位讲话。

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 19: Disposition of Assets After Immigration — Featured Guests Invited by Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm
items.title_zh: 第19期CCCWA“每周一星”: 移民资产处置问题 蔡律师事务所蔡清律师特邀嘉宾分享
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _August 26, 2020 08:00_ __ _ _ _ _ The number of Chinese families settling and becoming naturalized in the United States continues to grow. After immigrating, many find it confusing how to handle the assets they held in China before obtaining immigration status. For example: with the pandemic making it impossible to return to China in person, how can one authorize relatives in China to handle the inheritance or sale of assets through remote notarization; how to complete the foreign-exchange purchase and remittance of the proceeds after the assets are disposed of; and, once those funds are remitted into the U.S., how to handle tax reporting and what to watch out for. Through its member Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State invited experts in this area to share their knowledge. **Guest Speaker:** Ms. Diao Shu, Assistant Director of the Chengdu Lüzheng Notary Office in Sichuan Province (formerly the Sichuan Provincial Notary Office), sharing "How to handle powers of attorney and other notarization procedures through overseas remote video notarization, and solutions for special situations encountered by overseas Chinese in the process." **Guest Speaker:** Coco Bai, an international banking foreign-exchange specialist with extensive hands-on experience, sharing how to handle the transfer of immigration assets after immigrating. **Guest Speaker:** Shirley Tan, a former senior tax examiner at the IRS Seattle office, sharing tax-reporting matters for U.S. citizens and permanent residents after remitting proceeds from overseas asset disposition into the United States. **Pacific Time, Friday, August 28, 8:00pm–9:30pm** **Zoom** **To watch this livestream, please click the link below:** Join Zoom Meeting https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 One tap mobile +12532158782,,4696970869# US (Tacoma) +16699006833,,4696970869# US (San Jose)

items.title_en: CCCWA Weekly Star #19: Immigration Asset Disposal
items.title_zh: 第19期CCCWA“每周一星”：移民资产处置问题
items.summary_en: Attorney Cai discusses immigration asset management challenges for Chinese families settling in the US.
items.summary_zh: 蔡律师讨论华裔家庭在海外安家落户过程中的资产管理挑战。
items.body_en:
During the height of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) launched its "Weekly Star" (每周一星) online series — a recurring webinar bringing together professionals and experts to address the most pressing concerns facing the Chinese-American business community in the Greater Seattle area.

The 19th installment of the series featured Attorney Cai Qing of Cai Law Firm as a special guest speaker. Attorney Cai addressed the complex challenges that Chinese immigrants face when managing and disposing of assets across international borders — a topic that became especially urgent during the pandemic when in-person consultations, international travel, and cross-border financial operations were severely disrupted.

## Key Topics Covered

**Remote notarization:** With physical access to notaries and embassies restricted, Attorney Cai explained the legal validity of remote notarization for documents involving US-based property and assets, and which countries and jurisdictions recognize these procedures.

**Inheritance and estate transfer:** For families with assets in both China and the US, Attorney Cai outlined the procedures for transferring inherited property across borders, including required documentation and timelines. He highlighted common pitfalls that can delay or invalidate inheritance claims.

**Real estate disposal from abroad:** Many Chinese immigrants who own US real estate found themselves unable to return to the US during the pandemic. Attorney Cai discussed how to legally authorize a local representative to manage or sell property on your behalf, including power-of-attorney requirements.

**Cross-border fund transfers:** With currency controls and pandemic-era banking restrictions in place, Attorney Cai explained legal channels for moving funds between China and the US, including IRS reporting requirements for foreign financial accounts (FBAR and FATCA compliance).

## About the Weekly Star Series

CCCWA's Weekly Star series was launched in early 2020 in response to the pandemic, providing a free, accessible platform for Chinese-American business owners and community members to access expert guidance during an unprecedented time. Each session featured a different guest speaker covering a topic relevant to the community's immediate needs — from healthcare and finance to legal affairs and business strategy.

The series became one of CCCWA's most impactful community programs during the pandemic, reaching hundreds of members and non-members alike through live streaming and recorded broadcasts.
items.body_zh:
讲座内容：目前在美国定居及入籍的中国家庭人数不断增加。移民后对在取得移民身份之前的中国境内财产如何处置令不少人感到困惑。例如因疫情本人无法回到国内，如何通过远程公证来委托国内亲人办理继承或出售资产事宜，对资产处置后的款项如何完成购汇和汇出境外，该款项汇入美国后如何进行税务申报及应注意问题。华州中国总商会通过其会员蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师邀请了这方面的行家来予以分享。

**主讲嘉宾：**四川省成都市律政公证处（原四川省公证处）主任助理刁姝女士分享“如何通过海外远程视频公证办理委托及其它公证手续以及海外华人在办理中特殊情况处理方案”

**主讲嘉宾：**有丰富实操经验的国际银行外汇专员Coco Bai分享移民后如何办理移民资产转移

**主讲嘉宾：**前美国联邦税务局西雅图办公室资深查税官Shirley Tan分享美国公民和永久居民把境外资产处置款汇入美国后税务申报事宜

items.title_en: 19th CCCWA 'Star of the Week': Immigrant Asset Disposition Issues — Special Guests Invited by Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Office
items.title_zh: 第19期CCCWA“每周一星”: 移民资产处置问题 蔡律师事务所蔡清律师特邀嘉宾分享
items.summary_en: Lecture topics: The number of Chinese families settling and naturalizing in the US continues to grow. After immigrating, many are unsure how to handle property they owned in China prior to obtaining immigrant status — for example, how to use remote notarization to authorize family members back home to handle inheritance or asset sales when the pandemic prevents personal travel back to China.
items.summary_zh: ​讲座内容：目前在美国定居及入籍的中国家庭人数不断增加。移民后对在取得移民身份之前的中国境内财产如何处置令不少人感到困惑。例如因疫情本人无法回到国内，如何通过远程公证来委托国内亲人办理继承或出售资产事宜，对资产处置后的款项如何完成购汇和汇出境外，该款项汇入美国后如何进行税务申报及应注意问题。华州中国总商会通过其会员蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师邀请了这方面的行家来予以分享。
items.body_en:
Lecture topics: The number of Chinese families settling and naturalizing in the US continues to grow. After immigrating, many are unsure how to handle property they owned in China prior to obtaining immigrant status — for example, how to use remote notarization to authorize family members back home to handle inheritance or asset sales when the pandemic prevents personal travel back to China, how to complete currency exchange and transfer proceeds from asset sales overseas, and how to handle tax reporting and other considerations once those funds arrive in the US. CCCWA, through member Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Office, invited experts in this field to share their knowledge.

Speaker: Ms. Diao Shu, Assistant Director of the Lyzheng Notary Public Office of Chengdu, Sichuan Province (formerly the Sichuan Provincial Notary Office), sharing on how to handle powers of attorney and other notarization procedures through overseas remote video notarization, and how to handle special circumstances for overseas Chinese during the process.

Speaker: Coco Bai, an international bank foreign exchange specialist with extensive hands-on experience, sharing on how to handle the transfer of immigrant assets after immigration.

Speaker: Shirley Tan, former Senior Revenue Agent at the Seattle office of the IRS, sharing on tax reporting considerations for US citizens and permanent residents when transferring proceeds from overseas asset sales into the US.

Friday, August 28th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time.

To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Join Zoom Meeting https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869

Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 One tap mobile: +1 253 215 8782,,4696970869# US (Tacoma), +1 669 900 6833,,4696970869# US (San Jose)

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Unites Community Against COVID-19
items.title_zh: 华州中华总商会基金会团结社区共抗新冠疫情
items.summary_en: CCCWA Foundation coordinated with local businesses and volunteers across Greater Seattle to support communities affected by COVID-19.
items.summary_zh: CCCWA与西雅图地区各个企业和志愿者协调配合，支持受COVID-19影响的社区。
items.body_en:
When COVID-19 swept through Washington State in early 2020, the Chinese-American community faced unique challenges — stigma, language barriers, economic hardship, and uncertainty. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) mobilized quickly, coordinating a wide-ranging community relief effort through its foundation arm.

Working alongside local businesses, volunteers, and community partners across Greater Seattle, CCCWA helped organize and fund multiple parallel initiatives designed to address the most urgent needs of its members and the broader community.

## Food with Love (爱心午餐)

One of CCCWA's most visible relief programs was "Food with Love" (爱心午餐) — a charity meal initiative that organized Chinese restaurants to prepare and deliver hundreds of free meals daily to frontline workers at local hospitals, police stations, and fire departments. The program served a dual purpose: supporting healthcare and public safety workers during an exhausting crisis, and keeping Chinese-owned restaurants operating at a time when dining rooms were closed and revenue had collapsed.

Volunteer drivers, coordinated through CCCWA's network, picked up prepared meals from participating restaurants each day and delivered them across Seattle, Bellevue, and surrounding areas. Among the participating restaurants was Chowbus, whose delivery team became a regular presence at hospital entrances, becoming emblematic of the community's spirit of care and generosity.

## Fundraising and Community Outreach

CCCWA launched a fundraising campaign to sustain the Food with Love initiative and provide emergency financial support to member businesses and families in need. The campaign received support from community donors across Washington State and beyond, reflecting the deep ties within the Chinese-American business community.

At the same time, CCCWA worked to combat misinformation and provide accurate public health information to Chinese-language audiences, partnering with healthcare professionals and government agencies to produce bilingual content on COVID prevention, testing, and available resources.

## Media Recognition

The scale and impact of CCCWA's COVID relief efforts drew widespread attention. KIRO 7 News covered the "Food with Love" initiative in a multi-part series, introducing Seattle viewers to the restaurants and volunteers at the heart of the program and highlighting the Chinese-American community's contribution to the city's pandemic response.

CCCWA's relief work during COVID-19 became a defining moment for the organization, demonstrating its capacity to mobilize quickly, serve a broad constituency, and forge lasting partnerships with government, media, and the broader Seattle business community.
items.body_zh:
2020年初，新冠疫情席卷华盛顿州，华裔美国人社区面临着独特的挑战——污名化、语言障碍、经济困难和不确定性。华州中华总商会（CCCWA）迅速行动，通过其基金会部门协调开展了一场覆盖面广泛的社区救助行动。

华州中华总商会与大西雅图地区的本地企业、志愿者及社区合作伙伴携手，协助组织并资助了多项并行开展的行动计划，以应对会员及广大社区最迫切的需求。

## 爱心午餐（Food with Love）

华州中华总商会最具影响力的救助项目之一便是“爱心午餐”（Food with Love）——这是一项慈善送餐行动，组织多家中餐馆每日为本地医院、警察局和消防局的一线工作人员准备并配送数百份免费餐食。该项目具有双重意义：一方面在这场令人身心俱疲的危机中支持医护及公共安全工作者，另一方面在堂食停摆、营收锐减之际，帮助华人餐馆维持运营。

通过华州中华总商会网络协调的志愿者司机每天从参与餐馆取餐，配送至西雅图、贝尔维尤及周边地区。参与该项目的餐馆之一便是Chowbus，其配送团队频繁出现在各医院门口，成为社区关爱与慷慨精神的象征。

## 募捐与社区宣传

华州中华总商会发起了一项募捐活动，以维持“爱心午餐”项目的持续运作，并为有需要的会员企业和家庭提供紧急资金支持。该活动得到了来自华盛顿州乃至更广泛地区社区捐助者的支持，充分体现了华裔美国商业社区内部的深厚联系。

与此同时，华州中华总商会致力于打击不实信息，为华语受众提供准确的公共卫生信息，并与医疗专业人士及政府机构合作，制作有关新冠预防、检测及可用资源的双语内容。

## 媒体报道

华州中华总商会新冠救助行动的规模与影响力引起了广泛关注。KIRO 7新闻台以多集系列报道的形式对“爱心午餐”项目进行了报道，向西雅图观众介绍了该项目背后的餐馆与志愿者，并突显了华裔美国人社区在这座城市抗疫工作中所做出的贡献。

华州中华总商会在新冠疫情期间开展的救助工作，成为该机构发展历程中具有里程碑意义的时刻，充分展现了其快速动员、服务广大群体，以及与政府、媒体和西雅图更广泛商界建立持久合作关系的能力。

items.title_en: 18th CCCWA 'Star of the Week': Onelin Capital on Seattle Commercial Real Estate and New Models Amid the Pandemic
items.title_zh: 第18期CCCWA“每周一星”: Onelin Capital 疫情下的西雅图商业地产及新的模式
items.summary_en: Lecture topics: COVID-19 has changed how people live, work, and play, disrupting the global economy and triggering volatility in financial and capital markets. Different types of commercial real estate and markets have performed differently. This lecture shares and discusses how various Seattle commercial real estate categories have performed during the pandemic, along with expectations for the future market.
items.summary_zh: ​讲座内容： 新冠疫情改变了人们的生活、工作和娱乐方式，对世界经济造成冲击，也引发金融和资本市场的波动。不同商业地产和市场的表现也不尽相同。本次讲座希望与大家分享讨论西雅图不同商业地产类别在疫情当下的表现，以及我们对未来市场的预期。...
items.body_en:
Lecture topics: COVID-19 has changed how people live, work, and play, disrupting the global economy and triggering volatility in financial and capital markets. Different types of commercial real estate and markets have performed differently. This lecture shares and discusses how various Seattle commercial real estate categories have performed during the pandemic, along with expectations for the future market. It will also share Onelin Capital's business and business model as an active commercial real estate development and investment firm.

Onelin Capital has grown from real estate development, venture capital, and fund investment into a company that also operates incubators, coworking spaces, and co-living spaces. As Onelin Capital reorganizes its North American corporate structure, it is rapidly expanding its North American business.

Speaker: Zhixin Liu, Master's in Business Analytics from the University of Washington, currently an Investment Analyst and property management project lead at Onelin Capital, involved in investment analysis for real estate and early-stage tech company projects, as well as the incubation and operation of property management projects.

Speaker: Wei Zhang, Master's in Real Estate Finance and Investment from the University of Washington, currently Assistant Manager of Real Estate Investment and Development at Onelin Capital, involved in feasibility analysis, financial modeling, investment analysis, deal execution, and development across multiple projects.

Friday, August 21st, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time.

items.body_zh:
讲座内容： 新冠疫情改变了人们的生活、工作和娱乐方式，对世界经济造成冲击，也引发金融和资本市场的波动。不同商业地产和市场的表现也不尽相同。本次讲座希望与大家分享讨论西雅图不同商业地产类别在疫情当下的表现，以及我们对未来市场的预期。 同时也将分享Onelin Capital作为活跃的商业地产开发和投资企业的业务及商业模式。

Onelin Capital 从房地产开发、风险投资和基金投资，发展到同时拥有孵化器、共享办公、共享居住运营等业务。随着 Onelin Capital 在北美公司架构的重新整合，Onelin Capital 正迅速扩大北美业务。

主讲嘉宾： 刘智欣: 华盛顿大学商业分析硕士，现任一林资本投资分析师以及物管项目负责人。参与地产与早期科技企业的项目投资分析以及物管项目的孵化与运营。

主讲嘉宾： 张玮: 华盛顿大学房地产金融与投资硕士，现任一林资本地产投资开发助理经理。参与多个项目的可行性分析、财务建模、投资分析、项目交易、开发等。

items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Allison, a Credit Analyst from ICBC (USA)'s Seattle business center, introduces ICBC's business operations in the US: ICBC USA holds a full banking license, with products and services spanning retail banking, corporate banking, syndicated loans, trade finance, and more. It is a full-license commercial bank in the US and a member of the FDIC, and is the Chinese-invested bank with the most branches and widest presence in the US, operating on both the East and West Coasts across five regions — New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Seattle, and Houston — with 13 branches and 2 business centers.

Overview of ICBC USA products and services: retail banking products, commercial banking products, syndicated loans, trade services.

Allison gave an expert introduction to ICBC (USA)'s real estate loan information — personal home loans, and commercial loans.

The analyst gave thorough answers to attendees' questions. Anyone wanting to learn more about ICBC (USA)'s financial products and services can contact ICBC Seattle's professional staff through the following channels.
