items.body_zh: _2020年06月13日 14:26_ __ _ _ _ _ 西雅图地区抗疫以来备受瞩目的“爱心午餐行动”，随着华中基金会WSCRF和清华GIX北美中心的联袂加入，已经正式走向胜利冲刺阶段。 The Food with Love Program, which has drawn tremendous attention in the Seattle region, is making its final push after joining forces with the Washington State China Relations Fund (WSCRF) and Tsinghua GIX North America. 这次公益行动最初目标是向一线抗疫人员送出价值40万美元的爱心餐，截至5月31日已超额完成 ---- 餐厅全额捐餐17,620份，价值约32万美元；后续募集现金6.24万美元，已向餐厅购餐5,062份。目前总共已送出20,878份，到达26个医疗机构、警察消防等一线抗疫机构以及需要救助的社区人员手中。最近还将送出1,835份，合计送出22,713份，总价值40.5万美元。 As of May 31, the program has already exceeded its initial goal of $400,000 in meals and cash donations. Participating restaurants have donated 17,620 meals worth $320,000 and supporting parties and individuals contributed cash of $62,400, which was used to purchase 5,062 meals from the restaurants. As of today, a total of 20,878 meals have been delivered to 26 hospitals, testing sites, and police stations. Before the program ends on June 30, 2020, 1,835 additional meals will be delivered to sites in King County, which will conclude the program by successfully providing 22,713 meals. 爱心午餐行动第一阶段胜利完成，CCCWA，WSCRF和清华GIX三个非盈利机构又联合发起第二阶段行动：“你们帮助他们，我们帮助你们！” 行动呼吁社会各界继续捐款支持已经参与热心义捐的餐厅，用所得善款补贴他们所捐餐食的部分成本。众所周知，餐饮业在此次新冠疫情中遭受了前所未有的重创。在这种情况下，餐厅们依然挺身而出帮助别人。餐厅老板们的愿望简单又朴素，他们深爱这个城市，希望作为社区的一员尽到自己的力量。他们不计成本地做出美味又营养的食物，仿佛每天在进行厨艺大赛。这个特殊的行动，实际上也传播了中华美食文化，让更多的人爱上了中餐。 With the initial stage of the Food with Love program has been successfully completed, CCCWA, WSRF, and Tsinghua GIX (all three non-profits organizations) together kicked off the second phase of this program: “You help them, we’ll help you!” The program calls for all corners of society to continue to donate and support those restaurants that have already enthusiastically participated in this effort. As we all know, the restaurant industry has suffered unprecedented costs from Covid-19. Even in this situation, restaurants have still stepped forward and helped others. The motivation of these restaurant owners is pure and simple—they deeply care about this city and want to put forth their best effort as members of their communities. They make gourmet and nutritious meals without consideration of costs, repeatedly every day as if they were in a gastronomical competition. These activities are actually elevating and raising awareness of Chinese gourmet culture, making more people love and appreciate Chinese food. 图片来源：https://www.facebook.com/uwvirology/posts/2794507520660068 图片来源https://www.facebook.com/PacificMedicalCenters/photos/a.10150369457832506/10159563797392506/?type=3 **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/wXPgjx9iaH95p5qSQO2QibhBGgYGiaQf3zTzO3ia82icjRgBsr0Mzlg3iaxnMTL5VhANpZaR9czd87b1iaaMEvVkNj4gA/640?wx_fmt=png) ** 沸腾鱼乡的Leo和Lucy夫妇白手起家，在西雅图地区努力奋斗多年。这次在营业额骤降70%的情况下，仍然表示：“能够帮助到别人，是一种金钱买不到的快乐和幸福。希望出一份自己的力，能出多少就出多少，到最后如果我们撑不下去的时候再撤下来。” Husband and wife Leo and Lucy, owners of Frying Fish, started their business from scratch and have worked hard for many years in the Seattle region. Even during a sudden 70% drop in business, “helping others is a kind of priceless happiness and fortune. We want to contribute as much as we can, and pull back only when we can’t hold on any longer.” 图片来源https://www.facebook.com/foodwithlovecovid19/photos/a.111317903854945/130807111906024/?type=3 蓉城 老火锅的青年老板娘Laura，每天忙得睡眠不足情况下，仍然坚持免费为医护人员亲手制作精美而创意无限的蛋糕。 The young owner of Chengdu Memory, Laura, despite a daily busy schedule that doesn’t grant her enough sleep, still makes beautiful and creative cakes for hospital workers with her own hands. 6月8日，WSCRF将他们新近募集的24,100美元，以支票形式汇聚到行动善款中。WSCRF和WSCRC会长J. Norwell Coquillard先生表示：“华中基金会很高兴参与并支持‘爱心餐’这个既有创新性又有意义的活动。在为抗击Covid-19的一线人员供餐的同时，也支持当地的餐饮企业。我们感谢WSCRC的会员和朋友，为本活动的成功积极做出贡献。我们也很高兴能和CCCWA以及清华GIX合作，期待今后有更多的合作机会。” On June 8, the WSCRF deposited checks for nearly $24,000 into this charitable program. According to WSCRF and WSCRC President J. Norwell Coquillard, “The Washington State China Relations Fund is pleased to support this highly innovative and meaningful effort to support both our business community and those workers who are on the front line of the battle against Covid-19. We are very pleased that our members and friends stepped up to help make this program a success. We enjoyed the opportunity to work with CCCWA and Tsinghua GIX and look forward to more cooperation in the future.” 捐款网址 https://foodwithlovecovid19.com/ 捐款网址https://www.wscrf.org/donate/ 爱心午餐行动于今年3月由华州中国总商会CCCWA和豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito发起，由本地区13家餐厅精心制作午餐，通过专业外卖平台chowbus派送给抗疫前线的医护人员、警察和消防员。CCCWA会长吕莉莉女士说：“面对共同的危机，我们选择站在一起。每个人的小爱心，汇集成整体的大爱心，我们是一个社区，一个整体。” 清华GIX北美中心负责人郭文艳表示：“清华GIX自2016年底在西雅图成立以来，一向积极组织参与华州的创新教育活动。新冠疫情之下，我们更要走出教室，积极参与社区抗疫。很高兴这次与CCCWA和WSCRF合作，一起推动爱心行动，为工作在前线的医生、护士、服务人员，为深受影响的我们热爱的中餐和其他餐厅，为所有需要帮助的人们，踏踏实实做些事情。请大家支持我们的行动！” Tsinghua GIX North American Managing Director Guo Wenyan said that: “Since Tsinghua GIX was founded in the Seattle area in early 2016, we’ve actively participated in innovation and education activities in Washington state. During the Covid-19 crisis, it’s been even more important for us to leave the classroom and join the fight against the pandemic. We’re thrilled to be able to partner with the CCCWA and WSCRF to promote the Food with Love Program and do such down-to-earth activities to support frontline doctors, nurses, and service providers, our favorite restaurants that have been deeply impacted, and people who need help. Please support this program!” ** 关于WSCRF ** 华中基金会是华中理事会（WSCRC）的姐妹组织，旨在同华中理事会紧密合作，增进华盛顿州和中国之间的教育文化交流与互相了解。WSCRC是美国州级历史最悠久的促进中美关系的非盈利组织。 ** About WSCRF ** The WSCRF is a Washington nonprofit educational organization, recognized as tax exempt under Section 501(c)(3) of the IRS. As a new sister entity of the Washington State China Relations Council (WSCRC), the oldest non-governmental organization advocating at the state level for increased trade connections with China, WSCRF works closely with WSCRC to promote educational and charitable programs, exchanges, and understanding between the State of Washington and China. ** 关于清华GIX北美中心 ** 清华GIX北美中心基于Global Innovation Exchange（GIX）全球创新项目合作的需求而建立，是注册于美国华盛顿州的非盈利组织。全球创新学院（GIX），是两所世界顶尖研究型大学---- 中国的清华大学与美国的华盛顿大学，在微软公司支持下，合作搭建的具有多元文化优势的开放性教育和科研平台，致力于培养具有全球视野和创新精神的领军人才，探索解决一系列包括可持续发展、移动医疗在内的各类全球性挑战。 ** About Tsinghua GIX North America ** Tsinghua GIX Institute North America, a nonprofit organization incorporated in the State of Washington, is the representative of Tsinghua University to participate in GIX collaborations, to promote and operate Tsinghua University education programs in the North America. Our mission is to prepare the next generation of Chinese and American innovators, entrepreneurs to tackle the world's most challenging problems through global collaboration and technological innovation. **扫描下载 Chowbus App捐赠爱心午餐** **请扫描爱心午餐活动网站二维码及时了解活动动态** **活动信息** 主办单位： CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State WSCRC华盛顿州中国理事会 Washington State China Relations Council WSCRF华盛顿州 中国基金会 Washionton State China Relations Fund 清华GIX北美中心 本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) 颐和园北京烤鸭店 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅（CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手（LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 上海味道坊（Shanghai House Restaurant） 芙蓉湘(Sizzling Pot King) 九号巷（No.9 Alley Hot Pot） 小肥羊（快乐小羊Happy Lamb Hot Pot） 熊猫点心(Panda Dim Sum) 西雅图创业协会（Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp) 捐款接收账号： 本次活动义工小组联系方式： 餐厅参与捐赠及机构合作请联系： 总指挥：CCCWA 会长 吕莉莉 邮箱：lvlili0219@sina.com, 微信：lili2999 总律师：蔡和蔡律师事务所 蔡清 邮箱：Alex.cai@cai-law.com Tel: 425-7535188 配送组组长：Michelle Lei 邮箱：michelle@chowbus.com 公司或个人捐赠资金，请联系财务组组长：阳光青少年教育基金会/西雅图房地产俱乐部李晓艳 邮箱：eli@create-world.us 医疗机构如需爱心便当，请联系： 外联组组长：Sylvia Chin（Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club） 邮箱：screalty.seattle@gmail.com CCCWA商会事务请联系: Lei 邮箱：info@ccc-wa.org 微信：gloriachatting 文宣组组长：Grace Gu 邮箱：gracegu99@gmail.com 募捐组组长：那济源 邮箱：jay-na@att.net **活动合办方**

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 12: Attorney Cai Qing on the IRS's New Measures for Auditing Overseas Assets, and Former IRS Examiner Shirley Tan on 17 Years of Tax Investigation Experience
items.title_zh: 第12期CCCWA“每周一星”嘉宾：蔡清律师分享IRS对海外资产查税新措施，前IRS查税官谭衍清分享17年税务调查经验
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _June 12, 2020 10:29_ __ _ _ _ _ Since the U.S. government passed the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) in 2010, the IRS has stepped up its reporting requirements for the overseas assets of U.S. **citizens** and **green card holders**. Now, with the pandemic causing production shutdowns, soaring unemployment, and sharply reduced tax revenue, the IRS is likely to further strengthen its collection tools to expand its tax base. Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm shares which new audit measures the IRS has adopted since 2019 regarding overseas assets, and their impact on Chinese people. **Shirley Tan, a former IRS examiner with 17 years of investigation experience, introduces the IRS's key audit focus areas and analyzes classic cases.** 1. The IRS's main functions (departments) 2. The IRS investigation process 3. Questions about owning real estate in China 4. Filing taxes for different company forms (Corporation, LLC, Sole Proprietorship) For those who run a company in the U.S., how should you prepare your tax filings, and what should you watch out for? 1. Keep personal and company finances completely separate (explained with a tax case) 2. Keep books, invoices, and related records for at least 3 years 3. Any non-income transfers (deposits) must have documentation or evidence confirming they are not income 4. Any unusual figures on a tax return must be backed by supporting documentation Pacific Time, Friday, June 12, 8pm-9:30pm (Beijing time, Saturday, June 13, 11:00am-12:30pm) Registration: To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +12532158782,,4696970869# US

items.title_en: 11th 'Star of the Week' — Jason Moore of Local Real Estate Firm Windermere Shares the Latest on Greater Seattle Residential Real Estate Investment
items.title_zh: 第11期“每周一星”--来自本地房地产Windermere 的Jason Moore分享大西雅图地区住宅地产投资的新信息
items.summary_en: This episode's guest is Jason Moore, founder of Seattle real estate firm Windermere Real Estate/PSR Inc., who, along with colleague Laura Yang, hosted a session sharing the latest information on greater Seattle residential real estate investment.
items.summary_zh: 本期做客嘉宾是来自西雅图房地产公司Windermere Real Estat/PSR Inc. 创始人Jason Moore，他与同事Laura Yang主持分享大西雅图地区住宅地产投资的最新信息。...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest is Jason Moore, founder of Seattle real estate firm Windermere Real Estate/PSR Inc., who, along with colleague Laura Yang, hosted a session sharing the latest information on greater Seattle residential real estate investment. Whether buying or selling, Windermere's transactions account for nearly a quarter of the total local residential market.

Jason noted that when local residential inventory exceeds a 3-month supply, the market can be considered a buyer's market. The last buyer's market occurred in 2011 — since the real estate rebound that followed, the greater Seattle residential market has remained a seller's market due to a persistent shortage of available homes.

Affected by the pandemic and the economy, demand for lakeside luxury homes and high-density luxury downtown condos has shown a slowdown. However, because greater Seattle's economy is diversified — particularly with a concentration of high-income earners at tech companies — demand for home purchases remains strong, so the pandemic's impact on the broader housing market has been limited. Regarding the Spring District, a topic of interest to many, Jason believes the area's well-designed planning and convenient access to commerce and transit give it strong future market potential.

Millennials will be the primary driver of first-time homebuying demand — 46% of homebuyers in the greater Seattle area are millennials, making them a strong force behind the residential market. Jason remains optimistic about the medium- to long-term outlook for the local residential market.

Attendees actively participated in the discussion that evening, and thanked the two guests from Windermere, who carefully prepared thorough materials, drawing on years of data compiled into professional charts, giving everyone a comprehensive understanding of the latest information on greater Seattle residential real estate investment.
items.body_zh:
本期做客嘉宾是来自西雅图房地产公司Windermere Real Estat/PSR Inc. 创始人Jason Moore，他与同事Laura Yang主持分享大西雅图地区住宅地产投资的最新信息。 在住宅市场交易中无论购买或销售，Windermere 公司的成交量占据本地市场总额的近四分之一。

Jason提到当本地住宅市场的库存超过3个月，可以认为是买方市场。最近一次的买方市场发生在2011年，自从上次房地产反弹后，由于市场房源短缺，大西雅图地区的住宅市场维持在卖方市场。

受到疫情和经济的影响，湖边高端豪宅或市区高密度高级公寓的需求体现放缓的趋势。然而，大西雅图由于产业多样化，特别是集中高科技企业的高收入人群，对购房的需求迫切，因此疫情对普通住房市场影响有限。针对朋友们关注的Spring District, Jason认为当地规划设计完善，周围商业、交通便利，今后极具市场潜力。

千禧一代将成为刚需购房的主要市场，大西雅图地区46%购房者为千禧一代，因此对住宅市场是强劲的推动力。Jason对本地区住宅市场的中长期展望持乐观态度。

当晚大家积极参加讨论，并且感谢来自Windermere的两位嘉宾，他们认真为大家准备了充足的资料，收集了多年的数据，制作成专业的图表，让大家对大西雅图地区住宅地产投资的最新信息获得全面了解。

items.title_en: 12th CCCWA 'Star of the Week' Guests: Attorney Cai Qing Shares the IRS's New Measures for Auditing Overseas Assets, and Former IRS Auditor Yanqing Tan Shares 17 Years of Tax Audit Experience
items.title_zh: 第12期CCCWA“每周一星”嘉宾：蔡清律师分享IRS对海外资产查税新措施，前IRS查税官谭衍清分享17年税务调查经验
items.summary_en: Since the US government passed the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) in 2010, the IRS has stepped up its enforcement of foreign asset reporting requirements for US citizens and green card holders.
items.summary_zh: 自2010年美国政府通过了“外国账户税收遵从法”后，国税局即开始加强了对美国 公民 与 绿卡持有人...
items.body_en:
Since the US government passed the Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA) in 2010, the IRS has stepped up its enforcement of foreign asset reporting requirements for US citizens and green card holders. Now, with production shutdowns, a sharp rise in unemployment, and a steep drop in tax revenue caused by the pandemic, the IRS is expected to further strengthen its tax enforcement measures to expand its revenue base. Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Office shares what new measures the IRS has adopted since 2019 to audit overseas assets, and their impact on the Chinese community.

Former IRS auditor Yanqing Tan, with 17 years of audit experience, introduces the IRS's main areas of focus during audits, along with analysis of classic case studies: 1. The IRS's main functions (departments); 2. The IRS audit process; 3. Issues related to owning property in China; 4. Tax filing for different business entity types (Corporation, LLC, Sole Proprietorship).

For friends running a business in the US, how should you prepare for tax filing, and what should you watch out for? Keep personal and business finances completely separate (with tax case examples); keep at least 3 years of ledgers, invoices, and related records; any non-income transfer (incoming funds) should have documentation or evidence confirming it is not income; any unusual figures on a tax return must be backed up with supporting documentation.

Friday, June 12th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, June 13th, 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 253 215 8782,,4696970869# US
items.body_zh:
自2010年美国政府通过了“外国账户税收遵从法”后，国税局即开始加强了对美国[公民](https://wiki.mbalib.com/wiki/%E5%85%AC%E6%B0%91)与绿卡持有人海外资产的申报工作。现在因疫情导致生产停摆、失业率剧增及税收剧减情况又将促使国税局进一步增强征税手段来扩大税源。 蔡和蔡律师事务所蔡清律师与大家分享：针对海外资产，国税局自2019年起采取了那些查税新措施以及对华人的影响。

具有17年调查经验的前IRS查税官谭衍清介绍税务局查税重点方向，以及经典案例解析。 1. 税局的主要职能（部门） 2. 税务局调查过程 3. 有关在国内有房产的问题 4. 不同公司形式的报税 （Corporation, LLC, Sole Proprietorship)

针对在美国开公司的朋友怎么做报税准备？应该需要注意哪些方面？私人和公司要完全分开 （税务案例解释）保留至少3年的账本，发票及有关资料任何非收入的转账（进账）要有文件或证据确认它不是收入税表上有任何不寻常的数字都必须准备好证明材料

美西时间周五6月12日8pm-9:30pm，（北京时间周六6月13日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom 观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +12532158782,,4696970869# US

items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _June 5, 2020 14:38_ __ _ _ _ _ Over the past two years, the Greater Seattle area, as a cloud-computing hub, has attracted large numbers of IT and high-tech professionals, driving an all-around economic boom in local real estate and beyond. Population growth has translated into housing demand, and Greater Seattle home-price gains have led the nation for several years running. Amid the current pandemic, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State has specially invited Mr. Jason Moore of Windermere Real Estate/PSR Inc. to focus on the Greater Seattle market and, through professionally analyzed data, help everyone understand the latest information on the local real estate market and look ahead to residential real estate trends after the pandemic. Featured Speaker: Jason Moore graduated from the University of Washington with a degree in regional economics. He is the owner of Windermere PSR and has worked as a Windermere real estate agent for 25 years. Jason has grown up and lived in the Greater Seattle area his whole life and knows the local real estate market very well. He is also a part owner of CW Title Company and a director of Penrith Home Loans Company, and is familiar with the entire real estate transaction process. items.title_en: Dou Lao Fang Restaurant: One Pot, One World
items.title_zh: 豆捞坊餐厅：一锅一世界
items.summary_en: Feature on Dou Lao Fang restaurant joining CCCWA's COVID charity meal campaign.
items.summary_zh: 豆捞坊餐厅加入CCCWA爱心午餐活动，用一锅汤底送出爱心，支援社区。
items.body_en:
This article is part of CCCWA's "COVID Relief Restaurant Series" (抗击疫情·爱心餐厅系列), a collection of profiles highlighting Chinese restaurants in the Greater Seattle area that participated in the organization's charity meal campaign during the COVID-19 pandemic. Each restaurant in the series represents a different story of resilience, community spirit, and generosity in the face of unprecedented hardship.

Dou Lao Fang (豆捞坊), a beloved hotpot restaurant known for its rich broths and communal dining experience, joined CCCWA's Food with Love initiative at one of the most difficult moments in the restaurant industry's history. With dining rooms shuttered and foot traffic at a standstill, the restaurant's owners faced an existential choice. They chose community.

## One Pot, One Story

The name of the series profile — "One Pot, One World" (一锅一世界) — captures something essential about hotpot culture: a single pot of broth, surrounded by friends and family, represents connection, warmth, and shared experience. During the pandemic, that pot became a symbol of something larger — a restaurant reaching beyond its walls to feed strangers, and in doing so, feeding a community's sense of hope.

Dou Lao Fang's kitchen was repurposed during closures to prepare charity meals at scale. Working with the CCCWA coordination network, the restaurant prepared hundreds of boxed meals that were picked up by volunteers and delivered to frontline workers — doctors, nurses, police officers, and firefighters working long shifts to protect the city.

## Supporting Both Sides of the Table

The program was designed with two goals in mind: feeding essential workers who needed support, and keeping Chinese restaurants alive. By channeling donated funds into meal orders from participating restaurants, CCCWA created a model where giving back also meant sustaining local businesses that had become pillars of the Chinese-American community.

For Dou Lao Fang's owners, participation meant more than revenue. It meant being visible as a responsible, caring member of the Seattle community at a moment when Chinese-owned businesses were navigating both economic pressure and, in some cases, unfair stigma. The restaurant's commitment to the campaign became a point of pride — proof that a hotpot restaurant could nourish a city in more ways than one.

## About the Food with Love Campaign

CCCWA's Food with Love (爱心午餐) campaign ran throughout the spring and summer of 2020, coordinating dozens of Chinese-owned restaurants across Greater Seattle. The initiative was funded through a community fundraising effort and recognized by local media, including KIRO 7 News, which covered the campaign in an ongoing series highlighting its reach and impact.
items.body_zh:
本文是华州中华总商会“抗击疫情·爱心餐厅系列”报道之一，该系列专题介绍了在新冠疫情期间参与本会慈善送餐行动的大西雅图地区华人餐馆。系列中的每一家餐馆，都在前所未有的困境面前，讲述着各自坚韧不拔、乐于奉献的社区精神故事。

豆捞坊是一家深受喜爱的火锅餐厅，以浓郁的汤底和围炉共食的用餐体验而闻名。在餐饮业历史上最艰难的时刻之一，豆捞坊加入了华州中华总商会“爱心午餐”项目。彼时堂食停摆、客流骤减，餐厅经营者面临着生死攸关的抉择。他们选择了与社区同行。

## 一锅一故事

该系列专题“一锅一世界”这一名称，精准捕捉到了火锅文化的精髓：一锅热汤，围坐着亲朋好友，象征着连接、温暖与共同的体验。在疫情期间，这口锅升华为一种更宏大的象征——一家餐厅走出自己的四壁，为素不相识的人们送去食物，也由此为整个社区注入了希望。

在停业期间，豆捞坊的厨房被重新用于大批量制作慈善餐食。餐厅与华州中华总商会的协调网络合作，准备了数百份盒饭，由志愿者取餐后配送给一线工作人员——那些为守护这座城市而长时间轮班工作的医生、护士、警察和消防员。

## 一桌两端，同担同助

该项目的设计初衷有二：为需要支持的一线工作人员提供餐食，同时帮助华人餐馆维持生存。通过将捐款用于向参与餐馆订购餐食，华州中华总商会创造出一种模式——回馈社会的同时，也维系着这些已成为华裔美国人社区支柱的本地企业。

对豆捞坊的经营者而言，参与这一项目所带来的意义远不止于营收。在华人企业既承受经济压力、又在某些情况下遭遇不公污名化的时期，这意味着以负责任、有爱心的西雅图社区一员的身份被大家看见。餐厅对这项活动的投入，成为了值得骄傲的一件事——证明了一家火锅餐厅能以不止一种方式滋养一座城市。

## 关于“爱心午餐”项目

华州中华总商会“爱心午餐”项目于2020年春夏两季持续开展，协调了大西雅图地区数十家华人餐馆参与其中。该项目由社区募捐提供资金支持，并获得包括KIRO 7新闻台在内的本地媒体的关注和报道，KIRO 7以持续系列报道的形式，展现了该项目的覆盖范围与实际影响。

items.summary_zh: 本期主讲嘉宾设计师李静在线与朋友分享了 GC2构成设计 公司的设计创意和建造服务、并从从创意概念到施工完成的产业链，力求为客户提供最优化...
items.body_en:
This episode's speaker, designer Jing Li, shared online about GC2 Design's creative and construction services, spanning the full pipeline from creative concept to completed construction, striving to deliver the most optimized design solutions and top-quality construction for clients. Jing Li also shared factors influencing property value growth in the greater Seattle area and key points to keep in mind when investing in commercial buildings.

Real estate industry professionals also shared how population growth affects local market demand. Amid the current pandemic, logistics real estate and industrial real estate also show potential for growth, leading to a cautiously optimistic outlook for the market's future direction. Attendees that evening thanked the designer for her precise, professional discussion.
items.body_zh:
本期主讲嘉宾设计师李静在线与朋友分享了GC2构成设计公司的设计创意和建造服务、并从从创意概念到施工完成的产业链，力求为客户提供最优化的设计方案与高素质的施工。另外，李静设计师分享了影响大西雅图地区房产增长的考虑因素和提出对于投资商业楼宇地产时需要注意的几个关键点。

房地产投资的业内人士也分享了人口对本地市场需求的影响。当下受到疫情的波及，市场物流地产和工业地产也潜在着增长趋势，为此对未来市场走向表示谨慎乐观。当晚参加讨论的朋友们感谢设计师分享精准专业的讨论内容。

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 9 Guest: Dr. Guangming Zhang Shares Several Must-Know Questions About COVID-19 Antibody Testing
items.title_zh: 第九期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾: 张广明博士分享关于几个新冠抗体测试一定要知道的问题
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _May 21, 2020 09:20_ __ _ _ _ _ **This session's invited guest is Dr. Guangming Zhang, general manager of Any Lab Test in the U.S.** Dr. Zhang graduated from the Karolinska Institutet in Sweden and has specialized research experience in medical fields such as microbiology, infectious diseases, and immunochemistry. In 2000, Dr. Zhang was invited to the U.S. to conduct postdoctoral research in the Infectious Disease Division at Johns Hopkins Medical School. He later served as a research and development scientist at the Seattle Institute for Biomedical and Clinical Research in Seattle. Since 2010, Dr. Guangming Zhang has been the general manager of Any Lab Test. Located in Redmond, Washington, Any Lab Test provides direct access to clinical laboratory testing, such as InShapeMD, DNA testing, drug and alcohol testing, other toxicology testing services, and premium personal health programs. With COVID-19 now spreading around the world and confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State rising sharply each day, Any Lab Test—to support community public health and relieve the pressing needs of frontline medical institutions—is now offering COVID-19 serum antibody testing to the public, so people can understand their infection and immune status regarding the coronavirus. On the evening of May 22, Dr. Guangming Zhang will join CCCWA to share several must-know questions about COVID-19 antibody testing: 1. What are IgM antibodies and IgG antibodies? 2. How long after exposure to the coronavirus do IgM and IgG antibodies appear? 3. What does a positive IgG result mean? 4. What does a positive IgM result mean? 5. If neither is positive, does it mean the patient was never exposed? 6. Who can use serum antibody testing? Can you do the test at home? How long does it take to get results? **Friends concerned about the coronavirus are welcome to attend this lecture to hear first-hand information from an expert and communicate with him directly.** Pacific Time, Friday, May 22, 8pm-9:30pm (Beijing time, Saturday, May 23, 11am-12:30pm) Registration: To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,,4696970869# US
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年05月21日 09:20_ __ _ _ _ _ ** 本期的受邀嘉宾是美国Any Lab Test 总经理 张广明博士。 ** 张博士毕业于瑞典皇家医学院 （Karolinska Institutet），对微生物学、传染病学与免疫化学等医学领域有专业的研究。2000年，张博士应邀赴美国约翰霍普金斯医学院传染病专科做博士后研究（Johns Hopkins Medical School- Infectious Disease Division)。 张博士曾担任西雅图生物临床研究所担任研究与开发科学家（Seattle Institute for Biomedical and Clinical Research, Seattle)。2010至今，张广明博士任Any Lab Test总经理。位于华盛顿州Redmond City的 Any Lab Test专门提供临床实验室化验的直接通道，如 InShapeMD，DNA 检测，药物与酒精测试，其他毒理学测试服务及高端人体保健项目。 当下，新冠肺炎蔓延全球，华盛顿州的确诊与死亡人数逐日剧增。为支援社区公共卫生，解一线医疗机构的燃眉之急，Any Lab Test,现在对公众开放COVID-19 血清抗体测试， 让大家掌握有关新冠病毒的感染和免疫状态。 5月22日晚间，张广明博士将做客CCCWA与大家的分享关于几个新冠抗体测试一定要知道的问题： 1. 什么是lgM抗体和lgG抗体? 2. 患者接触冠状病毒后多长时间会出现lgM和lgG抗体？ 3. lgG阳性结果是什么意思？ 4. lgM阳性结果是什么意思？ 5. 如果都不是阳性结果，是否意味着患者从未暴露过？ 6. 谁可以使用血清抗体测试？自己在家可以做测试吗？需要多长时间可得到结果？ ** 关注新冠病毒的朋友们欢迎参加本次讲座，听专家的一手信息与专家直接交流沟通。 ** ** ** 美西时间周五5月22日8pm-9:30pm， （北京时间周六5月23日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： **

items.title_en: KIRO 7 News Series Covers CCCWA's 'Food with Love' and Other Pandemic Relief Efforts
items.title_zh: Kiro7 News 系列报道CCCWA“Food with Love"等 抗击疫情公益活动
items.summary_en: In the face of the sudden outbreak of COVID-19, member companies of the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) have stepped up with corporate social responsibility across many fields, actively coordinating with domestic and overseas branches to procure supplies and donate them free of charge to hard-hit organizations in need. After donating masks, protective gowns, and other medical supplies to hospitals, CCCWA further organized a group of outstanding, generous restaurants to donate $400,000 worth of love lunches to frontline medical workers.
items.summary_zh: 面对突如其来的新型冠状病毒感染的肺炎疫情，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会各会员单位在各个领域发挥出了企业社会责任感，积极协调公司海内外分支机构进行相关物资采购，并无偿捐赠给有需求的疫情严重的机构。在向医疗机构捐赠口罩、防护服等医疗物资之后，CCCWA又组织了一批优秀而有爱的餐饮企业向抗疫一线的医护人员捐赠价值40万美元的爱心午餐。
items.body_en:
In the face of the sudden outbreak of COVID-19, member companies of the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) have stepped up with corporate social responsibility across many fields, actively coordinating with domestic and overseas branches to procure supplies and donate them free of charge to hard-hit organizations in need. After donating masks, protective gowns, and other medical supplies to hospitals, CCCWA further organized a group of outstanding, generous restaurants to donate $400,000 worth of love lunches to frontline medical workers.

Local Seattle TV station KIRO 7 News specifically interviewed one of the founding restaurants participating in the drive, The Dolar Shop, along with CCCWA President Lily Lyu and member Attorney Cai Qing, running a dedicated feature.

KIRO 7 News Report 1 — CCCWA's (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) 'Food with Love' and other charity initiatives organized during the fight against the pandemic.

KIRO 7 News Report 2 — Reporter Deedee Sun tells the story of how The Dolar Shop and other restaurants, despite their own struggles to survive under the pandemic, kept the community's safety and the frontline pandemic fight close to heart.

KIRO 7 News Report 3 — The 'Food with Love' initiative delivered hundreds of love meals today, deeply moving frontline medical workers.

KIRO 7 News Report 4 — The 'Food with Love' initiative is nearing its goal of delivering $400,000 worth of love meals to frontline pandemic workers.

KIRO 7 News Report 5 — The 'Food with Love' initiative raises funds to help offset the cost for participating restaurants, with the whole community coming together to amplify the love.
items.body_zh:
面对突如其来的新型冠状病毒感染的肺炎疫情，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会各会员单位在各个领域发挥出了企业社会责任感，积极协调公司海内外分支机构进行相关物资采购，并无偿捐赠给有需求的疫情严重的机构。在向医疗机构捐赠口罩、防护服等医疗物资之后，CCCWA又组织了一批优秀而有爱的餐饮企业向抗疫一线的医护人员捐赠价值40万美元的爱心午餐。

西雅图本地的电视台Kiro7 News 特地采访了参与活动的餐厅发起餐厅之一“豆捞坊”和CCCWA会长吕莉莉女士及会员蔡清律师，并作了专题报导。

Kiro7 News 报道 1- CCCWA （Chinese Chamber of Commerce in washington State ）在抗击疫情期间组织的“Food with love”爱心餐等系列公益活动

Kiro7 News 报道 2–记者Deedee Sun讲述豆捞坊等餐厅在疫情冲击下不顾自身餐厅生存困难，心系社区安危和抗疫前线

Kiro7 News 报道3—-“Food with Love”公益活动今天送出几百份爱心餐，一线医护人员非常感动。

Kiro7 News 报道 4—-“Food with Love”公益活动给一线抗疫人员送出40万爱心餐目标即将完成

Kiro7 News报道5—“ Food with Love”活动募集资金，以分担爱心餐厅的制作成本，全社会一起把爱心放大。

items.body_en:
This episode's guest is Dr. Guangming Zhang, General Manager of Any Lab Test in the US. Dr. Zhang graduated from the Karolinska Institute in Sweden, with specialized research in microbiology, infectious disease, and immunochemistry. In 2000, Dr. Zhang was invited to the US for postdoctoral research in the Infectious Disease Division at Johns Hopkins Medical School. Dr. Zhang later served as a research and development scientist at the Seattle Institute for Biomedical and Clinical Research. Since 2010, Dr. Zhang has served as General Manager of Any Lab Test. Located in Redmond, Washington, Any Lab Test provides direct access to clinical laboratory testing, such as InShapeMD, DNA testing, drug and alcohol testing, other toxicology testing services, and premium health screening programs.

As COVID-19 continues to spread globally, confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State have been rising daily. To support community public health and address urgent needs at frontline medical institutions, Any Lab Test is now offering COVID-19 serum antibody testing to the public, helping people understand their infection and immune status regarding the virus.

On the evening of May 22nd, Dr. Guangming Zhang will join CCCWA to share key questions everyone should know about COVID-19 antibody testing:

What are IgM and IgG antibodies? How long after exposure to the coronavirus do IgM and IgG antibodies appear? What does a positive IgG result mean? What does a positive IgM result mean? If neither result is positive, does that mean the patient was never exposed? Who should use a serum antibody test? Can you test yourself at home? How long does it take to get results?

Anyone interested in learning more about COVID-19 is welcome to join this lecture, to hear firsthand information from the expert and engage directly.

items.title_en: CCCWA's 8th 'Star of the Week' Airs: Guest Qinghua Pei Shares on Aligning Companies with International Standards and the Trends in Operations Management
items.title_zh: 第八期CCCWA“每周一星”热播，做客嘉宾裴庆华分享企业与国际接轨，提升运营管理的趋势
items.summary_en: This episode's guest was Mr. Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), with 14 years of experience in corporate management consulting.
items.summary_zh: 本期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾：裴庆华先生 ，曾担任CCI竞能咨询国际中国区总经理 从事企业管理咨询14年。当晚， 裴先生...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest was Mr. Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), with 14 years of experience in corporate management consulting. That evening, Mr. Pei shared his firsthand experience providing world-class operations management consulting to multinational companies such as Coca-Cola, Heinz, DuPont, and AkzoNobel, as well as China Resources and COFCO, and his unique insights on corporate change management.

Mr. Pei also introduced the professional services CCI provides for corporate operations, helping companies optimize their entire operational value chain, build operating models aligned with world-class standards, achieve sustainable results, and strengthen their competitiveness in a globalized environment.
items.body_zh:
本期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾：裴庆华先生，曾担任CCI竞能咨询国际中国区总经理从事企业管理咨询14年。当晚，裴先生与大家分享了过去工作中为多个跨国企业如：可口可乐、亨氏、杜邦、阿克苏诺贝尔，华润、中粮等提供世界级运营管理咨询服务和企业的变革管理独到的体会经验。

裴先生也介绍了CCI竞能咨询国际对企业运营提供的专业性服务，帮助企业优化整个运营价值链，打造自己的运营与世界级运营模式接轨，达成可持续的成效，提高企业在全球化大背景下的竞争力。

items.title_en: CCCWA's 9th 'Star of the Week' Airs: Guest Dr. Guangming Zhang Shares on Issues with COVID-19 Antibody Testing Methods
items.title_zh: 第九期CCCWA“每周一星”热播，嘉宾 张广明博士分享新冠抗体测试方法的问题
items.summary_en: This episode's guest, Dr. Guangming Zhang, holds a doctorate in Microbiology and Infectious Disease from the Karolinska Institute in Sweden, and has developed several highly sensitive and specific clinical testing methods.
items.summary_zh: 本期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾张广明博士是毕业于瑞典皇家医学院微生物与传染病学的博士,...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Dr. Guangming Zhang, holds a doctorate in Microbiology and Infectious Disease from the Karolinska Institute in Sweden, and has developed several highly sensitive and specific clinical testing methods. He was invited to the US to conduct postdoctoral research at Johns Hopkins Medical School, studying the pathogenesis of enterotoxigenic Bacteroides fragilis. Dr. Zhang later served as a research and development scientist at the Seattle Institute for Biomedical and Clinical Research, and currently serves as Director of Any Lab Test, providing clinical, drug, and DNA testing services.

That evening, Dr. Zhang joined CCCWA to share basic information about COVID-19 antibody testing and address several key questions everyone should know about COVID-19 antibody tests.

Addressing common concerns, Dr. Zhang reminded attendees that patients showing COVID-19 symptoms should promptly see a doctor for a PCR test, and cooperate fully with treatment once diagnosed. For asymptomatic individuals who want to understand their health status or whether they carry antibodies, an antibody test may be appropriate.

Dr. Zhang explained what IgG and IgM test results mean, and introduced the professional services and accuracy standards of relevant testing organizations.

During the session, Dr. Zhang was joined by special guests Dr. Guo, a clinical medical expert in the US, and Dr. Zhang, a clinical medical expert in Hong Kong, who shared information on COVID-19 prevention and treatment based on real cases. All three experts agreed that boosting one's own immunity is the best way to fight COVID-19.
items.body_zh:
本期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾张广明博士是毕业于瑞典皇家医学院微生物与传染病学的博士, 研发出几种高度敏感和特异性的临床检测方法。他曾受邀赴美-在 Johns Hopkins Medical School作博士后研究员从事肠道毒性脆弱类杆菌的发病机理的研究。张博士随后担任西雅图生 物临床研究所研究与开发科学家; 现任Director of Anylab Test , 提供临床，毒品和DNA测试。

当晚，张广明博士做客CCCWA与大家普及新冠抗体测试的基本信息并分享关于几个新冠抗体测试一定要知道的问题。

针对大家关心的问题，张博士提醒有了新冠肺炎症状的病人需要及时找医生作核酸检测，一旦确诊后积极配合医生治疗。对于无症状人群，想了解身体状况，是否有自身免疫抗体的人可以作抗体测试。

张博士解释了lgG和 lgM 测试结果代表的意思，并介绍相关检测机构的专业服务和测试准确标准。

会议中，张博士联线特邀在美国的临床医学专家郭医生和在香港的临床医学专家张医生共同参与本次讲座，他们通过实际病例分享新冠肺炎的预防和治疗信息。三位专家一致认为提高自身的免疫力是对抗新冠病毒的最佳方法。

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 8 Guest Qinghua Pei: What Philosophy a Company Must Embrace to Align with International Standards, How to Improve Management Capability, and the Trends in Operations Management
items.title_zh: 第八期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾裴庆华分享“企业秉承怎样的理念才能与国际接轨，怎样才能提升管理力，运营管理的趋势是什么。”
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _May 14, 2020 04:15_ __ _ _ _ _ Qinghua Pei, former China general manager of CCI (Competitive Capabilities International), explores with everyone: in a globalized context, businesses face many operational challenges—what philosophy should a company embrace to be considered aligned with international standards, what characteristics do benchmark companies have, what kind of leadership is needed to effectively drive management improvement, and what are the trends in operations management. Although companies differ in industry and size, the concepts and methods of operations management are universal; Mr. Pei hopes this lecture can provide useful lessons for each company's operations management and development. Competitive Capabilities International (CCI) is a multinational firm specializing in business operations management consulting. Founded in 1987 and headquartered in Irvine, California, it has 7 branch offices across the continents and primarily serves large groups and multinational corporations. CCI created a "continuous improvement system" called TRACC, which consolidates modern management tools and methods along with the best operations-management practices of Fortune 500 companies to help businesses optimize their entire operations value chain, build their own operational excellence or world-class operating model, and achieve sustainable performance results. The TRACC system represents the philosophy of modern business operations management and the development trend of management systems. Featured Speaker Qinghua Pei: Master of Engineering, MBA. He has worked in business management consulting for 14 years and served as China general manager of CCI, providing world-class operations-management consulting services to many multinationals such as Coca-Cola, Heinz, DuPont, and AkzoNobel, as well as domestic Chinese state-owned enterprises such as China Resources and COFCO; he is now responsible for cross-regional coordination of consulting projects in the U.S. He also has a strong technical background, having worked for many years on overall spacecraft design at the China Academy of Space Technology, and spent two years studying and working in Europe, giving him unique insight into how businesses operate and manage change across different cultural backgrounds. Pacific Time, Friday, May 15, 8pm-9:30pm (Beijing time, Saturday, May 16, 11am-12:30pm) Registration: To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below:
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年05月14日 04:15_ __ _ _ _ _ CCI竞能咨询国际原中国区总经理裴庆华与大家 探讨：在全球化背景下企业运营面临诸多挑战，企业应该秉承怎样的理念才能算是与国际接轨，标杆企业有什么特点，需要怎样的领导力才能有效促进管理的提升，运营管理的趋势是什么。尽管企业行业不同、公司大小各异，但运营管理的理念和方法是相通的， 裴先生希望 通过本讲座能给各自公司的运营管理和发展带来借鉴。 竞能咨询国际 (CCI) 是一家企业运营管理咨询的跨国公司， 1987 年成立，总部设在美国加州尔湾，在全球各大洲共有 7 家分公司，主要服务大型的集团企业、跨国公司。 CCI 独创名为 TRACC 的 “ 持续改进系统 ” ，汇总现代管理工具方法和 500 强企业运营管理的最佳实践经验，帮助企业优化整个运营价值链，打造自己的卓越运营或世界级运营模式，达成可持续的绩效成果。 TRACC 系统代表了现代企业运营管理的理念和管理系统的发展趋势。 主将嘉宾裴庆华:工程硕士，MBA。从事企业管理咨询14年，曾担任CCI竞能咨询国际中国区总经理, 为许多跨国企业如可口可乐、亨氏、杜邦、阿克苏诺贝尔，和国内的央 企如华润、中粮等提供世界级运营管理咨询服务，现在美国负责咨询项目跨区域协同工作。他还有很强的技术背景，曾在中国空间技术研究院从事空间飞行器总体设计多年，并在欧洲有两年的学习和工作经历，对不同的文化背景下企业的运作、企业的变革管理有独到的体会。 美西时间周五5月15日8pm-9:30pm， （北京时间周六5月16日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接：

items.title_en: Now It's Time to Take Up the Baton from the Caring Restaurants!
items.title_zh: 现在，是时候接过爱心餐厅的接力棒了！
items.body_en: _May 13, 2020 10:46_ __ _ _ _ _ Seattle in May is gradually heating up, and the caring lunch campaign has continued to heat up along with the May weather. In the more than a month since the campaign began, 13 restaurants have delivered over 17,000 free caring boxed meals to 26 recipient organizations and community members through the professional delivery platform Chowbus, letting more than 1,000 frontline anti-pandemic workers enjoy caring lunches. From only three restaurants at the start to more than a dozen now; from serving medical staff to now serving medical staff, police, epidemic-prevention workers, and many more frontline anti-pandemic workers, the caring lunch campaign has become one of the most influential brand charity campaigns in Seattle's pandemic response. This campaign also touched local residents living in Seattle. After seeing the caring lunch campaign, many were moved by the organizers' good deeds and gathered to respond. During this time, many moving stories of love being passed on took place. The caring lunch campaign moved the public, and the public's participation moved the organizers. It is precisely these stories of mutual inspiration that let everyone feel that, whatever kind of participant we are, we are one family sharing hardship together. **Story One: A former aid recipient, now a donor** "For these four years I've wanted to find the people who helped me back then. I happened to see the caring lunch campaign online, and I have to use it to fulfill my wish." This was a WeChat message that a woman, L, sent to Lily Lyu, the caring lunch campaign's overall commander and CCCWA president. It turned out that four years ago, L's life suddenly took a turn for the worse, and at the time Lyu, on behalf of the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club—one of the participating organizations in this caring campaign—had raised a caring donation for her. For these four years, L had been thinking about how to give back to society, and when she saw the caring lunch campaign in the media she immediately donated $500. She said: "Thank you to those who helped me when I was in despair; now I want to pass the love on." This caring meal campaign is just like a baton of love, and we hope it is passed from hand to hand, to more people, for longer and farther. **Story Two: In China, hearts in Seattle** A couple living in China, Li Ruoyao and Zhang Shuo, immediately donated $10,000 to the campaign organizing committee upon hearing about the caring lunch campaign, to help the caring restaurants cover some raw-material costs. The couple said: "Medical staff and restaurant employees are both important forces fighting the pandemic in extraordinary times, and every one of these caring restaurants that joined the donation has a chivalrous spirit. We were moved by these ordinary, simple, yet great stories of love; although we can't come in person, our hearts are with this land of Seattle and these lovely people." **Story Three: I want medical staff to eat my caring boxed meal too** "When I saw that on the Chowbus app you can also choose to donate a caring meal to police and frontline command hotlines, to frontline medical staff in the ICU and ER, and to mobile testing stations, I thought that although my work leaves me no time to participate directly in the caring lunch campaign, I can still express my support for the campaign and my thanks to frontline medical workers by donating caring meals. Donating some caring boxed meals for them on Chowbus—this indirect participation is also love." This was a message from a user who bought 10 caring boxed meals on Chowbus in one go. This is not passing on meals of monetary value, but passing on priceless love. **Chowbus as the bridge that carries love** In this caring lunch relay, Chowbus played a key role. Connecting the more than a dozen restaurants making caring lunches on one end and the more than twenty frontline recipient organizations on the other, it became the most important bridge in the caring lunch campaign. Here, the caring restaurants also thank Chowbus for always delivering—rain or shine, Chowbus carried everyone's love to more and farther places. Chowbus staff worked from dawn to night every day, shuttling between restaurants and delivery points, covering everywhere from Renton in the south to Everett in the north, Issaquah in the east to Seattle in the west; the farthest recipient hospital was a round trip of more than a hundred miles, and some single tasks took at least three hours from pickup to delivery. On average, Chowbus delivered four to five hundred boxed meals a day, and at peak had to deliver 580 boxed meals to 14 different locations in one day, seven days a week without stopping. Yet Chowbus's delivery staff never complained—however many meals, however far the road, they gladly took them on. When the caring restaurants needed help, Chowbus staff would put on protective gear and help the restaurants pack and load, taking the steaming boxed meals to their destinations. By now Chowbus has delivered more than ten thousand boxed meals into the hands of over a thousand frontline anti-pandemic workers. **Standing together with the caring restaurants** "I hope I can still eat these caring restaurants' food after the pandemic"; "We absolutely cannot let these caring restaurants go under!"... When netizens saw the food these caring restaurants made, many raised such calls! Yes, now it's time to give back to these caring restaurants with love! We know the pandemic dealt an unprecedented blow to Seattle's restaurant industry. Over these two months, some restaurants worked hard on delivery, some pivoted to fresh-grocery group buying—everyone was finding ways to survive. Even in the restaurant industry's most cash-strapped days, these 13 restaurants participating in the caring lunch campaign still disregarded their own safety and, over the past month-plus, persisted in making free caring lunches for frontline anti-pandemic workers. Seeing this food, aren't you moved by the care of these caring restaurants? This is hardly like making caring lunches—it's practically a culinary competition among the caring restaurants! Whenever we see frontline anti-pandemic workers praising these caring lunches and posting all kinds of declarations of love to the caring restaurants on social media—"This is the best Chinese food we've ever eaten," "These caring lunches made me fall in love with Asian food," and so on—we, as Chinese people, feel proud too. "Now the caring lunch campaign has entered its second stage, and the baton of love has been passed into the public's hands. We hope to mobilize the strength of society to magnify the restaurants' love and use society's power to help these caring restaurants recover quickly from the blow of the pandemic." Here, the caring lunch organizers also call on the public to help the caring restaurants together and pass the love on. To help us keep these admirable caring restaurants, and so we can still eat their food after the pandemic, we sincerely ask everyone to take up the baton of love and order more delivery to support these caring restaurants. Now, for every $50 spent at a caring restaurant on Chowbus, these caring restaurants will match by donating a caring lunch. For the sake of the frontline anti-pandemic fighters and these caring restaurants, whether you spend on Chowbus or choose to donate directly on Chowbus, it's all a thumbs-up for love! Names of the 13 caring restaurants: The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, Liuyishou, Frying Fish, Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Shanghai House Restaurant, Sizzling Pot King, Happy Lamb Hot Pot, J&J Chinese Restaurant, No.9 Alley Hot Pot, Panda Dim Sum, and Tamarindos Indian Restaurant. Caring restaurants already live on the Chowbus app: The Dolar Shop, Liuyishou, Frying Fish, Sizzling Pot King, No.9 Alley Hot Pot, Shanghai House Restaurant. **Scan to download the Chowbus App and donate a caring lunch** **Please scan the caring lunch campaign website QR code to stay updated on the campaign** **Event Information** Host: CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State). **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** The Dolar Shop; Asian Family Market; Imperial Garden (Beijing Roast Duck); Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Frying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Shanghai House Restaurant; Sizzling Pot King; No.9 Alley Hot Pot; Happy Lamb Hot Pot; Panda Dim Sum; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Jing Wei LLC; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Cai & Cai Associates; Create World America Real Estate Inc.; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. Donation receiving account: Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. Company donation website: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. Check mailing address: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) (donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt). Volunteer group contacts for this event: For restaurant donation participation and institutional cooperation, please contact: Overall commander: CCCWA President Lily Lyu, email: lvlili0219@sina.com, WeChat: lili2999. Chief attorney: Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, email: Alex.cai@cai-law.com, Tel: 425-753-5188. Delivery group leader: Michelle Lei, email: michelle@chowbus.com. To donate funds as a company or individual, please contact finance group leader Li Xiaoyan (Sunshine Youth Education Foundation / Seattle Real Estate Club), email: eli@create-world.us. Medical institutions needing caring meals, please contact outreach group leader Sylvia Chin (Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club), email: screalty.seattle@gmail.com. For CCCWA chamber matters, please contact Lei, email: info@ccc-wa.org, WeChat: gloriachatting. Publicity group leader: Grace Gu, email: gracegu99@gmail.com. Fundraising group leader: Na Jiyuan, email: jay-na@att.net. IJ Sushi Burrito; Chowbus Inc.; J&J Chinese Restaurant; Tamarindos Indian Restaurant; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com **Co-organizers**
items.body_zh: _2020年05月13日 10:46_ __ _ _ _ _ 5月的西雅图逐渐炎热，爱心午餐活动也随着5月的天气继续升温。在活动进行的这一个多月时间里，13家餐厅通过专业外卖平台chowbus 将1.7万多份免费爱心盒饭送到26家受赠单位和社区成员手里，让1000多名一线抗疫者享用到爱心午餐。从一开始爱心午餐只有三家餐厅参与，到现在已经有十多家餐厅参与；从捐送医护人员到如今捐赠给医护人员、警察、防疫人员等更多一线抗疫工作者，爱心午餐活动经已经成为西雅图抗疫活动中最有影响力的品牌公益活动之一。 这次活动也感染了生活在西雅图的当地民众。很多人在看到有关爱心午餐的活动后都被组织者的义举所感动，也纷纷云集响应。在这段时间，也发生了不少让组织者感动的爱心传递的故事。爱心午餐活动感动民众，民众参与感动活动组织方。正是这种相互感动、相互鼓舞的故事，让大家感受到，无论是怎样的参与者，我们都是相濡以沫的一家人。 **故事一：曾经的受助者，如今的捐赠者** “这四年来一直想找到当初帮助过我的人，刚好在网上看到爱心午餐活动，一定要借活动了却心愿。”这是爱心午餐活动总指挥、CCCWA 商会会长吕莉莉收到的一条来自L女士的微信消息。原来，L女士在四年前生活突然遭遇变故，当时吕莉莉代表本次爱心活动的参与单位之一西雅图地产投资俱乐部募集了一笔爱心捐款给她。这四年来，L女士一直想着该用怎样的形式回馈社会，当她在媒体看到爱心午餐活动时立刻捐赠500美金。她说：“感谢在我绝望时帮助过我的人，现在我想把爱心传递下去。”这次爱心餐活动正如爱的接力棒，希望棒棒相传，传递给更多人，传递得更久、更远。 **故事二：人在中国，心系西雅图** 一对生活在国内的夫妇李若垚、张硕，听说爱心午餐活动后立即向活动组委会捐赠1万美金，用于帮助爱心餐厅承担一些原材料成本。这对夫妇说：“医护人员和餐厅员工都是在非常时期抗击疫情的重要力量，而这些参与捐赠的爱心餐厅也个个都有侠骨豪情。我们被这些平凡、朴素而又伟大的爱心故事所感动，虽然我们人不能来，但是心系西雅图这片土地和这些可爱的人。” **故事三：想让医护人员也能吃到我的爱心盒饭** “看到chowbus APP上也可以选择捐一顿爱心餐给警察以及前线指挥热线，捐给ICU、ER的一线医护人员，捐给移动监测站时，我想虽然自己由于工作关系没时间直接参与爱心午餐活动中，但是也可以通过捐爱心餐这种方式来表达对活动的支持、对一线医务工作者的感谢。为他们在chowbus上捐赠一些爱心盒饭，这种间接参与也是爱。”这是一位一口气在chowbus上买了10份爱心盒饭的用户留言。这不是传递有价的盒饭，而是传递无价的爱心。 ** ** **chowbus做传递爱心的桥梁** 在这场爱心午餐接力赛中，chowbus起了关键性作用。它一端连接制作爱心午餐的十几家餐厅，一端连接着二十多家一线受助单位，成为这场爱心午餐活动中最重要的桥梁。在此， 爱心餐厅们也感谢chowbus的使命必达，是chowbus风雨无阻把大家的爱心送到更多、更远的地方。chowbus的工作人员每天披星载月从早忙到晚上穿梭在餐厅和送餐点之间，南到Renton，北到Everett, 东到Issaquah，西到Seattle全覆盖， 最远的受捐医院 往返路程加起来得一百多英里， 有的 一单任务从取餐到送餐完成的时间加起来至少花费三个小时。 平均每天， chowbus 运 送四五百份盒饭，最多时需要一天将580个盒饭送达14个不同地方， 而且每周七天不停歇。但是， chowbus配送人员毫无怨言，再多的餐、再远的路他们都欣然接受。 当爱心午餐餐厅需要帮忙时，chowbus的员工就会带上防护品，帮助餐厅打包、装车，带着热气腾腾的饭盒前往目的地。 如今chowbus已经将一万多份盒饭送到上千名一线抗疫人员手中。 ** ** **与爱心餐厅丹舟共济** “希望在疫情之后还能吃到这些爱心餐厅的美食”，“绝对不能让这些爱心餐厅倒下去！”……当网友们看到爱心餐厅们制作的美食后，很多网友发出这样的呼声！ 是的，现在是时候用爱来回馈这些爱心餐厅了！我们知道，疫情给西雅图的餐饮行业带来了前所未有的重创。这两个月以来，有的餐厅努力送外卖，有的餐厅转型搞起了生鲜团购，大家都在想方设法生存下来。即使餐饮行业捉襟见肘的日子里，这13家参与爱心午餐活动的餐厅依然不顾自身安危，在过去的一个多月时间里坚持为一线抗疫工作者制作免费的爱心午餐。 ** ** ** ** 看到这些美食你是不是都在感慨爱心餐厅的用心，这哪里像是做爱心午餐，简直是爱心餐厅的厨艺大赛！每当看到一线抗疫工作者对这些爱心午餐赞不绝口，在社交媒体上给爱心餐厅的各种告白：“这是我们吃过的最好吃的中餐”，“因为这些爱心午餐让我爱上了亚洲美食”等等，身为华人的我们也为之骄傲。 “现在爱心午餐活动进入第二阶段，爱心的接力棒传递到大众手中，希望发动社会力量将餐厅的爱心放大，用社会的力量帮助这些爱心餐厅从疫情打击中快速恢复。”在此，爱心午餐的主办方也呼吁大众一起帮助爱心餐厅，将爱心传递下去。 为了能让我们留住这些可敬的爱心餐厅，为了让我们在疫情后还能吃到这些餐厅的美食，恳请大家接过爱心接力棒，多点外卖支持这些爱心餐厅。现在只要在chowbus上的爱心餐厅每消费$50美金，这些爱心餐厅将配捐赠出一份爱心午餐。为了身在前线的抗疫战士们，也为了这些爱心餐厅，无论您是在chowbus上消费，还是在chowbus上选择直接捐赠，都是为爱点赞！ 十三家爱心餐厅名称： 豆捞坊、IJ Sushi、刘一手、沸腾鱼乡、颐和园海鲜酒楼、蓉城老火锅、上海味道坊、芙蓉湘、小肥羊（快乐小羊）、百味轩、九号巷火锅、熊猫点心、Tamarindos Indian 餐厅 已在chowbus APP上线的爱心餐厅： 豆捞坊、刘一手、沸腾鱼乡、芙蓉湘、九号巷火锅、上海味道坊 **扫描下载 Chowbus App捐赠爱心午餐** **请扫描爱心午餐活动网站二维码及时了解活动动态** **活动信息** 主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State 本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) 颐和园北京烤鸭店 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅（CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手（LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 上海味道坊（Shanghai House Restaurant） 芙蓉湘(Sizzling Pot King) 九号巷（No.9 Alley Hot Pot） 小肥羊（快乐小羊Happy Lamb Hot Pot） 熊猫点心(Panda Dim Sum) 西雅图创业协会（Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) items.title_en: CCCWA's 7th 'Star of the Week' Draws Huge Popularity!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第7期CCCWA每周一星高人气热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's featured speaker was Ms. Holly Yang, Senior Vice President and Partner at Kidder Mathews, a leading West Coast commercial real estate firm.
items.summary_zh: 本期的主讲嘉宾是 西海岸领先的商业地产公司Kidder Mathews 高级副总裁 ，合伙人 Holly Yang 杨晓红女士。...
items.body_en:
This episode's featured speaker was Ms. Holly Yang, Senior Vice President and Partner at Kidder Mathews, a leading West Coast commercial real estate firm. Holly is a well-known expert in Seattle's commercial real estate community, and the first Chinese American in the Seattle area to earn the CCIM (Certified Commercial Investment Member) designation. With nearly 15 years in the industry, Holly has helped countless overseas investors achieve precise cross-border investment matches and maximize investor returns, and has been invited to speak at major business forums on market trend forecasting, legal topics, and international business courses.

Drawing on her real-world experience, Holly shared insights on West Coast US commercial real estate investment and walked through classic successful case studies from her 15 years in the field. She also addressed the current impact of the pandemic on the market and the outlook for after the pandemic, using professional data and her investment experience to introduce portfolio products investors might consider during extraordinary times and the role alternative investments can play in a portfolio.

Nearly 50 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom. Everyone thanked Kidder Mathews and the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.

Recording link: https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/2sBrFZbd7GBOHK_O-miYfL85EoH1eaa80CccrqFez06Wk3V45UZNNwHAftPE8xVS?startTime=1588991979000
items.body_zh:
本期的主讲嘉宾是西海岸领先的商业地产公司Kidder Mathews 高级副总裁，合伙人Holly Yang 杨晓红女士。 Holly是西雅图商业地产界的知名专家,她是西雅图地区首位获得“国际注册商业地产投资师”资质的华人。从业近15年，Holly帮助了无数的海外投资人实现跨国投资精准对接，并取得投资人利益最大化并且受邀各大商业论坛进行市场趋势预测，法律讲座和国际商业课程。

Holly以实际工作经验，通过讲座与大家分享了美国西海岸的商业地产的投资内容,以及过往15年的经典成功案例分析。 另外针对当前疫情对市场的影响和疫情过后的市场展望，Holly以专业数据为依据，结合投资经验，介绍了投资人在特殊时期可以考虑的组合配置产品以及配置另类投资对于投资组合的作用。

近50位朋友通过ZOOM参加了“云聚会”，大家感谢Kindder Mathews 与华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA组织这次专业知识讲座为大家提供广泛接触的机会和信息交流的平台。

讲座回播链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/2sBrFZbd7GBOHK_O-miYfL85EoH1eaa80CccrqFez06Wk3V45UZNNwHAftPE8xVS?startTime=1588991979000

items.title_en: 8th 'Star of the Week' Guest Qinghua Pei Shares 'What Philosophy Should Companies Embrace to Align with International Standards, How Can They Strengthen Management, and What Are the Trends in Operations Management?'
items.title_zh: 第八期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾裴庆华分享“企业秉承怎样的理念才能与国际接轨，怎样才能提升管理力，运营管理的趋势是什么。”
items.summary_en: Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), discusses: in a globalized environment, companies face many operational challenges. What philosophy should a company embrace to be considered internationally aligned? What traits do benchmark companies share? What kind of leadership effectively drives management improvement, and what are the trends in operations management?
items.summary_zh: CCI竞能咨询国际原中国区总经理裴庆华与大家 探讨：在全球化背景下企业运营面临诸多挑战，企业应该秉承怎样的理念才能算是与国际接轨，标杆企业有什么特点，需要怎样的领导力才能有效促进管理的提升，运营管理的趋势是什么。尽管企业行业不同、公司大小各异，但运营管理的理念和方法是相通的，...
items.body_en:
Qinghua Pei, former China General Manager of CCI (Competitive Capability International), discusses: in a globalized environment, companies face many operational challenges. What philosophy should a company embrace to be considered internationally aligned? What traits do benchmark companies share? What kind of leadership effectively drives management improvement, and what are the trends in operations management? Though industries and company sizes vary widely, the philosophy and methods of operations management are universal — Mr. Pei hopes this lecture will offer useful insights for the operations and growth of each attendee's own company.

Competitive Capability International (CCI) is a multinational operations management consulting firm founded in 1987, headquartered in Irvine, California, with seven offices across the globe serving primarily large corporate groups and multinational companies. CCI created its proprietary 'TRACC' Continuous Improvement System, distilling modern management tools and best practices from Fortune 500 operations, helping companies optimize their entire operational value chain and build their own world-class operating model to achieve sustainable performance results. The TRACC system represents the direction modern enterprise operations management philosophy and management systems are heading.

Speaker Qinghua Pei: Master's in Engineering, MBA. With 14 years of experience in corporate management consulting, he served as China General Manager of CCI, providing world-class operations management consulting to multinational companies such as Coca-Cola, Heinz, DuPont, and AkzoNobel, as well as major Chinese state-owned enterprises such as China Resources and COFCO. He now oversees cross-regional coordination for consulting projects in the US. He also has a strong technical background, having spent many years working on spacecraft systems design at the China Academy of Space Technology, and has two years of study and work experience in Europe, giving him unique insight into corporate operations and change management across different cultural contexts.

Friday, May 15th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, May 16th, 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833,,4696970869# US
items.body_zh:
CCI竞能咨询国际原中国区总经理裴庆华与大家探讨：在全球化背景下企业运营面临诸多挑战，企业应该秉承怎样的理念才能算是与国际接轨，标杆企业有什么特点，需要怎样的领导力才能有效促进管理的提升，运营管理的趋势是什么。尽管企业行业不同、公司大小各异，但运营管理的理念和方法是相通的，裴先生希望通过本讲座能给各自公司的运营管理和发展带来借鉴。

竞能咨询国际(CCI)是一家企业运营管理咨询的跨国公司，1987年成立，总部设在美国加州尔湾，在全球各大洲共有7家分公司，主要服务大型的集团企业、跨国公司。CCI独创名为TRACC的“持续改进系统”，汇总现代管理工具方法和500强企业运营管理的最佳实践经验，帮助企业优化整个运营价值链，打造自己的卓越运营或世界级运营模式，达成可持续的绩效成果。TRACC系统代表了现代企业运营管理的理念和管理系统的发展趋势。

主将嘉宾裴庆华:工程硕士，MBA。从事企业管理咨询14年，曾担任CCI竞能咨询国际中国区总经理, 为许多跨国企业如可口可乐、亨氏、杜邦、阿克苏诺贝尔，和国内的央企如华润、中粮等提供世界级运营管理咨询服务，现在美国负责咨询项目跨区域协同工作。他还有很强的技术背景，曾在中国空间技术研究院从事空间飞行器总体设计多年，并在欧洲有两年的学习和工作经历，对不同的文化背景下企业的运作、企业的变革管理有独到的体会。

美西时间周五5月15日8pm-9:30pm，（北京时间周六5月16日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,,4696970869# US

items.title_en: WSCRF Teams up with CCCWA to Support Local Businesses and Feed Frontline Workers
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国关系基金会（WSCRF）携手CCCWA支持本地商家，为一线抗疫人员送餐
items.summary_en: The Washington State China Relations Fund (WSCRF), the charitable arm of the Washington State China Relations Council (WSCRC), has joined forces with the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington...
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国关系理事会（WSCRC）旗下的慈善机构——华盛顿州中国关系基金会（WSCRF），近日与华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）携手，在为奋战在抗疫一线的工作者提供餐食的同时，也支持本地餐厅的生存与发展。
items.body_en:
The Washington State China Relations Fund (WSCRF), the charitable arm of the Washington State China Relations Council (WSCRC), has joined forces with the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) to provide meals to frontline workers fighting Covid-19 while simultaneously supporting local restaurants. CCCWA and partnering organizations and restaurants initiated their “Food with Love” Program on March 30, 2020 ([https://foodwithlovecovid19.com](https://wscrc.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cebf8a47fb72b3eacf0298b96&id=a1996545d7&e=a749ac4648)). The program recruited 15 local restaurants to prepare meals to be delivered to frontline healthcare workers and first responders at over 20 hospitals, police stations and mobile testing sites. To date over 11,000 meals have been delivered. The program is scheduled to run until the end of May. The meals delivered to date have been financed by donations from the restaurants themselves, an in-kind contribution from Chowbus, a food delivery system, and by cash donations. To meet the initial target of raising $400,000 to providing 17,500 meals by June 30, 2020, the program needs to raise an additional $58,000 to complete its objective. The WSCRC and WSCRF, recognizing the great efforts by the Chinese Community in Washington State to pitch in to defeat the virus, encourage its members and partners to support this effort. The WSCRF is able to receive donations and issue a tax-deductible receipt. We appreciate your support. Please contact us if you know of any restaurants who might be interested in participating in this effort.

You could help this effort through the following channels:

PayPal: Send payment to [[email protected]](https://wscrc.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cebf8a47fb72b3eacf0298b96&id=cba0436963&e=a749ac4648) Check Payment: Make Check Payable to: Washington State China Relations Fund Address: 1301 5th Ave, Suite 1500 Seattle, WA 98101 Bank Transfer: Bank Name: East West Bank Account Name: Washington State China Relations Fund Routing Number: 125108492 Account Number: 8662009086 To receive tax-exemption receipt, please provide the donor’s name, email and contact number when making the donation. For more information and questions, please contact [[email protected]](https://wscrc.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cebf8a47fb72b3eacf0298b96&id=8180ca8108&e=a749ac4648). We hope that you and your family stay safe and healthy. Thank you for your kind support. Contact us: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) 206-441-4419 Mailing Address: 1301 5th Ave NE, Suite 1500 Seattle, WA 98101
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国关系理事会（WSCRC）旗下的慈善机构——华盛顿州中国关系基金会（WSCRF），近日与华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）携手，在为奋战在抗疫一线的工作者提供餐食的同时，也支持本地餐厅的生存与发展。CCCWA联合多家合作机构与餐厅，于2020年3月30日发起了“Food with Love”爱心餐项目（网址：https://foodwithlovecovid19.com）。该项目招募了15家本地餐厅制作爱心餐，配送至20多家医院、警察局及移动检测点的一线医护人员和急救人员手中。截至目前，已配送超过11,000份爱心餐。该项目计划持续至5月底。目前已配送的爱心餐资金来源包括参与餐厅自身的捐赠、外送平台Chowbus提供的实物贡献，以及社会各界的现金捐款。为实现在2020年6月30日前募集40万美元、提供17,500份爱心餐的最初目标，该项目仍需再筹集5.8万美元才能完成。WSCRC及WSCRF高度认可华盛顿州华人社区为抗击疫情所付出的巨大努力，鼓励其成员和合作伙伴支持这项行动。WSCRF可接受捐款并开具免税收据。感谢您的支持！如果您了解有意参与此项行动的餐厅，欢迎与我们联系。

您可以通过以下渠道支持本次活动：

PayPal：付款至 [通过邮件联系]
支票支付：抬头请写：Washington State China Relations Fund，地址：1301 5th Ave, Suite 1500, Seattle, WA 98101
银行转账：银行名称：East West Bank，账户名称：Washington State China Relations Fund，Routing Number: 125108492，Account Number: 8662009086

如需获取免税收据，请在捐款时提供捐款人姓名、邮箱及联系电话。如需了解更多信息或有任何疑问，请联系 [通过邮件联系]。

愿您和家人平安健康。感谢您的热心支持。

联系方式：[通过邮件联系] 206-441-4419
通讯地址：1301 5th Ave NE, Suite 1500, Seattle, WA 98101

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 7 Guest Holly Yang: U.S. Commercial Real Estate Investment Under the Shadow of COVID-19
items.title_zh: 第七期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾Holly Yang分享: 新冠疫情阴影下的美国商业地产投资
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _May 7, 2020 04:40_ __ _ _ _ _ Lecture content: • Market trends under the shadow of COVID-19 • Market outlook after the pandemic • Commercial Real Estate 101 • Success stories and analysis • Common misconceptions in commercial real estate investment Speaker: Holly Yang, CCIM, First Vice President, Partner. Ms. Holly Yang is a well-known expert in Seattle's commercial real estate field, deeply versed in Chinese and American languages, business culture, and regulations. In 2019, Ms. Yang was named "Most Influential Commercial Real Estate Leader of the Year" by a national business weekly. In 2018, she received the "Top 10 Outstanding Women in U.S. Real Estate" award from a real estate news outlet. She is the first Chinese person in the Seattle area to earn the CCIM (Certified Commercial Investment Member) designation. In nearly 15 years in the field, she has helped countless overseas investors achieve precise cross-border investment matches and maximize their returns. Ms. Yang has been interviewed by many major media outlets, including the well-known BISNOW and the Puget Sound Business Journal, and has been invited to major business forums to give market-trend forecasts, legal lectures, and international business courses. In her work, Ms. Yang upholds a professional attitude of pursuing excellence; in life, she is passionate about charity and advancing U.S.-China cultural exchange. Founded more than 40 years ago, Kidder Mathews is a leading commercial real estate firm on the West Coast, now operating across Arizona, California, Nevada, Oregon, and Washington. Kidder Mathews' Greater Seattle China services provide outstanding real estate consulting and brokerage services to Chinese investors, developers, and tenants. Pacific Time, Friday, May 8, 8pm-9:30 (Beijing time, Saturday, May 9, 11am-12:30pm) Registration: To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,,4696970869# US (San Jose)
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年05月07日 04:40_ __ _ _ _ _ 讲座内容： • 新冠疫情阴影下的市场行情走势 • 疫情过后的市场展望 • 商业地产101 • 成功案例及分析 • 商业地产投资常见误区 主讲者: Holly Yang 杨晓红，CCIM, First Vice President, Partner 副总裁，合伙人. 杨 晓红女士是西雅图商业地产界的知名专家，她深谙中美语言、商业文化和法规。2019年杨晓红女士被全美商业周刊荣选为“年度最具影响力的商业地产领军人”。2018年杨晓红女士荣膺房地产新闻网“全美房地产业十大杰出女性”奖。她是西雅图地区首位获得“国际注册商业地产投资师”资质的华人。从业近15年，她帮助了无数的海外投资人实现跨国投资精准对接，并取得投资人利益最大化。杨晓红女士曾多次接受各大媒体采访，包括著名的BISNOW和普吉特湾商业周刊，并受邀各大商业论坛进行市场趋势预测，法律讲座和国际商业课程。工作中，杨晓红女士秉持着追求卓越的专业态度。生活中，她热衷公益慈善和推进中美文化的交流。 Kidder Mathews公司成立40多年,是西海岸领先的商业地产公司。现已发展遍及亚利桑那州，加利福尼亚州，内华达州，俄勒冈州和华盛顿州。 Kidder Mathews 大西雅图对华服务为中国投资者，开发商和租户提供卓越地 产咨询和经纪服务。 美西时间周五5月08日8pm-9:30，（北京时间周六5月09日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接：
