items.body_zh:
讲座内容： • 新冠疫情阴影下的市场行情走势 • 疫情过后的市场展望 • 商业地产101 • 成功案例及分析 • 商业地产投资常见误区

主讲者: Holly Yang 杨晓红，CCIM, Senior Vice President, Partner 高级副总裁，合伙人. 杨晓红女士是西雅图商业地产界的知名专家，她深谙中美语言、商业文化和法规。2019年杨晓红女士被全美商业周刊荣选为“年度最具影响力的商业地产领军人”。2018年杨晓红女士荣膺房地产新闻网“全美房地产业十大杰出女性”奖。她是西雅图地区首位获得“国际注册商业地产投资师”资质的华人。从业近15年，她帮助了无数的海外投资人实现跨国投资精准对接，并取得投资人利益最大化。杨晓红女士曾多次接受各大媒体采访，包括著名的BISNOW和普吉特湾商业周刊，并受邀各大商业论坛进行市场趋势预测，法律讲座和国际商业课程。工作中，杨晓红女士秉持着追求卓越的专业态度。生活中，她热衷公益慈善和推进中美文化的交流。

Kidder Mathews公司成立40多年,是西海岸领先的商业地产公司。现已发展遍及亚利桑那州，加利福尼亚州，内华达州，俄勒冈州和华盛顿州。 Kidder Mathews 大西雅图对华服务为中国投资者，开发商和租户提供卓越地 产咨询和经纪服务。

美西时间周五5月08日8pm-9:30pm，（北京时间周六5月09日11am-12:30pm） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +16699006833,,4696970869# US (San Jose)

items.title_en: CCCWA COVID Charity Meal Drive — Latest Update
items.title_zh: 华州中华总商会新冠慈善送餐行动——最新进展
items.summary_en: Latest update on CCCWA's charity meal fundraising effort, supporting local restaurants and vulnerable residents.
items.summary_zh: 最新动态：CCCWA爱心募捐活动，支持受疫情影响的当地餐厅和弱势居民。
items.body_en:
The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) launched a community fundraising appeal at the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, calling on its members and supporters to contribute to a charity meal drive that would support two interlinked groups: Chinese-owned restaurants facing closure, and vulnerable community members who needed food assistance.

The fundraising letter (倡议书), issued by CCCWA leadership in early 2020, framed the appeal as a moment of community solidarity — an opportunity for those with the means to help, to stand alongside neighbors, colleagues, and fellow business owners who were facing serious hardship.

## How the Drive Worked

Donations collected through the campaign were channeled directly into meal orders placed with participating Chinese restaurants across the Greater Seattle area. Restaurants received payment for meals prepared at or near cost, providing a critical revenue stream at a time when their doors were otherwise closed to the public.

Prepared meals were collected by volunteer drivers — many of them CCCWA members donating their time — and delivered to hospitals, assisted living facilities, community centers, and directly to households in need. The logistics were coordinated through CCCWA's established network of contacts and volunteers, with daily routes organized across Seattle, Bellevue, Redmond, and surrounding communities.

## Community Response

The response from CCCWA's membership and the broader Chinese-American community was immediate and generous. Donations came from individuals, businesses, and organizations across Washington State and from the wider Chinese diaspora, reflecting the community's deep sense of mutual obligation and care.

As the campaign grew, CCCWA continued to provide updates to donors and the public, documenting the number of meals delivered, the restaurants involved, and the communities reached. These updates became an important form of accountability and also served to encourage continued giving as the pandemic stretched into the summer months.

## Impact

The charity meal drive became one of CCCWA's signature programs during the pandemic, ultimately helping to sustain multiple Chinese-owned restaurants through a period that devastated the food service industry, while delivering thousands of meals to frontline workers and at-risk community members. The program demonstrated the power of organized community action and established a model for CCCWA's crisis response work going forward.
items.body_zh:
新冠疫情爆发之初，华州中华总商会（CCCWA）便发起了一项社区募捐倡议，呼吁会员及支持者为一项慈善送餐行动慷慨解囊，该行动旨在同时帮助两个相互关联的群体：面临停业危机的华人餐馆，以及需要食物援助的社区弱势群体。

华州中华总商会领导层于2020年初发布的这份倡议书，将此次募捐定位为社区团结互助的契机——让有能力伸出援手的人们，与正面临严峻困境的邻里、同事和同行企业主并肩同行。

## 行动如何运作

通过此次活动募集的善款被直接用于向大西雅图地区参与该项目的华人餐馆下单订餐。餐馆按接近成本价的标准准备餐食并获得相应报酬，这在其他业务停摆、无法向公众开放之际，为其提供了至关重要的营收来源。

备好的餐食由志愿者司机——其中许多是无偿贡献时间的华州中华总商会会员——负责收取，并配送至各医院、辅助生活机构、社区中心，以及有需要的家庭。整个物流工作通过华州中华总商会既有的联络人与志愿者网络进行协调，每日在西雅图、贝尔维尤、雷德蒙德及周边社区安排配送路线。

## 社区反响

华州中华总商会会员及更广泛的华裔美国人社区反响迅速且慷慨。捐款来自华盛顿州各地乃至更广泛华人侨界的个人、企业和机构，充分体现了这一社区深厚的互助责任感与关爱之情。

随着活动规模不断扩大，华州中华总商会持续向捐助者及公众发布最新进展，记录已配送的餐食数量、参与的餐馆以及覆盖的社区。这些更新不仅成为一种重要的问责方式，也在疫情延续至夏季期间，持续鼓励着大家的踊跃捐助。

## 成效

这项慈善送餐行动成为华州中华总商会在疫情期间的标志性项目之一，最终帮助多家华人餐馆挺过了这场重创餐饮业的危机，同时向一线工作人员及高风险社区群体配送了数千份餐食。该项目充分展现了有组织的社区行动所蕴含的力量，也为华州中华总商会日后的危机应对工作树立了范例。

items.title_en: CCCWA's 6th 'Star of the Week' Continues to Draw Huge Popularity!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第6期CCCWA“每周一星持续“高人气热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's guest, Grace Chen, President of American Express Financial North America, gathered virtually with attendees for the evening, sharing professional insights on diversified asset allocation to help individual investors understand different investment portfolio strategies.
items.summary_zh: 本期的受邀嘉宾美信金融北美区总裁Grace Chen当晚与参会来宾 隔空聚会，从专业角度 带给大家实现多元分散的资产配置信息分享，帮助...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Grace Chen, President of American Express Financial North America, gathered virtually with attendees for the evening, sharing professional insights on diversified asset allocation to help individual investors understand different investment portfolio strategies.

Main topics of the lecture:
- The role of alternative investments within a portfolio
- Portfolio products worth considering during extraordinary times
- Hedge-style life settlement funds
- Tax-advantaged Opportunity Zone investments

Nearly 60 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom, responding enthusiastically to the introduction to American Express Financial, with continuous questions and interaction with the guest throughout the evening. Everyone thanked the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.

Recording link: https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/5ZJHaI7TsVpOGtL19VrfVohmDLbHaaa81yUX-aYNyof_18qn5yuzuVLqK9QAppY
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾美信金融北美区总裁Grace Chen当晚与参会来宾隔空聚会，从专业角度带给大家实现多元分散的资产配置信息分享，帮助广大个人投资者了解投资领域的不同组合计划。

讲座涉及的主要内容： - 配置另类投资对于投资组合的作用 - 特殊时期可以考虑组合配置产品 - 避险型投资保单贴现基金 - 避税型Opportunity Zone 机会区域型的投资

近60位朋友通过ZOOM参加了“云聚会”，对美信金融的介绍反应热烈，当晚会议进行中不断与嘉宾提问互动。大家感谢华盛顿州中国总商会组织这次专业知识讲座为大家提供广泛接触的机会和信息交流的平台。

讲座回放链接：Meeting Recording: https://us02web.zoom.us/rec/share/5ZJHaI7TsVpOGtL19VrfVohmDLbHaaa81yUX-aYNyof_18qn5yuzuVLqK9QAppY

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 6 Guest Grace Chen (Maxim Financial): "How to Achieve Diversified Asset Allocation"
items.title_zh: 第六期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾Grace Chen （美信金融）分享《如何实现多元分散的资产配置》
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 29, 2020 07:30_ __ _ _ _ _ Communications technology is about to enter the 5G era, and many industries hope to promote their products worldwide through social platforms to improve customer satisfaction and achieve a win-win for businesses and customers. Maxim Financial is exactly such a financial services company: based on internet platform technology, it connects with high-quality global asset management firms to bring alternative investment opportunities—once available only to institutions—to individual investors, helping them achieve diversified asset allocation. Featured Speaker: North America president of Maxim Financial. Guest Grace Chen previously worked in PMG's investment development department and as a development and financing manager at Greenland USA; she holds FINRA Series 7 and 63 licenses and dual bachelor's degrees in financial mathematics and economics from Binghamton University (SUNY). Pacific Time, Friday, May 1, 8pm-9:30 (Beijing time, Saturday, May 2, 11am-12:30am). Registration: To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: +16699006833,4696970869#
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月29日 07:30_ __ _ _ _ _ 通信科技即将跨入 5G 时代，许多行业都希望通过社交平台将产品推广到世界各地以提高客户的满意度，并做到企业与客户的双赢。美信金融正是这样的金融服务公司：基于互联网平台技术，对接高质量全球资产管理公司，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现多元分散的资产配置。 主讲嘉宾 美信金融北美区总裁： 做客嘉宾Grace Chen Grace Chen 曾就职于PMG投资拓展部及绿地美国开发及融资经理； 持有Finra系列7和63执照；纽约州立大学宾汉姆顿金融数学及经济双学士。 美西时间周五5月01日8pm-9:30， （北京时间周六5月2日11am-12:30am） 报名方式 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： +16699006833,4696970869#

items.title_en: Chowbus: The Messengers of Love Shuttling Daily Between Restaurants, Hospitals, and Police Stations
items.title_zh: Chowbus: 每天穿梭在餐厅和医院、警察局之间的爱的使者
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 28, 2020 07:28_ __ _ _ _ _ "If the participating restaurants are the 'needle' of the caring lunch campaign, then Chowbus's delivery is the 'thread.' Threading the needle, Chowbus organized the whole campaign in an orderly way, forming the moving picture of this caring lunch donation." This is how the caring lunch campaign organizing committee described Chowbus's role. In this caring lunch relay, Chowbus connected the more than a dozen restaurants making caring lunches on one end and, on the other, more than a dozen frontline medical sites, police stations, and mobile epidemic-prevention stations such as UW Virology and Bellevue Police—becoming the most important bridge in the campaign. As of now, Chowbus has delivered more than 5,000 caring lunches in total to frontline medical sites, police stations, and other institutions, and over the next month-plus will continue to dedicate its professional delivery to serving recipient organizations with love. When the caring lunch campaign was first launched, Chowbus joined immediately, and Chowbus lead Michelle also took on the role of the campaign's delivery group leader. Michelle said: "Joining this campaign came entirely from being moved by the restaurants' good deeds, and wanting to use my own resources and strengths to achieve this goal together with everyone. When almost everyone is safe at home, medical workers and police must stay at their posts; we hope to give some care to those fighting on the front lines, so they can feel some warmth and companionship while protecting us." **Connecting restaurants and frontline workers through delivery service.** For the caring lunches, Chowbus staff worked up a hard sweat, and the Chowbus company even set aside its own profits to do charity. The pandemic caused Chowbus's own business to grow rapidly in the short term. While ensuring high-quality service to its own users, Chowbus not only hired more drivers but also sent office staff to assist the caring lunch campaign at any time, completing the task with guaranteed quality and quantity. Every day, Chowbus had to complete the delivery of several hundred caring lunches. For these hundreds of meals, Chowbus staff first had to go separately to each restaurant to pick up the food, then deliver it to different hospitals, police stations, and mobile testing sites. The recipient organizations were very spread out; a round trip to the farther hospitals added up to more than a hundred miles, and a single task took at least three hours from pickup to delivery. Yet Chowbus's delivery staff never complained—however many meals, however far the road, they gladly took them on. When some hospitals had strict requirements for delivery time and food temperature, they could deliver food meeting temperature standards within the set time. When the caring restaurants needed help, Chowbus staff would put on protective gear and help the restaurants pack and load, taking the steaming boxed meals to their destinations. Here, Michelle also thanked the restaurants fighting alongside them—The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Liuyishou, and others—saying it was precisely because of everyone's tacit cooperation that the caring meals could be delivered on time. **Connecting users and caring lunches through the platform.** On one hand, Chowbus connected restaurants and frontline workers through delivery service; on the other, Chowbus connected the general public with caring lunches through its own online platform. When many people saw the reports about the "caring lunch" campaign, they expressed that they too wanted to donate caring lunches. So Chowbus opened a donation channel on its website and app, where users could choose to donate a caring meal to police and frontline command hotlines, to frontline medical staff in the ICU and ER, to mobile testing stations, and to donate other amounts. On the very day the caring-meal donation feature launched, it won users' recognition and they gave generously—one anonymous user even donated dozens of caring lunches at once. The platform also received over $3,000 in caring donations from users, and Michelle herself led by donating $500; all these donations were transferred to the campaign's finance group to buy more caring meals for frontline workers. **Chowbus App: donate a caring lunch.** Whenever medical staff and police receive a caring meal from a Chowbus driver, their faces beam with bright, happy smiles. They say receiving these "caring lunches" warms their hearts and adds even greater motivation to their pandemic-fighting work. Just last week, when Bellevue police officers enjoyed caring lunches for the first time, they happily posted on Facebook to thank Chowbus and the restaurants! In the days ahead, Chowbus's striking red delivery insulated bags will keep appearing at police stations, hospitals, and testing sites. If you also want your own caring lunch to be in a Chowbus delivery bag, download the Chowbus App now and donate a caring lunch to the frontline workers protecting our Seattle home whom you'd like to thank! **Scan to download the Chowbus App and donate a caring lunch** **Event Information** Host: CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State). **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** The Dolar Shop; IJ Sushi Burrito; Asian Family Market; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Jing Wei LLC; Cai & Cai Associates; SC Intl Realty; Imperial Garden (Beijing Roast Duck); Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Frying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Create World America Real Estate Inc.; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. Donation receiving account: Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. Company donation website: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. Check mailing address: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) (donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt). Volunteer group contacts for this event: For restaurant donation participation and institutional cooperation, please contact: Overall commander: CCCWA President Lily Lyu, email: lvlili0219@sina.com, WeChat: lili2999. Chief attorney: Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, email: Alex.cai@cai-law.com, Tel: 425-753-5188. Delivery group leader: Michelle Lei, email: michelle@chowbus.com. To donate funds as a company or individual, please contact finance group leader Li Xiaoyan (Sunshine Youth Education Foundation / Seattle Real Estate Club), eli@create-world.us. Medical institutions needing caring meal boxes, please contact outreach group leader Sylvia Chin (Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club), email: screalty.seattle@gmail.com. For media and CCCWA chamber matters, please contact Lei, email: info@ccc-wa.org, WeChat: gloriachatting. Publicity group leader: Grace Gu, email: gracegu99@gmail.com. Fundraising group leader: Na Jiyuan, email: jay-na@att.net. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com **Co-organizers**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月28日 07:28_ __ _ _ _ _ “如果说参加捐赠的餐厅是爱心午餐活动的‘针’，那么Chowbus的配送就是这次活动的‘线’，经过Chowbus穿针引线，将整个活动组织得有条不紊，构成这次爱心午餐捐赠的动人画面。”这是爱心午餐活动组委会对Chowbus在这次活动中作用的评价。在这场爱心午餐的接力赛中，Chowubus一端连接制作爱心午餐的十几家餐厅，一端连接着UW Virology、Bellevue Police等十几个一线医护、警察局以及移动防疫站，成为这场爱心午餐活动中最重要的桥梁。截止目前为止，Chowbus已经向一线医护、警察局等机构共计配送了5000多份爱心午餐，在接下来的一个多月时间中 ，还将继续用专业配送为受助机构奉献爱心。 在爱心午餐活动刚刚发起时，Chowbus就第一时间加入进来，Chowbus 负责人Michelle也担任了本次爱心午餐配送组组长的工作。Michelle说：“能参加这个活动完全是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。在几乎所有的人都安全在家时，此时医务工作者、警察这些人却需要坚守岗位，希望能给奋战在一线岗位的工作者一些关怀，让他们能在守护我们的同时感到一些温暖和陪伴。” 用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者 为了爱心午餐，Chowbus工作人员付出了辛勤汗水，而Chowbus公司更是舍弃自己盈利去做公益。据了解，疫情的发生让Chowbus自身业务短期内迅速增长。在保证提供给自己用户高质量服务的前提下，Chowbus不但增加雇佣司机、更是出动办公室工作人员，随时援助爱心午餐活动，保质保量完成任务。 每天，Chowbus都要完成几百份爱心午餐的配送任务。这数百份的爱心餐都需要Chowbus工作人员先分别去各个餐厅取餐，然后送往不同的医院、警察局、移动检测点。受捐机构都分布很分散，远些的医院去一趟往返路程加起来得一百多英里，一单任务从取餐到送餐完成的时间加起来至少花费三个小时。但是，Chowbu配送人员毫无怨言，再多的餐、再远的路他们都欣然接受。当有的医院对送餐时间、餐品温度有着严格的要求时，他们也能在规定时间将符合温度标准的食物送到。当爱心午餐餐厅需要帮忙时，Chowbus的员工就会带上防护品，帮助餐厅打包、装车，带着热气腾腾的饭盒前往目的地。在此，Michelle 也向共同奋战的豆捞坊、IJ Sushi、颐和园海鲜酒楼、蓉城老火锅、沸腾鱼乡、刘一手等餐厅表示感谢，她说，正是因为大家的默契配合，才能让爱心餐及时送达。 用平台连接用户和爱心午餐 一方面，Chowbus用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者 ；另一方面，Chowbus用自己的网络平台连接大众用户和爱心午餐。 当很多人看到“爱心午餐”的活动报道后，都纷纷表示自己也想捐助爱心午餐。为此，Chowbus在网站和APP上也开通捐赠通道，用户可以选择捐一顿爱心餐给警察以及前线指挥热线、给ICU、ER的一线医护人员、捐给移动监测站、以及其他金额捐赠。捐赠爱心餐功能上线当天就收到用户们认可并纷纷解囊，甚至有位匿名用户一口气捐了几十份爱心午餐。平台上还收到用户们的3000多美金爱心捐款，Michelle本人也带头捐赠500美金，这些捐款都一并转给活动财务组，用来给一线工作人员们购买更多爱心餐。 Chowbus App 捐赠爱心午餐 每当医护人员、警察从Chowbus司机手中接过爱心餐时，脸上都洋溢着灿烂幸福的笑容，他们说，能收到这些“爱心午餐”内心很温暖，这给他们抗疫工作增添了更大的动力。就在上周，当Bellevue 警察局的警察们首次享用到爱心午餐时，开心地在Facebook发文感谢Chowbus、感谢餐厅！ 在接下来的日子，Chowbus醒目的红色配送保温包还将频繁出现在警察局、医院和监测点，如果你也想让Chowbus的配送包里有你的一份爱心午餐，现在就下载Chowbus APP，给你想致谢的保卫西雅图家园的一线工作者们捐赠一份爱心午餐！ **扫描下载 Chowbus App捐赠爱心午餐** **活动信息** 主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of items.title_en: Love Lunch Story Feature — Chowbus: A Messenger of Love Shuttling Between Restaurants, Hospitals, and Police Stations Every Day
items.title_zh: 爱心午餐报道之--Chowbus: 每天穿梭在餐厅和医院、警察局之间的爱的使者
items.summary_en: When the Love Lunch drive first launched, Chowbus was one of the first to join, and Chowbus manager Michelle also took on the role of delivery team lead. Michelle said: 'What moved me to join was entirely the generosity shown by the restaurants — I wanted to use my own resources and strengths to help achieve this goal alongside everyone else.'
items.summary_zh: 在爱心午餐活动刚刚发起时，Chowbus就第一时间加入进来，Chowbus 负责人Michelle也担任了本次爱心午餐配送组组长的工作。Michelle说：“能参加这个活动完全是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。在几乎所有的人都安全在家时，此时医务工作者、警察这些人却需要坚守岗位，希望能给奋战在一线岗位的工作者一些关怀，让他们能在守护我们的同时感到一些温暖和陪伴。”...
items.body_en:
When the Love Lunch drive first launched, Chowbus was one of the first to join, and Chowbus manager Michelle also took on the role of delivery team lead. Michelle said: 'What moved me to join was entirely the generosity shown by the restaurants — I wanted to use my own resources and strengths to help achieve this goal alongside everyone else. While almost everyone else is safe at home, medical workers and police officers still need to stay on duty. I hope we can bring a little care to those working on the front lines, so they feel some warmth and companionship even as they protect us.'

'If the restaurants donating to the Love Lunch drive are the needle, then Chowbus's delivery is the thread — Chowbus wove the whole operation together seamlessly, creating the touching picture behind this donation effort.' That's how the Love Lunch organizing committee described Chowbus's role in this drive. In this relay of love lunches, Chowbus connects a dozen or so participating restaurants on one end, and a dozen frontline hospitals, the Bellevue Police Department, and mobile testing sites on the other — becoming the most critical bridge in the whole effort. As of now, Chowbus has delivered more than 5,000 love lunches to frontline medical staff and police, and will continue donating its professional delivery services over the coming month or more.

Connecting restaurants and frontline workers through delivery. Chowbus staff put in real sweat for this cause, and the company gave up its own profit to do good. Ironically, the pandemic caused Chowbus's own business to grow rapidly in the short term. While still ensuring high-quality service for its regular customers, Chowbus not only hired more drivers but also mobilized office staff to help with the Love Lunch drive whenever needed, completing the work reliably and on time. Every day, Chowbus completes hundreds of love-lunch deliveries. Each of those hundreds of meals requires Chowbus staff to first pick up food from each restaurant, then deliver it to different hospitals, police stations, and mobile testing sites. Recipient organizations are spread far apart — some hospitals require a round trip of over 100 miles, and a single delivery task, from pickup to drop-off, can take at least three hours. Yet Chowbus's delivery staff never complained, cheerfully accepting however much food and however far the distance. When some hospitals had strict requirements for delivery timing and food temperature, they still managed to deliver food meeting those standards within the required window. When restaurants needed help, Chowbus staff would put on protective gear and help pack and load food, carrying steaming hot meal boxes to their destinations. Michelle also thanked the restaurants working alongside them — The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou, and others — saying it was their seamless coordination that made timely delivery of the love lunches possible.

Connecting users and the Love Lunch drive through its platform. On one hand, Chowbus connects restaurants and frontline workers through delivery; on the other, it connects everyday users to the Love Lunch drive through its own platform. After many people saw news coverage of the 'Love Lunch' drive, they expressed interest in donating too. So Chowbus opened a donation channel on its website and app, letting users choose to donate a love meal to police and frontline command hotlines, to ICU/ER frontline medical staff, to mobile testing stations, or other amounts. The donation feature received an enthusiastic response the day it launched, with one anonymous user donating dozens of love lunches in one go. The platform also received over $3,000 in donations from users, with Michelle herself leading by donating $500 — all funds were passed along to the event's finance team to purchase more love lunches for frontline workers.

Every time medical staff or police officers receive a love lunch from a Chowbus driver, their faces light up with genuine happiness. They say receiving these 'love lunches' warms their hearts and gives them extra motivation in the fight against the pandemic. Just last week, when Bellevue police officers enjoyed their first love lunch, they happily posted on Facebook to thank Chowbus and the restaurants! In the days ahead, Chowbus's eye-catching red insulated delivery bags will continue showing up frequently at police stations, hospitals, and testing sites, bringing a love lunch to the frontline workers protecting our Seattle home!

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Asian Family Market, Chowbus Inc., Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Cai & Cai Associates, SC Intl Realty

items.body_zh:
在爱心午餐活动刚刚发起时，Chowbus就第一时间加入进来，Chowbus 负责人Michelle也担任了本次爱心午餐配送组组长的工作。Michelle说：“能参加这个活动完全是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。在几乎所有的人都安全在家时，此时医务工作者、警察这些人却需要坚守岗位，希望能给奋战在一线岗位的工作者一些关怀，让他们能在守护我们的同时感到一些温暖和陪伴。” “如果说参加捐赠的餐厅是爱心午餐活动的‘针’，那么Chowbus的配送就是这次活动的‘线’，经过Chowbus穿针引线，将整个活动组织得有条不紊，构成这次爱心午餐捐赠的动人画面。”这是爱心午餐活动组委会对Chowbus在这次活动中作用的评价。在这场爱心午餐的接力赛中，Chowubus一端连接制作爱心午餐的十几家餐厅，一端连接着UW Virology、Bellevue Police等十几个一线医护、警察局以及移动防疫站，成为这场爱心午餐活动中最重要的桥梁。截止目前为止，Chowbus已经向一线医护、警察局等机构共计配送了5000多份爱心午餐，在接下来的一个多月时间中，还将继续用专业配送为受助机构奉献爱心。

用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者 为了爱心午餐，Chowbus工作人员付出了辛勤汗水，而Chowbus公司更是舍弃自己盈利去做公益。据了解，疫情的发生让Chowbus自身业务短期内迅速增长。在保证提供给自己用户高质量服务的前提下，Chowbus不但增加雇佣司机、更是出动办公室工作人员，随时援助爱心午餐活动，保质保量完成任务。 每天，Chowbus都要完成几百份爱心午餐的配送任务。这数百份的爱心餐都需要Chowbus工作人员先分别去各个餐厅取餐，然后送往不同的医院、警察局、移动检测点。受捐机构都分布很分散，远些的医院去一趟往返路程加起来得一百多英里，一单任务从取餐到送餐完成的时间加起来至少花费三个小时。但是，Chowbu配送人员毫无怨言，再多的餐、再远的路他们都欣然接受。当有的医院对送餐时间、餐品温度有着严格的要求时，他们也能在规定时间将符合温度标准的食物送到。当爱心午餐餐厅需要帮忙时，Chowbus的员工就会带上防护品，帮助餐厅打包、装车，带着热气腾腾的饭盒前往目的地。在此，Michelle 也向共同奋战的豆捞坊、IJ Sushi、颐和园海鲜酒楼、蓉城老火锅、沸腾鱼乡、刘一手等餐厅表示感谢，她说，正是因为大家的默契配合，才能让爱心餐及时送达。

用平台连接用户和爱心午餐 一方面，Chowbus用配送服务连接餐厅和一线工作者；另一方面，Chowbus用自己的网络平台连接大众用户和爱心午餐。 当很多人看到“爱心午餐”的活动报道后，都纷纷表示自己也想捐助爱心午餐。为此，Chowbus在网站和APP上也开通捐赠通道，用户可以选择捐一顿爱心餐给警察以及前线指挥热线、给ICU、ER的一线医护人员、捐给移动监测站、以及其他金额捐赠。捐赠爱心餐功能上线当天就收到用户们认可并纷纷解囊，甚至有位匿名用户一口气捐了几十份爱心午餐。平台上还收到用户们的3000多美金爱心捐款，Michelle本人也带头捐赠500美金，这些捐款都一并转给活动财务组，用来给一线工作人员们购买更多爱心餐。 每当医护人员、警察从Chowbus司机手中接过爱心餐时，脸上都洋溢着灿烂幸福的笑容，他们说，能收到这些“爱心午餐”内心很温暖，这给他们抗疫工作增添了更大的动力。就在上周，当Bellevue 警察局的警察们首次享用到爱心午餐时，开心地在Facebook发文感谢Chowbus、感谢餐厅！ 在接下来的日子，Chowbus醒目的红色配送保温包还将频繁出现在警察局、医院和监测点，为保卫西雅图家园的一线工作者们送上一份爱心午餐！

items.title_en: CCCWA's 5th 'Star of the Week' Livestream Draws Huge Popularity!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第5期CCCWA“每周一星“超高人气热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's guest, Mr. Ming Zhang, is the founder of MZA Architecture, an internationally renowned architectural design firm whose projects range from custom private villas to mid- and high-rise apartments, hotels, and commercial centers.
items.summary_zh: ​本期的受邀嘉宾张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司， 项目...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest, Mr. Ming Zhang, is the founder of MZA Architecture, an internationally renowned architectural design firm whose projects range from custom private villas to mid- and high-rise apartments, hotels, and commercial centers. Mr. Zhang shared creative architecture, interior, and planning design services from both the local market and China.

Over the past two years, Seattle's rise as a cloud computing hub has drawn large numbers of tech talent, driving an all-around economic boom including real estate. Population growth has translated directly into housing demand, and Seattle home price growth has consistently led the nation. Mr. Zhang shared key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate, the main development and design process, and the differences in design requirements between the two cities.

Nearly 80 people joined the 'cloud gathering' via Zoom, responding enthusiastically to Mr. Zhang's presentation, with continuous questions and interaction with the guest throughout the evening. Everyone thanked the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State for organizing this expert lecture, providing a valuable platform for exposure and information exchange.
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司，项目 从私人定制别墅，到多层及高层公寓，酒店，及商业中心等。张铭先生分享了本地以及中国的富有创意的建筑，室内和规划设计服务。

近两年，西雅图作为云计算中心吸引了大量IT高科技人才，同时带动了本地区房地产等全方面的经济腾飞。人口的增长转化成为住房的需求，西雅图房价涨幅连续领跑全美。 张铭先生分享了投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产需要注意的要点、开发设计的主要流程和两个城市对设计要求的区别

近80位朋友通过ZOOM参加了“云聚会”，对张总的介绍反应热烈，当晚会议进行中不断与嘉宾提问互动。大家感谢华盛顿州中国总商会组织这次专业知识讲座为大家提供广泛接触的机会和信息交流的平台。

items.title_en: 6th 'Star of the Week' Guest Grace Chen (American Express Financial) Shares 'How to Achieve Diversified Asset Allocation'
items.title_zh: 第六期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾Grace Chen （美信金融）分享《如何实现多元分散的资产配置》
items.summary_en: As communications technology moves into the 5G era, many industries hope to use social platforms to promote their products worldwide, improving customer satisfaction and achieving a win-win for businesses and customers alike. American Express Financial is exactly that kind of financial services company — using internet platform technology to connect with high-quality global asset management firms, bringing alternative investment opportunities once reserved only for institutions to everyday individual investors, helping them achieve diversified asset allocation.
items.summary_zh: 通信科技即将跨入 5G 时代，许多行业都希望通过社交平台将产品推广到世界各地以提高客户的满意度，并做到企业与客户的双赢。美信金融正是这样的金融服务公司：基于互联网平台技术，对接高质量全球资产管理公司，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现多元分散的资产配置。...
items.body_en:
As communications technology moves into the 5G era, many industries hope to use social platforms to promote their products worldwide, improving customer satisfaction and achieving a win-win for businesses and customers alike. American Express Financial is exactly that kind of financial services company — using internet platform technology to connect with high-quality global asset management firms, bringing alternative investment opportunities once reserved only for institutions to everyday individual investors, helping them achieve diversified asset allocation.

Speaker: Grace Chen, President of American Express Financial North America. Grace Chen previously worked in PMG's investment development department and as a development and financing manager at Greenland USA. She holds FINRA Series 7 and 63 licenses, and a dual bachelor's degree in Financial Mathematics and Economics from Binghamton University, SUNY.

Friday, May 1st, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, May 2nd, 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869#
items.body_zh:
通信科技即将跨入5G时代，许多行业都希望通过社交平台将产品推广到世界各地以提高客户的满意度，并做到企业与客户的双赢。美信金融正是这样的金融服务公司：基于互联网平台技术，对接高质量全球资产管理公司，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现多元分散的资产配置。

主讲嘉宾美信金融北美区总裁：做客嘉宾Grace Chen Grace Chen曾就职于PMG投资拓展部及绿地美国开发及融资经理；持有Finra系列7和63执照；纽约州立大学宾汉姆顿金融数学及经济双学士。

items.title_en: 5th 'Star of the Week' Guest Ming Zhang (MZA Architecture) Shares 'US Real Estate Development Investment and the Design Process'
items.title_zh: 第五期CCCWA“每周一星”做客嘉宾张铭 （MZA建筑设计事务所）分享《美国房地产开发投资和设计流程》
items.summary_en: Main topics included: key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate; the main development and design process for Seattle and Bellevue real estate and the differences in design requirements between the two cities; government land-use approval requirements.
items.summary_zh: 主要内容包括： 投资Seattle和Bellevue房地产需要注意的要点 投资 Seattle和Bellevue房地产开发设计的主要 流程和两个城市对设计要求的 区别 政府审批...
items.body_en:
Main topics included: key points to keep in mind when investing in Seattle and Bellevue real estate; the main development and design process for Seattle and Bellevue real estate and the differences in design requirements between the two cities; government land-use approval requirements; approval steps in the design process; and standards to keep in mind during the design process.

Speaker introduction: Ming Zhang, FAIA is the founding Partner of MZA Architecture headquartered in Seattle. He is an award-winning designer specializing in large-scale mixed-use and high-rise building design. His work has covered the US, Asia, and the Middle East. He is a sought-after speaker, particularly on the topics of high-rise building design, urban design, and overall culture and design. He has presented and written essays for international academic organizations such as CTBUH, AIA, and over 30 international design conferences and universities. He is NCARB certified and holds a Master of Architecture from the Illinois Institute of Technology.

MZA is an internationally-renowned architectural design firm with offices located in Bellevue, Washington and Shanghai, China. It provides innovative architecture, design, interiors, and planning services. For local developers and Chinese investors in the Puget Sound area, MZA builds projects ranging from custom single-family homes to mid- and high-rise office buildings, apartments, condominiums, retail centers, and hotels. Current projects in the greater Seattle area under design include two high-rise apartment towers, one high-rise hotel, and numerous mid-rise apartment projects. Its projects in China are even larger in scale, with buildings reaching as high as 500 meters.

Friday, April 24th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday, April 25th, 8:00–9:30 AM Beijing Time). To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869# US (San Jose)

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State
Co-hosted by: Seattle Real Estate Investment Club
items.body_zh:

主讲嘉宾介绍：张铭先生是美国MZA建筑设计公司的创始人，他是一个荣获众多奖项的国际著名建筑师，尤其以大型城市综合体以及高层建筑设计为专长。他的作品遍布在美国，亚洲和中东。他也是一个广受欢迎的演说者，尤其在高层建筑，文化与建筑以及绿色建筑领域。在世界高层建筑协会，美国和中国建筑师学会，以及30多个国际学术会议上发表文章和演讲。他是美国注册建筑师和美国建筑师学会的院士会员。

Ming Zhang, FAIA is the founding Partner of MZA Architecture headquartered in Seattle. He is a award winning designer that specialized in large scale Mixed-use and High-rise building design. His work has covered the US, Asia and Middle East. He is a sought-after speaker, particularly in the topics of high-rise building design, urban design and overall culture and design. He has presented and written essays for international academic organizations such as CTBUH, AIA, and over 30 International Design conferences and Universities. He is NCARB certified and has a Master of Architecture from Illinois Institute of Technology.

MZA建筑设计有限公司是一家国际知名建筑设计公司。总部位于美国贝尔维市，并在上海设有办公室。本司为本地以及来自中国的开发商和投资人提供富有创意的建筑，室内和规划设计服务。项目种类从私人定制别墅，到多层及高层公寓，酒店，及商业中心等。目前正在设计中的大西雅图地区项目包括二栋高层公寓，一栋高层酒店，以及众多多层公寓项目。中国的项目更是规模巨大，最高建筑达500米之高。

MZA is an internationally-renowned architectural design firm with offices located in Bellevue, Washington and Shanghai, China. We provide innovative architecture, design, interiors, and planning services. For local developers and Chinese investors in the Puget Sound area, we buildprojects ranging from custom single-family homes to mid and high-rise office buildings, apartments, condominiums, retail centers, and hotels. For clients in China, we design large-scale, mixed-use building projects that can reach as high as 500 meters.

items.title_en: CCCWA's 4th 'Star of the Week' Livestream Continues!
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会第4期CCCWA“每周一星“热线继续热播！
items.summary_en: This episode's guests were experienced accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng of Proctor Company, who gave a special presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues.'
items.summary_zh: 本期的受邀嘉宾是美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，他们为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。
items.body_en:
This episode's guests were experienced accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng of Proctor Company, who gave a special presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues.'

The two guests shared professional tax knowledge, focusing on: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset and other information reporting; Bitcoin taxation; retirement plan strategies; and depreciation issues related to rental real estate.

Nearly forty people attended the online lecture, with an enthusiastic response. Both professionals provided precise data and shared real case studies, answering attendees' questions on the spot, and everyone came away with new insights. Everyone hopes CCCWA will continue hosting similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals, and affirmed CCCWA's efforts in serving the community.
items.body_zh:
本期的受邀嘉宾是美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，他们为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。

两位嘉宾为大家提供专业的税务知识，着重分享了以下内容：新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室海外资产以及其他信息申报/Bitcoin（比特币)的纳税促进退休计划房地产出租后相关的折旧问题/房地产出租后相关的折旧问题

近四十位朋友出席了网络讲座，反应热烈。两位专业人士提供了精准的数据和实际案例的分享，并且当场解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 参会人员受到了启发。 大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。 同时, 大家肯定了CCCWA对服务社区的努力。

items.title_en: The "Caring Lunch" Press Conference Was Held Successfully, and Participants' Stories of Love Moved Seattle
items.title_zh: “爱心午餐”新闻发布会成功举行，参与者爱心故事感动西雅图
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 17, 2020 10:16_ __ _ _ _ _ At 2:00 pm on April 13, a special press conference was held in a Zoom livestream room. This press conference for the campaign donating caring lunches to frontline anti-pandemic medical staff drew many well-known local social-media figures and viewers, who entered the livestream room early and waited, hoping to learn the stories behind the "caring lunch." After the event began, the owners of the restaurants making the caring lunches, the head of the delivery platform Chowbus, and the leaders of various NPOs each recounted why they joined the campaign. After hearing them, everyone couldn't help but feel that doing something so meaningful in this special time is full of positive energy! The leaders' remarks moved everyone attending—some pledged donations on the spot, some wanted to make a documentary about the campaign, and media friends said that although they couldn't participate directly, they would use their words to pass on this love. "During the pandemic, we learned that frontline medical staff had extremely intense workloads—some on 12-hour shifts, some on 24-hour three-shift rotations—and couldn't eat on time or even had no time to order food. So we thought of using the chamber's platform to bring together restaurants willing to donate caring lunches and, through the delivery platform Chowbus, deliver them free and in an organized way to hospitals. That's how we launched this campaign to donate $400,000 in caring meals. Going forward, we hope to unite the strength of all sectors of society, raise more funds, and—on top of the restaurants' full donations of caring meals—use the funds raised to share some costs and make more caring meals to magnify the love." Lily Lyu, president of the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State and the campaign's initiator, first introduced the origins of the project. "Caring Lunch" promotion. As for why the restaurants joined the "caring lunch," the restaurants that first launched the campaign—The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, and Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant—and the delivery platform Chowbus each shared their own moving stories. The Dolar Shop: From community to hospital, love expands. Owner Bruce explained that The Dolar Shop was the earliest restaurant to start delivering caring lunches. When they saw that after the pandemic began many police, security guards, and drivers had nowhere to eat, they handed out free lunches at the restaurant door so those in need could get them anytime. Later, when they learned that medical staff needed help even more urgently, their caring lunches expanded from the community to hospitals. IJ Sushi: We'll keep going even when doubted. "When the pandemic hit, we all stayed safely at home, but frontline workers not only couldn't stay home—they had to remain on duty even longer, working under great risk and pressure. I thought: these medical staff are protecting us, so what can we do for them? At first I put out word through WeChat that we wanted to give free meals to medical staff. To my surprise, this message met with doubt—many didn't believe we would do it. But now the ongoing caring lunch campaign not only proves we did it, but also that many like-minded restaurants are doing it with us!" said IJ Sushi owner Kevin. Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant: The storefront can close, but love cannot stop. The head of Imperial Garden Seafood Restaurant said the group Imperial Garden belongs to still has 48 stores in China, all closed due to the pandemic, with not only sharply falling revenue but also hefty rent and employee wages to pay. Yet even while severely affected themselves, when the group's owner learned that hospitals in Seattle needed help, he still resolutely decided to support medical staff with caring lunches. To give generously in hard times is a sense of responsibility and duty in one's heart. Chowbus: Through wind and rain, mission accomplished. As the company shouldering the heavy task of transporting the caring meals, Chowbus was one of the first to join the campaign. Michelle, the campaign's delivery group leader and Chowbus lead, said, "Joining this campaign came from being moved by the restaurants' good deeds, and wanting to use my own resources and strengths to achieve this goal together with everyone." Chowbus indeed faced many challenges in delivery: first, hospitals had strict requirements for delivery standards, such as delivery time and food temperature, requiring food that met temperature standards to be delivered within a set time. Second, as more restaurants donated and more medical staff were served, delivery tasks grew heavier. Every day, Chowbus had to set out from different restaurants to different hospitals, some far beyond the delivery range. Just as Michelle was speaking, a Chowbus driver was on the road delivering, picking up from 4 restaurants to deliver to 11 hospitals, with the farthest hospital in Everett—one hour each way. Facing these challenges, Chowbus overcame them one by one and accomplished the mission. To raise donations for the "caring lunch," Chowbus also opened a donation channel on its website and app and made an initial donation of over $3,000; beyond these donations, Michelle also led by example, being the first to donate $500, and has handed both donations to the finance group. Chowbus has now delivered over 2,000 caring boxed meals and will keep hitting the road with caring meals in the campaign ahead. In fact, besides the restaurants at the press conference, three more restaurants—Frying Fish, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, and Liuyishou—also each supported frontline medical staff with caring lunches. Frying Fish: Doing our utmost to give a share of love. Chengdu Memory Hot Pot: The owner personally made cakes for frontline medical staff. Liuyishou: Cheering on medical staff with exquisite dishes. Financial and legal backing. This caring lunch campaign also had strong legal and financial backing. At the press conference, legal lead Attorney Cai Qing said: "The bigger the campaign, the greater the responsibility—we must both do the caring campaign well and reduce potential risks. By inspecting the sanitary conditions of the participating restaurants and drafting commitment letters, we eliminated potential risk points one by one, so everyone can give with greater peace of mind." Finance lead Li Xiaoyan also introduced the campaign's donations: "This campaign's goal is to raise $400,000. As of now, the 6 restaurants have donated a total of 14,150 meal sets worth $242,000, and the 4,145 meals already donated are worth $77,050. Even during the press conference, upon hearing the news, Mr. Lai Huiwu, president of the 505 Group, donated $2,000 to show support." Update: On the day of publication on the 16th, $30,499 in cash donations had been received so far. Thanks from medical staff. Medical staff thank the "caring lunch." The caring lunch left the medical staff who received it deeply grateful, and they often expressed their thanks to the organizers in their own different ways—some by email and text, some by sharing their caring lunches on social media. When medical staff learned this press conference would be held, they specially made a short video amid their busy schedules, saying: "Thank you—we fight the pandemic on the front line, and you protect us from behind." "Caring lunch" recipient hospitals. Caring lunch: we look forward to your joining. This "caring lunch" campaign is like a powerful magnet, drawing more and more caring people to join, and also receiving support from sister associations. Rhea, the volunteer in charge of English-language publicity, nearly cried after learning this story of love and took the initiative to handle all updates for the campaign's Facebook, Twitter, and English web pages. And the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, as a partner in this campaign, was moved when it saw the caring lunch proposal and lent a hand to help. In the press conference of just over an hour, what everyone heard most was love and dedication. When everyone is troubled by the pandemic, this press conference was like a positive-energy story-sharing session that made everyone feel warm. While moved, we also hope more people will join in, work together with one heart, and do all we can to contribute to the community and the place we live—looking forward to Seattle soon recovering its former laughter and joy! **Event Information** Host: CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State). **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** The Dolar Shop; Asian Family Market; Imperial Garden (Beijing Roast Duck); Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Frying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Jing Wei LLC; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Cai & Cai Associates; Create World America Real Estate Inc.; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. Donation receiving account: Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. Company donation website: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. Check mailing address: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) (donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt). Volunteer group contacts for this event: For restaurant donation participation and institutional cooperation, please contact: Overall commander: CCCWA President Lily Lyu, email: lvlili0219@sina.com, WeChat: lili2999. Chief attorney: Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, email: Alex.cai@cai-law.com, Tel: 425-753-5188. Delivery group leader: Michelle Lei, email: michelle@chowbus.com. To donate funds as a company or individual, please contact finance group leader Li Xiaoyan (Sunshine Youth Education Foundation / Seattle Real Estate Club), email: eli@create-world.us. Medical institutions needing caring meals, please contact outreach group leader Sylvia Chin (Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club), email: screalty.seattle@gmail.com. For CCCWA chamber matters, please contact Lei, email: info@ccc-wa.org, WeChat: gloriachatting. Publicity group leader: Grace Gu, email: gracegu99@gmail.com. Fundraising group leader: Na Jiyuan, email: jay-na@att.net. IJ Sushi Burrito; Chowbus Inc.; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com **Co-organizers**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月17日 10:16_ __ _ _ _ _ 4月13日下午2:00，一场特殊的新闻发布会在Zoom直播间里举行。这场向抗疫一线医护人员捐赠爱心午餐活动的新闻发布会吸引了不少当地知名社交媒体和观众，大家早早进入直播间里等待着，希望了解“爱心午餐”背后的故事。活动开始后，制作爱心午餐的餐厅负责人、负责配送的送餐平台Chowbus负责人、各个NPO组织负责人纷纷讲述自己参与到本次活动的缘由。当听完他们的讲述后，大家都不由感慨，能在这个特殊时期做这样一件有意义的事情太有正能量了！负责人们的发言感动了所有参会的人，有人当场表示捐赠，有人想要为这个活动拍摄纪录片，而媒体朋友表示虽然不能直接参与活动，但会用自己的文字去传递这份爱。 “在疫情中我们得知奋战在一线的医护人员工作强度特别大，有的是12小时一班，有的是24小时三班倒，他们不能及时用餐，甚至没有时间点餐，我们就想到用商会平台把想捐赠爱心午餐的餐厅聚集到一起，通过外送平台Chowbus免费配送有组织地送到医院，于是发起这个捐赠40万美金爱心餐的活动。后续希望联合社会各界力量，募集更多资金，在餐厅全额捐赠爱心餐的基础上，再用募集来的资金分担一些成本，多制作一些爱心餐把爱心放大。” 本次活动发起方、华盛顿州中国总商会会长吕莉莉首先介绍了这个项目发起的缘由。 “爱心午餐”宣传 关于餐厅为何参与到“爱心午餐”中，最先发起本次活动的餐厅豆捞坊、IJ Sushi、颐和园海鲜酒楼，以及送餐平台Chowbus分别分享了各自背后令人感动的故事。 豆捞坊：从社区到医院，爱心在扩大 负责人Bruce介绍，豆捞坊是最早一家开始送爱心午餐的餐厅，当看到疫情发生后很多警察、保安、司机没有吃饭的地方，他们便在饭店门口发放免费午餐，让这些需要帮助的人能随时获得。后来当得知医护人员更急需帮助后，他们的爱心午餐覆盖范围也从社区扩大到医院。 IJ Sushi：即使被质疑，也会做下去 “当疫情发生后，我们都安安全全待在家里，但一线人员不但不能待在家里，反而需要在工作岗位待命更长时间，他们需要顶着很大风险和压力去工作。我想，这些医护人员在守护我们，而我们又能为这些医护人员做些什么？一开始我先通过微信渠道发出想给医护人送免费餐的消息。没想到这个消息竟然收到质疑，很多人不相信我们会这么做。而现在爱心午餐活动的进行，不但证明我们做到了，而且还有很多志同道合的餐厅和我们一起在做！” IJ Sushi 老板Kevin说。 颐和园海鲜酒楼： 门店可以关 爱心不能断 颐和园海鲜酒楼负责人说，颐和园餐厅所在的集团在国内还有四十八家门店，因为受疫情影响都关闭了，不但营业额大幅下滑，还要支付不菲的房租和员工工资。然而在自身都受影响严重的情况下，当集团老板得知西雅图这边需要援助医院时候，还是义无反顾决定用爱心午餐支援医护人员。在艰难时刻还能慷慨解囊，是心中的一份责任与担当。 Chowubus: 风雨兼程 使命必达 作为担当爱心餐运输重任的Chowbus是最先参与到本次活动的企业之一，本次活动配送组组长、Chowbus负责人Michelle说，“能参加这个活动是被餐厅义举所感动，也想用自己资源和优势和大家一起实现这个目标。” 据了解Chowbus在送餐中确实遇到不少挑战：首先，医院对送餐标准有着严格的要求，比如送达时间、餐品温度等，要在规定时间将符合温度标准的食物送到。其次，随着捐助餐厅、受助医护人员的增多，让配送任务更为繁重。每天，Chowbus需要从不同餐厅出发送往不同医院，有的远远超出送餐范围。就在Michelle发言当时，Chowbus的司机正在赶在送餐的路上，要从4家餐厅取餐送到11个医院，而最远的一家医院在Everett，仅单程就需要1个小时车程。面对这些挑战，Chowbus都一一克服使命必达。为了给“爱心午餐”筹集捐款，Chowbus在网站和APP上也开通捐赠通道并将首批捐款3000多美元，除了这些捐款，Milchelle 自己也身体力行，率先捐款500美金，她已将这两笔捐款交给财务组。现在，Chowbus已经送出2000多份爱心盒饭，在接下来活动中还将继续带着爱心餐上路。 其实，除了参加新闻发布会的餐厅外，还有沸腾鱼乡、蓉城老火锅、刘一手这三家餐厅也都分别用爱心午餐来支援一线医务人员。 沸腾鱼乡：尽最大力 献一份爱 蓉城老火锅：老板娘亲手制蛋糕送一线医务人员 刘一手：用精美餐品给医护人员加油 财务和法律后盾 本次爱心午餐活动也有强大的律师和财务后盾。新闻发布会上，法律负责人蔡青律师说：“活动越大责任就越大，既要把爱心活动做好，又要把潜在风险降低。通过对加盟餐馆的卫生条件进行考察，并起草承诺函等，将潜在风险点一一排除，让大家更能踏踏实实献爱心。”财务负责人李晓艳也介绍了活动的捐赠情况：“本次活动目标筹款40万美金，截止目前为止，6家餐厅总捐赠14150份套餐的金额是24.2万美金，已经捐出的4145份餐食价值77050美金，就在新闻发布会进行中，得知消息的505集团总裁来辉武先生也捐款2000美金表示对活动的支持。” 更新：在16日发稿当日， 目前已经收到现金捐赠30499美元。 ” 来自医护人员的感谢 医护人员感谢“爱心午餐” 爱心午餐让受捐助的医护人员感激不尽，他们经常用自己不同的方式来表达对活动组织方的感激，有的发Email和短信来致谢，有的在社交媒体上分享自己的爱心午餐。当医护人员得知要召开这次新闻发布会时，他们特意在百忙之中制作了小视频说：“感谢你们，我们在前线抗疫，你们在背后守护我们。” “爱心午餐”受捐医院 爱心午餐 期待你的加入 这场“爱心午餐”活动就像一块磁力极强的磁铁，吸引了越来越多有爱心的人加入，也得到兄弟协会的支援。负责英文文宣的志愿者Rhea了解了这个爱心故事后差点落泪并主动承担起本次活动Facebook、Twitter 、英文网页等所有更新工作。而西雅图创业协会作为本次活动的合作伙伴在看到爱心午餐倡议书被感动，也发挥一臂之力帮助本次活动。 短短一个多小时的发布会，听到最多的就是爱和奉献，当大家都在被疫情而困扰时，这个新闻发布会就像是一个正能量的故事分享会，让所有人都感到温暖。在为之动容之际，也希望能有更多人参与进来，齐心协力，尽我们所能，为社区和我们生活的地方贡献一份力量，期待西雅图早日恢复往昔的欢声笑语！ **活动信息** 主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State 本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) 颐和园北京烤鸭店 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅（CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手（LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会（Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp) ‍ 捐款接收账号： \- 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank -公司捐款网站捐赠：搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association \- 支票邮寄地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)（请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明） 本次活动义工小组联系方式： 餐厅参与捐赠及机构合作请联系： 总指挥：CCCWA 会长 吕莉莉 邮箱：lvlili0219@sina.com, 微信：lili2999 总律师：蔡和蔡律师事务所 蔡清 邮箱：Alex.cai@cai-law.com Tel: 425-7535188 配送组组长：Michelle Lei 邮箱：michelle@chowbus.com items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 4: A Special Session on "2019–2020 Tax Issues"
items.title_zh: 第四期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。
items.body_en: _April 15, 2020 12:46_ __ _ _ _ _ **Main topics include:** * The CARES Act (COVID-19 relief and economic assistance) / pandemic unemployment compensation * 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures / home office * Reporting of overseas assets and other information / taxation of Bitcoin * Boosting retirement plans * Depreciation issues related to renting out real estate Featured Speaker Annie Zheng holds bachelor's and master's degrees from Beijing Foreign Studies University, a bachelor's degree in accounting from the University of Washington, and a master's in tax law from Golden Gate University. She is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. Her areas of expertise are the tax issues of new immigrants—including reporting overseas assets, corporate accounts, and investment income—and the tax issues of foreigners investing in U.S. real estate, including ITIN applications. Annie is also an IRS-approved CAA (Certifying Acceptance Agent) and can certify passports for foreigners. Featured Speaker Mr. Steven Yun holds a bachelor's degree from the University of Hong Kong and a master's in accounting from the University of Washington, and is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. He is highly experienced in tax planning for companies, including startup, corporate structure, and choice of profit-distribution methods. With long-standing experience dealing with the IRS and state tax departments, he can help clients avoid risk in audits. CCCWA has arranged these two tax experts' lectures in the hope of helping everyone in their work and life in the United States. **Registration: This event is livestream only** **Seattle time, April 17, 8:00-9:30 pm** **(Beijing time, April 18, 11:00am-12:30pm)** **To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below:** **+16699006833,4696970869# US**
items.body_zh: _2020年04月15日 12:46_ __ _ _ _ _ ** 主要内容包括： ** * 新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金 * 2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室 * 海外资产以及其他信息申报/Bitcoin（比特币)的纳税 * 促进退休计划 * 房地产出租后相关的折旧问题/房地产出租后相关的折旧问题 主讲嘉宾Annie Z heng获得北京外国语大学学士及硕士学位，华盛顿大学会计学学士学位，同时拥有GoldenGate University 税法硕士学位。 是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA 会员。 专业的领域为新移民税务问题，其中包括海外资产，公司账目和投资收入的申报； 外国人投资美国房地产税务问题，其中包括税号申请。 Annie同时为国税局批准的CAA 代表，可以为外国人进行护照的认证。 主讲嘉宾Steven Yun先生拥有香港大学学士学位，华盛顿大学会计硕士学位，是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA会员。在为公司进行税务计划方面很有经验，其中包括公司的起步，公司结构和利润分配方式的选择。拥有长期与国税局以及洲税务部门打交道的经验，可以在帮助客户在审计中规避风险. CCCWA安排以上两位税务专家的讲座，希望能对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。 ** 报名方式本次活动仅限直播 ** ** 西雅图时间4月17日晚上8:00-9:30 ** ** （北京时间4月18日上午11:00-12:30） ** ** zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： ** ** +16699006833,4696970869# **

items.title_en: The 4th Guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' Series: We Specially Invited Experienced Proctor Company Accountants Steven Yun and Annie Zheng to Share a Special Presentation on '2019–2020 Tax Issues'
items.title_zh: 第四期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在美国Proctor Company有丰富经验的会计师Steven Yun先生和Annie Zheng女士 ，为大家专题分享《2019-2020 税务问题》。
items.summary_en: Main topics included: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset reporting requirements.
items.summary_zh: 主要内容包括： 新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金 2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室...
items.body_en:
Main topics included: the COVID-19 relief and economic assistance act / pandemic unemployment compensation; 2019 tax rates and other deduction figures; home office and foreign asset and other information reporting; Bitcoin taxation; retirement plan strategies; and depreciation issues related to rental real estate.

Speaker Annie Zheng holds a bachelor's and master's degree from Beijing Foreign Studies University, a bachelor's degree in Accounting from the University of Washington, and a Master of Tax Law from Golden Gate University. She is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. Her specialties include tax issues for new immigrants, including reporting foreign assets, corporate accounts, and investment income; and US real estate tax issues for foreign investors, including ITIN applications. Annie is also an IRS-approved Certifying Acceptance Agent (CAA), able to certify passports for foreign nationals.

Speaker Steven Yun holds a bachelor's degree from the University of Hong Kong and a Master's in Accounting from the University of Washington. He is a Washington State CPA and a member of the AICPA and WSCPA. He has extensive experience in corporate tax planning, including business formation, entity structuring, and profit distribution strategy. With long experience dealing with the IRS and state tax authorities, he helps clients minimize audit risk.

CCCWA arranged this lecture with these two tax experts, hoping it will help everyone with their work and life in the US.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869 +1 669 900 6833, 4696970869#
items.body_zh:
主要内容包括：新冠肺炎救济和经济援助法案/流行疾病失业补偿金2019年的税率和其他一些抵扣的数据/家庭办公室海外资产以及其他信息申报/Bitcoin（比特币)的纳税促进退休计划房地产出租后相关的折旧问题/房地产出租后相关的折旧问题

主讲嘉宾Annie Zheng获得北京外国语大学学士及硕士学位，华盛顿大学会计学学士学位，同时拥有Golden Gate University 税法硕士学位。 是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA 会员。专业的领域为新移民税务问题，其中包括海外资产，公司账目和投资收入的申报；外国人投资美国房地产税务问题，其中包括税号申请。Annie同时为国税局批准的CAA 代表，可以为外国人进行护照的认证。

主讲嘉宾Steven Yun先生拥有香港大学学士学位，华盛顿大学会计硕士学位，是华盛顿洲注册会计师，AICPA 和 WSCPA会员。在为公司进行税务计划方面很有经验，其中包括公司的起步，公司结构和利润分配方式的选择。拥有长期与国税局以及洲税务部门打交道的经验，可以在帮助客户在审计中规避风险 .

CCCWA安排以上两位税务专家的讲座，希望能对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。

items.title_en: 3rd 'Star of the Week' Tracking Report
items.title_zh: 第三期CCCWA“每周一星”追踪报道
items.summary_en: The guest for the 3rd episode of 'Star of the Week' was CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Attorney Lani Cao.
items.summary_zh: ​ 第三期“每周一星“的做客嘉宾是CCCWA法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师。
items.body_en:
The guest for the 3rd episode of 'Star of the Week' was CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Attorney Lani Cao.

Attorney Cao first introduced the types of visas available to multinational companies in the US and their applicability, including: investment immigration (EB-5), extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A), entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C), employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3), E1/E2 visas for nationals of New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions, and TN visas for Canada and Mexico. She also addressed recent policy changes affecting green cards, noting that the global pandemic outbreak has affected USCIS processing timelines, and green card form submissions should closely follow USCIS announcements. Attorney Cao's law office will continue tracking the latest USCIS updates to help keep everyone informed!

Drawing on her rich work experience and real case studies, Attorney Cao promptly answered attendees' questions. CCCWA will continue to host similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals. CCCWA provides a win-win platform for exchange, sharing, and cooperation.
items.body_zh:
第三期“每周一星“的做客嘉宾是CCCWA法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师。

曹律师首先向大家介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证种类和适用性，包括了：投资移民投资移民EB-5，特殊人才移民Eb-1A，企业家签证及绿卡L-1/L-2， Eb-1C，职业移民EB-1/ EB-2/ EB-3，新西兰，台湾，香港等国家或地区人士的 E1/E2, 加拿大，墨西哥的 TN 另外针对绿卡近期政策变化，曹律师强调全球这次疫情爆发，当下移民局的工作进程收到影响，绿卡的表格提交需要密切关注移民局公告。曹律师事务所会及时追踪移民局的最新动态，以便帮助大家了解更新的信息！

专业人士结合丰富的工作经历和实际案例的分享，及时解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。CCCWA是为大家提供交流、分享、合作的共赢平台。

items.title_en: We Invite You to Hear the Stories Behind the Caring Campaign — You're Cordially Invited to the 'Caring Lunch' Press Conference
items.title_zh: 邀请您聆听爱心活动背后的故事——“爱心午餐”新闻发布会诚邀您的参加
items.body_en: _April 14, 2020 00:51_ __ _ _ _ _ As April had just begun, a "CCCWA Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch Fundraising Proposal" spread throughout the social-media circles of Seattle's Chinese community, with people eagerly sharing it—not only praising the organizers' compassion, but also applauding this ingenious way of giving. The campaign was initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), with lead donations from local Seattle restaurants and the delivery platform Chowbus, and enthusiastic support from all sectors of society. The campaign plans to raise $400,000 worth of caring lunches within one month to deliver into the hands of medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. As of April 11, six main donor restaurants had pledged to jointly donate meal sets worth a total of $242,000, and $27,000 had been raised in donations from all sectors of society. After donating masks, protective suits, and other medical supplies to healthcare institutions, why participate in pandemic relief again in the form of "caring lunches"? The organizer, CCCWA, hopes to leverage the association's own strengths and use its unique methods and resources to support medical staff. "Right now, every member of the community is serving the frontline medical staff in their own way and cheering on our city. As a nonprofit organization formed spontaneously by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State, CCCWA has a group of outstanding and caring restaurant entrepreneurs. When they learned that the pandemic had made medical staff's work busier and more stressful, it became their wish to make sure frontline medical staff could eat a tasty lunch on time. Although the pandemic has hit their businesses hard, they still wanted to give generously, to support frontline medical staff, and to make their own contribution to the city they love. So we connected restaurant resources and, together with the delivery platform Chowbus, organized this caring-lunch campaign. We hope to unite the strength of all sectors of society, raise more funds, and together magnify their compassion," said CCCWA President Lily Lyu, explaining the origins of the campaign. The "caring lunch" received strong support from local Seattle restaurants and delivery platforms. The participating restaurants are all well-known names in the Seattle area: The Dolar Shop Chinese restaurant (together with Asian Family Market), IJ Sushi Burrito Japanese restaurant, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Imperial Garden (Beijing Roast Duck), and Chengdu Memory Hot Pot. Due to the pandemic, the pause in the restaurant industry dealt a huge blow to business, but these restaurant owners "worried not about themselves but about the world." Rather than putting their own profits first, they selflessly devoted themselves to making free lunches. For delivery, the Chowbus delivery platform, with its professional delivery service, took the initiative to handle delivery for this caring campaign. Even though the pandemic was Chowbus's busiest period, Chowbus still assigned dedicated staff to coordinate scheduling and delivery, getting caring lunches into medical staff's hands on time every day. In the two weeks since the campaign began, nonprofit organizations including the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, the Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, the Sunshine Youth Foundation, and the Guangfu Association have all given strong support and assistance. In particular, Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, Ms. Sylvia Chin, Li Ruoyao and Zhang Shuo of Jing Wei LLC, and UW student Rhea not only led the way in donating funds in the project's early stages but also spent a great deal of time making outstanding contributions to advancing the project. A working group of some thirty-odd volunteers served this campaign, coming from various nonprofit organizations, donor units, communities, government, universities, and high schools. As of April 11, 3,845 caring lunches had been delivered, and 675 medical workers at 15 key anti-pandemic hospitals such as UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital had enjoyed these caring lunches. The delivery scope will expand further, reaching more medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. The medical workers also expressed heartfelt thanks for the campaign. Many were deeply grateful after receiving caring lunches, sharing them on social media, thanking the "caring lunch" in their own unique ways, and tagging these caring restaurants to "advertise" for them. April is a fragrant month, and this should be the most beautiful season—yet everyone involved in the "caring lunch" had no time to enjoy the spring scenery. They were busier every day, devoting their own efforts to fighting the pandemic. Now, to help everyone understand the "caring lunch" plan more fully, hear these restaurant entrepreneurs' original intentions for participating, and learn how the delivery platform Chowbus manages to promptly connect restaurants with hospitals, CCCWA will hold an online press conference on April 13 from 2:00PM to 3:30PM Seattle time. At that time, the restaurant owners, co-organizer leaders, and working-group members will share the stories behind this "caring lunch" with everyone. If you are a Chinese-language media outlet, independent media creator, or an interested partner organization or individual in Seattle, you are cordially invited to attend this online sharing event. **Press Conference Time: April 13, 2:00PM-3:30PM** **Zoom webcast link: https://washington.zoom.us/j/766492115** **Press Conference Agenda:** 1. CCCWA President Lily Lyu introduces an overview of the campaign 2. Remarks by Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee 3. Remarks by three lead donor restaurant representatives (The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, Imperial Garden) 4. Attorney Cai Qing introduces the project's legal matters 5. Liaison group leader Sylvia introduces the recipient hospitals 6. Delivery group leader Michelle introduces delivery 7. Finance group leader Xiaoyan introduces donated supplies and funds 8. Publicity group leader Grace speaks, and English-media lead Rhea speaks 9. Fundraising group leader Na Jiyuan speaks 10. Remarks by co-organizing institutions 11. Interactive Q&A session **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** The Dolar Shop; Asian Family Market; Imperial Garden (Beijing Roast Duck); Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Frying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Jing Wei LLC; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Cai & Cai Associates; Create World America Real Estate Inc.; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. IJ Sushi Burrito (kevin100118@gmail.com); Chowbus Inc.; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club
items.body_zh: _2020年04月14日 00:51_ __ _ _ _ _ 四月刚刚开始拉开序幕，一则“CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐倡议书”传遍了西雅图华人的朋友圈，大家竞相转发，不但为活动主办方的爱心点赞，更是为这个独出心裁的献爱心方式叫好。该活动由华盛顿州中国总商会（简称：CCCWA）发起倡议、西雅图本地餐厅与外送平台Chowbus参与领捐，并由社会各界热情支持。活动计划在一个月内募集价值40万美元的爱心午餐送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手中。截止4月11日，6家主捐餐厅承诺将共同捐赠总价值$24.2万美金的套餐，募集到社会各界捐款2.7万美元 。 在向医疗机构捐赠口罩、防护服等医疗物资之后，为何又以“爱心午餐”形式参与到援助抗疫中？活动主办方CCCWA希望，发挥协会自身优势，用自己独特的方式和资源去支援医护人员。“现在社区的每一份子都用各自方式为抗疫前线的医护人员服务，为我们的城市加油。而CCCWA作为由华盛顿州中资企业自发组成的非营利性组织，拥有一批优秀而有爱的餐饮企业家，他们得知疫情让医护人员工作节奏更忙碌紧张，能让一线医护人员及时吃到可口的午餐成为他们的一个愿望，虽然疫情使他们的生意备受冲击，他们仍希望慷慨解囊，为一线医护人员助力，为自己热爱的城市做一点自己的贡献。于是我们对接餐厅资源，并联合外送平台Chowbus，一起组织了这次爱心午餐活动。我们希望联合社会各界力量，募集更多的资金，共同把他们的爱心放大。”CCCWA会长吕莉莉介绍本次活动发起缘由。 “爱心午餐”得到西雅图当地餐厅和外送平台的大力支持。参与活动的餐厅都是西雅图地区耳熟能详的知名餐厅：豆捞坊中餐厅（联手百家超市）、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、刘一手火锅、沸腾鱼乡、颐和园北京烤鸭店、蓉城老火锅。由于受疫情影响，餐饮业暂停让餐饮业绩受到巨大冲击，但是这些餐馆负责人“不忧己而忧天下”，不但没把自身营利放在首位，反而无私奉献积极参与制作免费午餐。在配送上，拥有专业配送服务的Chowbus外卖平台主动承担起本次爱心活动的配送。尽管疫情期间正是Chowbus业务最为繁忙阶段，但是Chowbus依然配备了专门人员对接本次活动负责沟通排期与外送，每天准点将爱心午餐送到医护人员手中。 活动开展两周来，西创会、西雅图新移民之家、西雅图地产投资俱乐部、阳光青少年基金会、广府会等非营利组织均对活动给予大力支持与协助，尤其是蔡和蔡律师事务所的蔡清律师、Sylvia Chin女士、美国经纬有限公司李若垚、张硕夫妇女士、华大在校生Rhea，他们在项目前期不仅带头捐赠资金，还花费了大量时间为项目的推进做出杰出贡献，一共有三十几个志愿者组成的工作小组在为这个活动服务，他们来自各个非营利组织、捐赠单位、社区、政府、大学、高中…… 截至4月11日，爱心午餐已送出3845份，UW Virology、SwedishHospital、Overlake Hospital、EvergreenHospital等15家重点抗疫医院的675位医护工作者们已经享用到了这些爱心午餐。送餐范围还将扩大，活动还将普及到更多医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员。医护工作者们对本次活动也表示了由衷感谢。很多医护人员收到爱心午餐后都感激不尽，纷纷在社交媒体上分享自己的爱心午餐，用自己独特的方式致谢“爱心午餐”，并纷纷@这些爱心餐厅给他们“打广告”。 人间芳菲四月天，这个本应是最美的季节，参与“爱心午餐”的所有人却无暇欣赏大美春光，他们每天更为忙碌，为抗击疫情而奉献一己之力。现在为了使大家更全面了解“爱心午餐”的规划，聆听这些餐饮企业参与本次活动的初心，以及外送平台Chowbus 如何做到及时连接餐厅与医院的，CCCWA将于4月13日西雅图时间2:00PM至3:30PM举行线上新闻发布会。届时，各餐厅负责人、协办机构负责人、工作组成员，将和大家分享这次“爱心午餐”背后的故事。如果您是西雅图的中文媒体、自媒体人以及有意向的合作单位或个人，诚邀您参加本次线上分享活动。 **发布会时间：4月13日2：00PM-3：30PM** ** Zoom 网络直播链接: https://washington.zoom.us/j/766492115 ** ** ** **发布会流程：** 1． 主办单位CCCWA会长吕莉莉介绍活动概况 2． Bellevue市议员李瑞麟先生发言 3． 三位领捐餐厅代表发言（豆捞坊、IJ sushi 、颐和园） 4，蔡清律师介绍项目的法律事务 5， 联络组组长Sylvia介绍受捐医院情况 6， 配送组组长Michelle介绍配送情况 7， 财务组组长Xiaoyan介绍捐物资及资金情况 8， 文宣组组长Grace 发言、英文媒体负责人Rhea发言 9， 募捐组组长那济源发言 10，协办机构发言 11． 互动问答环节 **本次活动支持单位：** 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) 颐和园北京烤鸭店 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会（Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center）阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ）西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404）蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates）拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

items.title_en: Join Us to Hear the Story Behind the Love Lunch Drive — Invitation to the 'Love Lunch' Press Conference
items.title_zh: 邀请您聆听爱心活动背后的故事——“爱心午餐”新闻发布会诚邀您的参加
items.summary_en: As April began, a 'CCCWA Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Call' spread across Seattle's Chinese community social circles, with everyone eagerly sharing it, praising both the organizers' generosity and this creative way of showing love. As of April 11th, six lead-donor restaurants had pledged a combined $242,000 in value, and $27,000 had been raised from the broader community.

items.body_en:
As April began, a 'CCCWA Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Call' spread across Seattle's Chinese community social circles, with everyone eagerly sharing it, praising both the organizers' generosity and this creative way of showing love. The drive was initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), with local Seattle restaurants and delivery platform Chowbus leading the donations, and enthusiastic support from across the community. The drive plans to raise $400,000 worth of love lunches within a month, delivering them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. As of April 11th, six lead-donor restaurants had pledged a combined $242,000 worth of meal packages, and $27,000 had been raised from the broader community.

After donating masks, protective gowns, and other medical supplies to hospitals, why did the group also choose to participate in pandemic relief through 'love lunches'? Organizer CCCWA hoped to use its own strengths and unique resources to support medical workers. 'Right now, every member of our community is doing their part to support frontline medical workers and cheer on our city. CCCWA, as a nonprofit made up of Chinese-invested businesses in Washington State, includes many outstanding, big-hearted restaurant entrepreneurs. When they learned the pandemic had made medical staff's work even busier and more stressful, making sure frontline workers could enjoy a good lunch became something they genuinely wanted to do. Even though the pandemic has hit their businesses hard, they still wanted to give generously to support frontline medical staff and contribute something to the city they love. So we connected with restaurant resources and partnered with delivery platform Chowbus to organize this Love Lunch drive. We hope to rally support from across the community, raise more funds, and amplify their generosity together.' CCCWA President Lily Lyu explained the origins of the drive.

The 'Love Lunch' drive has received strong support from local Seattle restaurants and delivery platforms. Participating restaurants are all well-known names in the Seattle area: The Dolar Shop (together with Asian Family Market), IJ Sushi Burrito, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Imperial Garden Beijing Duck Restaurant, and Chengdu Memory. Even though the pandemic-driven shutdown hit the restaurant industry's revenue hard, these restaurant owners 'worried about the world before worrying about themselves' — rather than prioritizing their own profits, they gave selflessly and actively took part in preparing free lunches. For delivery, Chowbus, with its professional delivery service, proactively took on the task of delivering for this drive. Even though the pandemic period is Chowbus's busiest time for its own business, Chowbus still assigned dedicated staff to coordinate scheduling and delivery for this drive, delivering love lunches to medical staff on time every day.

Over the two weeks since the drive began, nonprofits including the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Sunshine Youth Foundation, and the Guangfu Association have all provided strong support and assistance — especially Attorney Cai Qing and Ms. Sylvia Chin of Cai & Cai Law Office, Ruoyao Li and Shuo Zhang of Jing Wei LLC, and UW student Rhea, who not only led the way with early donations but also devoted significant time to advancing the project. A working group of over thirty volunteers has served this drive, drawn from various nonprofits, donor organizations, the community, government, universities, and high schools.

As of April 11th, 3,845 love lunches had been delivered, and 675 medical workers at 15 key frontline hospitals — including UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital — have already enjoyed these love lunches. The delivery scope will continue to expand, reaching more medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. Medical workers have expressed heartfelt thanks for this drive. Many, upon receiving their love lunches, were deeply moved and shared their love lunches on social media, thanking the drive in their own unique ways and tagging the participating restaurants to help promote them.

April is usually the most beautiful time of year, but everyone involved in the 'Love Lunch' drive has had no time to enjoy the spring scenery — they've been busier than ever, giving their all to the fight against the pandemic. To help everyone gain a fuller understanding of the Love Lunch plan, hear from the restaurants about why they got involved, and learn how delivery platform Chowbus managed to connect restaurants and hospitals so effectively, CCCWA will hold an online press conference on April 13th, 2:00–3:30 PM Seattle time. At that time, restaurant owners, partner organization leads, and working group members will share the story behind this 'Love Lunch' drive. If you are a Chinese-language media outlet, independent media creator, or an interested partner organization or individual in Seattle, you are warmly invited to join this online session.

Press conference details:
Time: April 13th, 2:00–3:30 PM
Zoom livestream link: https://washington.zoom.us/j/766492115

Agenda: CCCWA President Lily Lyu gives an overview of the drive; Bellevue City Councilmember Conrad Lee gives remarks; Attorney Cai Qing introduces the legal aspects of the project; Outreach Team Lead Sylvia gives an update on recipient hospitals; Delivery Team Lead Michelle gives an update on delivery; Finance Team Lead Xiaoyan Li gives an update on donated supplies and funds; Communications Team Lead Grace speaks, followed by English-language media lead Rhea; representatives from three lead-donor restaurants speak (The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi, Imperial Garden); partner organizations give remarks; Fundraising Team Lead Jiyuan Na speaks; Q&A session.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp
