items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Joins All Sectors of Society in Actively Fighting the Pandemic
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会联合社会各界积极抗疫
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 11, 2020 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ Since the donation channel of the CCCWA Foundation (the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State Foundation) launched on March 20, it has—together with the Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle, the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni, and chamber member organizations forming a working group—raised nearly $39,000 in funds from all sectors of society and nearly $100,000 worth of supplies in just one week. On the day the channel launched, supplies donated by Systimmune Inc. were delivered to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center. The entire fundraising process brought together tens of thousands in acts of love time and again, witnessing unprecedented unity among Chinese people. As soon as the proposal was issued, it rallied a hundred people to join the CCCWA Foundation donation group; meanwhile, the Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association and the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni each rallied and fundraised within their alumni groups, with more than 300 total participants. Among the donors were not only Chinese-invested enterprises, well-known entrepreneurs, dignitaries, and elites from all walks of life in the Seattle area, but also many local institutions, organizations, and caring individuals—many of whom had already donated several times yet still gave again. All these efforts were driven by our shared goal and wish: to unite as one, fight COVID-19, and protect the community! During this special period of overwhelmed courier services and disrupted air routes, the CCCWA Foundation working group raced against time to coordinate with each organization to ensure the quality and safety of supplies, and, with the help of professional foreign-trade companies, delivered them to the Seattle area as fast as possible. As of now, the CCCWA Foundation has visited 14 institutions and donated 82,000 masks and 1,500 sets of protective supplies (including medical gloves, protective suits, and goggles), with a large batch of items still in transit. The donations received heartfelt thanks and recognition from the recipient units, and the image of Chinese people uniting as one won people's hearts and was reported by mainstream media such as the KIRO 7 TV channel. On March 27, the working group delivered supplies to Issaquah Swedish Hospital, where hospital staff delivered them directly into the hands of ICU medical staff. The medical staff called it truly timely help, thanking the Chinese community for its care and protection. KIRO 7 report: CCCWA Foundation representatives and Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association representatives; Swedish Hospital ICU medical staff receiving supplies. **On March 31, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives went to Virginia Mason Medical Center, Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center, and the Bellevue police and fire departments to make donations. Virginia Mason's CEO Gary Kaplan sent a special letter thanking the CCCWA Foundation.** Representatives donating to Virginia Mason Medical Center; representatives donating to Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center; representatives donating to Bellevue City Hall. From April 1 to 3, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives went nonstop to UW Valley Medical Center, Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Medical Center, the Chinatown ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic, and Burien Highline Medical Center to make donations. Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta personally wrote to thank the CCCWA Foundation, movingly writing: "As COVID-19 ravages our community, your help lets us see the light of hope at the end of the tunnel. Our entire community thanks you." Thank-you letter from Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta; Dr. Martin Walker posted his thanks on Facebook. Representatives donating to UW Valley Medical Center; the CCCWA chair and Seattle Real Estate Club representatives donating to Overlake Medical Center; an Evergreen Hospital doctor receiving the donation; representatives donating to ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic. Washington State's pandemic situation is now stabilizing—not only because of the doctors' selfless efforts and the cooperation of all sectors of society, but even more because of the consistent dedication and support of the entire Chinese community. Many of us are first-generation immigrants; we gather strength from our motherland to support our present home, because we deeply love this land. Drops of water gather into rivers; our modest efforts help the community. The CCCWA Foundation will continue to unite all sectors of society in donating until the war against the pandemic sounds the horn of victory! (Report and photos: Carrie Wang — CCCWA Foundation) Host: CCCWA Foundation. Partners: Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association (XMUAA Seattle), ICBC USA, Modern Land Seattle LLC, MY International Real Estate, Create World Real Estate, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Systimmune Inc., iSoftStone, Adsage, Washington Property, Chinese American Family Association, 505 Group, and China-US-Canada Friendship Association. **The donation channel is now open; donors, donated items and quantities, and recipient details will all be published transparently in due course. Please stay tuned for** **CCCWA Foundation** **donation activity details.** **"Drops of water gather into rivers; our modest efforts help the community!"** **Ways to Donate Funds:** Onelin Capital Corporation; Chinese American mixed family association. 1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, e-mail: info@ccc-wa.org, checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024. Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040. 2. Online wire/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation. Ways to donate supplies: please contact any of the following working-group member organizations for further coordination: 1. CCCWA Foundation working group: info@ccc-wa.org, phone: 206-661-8187 2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: xmuaainseattle@gmail.com, phone: 302-358-0366. Source: CCCWA Foundation.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月11日 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（以下称CCCWA Foundation）捐赠通道自3月20日启动以来，联合厦门大学西雅图校友会（Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle）、浙江大学北美西雅图校友会（Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni）、总商会会员单位组成工作组，在短短一周内共筹集来自社会各界的资金捐赠近3万9千美金以及价值近10万美金的物资，并在通道启动当天将百利药业（SystimmuneInc）捐赠的物资送达Everett Providence Hospital及Overlake Medical Center. 整个筹款过程一次又一次凝聚了数万的爱心，见证了华人空前的团结。倡议书一经发出就号召聚集了百人加入CCCWA Foundation捐赠群，同时厦门大学西雅图校友会及浙江大学北美西雅图校友会分别在其校友群中进行号召和筹款，总参与人数超过300人。 此次捐赠者中不仅有西雅图地区的中资企业、知名企业家、政要、来自各行各业的精英，还有众多本地机构、组织和爱心人士，其中许多个人和单位已经几度捐款，但依旧再次献出爱心；所有的努力都因为我们有着共同的目标和心愿：团结一心、抗击新冠、保护社区！ 在快递爆仓，航路不畅的特殊时期，CCCWA Foundation工作组争分夺秒对接各单位，确保物资的质量及安全性。并在专业外贸公司的协助下尽可能以最高的速度送达西雅图地区。截至日前，CCCWA Foundation共前往14家机构，捐出8万2千个口罩及1500套防护物资（含医用手套、防护服及护目镜）, 仍有大批物品还在运送途中。捐赠得到了受赠单位由衷的感谢和肯定，华人众志成城的形象深入人心，并被主流媒体：如KIRO 7电视频道报道。 3月27日工作组将物资送达Issaquah Swedish Hospital, 并由医院工作人员直接送至ICU的医护手中。医护人员都称这真是雪中送炭，感谢来自中国社区的关爱和保护。 KIRO7报道: CCCWA Foundation 代表及厦门大学西雅图校友会代表 Swedish HospitalICU的医护人员接收物资 ** 3月31日CCCWA Foundation工作组代表前往Virginia Mason Medical Center、Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center及Bellevue市警察局、消防局进行捐赠。Virginia Mason的CEO Gary Kaplan特别发信致谢CCCAW Foundation。 ** 代表向Virginia Mason Medical Center捐赠 代表向Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center捐赠 代表向Bellevue市政厅捐赠 4月1日至3日，CCCWA Foundation工作组代表马不停蹄前往UW Valley Medical Center、Evergreen Hospital、Overlake Medical Center、中国城ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic、Burien Highline Medial Center进行捐赠。Burien市长Jimmy Matta亲自致信感谢CCCWA Foundation，并动情地写到：“在新冠病毒COVID-19肆虐我们社区的时候，你们的帮助让我们看到了隧道尽头的希望之光。我们整个社区都感谢你们。” Burien市长Jimmy Matta的感谢信 医生Martin Walker在Facebook页面发文致谢 代表向UW Valley Medical Center捐赠 CCCWA主席和西雅图地产俱乐部代表向Overlake Medical Center捐赠 Evergreen Hospital医生接收捐赠 代表向ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic捐赠 目前华盛顿州疫情趋于稳定，这不仅因为医生们奋不顾身的努力和社会各界的配合，更因为有整个华人社区一致的奉献与支持。我们中许多人是第一代移民，我们汇聚来自母国的力量共同支援现在的家园，因为我们深爱这片土地。滴水汇江河，绵力助社区。CCCWA Foundation将继续团结社会各界进行捐赠，直到抗疫之战吹响胜利的号角！ (图文报道：王洋Carrie Wang-CCCWA Foundation) 主办单位： 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会CCCWA FOUNDATION 合作单位： 厦门大学西雅图校友会 XMUAASEATTLE 工银美国 ICBC USA 当代置业 Modern Land Seattle LLC 梅高国际地产MY International Real Estate 拓宏美国Create World Real Estate 西雅图房地产俱乐部 Seattle Real Estate Investment Club 百利药业Systimmune lnc. 软通动力 iSoftStone 艾德思奇Adsage 华宇房地产公司 Washington Property 中美家庭协会 505 集团公司 505 Group 中美加友好协会 China-US-Canada Friendship Association **捐赠通道已经开启，捐赠者、捐赠物及数量及受赠明细都将陆续透明公布给大家。请持续关注** **CCCWAFoundation** **捐赠活动详情** **.** ****"** ** **滴水汇江河，绵力助社区！** **"** **资金捐赠方式** ： 2\. 网上电汇/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation 物资捐赠方式： 请联络以下任一工作组成员机构进一步对接： 1、华盛顿州中国总商会基金会工作小组：info@ccc-wa.org, 电话：2066618187 2、厦门大学西雅图校友会：xmuaainseattle@gmail.com，电话：3023580366 图文来源：华盛顿州中国总商会基金会 CCCWA Foundation

items.title_en: Fighting the Pandemic: An Update on the Caring Meal Fundraising Campaign
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐募捐活动更新报道
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 11, 2020 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ The "Anti-Pandemic Caring Meal Fundraising Campaign"—initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), with lead donations from The Dolar Shop Chinese restaurant, IJ Sushi Burrito Japanese restaurant, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Liuyishou, and others—has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community. Together they pledged to provide meals worth a total of $242,250, about 14,150 nutritious meal sets, to express thanks and respect to the medical staff fighting on the pandemic's front lines! As of the evening of April 7, the participating restaurants, though their businesses were hit by the pandemic, still generously did their best to contribute to society. With their own funds and manpower, they had prepared 2,535 caring lunches (totaling $45,525) and delivered them into the hands of medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. The "caring lunch" campaign is proceeding vigorously and in an orderly manner. It has also received enthusiastic support from all sectors of society, with donations growing by the day. CCCWA has received $26,479 in cash donations from caring individuals across the community, and everyone hopes to donate more caring meals through our platform. With the virus upon us, frontline medical workers choose to fight day and night to protect our health; we too should do our small part and offer a token of gratitude to these hardworking medical workers! Now, frontline medical staff fighting the pandemic at UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital have enjoyed caring lunches. Many were deeply grateful after receiving them and **expressed their thanks to CCCWA and the sponsoring restaurants through social media!** UW Virology medical staff said on Facebook: **"These caring lunches are simply delicious."** The "caring lunch" campaign will reach more medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. Freshly cooked, nutritious caring meal sets have drawn us closer to medical and community service workers—we all share the same love and gratitude. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State calls on more restaurants to join, and on more institutions, companies, and individuals to join, to help more medical staff and community members in need. Our fundraising campaign is completely open and transparent, strictly complies with U.S. law, and operates strictly according to nonprofit financial regulations; donation amounts and donated food will be published in real time. **Let's all take action! Love is not measured by size, nor by amount—let us use concrete action to express the courage and responsibility of our people of all ethnicities to fight the pandemic together and share the burden together!** **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** Asian Family Market; Imperial Garden; Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Flying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Jing Wei LLC; Cai & Cai Associates; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. Donation receiving account: Please mail checks to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li). Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. To donate directly, click: gf.me/u/xruzbv (please click from the server). If donating through your company's internal donation website, please search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. ***Donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt.*** The Dolar Shop (Bruce.zixuan.lin@thedolarshop.com); IJ Sushi Burrito (kevin100118@gmail.com); Chowbus Inc.; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Create World America Real Estate Inc. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal transfer info: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月11日 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮界的热烈响应，他们共同承诺提供总价值$242,250 美金，约14,150份营养套餐，以表达对奋战在抗疫前线的医护人员的感谢和敬意！ 截至4月7日晚， 参与爱心活动的几家餐厅在生意受到疫情打击下，依然慷慨尽力 为社会做贡献。他们 出资金、安排人力 已制作完成2,535份爱心午餐(合计$4,5525美金）并送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。 “爱心午餐”活动开展得如火如荼并且有条不紊地进行着。活动也得到社会各界的热情支持，爱心捐款数目与日俱增。 CCCWA已经收到了各界热心人士的现金捐赠美金 $26,479 ，大家希望通过我们的平台捐赠更多的爱心餐。 病毒当前，前线的医务人员选择日夜奋战，全力保护着我们的健康，我们也当进绵薄之力， 为辛苦的医务人员捐上一份感激之心! 现在，UW Virology、Swedish Hospital、Overlake Hospital 、Evergreen Hospital 医院里奋战在抗疫一线的医护人员们已经享用到爱心午餐。很多医护人员收到爱心午餐后都感激不尽， ** 通过自媒体发表了他们对CCCWA和赞助餐厅的感谢心声！ ** UW Virology的医护人员在Facebook上说： ** “这些爱心午餐简直太美味了“ ** 。 “爱心午餐”活动还将普及到更多医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。 新鲜烹制的爱心 营养套餐将我们和 医疗人员、社区服务人员拉近了距离，我们都有同样的爱心和感恩之情。 华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 ** 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任! ** 本次活动支持单位： 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 沸腾渔乡 (FLYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp) 捐款接收账号： 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) \- 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank \- 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） \- 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: Fighting the Pandemic — Caring Restaurant Series: The Dolar Shop — "One Pot, One World: Yesterday Others Helped Me, Today I Help Others"
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐厅系列介绍之“豆捞坊”：一锅一世界-昨日人渡我，今日我渡人
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 11, 2020 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ The "Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch Fundraising Campaign"—initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), with lead donations from The Dolar Shop Chinese restaurant and IJ Sushi Burrito Japanese restaurant—has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community. As of the evening of April 2, besides The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, four more restaurants—Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou—had newly joined the ranks of caring-lunch donors, pledging to donate 14,150 lunches. They had already prepared 1,515 caring lunches and delivered them into the hands of medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. When asked about the original intention behind spontaneously launching the "Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch" donation campaign, the head of The Dolar Shop's Seattle branch answered very simply: "One pot, one world: yesterday others helped me, today I help others." I understand him to mean that since entering Seattle in October 2018, people's love has supported the business's growth. Now, amid the severe COVID-19 pandemic in the U.S., when restaurants were forced to close, The Dolar Shop still hoped to do something for the local community, to repay its deep affection over the past year and a half. So The Dolar Shop decided to provide free caring lunches to all in the community who needed them. All of its staff expressed the gratitude of "yesterday others helped me, today I help others" through concrete action. Food is the people's heaven; under pandemic isolation, many restaurants closed, leaving police, community workers, medical staff, taxi drivers, people working and studying from home, and unattended seniors all facing the problem of getting meals. At first, The Dolar Shop's Seattle store voluntarily donated caring lunches, and anyone in need could come to the store to pick up a free one. Perhaps because word spread only so far, or because people didn't believe such a good thing existed, not many came. Later, when the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State learned of this, it took the initiative to contact other Greater Seattle charitable organizations, hospital systems, and more restaurants, to deliver caring lunches to the medical staff on the front lines and benefit more people in need. The Buddha said: in one flower a world, in one tree a life, in one blade of grass a heaven, in one leaf a Buddha, in one grain of sand paradise, in one place a pure land, in one smile a worldly bond, in one thought serenity. The Dolar Shop also put forward its own philosophy: one pot, one world. Each person has their own pot—cleaner and more hygienic—and everyone can choose their own flavors and dishes, while all gathering around one table, savoring delicious food while chatting and laughing. People often even have to wait in line for 2 hours to enjoy their beloved Dolar hot pot. What is the story behind The Dolar Shop brand? According to its head, the concept of "dou lao" comes from Macau. In the past, when people couldn't afford good ingredients, they made seafood into sliced dishes, which were both delicious and affordable and much loved by the people of Macau. Moreover, "dou lao" is a homophone for "all scoop up," symbolizing auspiciousness and prosperity. Later, Macau's dou lao spread to the mainland and became synonymous with luxury, high-end hot pot and an important choice for business banquets. With so many hot pot brands, what makes The Dolar Shop distinctive? According to its head, hot pot can be roughly divided into two types: Sichuan spicy hot pot and Hong Kong-style seafood hot pot. Dou lao belongs to the Hong Kong style, using the freshest seafood to make sliced dishes and selecting the highest-quality beef, paired with a secret-recipe sauce; after eating, you can also drink the nourishing hot pot broth. The Dolar Shop is high-end hot pot, using the best ingredients that can be found—only with good ingredients can the taste be better. Its décor is also the most cutting-edge, and its service the best, always putting guests first. The Dolar Shop also pays great attention to the details customers can't see in the back kitchen, even requiring the copper drain pipes to be polished bright and shiny. It is precisely because of The Dolar Shop's high demand for consistent quality that, since founding the brand in Shanghai in 2004, it has opened 52 directly operated branches worldwide, including four overseas in Seattle, New York, Vancouver, and Sydney. We sincerely thank all of The Dolar Shop's staff for still taking the initiative to give back to society and help the community during the restaurant industry's most difficult time in the pandemic. We sincerely wish The Dolar Shop to become a century-old establishment and a world brand! Blessings to Dolar! The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State calls on more restaurants to join, and on more institutions, companies, and individuals to join, to help more medical staff and community members in need. Our fundraising campaign is completely open and transparent, strictly complies with U.S. law, and operates strictly according to nonprofit financial regulations; donation amounts and donated food will be published in real time. Let's all take action! Love is not measured by size, nor by amount—let us use concrete action to express the courage and responsibility of our people of all ethnicities to fight the pandemic together and share the burden together! **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** The Dolar Shop (Bruce.zixuan.lin@thedolarshop.com); Asian Family Market; Imperial Garden; Chengdu Memory Hot Pot; Flying Fish; Liuyishou Hot Pot; Seattle Entrepreneurship Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Jing Wei LLC; Cai & Cai Associates; Pacific Sunrise International Corp. Donation receiving account: Please mail checks to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li). Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. To donate directly, click: gf.me/u/xruzbv (please click from the server). If donating through your company's internal donation website, please search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. ***Donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt.*** IJ Sushi Burrito (kevin100118@gmail.com); Chowbus Inc.; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Create World America Real Estate Inc. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal transfer info: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月11日 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心午餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮届的热烈响应。至4月2日晚，除了豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐 厅，又有颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等4家餐厅新加入到捐赠爱心午餐的队伍中来，承诺捐 赠午餐14,150份，并已制作完成1,515份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。 当被问到为什么主动发起“抗击新冠疫情爱心午餐”捐赠活动的初心时，豆捞坊⻄雅图分店负责人回答非常 简洁:“一锅一世界:昨日人渡我，今日我渡人。” 我理解他的意思是，自2018年10月进入⻄雅图以来，人 们的喜爱支撑了企业的发展。当今正直美国新冠疫情严重，饭店被迫关店歇业之时，豆捞坊仍然希望能为 当地社区做些什么，以回馈社区一年半以来的厚爱。所以，豆捞坊决定向社区所有需要的人免费提供爱心 午餐。豆捞坊全体员工以实际行动表达“昨日人渡我，今日我渡人”的感恩。 ⺠以⻝为天，疫情隔离之下，很多饭店关⻔，导致警察、社区工作人员、医护人员、出租⻋司机、居家工 作和学习的人们、无人照料的老人都遇到了吃饭问题。 最初豆捞坊⻄雅图店自愿捐献爱心午餐，任何需要 的人都可以到店里领取一份免费爱心午餐。 可能是因为传播有限，或者人们并不相信有这样的好事，来主 动领取爱心午餐的人并不多。 后来华盛顿州中国总商会了解到这个情况，主动联系大⻄雅图地区其他公益 组织联系医院系统以及更多的饭店，为冲在抗疫救灾第一线的医护人员送上爱心午餐，让更多需要的人受益。 佛曰:一花一世界，一木一浮生，一草一天堂，一叶一如来，一砂一极乐，一方一净土，一笑一尘缘，一 念一清静。豆捞坊也提出了自己的理念:一锅一世界。每人一锅，更干净卫生，每个人都可以选择自己的 口味和菜品，大家又都聚在一个餐桌上，一边品味美⻝，一边谈笑⻛生。人们甚至常常要排2小时的队才能吃到心爱的豆捞火锅。 豆捞坊品牌背后有什么样的故事呢?据豆捞坊负责人介绍豆捞的概念来自澳⻔，以前人们吃不起好的⻝ 材，就把海鲜做成滑类，这样既美味又便宜实惠，很受澳⻔人⺠的喜爱。而且豆捞的谐音是“都捞”，寓意 吉祥富贵，也能讨个好口彩。后来，澳⻔豆捞传到大陆，成了奢侈高端火锅的代名词，商务宴请的重要选择。 火锅品牌众多，豆捞坊有什么自己的特色呢?豆捞坊负责人介绍，火锅大致可以分为两类，四川麻辣火锅 和港式海鲜火锅。豆捞就属于港式火锅，用最新鲜的海鲜做成滑类，选择最高品质的牛肉，配以秘制酱 料，吃完还可以喝滋补的火锅靓汤。豆捞坊是高端火锅，选用的都是能 找到的最好的⻝材，⻝材好，味道才能更好。豆捞坊的装修也是最超前的，服务也是最好的， 永远把客人放在第一位。豆捞坊还很注意在客人看不到的后厨下功夫，连 下水道的铜管都要求擦得铮明瓦亮。正因为豆捞坊对品质一致性的高要 求，自2004年在上海创立品牌至今，豆捞坊在全世界开了52家分店都是直营，其中海外有四家店，分别在 ⻄雅图、纽约、温哥华和悉尼。 衷心感谢豆捞坊全体同仁在疫情之下餐饮业最艰难的时刻，仍然主动回馈社会，帮助社区。衷心祝愿豆捞 坊成为百年老店，世界品牌!祝福豆捞! 华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！ ** 本次活动支持单位： ** 豆捞坊 The Dolar Shop (Bruce.zixuan.lin@thedolarshop.com) 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 沸腾渔乡 (FLYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp) 捐款接收账号： 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) \- 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank \- 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） \- 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: Second Episode of CCCWA's "Star of the Week" Hotline Continues! Ms. Frances Chen Shares a Special Presentation on Online Marketing Strategies in the US Market
items.title_zh: 第二期CCCWA“每周一星“热线继续热播！Frances Chen女士为大家专题分享美国市场如何进行网络推广
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _April 11, 2020, 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ This episode's guest for CCCWA's (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) "Star of the Week" was Ms. Frances Chen, Director of US Marketing at adSage, who introduced the commercial value of digital advertising driven by communication and digital media technology, as well as the current state and outlook of digital advertising development in both China and the US. Amid the current global pandemic, many company employees have been forced to work from home and retail stores have temporarily closed; during this special period, digital online marketing has demonstrated remarkable power, connecting businesses across industries and borders with their audiences and buyers. Frances introduced some advertising platforms and ad formats well-suited to attendees' needs. Frances Chen shared with the online audience the services of adSage, a leading global digital marketing company, and introduced its major clients, including Amazon, Microsoft, Vipshop, Uber, Ashford, Blue Nile, and GoDaddy, giving everyone a primer on the development of the internet advertising industry.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月11日 13:07_ __ _ _ _ _ 本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了adSage美国市场营销总监Frances Chen女士向大家介绍网络营销借助通信和数字媒体技术推动的数字广告的商业价值,中美两地数字广告的发展现状及展望。在全球这次疫情爆发的当下，很多公司员工被迫在家办公，零售商店暂停营业，在特殊时期数字化网络营销发挥神奇力量，让各个行业跨国界联系到企业的受众群以及买家。Frances 介绍了一些比较适合大家的投放平台以及广告投放形式。 Frances Chen与 在线的朋友们分享了 全球领先的数字营销公司adSage 的服务，并 向大家介绍 主要的客户为亚马逊、微软、唯品会、Uber,Ashford、Blue Nile、Go Daddy等， 为大家普及了 互联网广告行业 的发展。

items.title_en: CCCWA "Weekly Star" Session 3: Attorney Xiaohe Cao on Recent Policy Changes to Visas and Green Cards Available to Multinational Companies in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 第三期CCCWA“每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了曹霄鹤律师介绍'跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和绿卡近期政策变化"
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 10, 2020 09:50_ __ _ _ _ _ **Attorney Cao will introduce the types of visas and immigration available to multinational companies in the U.S.:** 1. Investment immigration: EB-5 2. Extraordinary-ability immigration: EB-1A 3. Entrepreneur visas and green cards: L-1/L-2, EB-1C 4. Employment-based immigration: EB-1/EB-2/EB-3 5. For countries or regions such as Canada, New Zealand, Taiwan, and Hong Kong: E1/E2, TN **We hope Attorney Cao's professional lecture will help everyone in their work and life in the United States.** Attorney Cao earned her bachelor's degree from China University of Political Science and Law, and later received a master's in public policy from Japan's National Graduate Institute for Policy Studies and a Juris Doctor from Seattle University School of Law. During her legal practice in China, she focused mainly on Chinese business law and served as legal counsel at a large Chinese fuel company. She also co-authored works on Chinese law. After immigrating to the U.S., Attorney Cao began her legal practice here after earning her J.D. from Seattle University School of Law. Whether in immigration law, family law, business law, or estate planning, Attorney Cao has extensive experience, tailoring immigration strategies more comprehensively to different needs to help clients achieve the American Dream—including investment immigration (EB-5 direct investment and regional centers), employment immigration (EB-1, EB-2, EB-3), family immigration, applications for various non-immigrant visas (such as H-1B), and corporate law services. Attorney Cao is also active in many Seattle Chinese community events. She was invited to host an **immigration law column** on a Seattle Chinese radio station and served as a writer for an immigration-law column for overseas Chinese, providing immigration consulting to Chinese friends in the Greater Seattle area. Registration: This event is livestream only. To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: Pacific Time, Friday, April 10, 8PM-9:30PM (Beijing time, Saturday, 11AM-12:30PM) Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月10日 09:50_ __ _ _ _ _ ** ** ** 曹律师将介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和移民种类： ** 1. 投资移民：EB-5 2. 特殊人才移民：Eb-1A 3. 企业家签证及绿卡：L-1/L-2， Eb-1C 4. 职业移民：EB-1/ EB-2/ EB-3 5. 加拿大，新西兰，台湾，香港等国家或地区：E1/E2, TN ** 希望曹律师的专业讲座对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。 ** 曹律师早年在中国政法大学获得大学学士学位，并先后在日本国立政策研究院和西雅图大学法学院获得公共政策硕士以及法学博士学位。在中国从事律师执业期间，她主要集中于中国商务法，并在中国一家大型燃料公司担任法律顾问。曹律师也曾与他人一起合著关于中国法律方面的著作。 移民美国后，曹律师在西雅图大学法学院获得法学博士学位后开始了在美国的法律实践。无论是移民法，家庭法，商业法或是遗产规划，曹律师都有非常丰富的经验,根据不同的需求，更加全面地为客户量身定制移民策略，帮助客户实现美国梦,包括投资移民（EB-5直投、区域中心）、工作移民（EB-1，EB-2， EB-3）、亲属移民、各类非移民签证（H-1B等）的申请以及公司法等服务。 曹律师也积极参加众多西雅图华人社区活动。她曾受邀担任西雅图中文电台移民 **法律专栏节目** 主讲，并担任侨胞移民法律只是栏目的撰稿人，为大西雅图地区的华人朋友们提供关于移民方面的咨询。 报名方式: 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： 美西时间4月10日周五晚间8PM-9:30PM (北京时间周六上午11AM-12:30PM)

items.title_en: Fighting COVID-19: Love Lunch Fundraising Drive Update
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐募捐活动更新报道
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant industry, with these restaurants together pledging a combined $242,250 worth of roughly 14,150 nutritious meal packages to show their thanks and respect for medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response.
items.summary_zh: 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、 颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等领捐的“抗击疫...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant industry, with these restaurants together pledging a combined $242,250 worth of roughly 14,150 nutritious meal packages to show their thanks and respect for medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response!

As of the evening of April 7th, the restaurants participating in the drive — despite their own businesses being hit hard by the pandemic — have continued to generously give back to society. Through their funding and staffing, they have already prepared 2,535 love lunches (worth a combined $45,525) and delivered them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need.

The 'Love Lunch' drive is proceeding vigorously and smoothly. It has also received enthusiastic support from across the community, with donation totals growing by the day. CCCWA has already received $26,479 in cash donations from generous community members, and many hope to donate even more love lunches through our platform. With the virus still spreading, frontline medical workers have chosen to fight day and night to protect our health, and we too should do our small part, offering our gratitude in the form of a donated meal for these hardworking medical workers!

Right now, frontline medical staff fighting the pandemic at UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital have already enjoyed these love lunches. Many medical workers, upon receiving their love lunches, were deeply grateful and expressed their thanks to CCCWA and the sponsoring restaurants through social media! Staff at UW Virology posted on Facebook: 'These love lunches are simply delicious.' The 'Love Lunch' drive will continue to expand its reach to more medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. These freshly prepared, nutritious meal packages have brought us closer to medical staff and community service workers, united in the same spirit of love and gratitude.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop (contact via email), Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅、颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮界的热烈响应，他们共同承诺提供总价值$242,250 美金，约14,150份营养套餐，以表达对奋战在抗疫前线的医护人员的感谢和敬意！

截至4月7日晚，参与爱心活动的几家餐厅在生意受到疫情打击下，依然慷慨尽力为社会做贡献。他们出资金、安排人力已制作完成2,535份爱心午餐(合计$4,5525美金）并送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。

“爱心午餐”活动开展得如火如荼并且有条不紊地进行着。活动也得到社会各界的热情支持，爱心捐款数目与日俱增。CCCWA已经收到了各界热心人士的现金捐赠美金$26,479，大家希望通过我们的平台捐赠更多的爱心餐。病毒当前，前线的医务人员选择日夜奋战，全力保护着我们的健康，我们也当进绵薄之力，为辛苦的医务人员捐上一份感激之心!

现在，UW Virology、Swedish Hospital、Overlake Hospital 、Evergreen Hospital 医院里奋战在抗疫一线的医护人员们已经享用到爱心午餐。很多医护人员收到爱心午餐后都感激不尽，通过自媒体发表了他们对CCCWA和赞助餐厅的感谢心声！ UW Virology的医护人员在Facebook上说：“这些爱心午餐简直太美味了“。 “爱心午餐”活动还将普及到更多医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。新鲜烹制的爱心营养套餐将我们和医疗人员、社区服务人员拉近了距离，我们都有同样的爱心和感恩之情。

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 The Dolar Shop（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （Chengdu Memory) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

items.title_en: The 3rd Guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' Series: We Specially Invited CCCWA Chief Legal Counsel Lani Cao to Present on 'Recent Policy Changes to Visas and Green Cards Available to Multinational Companies in the US'
items.title_zh: 第三期CCCWA“每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了CCCWA 法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师介绍'跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和绿卡近期政策变化"
items.summary_en: Attorney Cao will introduce the types of visas and immigration pathways available to multinational companies in the US: Investment immigration (EB-5), extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A), entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C), employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3), and E1/E2, TN visas for nationals of Canada, New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions.
items.summary_zh: 曹律师将介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和移民种类：  投资移民：EB-5 特殊人才移民：Eb-1A 企业家签证及绿卡：L-1/L-2， Eb-1C 职业移民：EB-1/ EB-2/...
items.body_en:
Attorney Cao will introduce the types of visas and immigration pathways available to multinational companies in the US: Investment immigration (EB-5); extraordinary ability immigration (EB-1A); entrepreneur visas and green cards (L-1/L-2, EB-1C); employment-based immigration (EB-1/EB-2/EB-3); and E1/E2, TN visas for nationals of Canada, New Zealand, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and other countries/regions. We hope Attorney Cao's expert lecture will be helpful for everyone's work and life in the US.

Attorney Cao earned her undergraduate degree from China University of Political Science and Law, followed by a Master's in Public Policy from Japan's National Graduate Institute for Policy Studies and a J.D. from Seattle University School of Law. While practicing law in China, she focused on Chinese business law and served as legal counsel to a major Chinese fuel company. She has also co-authored publications on Chinese law. After immigrating to the US and earning her J.D. from Seattle University School of Law, she began her US legal practice. Whether in immigration law, family law, business law, or estate planning, Attorney Cao brings extensive experience, tailoring immigration strategies to each client's needs to help them achieve the American dream — including investment immigration (EB-5 direct investment and regional centers), employment-based immigration (EB-1, EB-2, EB-3), family-based immigration, various nonimmigrant visa applications (H-1B, etc.), and corporate law services. Attorney Cao is also active in numerous Seattle Chinese community activities. She has been invited to host a legal advice segment on Seattle Chinese radio and writes an immigration law column for The China Press, providing legal guidance on immigration matters to Chinese community members across the greater Seattle area.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Friday, April 10th, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869
items.body_zh:
曹律师将介绍跨国公司在美国可以使用的签证和移民种类： 投资移民：EB-5特殊人才移民：Eb-1A企业家签证及绿卡：L-1/L-2， Eb-1C职业移民：EB-1/ EB-2/ EB-3加拿大，新西兰，台湾，香港等国家或地区： E1/E2, TN 希望曹律师的专业讲座对大家在美国工作和生活带来帮助。

曹律师早年在中国政法大学获得大学学士学位，并先后在日本国立政策研究院和西雅图大学法学院获得公共政策硕士以及法学博士学位。在中国从事律师执业期间，她主要集中于中国商务法，并在中国一家大型燃料公司担任法律顾问。曹律师也曾与他人一起合著关于中国法律方面的著作。 移民美国后，曹律师在西雅图大学法学院获得法学博士学位后开始了在美国的法律实践。无论是移民法，家庭法，商业法或是遗产规划，曹律师都有非常丰富的经验,根据不同的需求，更加全面地为客户量身定制移民策略，帮助客户实现美国梦,包括投资移民（EB-5直投、区域中心）、工作移民（EB-1，EB-2， EB-3）、亲属移民、各类非移民签证（H-1B等）的申请以及公司法等服务。 曹律师也积极参加众多西雅图华人社区活动。她受邀担任西雅图中文电台曹律师信箱；侨报移民法律栏目的撰稿人，为大西雅图地区的华人朋友们提供关于移民方面的法律咨询。

报名方式: 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： 美西时间4月10日周五晚间8PM-9:30PM (北京时间周六上午11AM-12:30PM) Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Joins Forces Across the Community in the Active Fight Against the Pandemic
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会联合社会各界积极抗疫
items.summary_en: Since the CCCWA Foundation's donation channel launched on March 20th, it has partnered with the Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle, the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association, and Chamber member companies to form a working group that raised nearly $39,000 in cash donations and close to $100,000 worth of supplies from across the community within just one week.
items.summary_zh: ​华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（以下称CCCWA Foundation）捐赠通道自3月20日启动以来，联合厦门大学西雅图校友会（Xiamen University Alumni Association in...
items.body_en:
Since the CCCWA Foundation's donation channel launched on March 20th, it has partnered with the Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle, the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association, and Chamber member companies to form a working group that raised, within just one week, nearly $39,000 in cash donations and close to $100,000 worth of supplies from across the community — delivering supplies donated by member company Systimmune Inc. to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center on the very day the channel launched.

The entire fundraising effort brought together tens of thousands of acts of generosity time and again, bearing witness to an unprecedented level of unity within the Chinese community. As soon as the call went out, over a hundred people joined the CCCWA Foundation donation group, while the Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association and the Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni Association separately rallied and fundraised within their own alumni groups, bringing total participation to over 300 people. Donors included not only Chinese-invested businesses, prominent entrepreneurs, dignitaries, and professionals across industries in the Seattle area, but also many local organizations and generous individuals — many of whom had already donated multiple times yet still chose to give again. All of this effort was possible because we share a common goal and wish: to stand united, fight COVID-19, and protect our community!

During this extraordinary period of overwhelmed courier services and disrupted shipping routes, the CCCWA Foundation working group raced against time to coordinate with various organizations, ensuring the quality and safety of supplies, and worked with professional trading companies to deliver them to the Seattle area as quickly as possible. To date, the CCCWA Foundation has visited 14 organizations, donating 82,000 masks and 1,500 sets of protective supplies (including medical gloves, protective gowns, and goggles), with a large batch of additional supplies still in transit. The donations received heartfelt thanks and recognition from recipient organizations, and the image of a united Chinese community resonated widely, drawing coverage from mainstream media outlets such as KIRO 7.

On March 27th, the working group delivered supplies to Issaquah Swedish Hospital, which hospital staff carried directly to ICU medical workers. The medical staff called it help arriving exactly when needed, thanking the Chinese community for its care and protection.

KIRO 7 coverage: CCCWA Foundation representatives and Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association representatives

Swedish Hospital ICU staff receiving the supplies

On March 31st, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives delivered donations to Virginia Mason Medical Center, Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center, and the Bellevue Police and Fire Departments. Virginia Mason CEO Gary Kaplan sent a personal letter of thanks to the CCCWA Foundation.

Representatives donating to Virginia Mason Medical Center

Representatives donating to Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center

Representatives donating to Bellevue City Hall

From April 1st to 3rd, CCCWA Foundation working group representatives made back-to-back visits to deliver donations to UW Valley Medical Center, Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Medical Center, the International Community Health Services (ICHS) International District Medical and Dental Clinic, and Burien's Highline Medical Center. Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta personally wrote a letter of thanks to the CCCWA Foundation, writing movingly: 'As COVID-19 ravages our community, your help has shown us a light of hope at the end of the tunnel. Our entire community thanks you.'

Burien Mayor Jimmy Matta's letter of thanks

Dr. Martin Walker posted his thanks on Facebook

The CCCWA President and Seattle Real Estate Club representatives donating to Overlake Medical Center

Representatives donating to the ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic

Representatives donating to UW Valley Medical Center

Evergreen Hospital doctors receiving the donation

Washington State's outbreak has now begun to stabilize — not only because of the tireless efforts of doctors and the cooperation of the broader community, but also because of the unified dedication and support of the entire Chinese community. Many of us are first-generation immigrants; we draw on strength from our home country to support the home we live in now, because we deeply love this land. Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community. The CCCWA Foundation will continue rallying the community to donate, until victory is declared in this fight against the pandemic! (Report and photos by Carrie Wang — CCCWA Foundation)

Hosted by: CCCWA Foundation

Partner organizations: Xiamen University Alumni Association Seattle (XMUAASEATTLE), ICBC USA, Modern Land Seattle LLC, MY International Real Estate, Onelin Capital Corporation, Create World Real Estate, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Systimmune Inc., iSoftStone, adSage, Washington Property, Chinese American Mixed Family Association, 505 Group, China-US-Canada Friendship Association

The donation channel is now open. Donors, donated items and quantities, and recipient details will be transparently published on an ongoing basis. Please continue to follow the CCCWA Foundation for details on the donation drive. 'Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community!'

Ways to donate funds:
1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, email: [contact via email]
2. Online wire transfer/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation, Checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024. Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040.

Ways to donate supplies:
Please contact any of the following task force member organizations to coordinate:
1. CCCWA Foundation Task Force: [contact via email], Phone: 206-661-8187
2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: [contact via email], Phone: 302-358-0366

Text and photos courtesy of: CCCWA Foundation
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会基金会（以下称CCCWA Foundation）捐赠通道自3月20日启动以来，联合厦门大学西雅图校友会（Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle）、浙江大学北美西雅图校友会（Zhejiang University North America Seattle Alumni）、总商会会员单位组成工作组，在短短一周内共筹集来自社会各界的资金捐赠近3万9千美金以及价值近10万美金的物资，并在通道启动当天将百利药业（SystimmuneInc）捐赠的物资送达Everett Providence Hospital及Overlake Medical Center.

整个筹款过程一次又一次凝聚了数万的爱心，见证了华人空前的团结。倡议书一经发出就号召聚集了百人加入CCCWA Foundation捐赠群，同时厦门大学西雅图校友会及浙江大学北美西雅图校友会分别在其校友群中进行号召和筹款，总参与人数超过300人。 此次捐赠者中不仅有西雅图地区的中资企业、知名企业家、政要、来自各行各业的精英，还有众多本地机构、组织和爱心人士，其中许多个人和单位已经几度捐款，但依旧再次献出爱心；所有的努力都因为我们有着共同的目标和心愿：团结一心、抗击新冠、保护社区！

在快递爆仓，航路不畅的特殊时期，CCCWA Foundation工作组争分夺秒对接各单位，确保物资的质量及安全性。并在专业外贸公司的协助下尽可能以最高的速度送达西雅图地区。截至日前，CCCWA Foundation共前往14家机构，捐出8万2千个口罩及1500套防护物资（含医用手套、防护服及护目镜）, 仍有大批物品还在运送途中。捐赠得到了受赠单位由衷的感谢和肯定，华人众志成城的形象深入人心，并被主流媒体：如KIRO 7电视频道报道。

3月27日工作组将物资送达Issaquah Swedish Hospital, 并由医院工作人员直接送至ICU的医护手中。医护人员都称这真是雪中送炭，感谢来自中国社区的关爱和保护。

KIRO7报道: CCCWA Foundation 代表及厦门大学西雅图校友会代表

Swedish HospitalICU的医护人员接收物资

3月31日CCCWA Foundation工作组代表前往Virginia Mason Medical Center、Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center及Bellevue市警察局、消防局进行捐赠。Virginia Mason的CEO Gary Kaplan特别发信致谢CCCWA Foundation。

代表向Virginia Mason Medical Center捐赠

代表向Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research Center捐赠

代表向Bellevue市政厅捐赠

4月1日至3日，CCCWA Foundation工作组代表马不停蹄前往UW Valley Medical Center、Evergreen Hospital、Overlake Medical Center、中国城ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic、Burien Highline Medial Center进行捐赠。Burien市长Jimmy Matta亲自致信感谢CCCWA Foundation，并动情地写到：“在新冠病毒COVID-19肆虐我们社区的时候，你们的帮助让我们看到了隧道尽头的希望之光。我们整个社区都感谢你们。”

Burien市长Jimmy Matta的感谢信

医生Martin Walker在Facebook页面发文致谢

CCCWA主席和西雅图地产俱乐部代表向Overlake Medical Center捐赠

代表向ICHS International District Medical and Dental Clinic捐赠

代表向UW Valley Medical Center捐赠

Evergreen Hospital医生接收捐赠

目前华盛顿州疫情趋于稳定，这不仅因为医生们奋不顾身的努力和社会各界的配合，更因为有整个华人社区一致的奉献与支持。我们中许多人是第一代移民，我们汇聚来自母国的力量共同支援现在的家园，因为我们深爱这片土地。滴水汇江河，绵力助社区。CCCWA Foundation将继续团结社会各界进行捐赠，直到抗疫之战吹响胜利的号角！ （图文报道：王洋Carrie Wang-CCCWA Foundation）

主办单位：华盛顿州中国总商会基金会CCCWA FOUNDATION 合作单位：厦门大学西雅图校友会 XMUAASEATTLE 工银美国 ICBC USA 当代置业 Modern Land Seattle LLC 梅高国际地产MY International Real Estate 一林资本Onelin Capital Corporation 拓宏美国Create World Real Estate 西雅图房地产俱乐部 Seattle Real Estate Investment Club 百利药业Systimmune lnc. 软通动力 iSoftStone 艾德思奇Adsage 华宇房地产公司 Washington Property 中美家庭协会 Chinese American mixed family association 505 集团公司 505 Group 中美加友好协会 China-US-Canada Friendship Association

items.title_en: Fighting COVID-19: Love Restaurant Series Feature — 'The Dolar Shop': One Pot, One World — Yesterday Others Carried Me Across, Today I Carry Others
items.title_zh: 抗击疫情，爱心餐厅系列介绍之“豆捞坊”：一锅一世界-昨日人渡我，今日我渡人
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), led by The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community.
items.summary_zh: 由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心午餐募捐活动”...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) and led by The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from Seattle's restaurant community. As of the evening of April 2nd, beyond The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, four more restaurants — Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou — have joined the drive, pledging to donate 14,150 lunches, with 1,515 love lunches already prepared and delivered to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need.

When asked why they took the initiative to launch the 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch' donation drive, the manager of The Dolar Shop's Seattle location gave a simple answer: 'One pot, one world — yesterday others carried me across, today I carry others across.' As I understand it, he meant that since opening in Seattle in October 2018, the restaurant's growth has been sustained by the community's support. Now, amid America's severe COVID-19 outbreak, with restaurants forced to close, The Dolar Shop still wanted to give back to the local community for its year and a half of support. So The Dolar Shop decided to offer free love lunches to anyone in the community who needed one. All of The Dolar Shop's staff put this gratitude — 'yesterday others carried me, today I carry others' — into real action.

Food is the foundation of the people's livelihood — as the pandemic forced many restaurants to close, police officers, community workers, medical staff, taxi drivers, people working and studying from home, and unattended elderly people all faced difficulties getting meals. At first, The Dolar Shop Seattle voluntarily donated love lunches, available for free pickup by anyone who needed one. Perhaps because word didn't spread far enough, or people didn't believe such generosity was real, not many people came to claim a free lunch. Later, once CCCWA learned of this, it proactively reached out to other nonprofit organizations across greater Seattle, connecting with hospital systems and more restaurants, to deliver love lunches to medical staff on the front lines of the pandemic response, benefiting many more people in need.

As the Buddha said: a world in a flower, a lifetime in a tree, a heaven in a blade of grass, the Buddha in a leaf, paradise in a grain of sand, a pure land in every place, a lifetime's bond in a smile, tranquility in a single thought. The Dolar Shop has its own version of this philosophy: one pot, one world. Each person gets their own pot — cleaner and more hygienic — and everyone can choose their own flavors and ingredients, while still gathering around one table, enjoying good food and lively conversation together. People have even waited in line for two hours just to enjoy their favorite Dolar Shop hot pot.

What's the story behind The Dolar Shop brand? According to the restaurant's management, the concept of 'dolar' (Chinese: 豆捞) hot pot originated in Macau. In the past, when people couldn't afford premium ingredients, they turned seafood into thin, silky slices — delicious and affordable, and much loved by the people of Macau. 'Dolar' is also a homophone in Chinese for prosperity and abundance, making it an auspicious name as well. Later, Macau-style dolar hot pot spread to mainland China, becoming synonymous with high-end, luxury hot pot and a popular choice for business banquets.

With so many hot pot brands out there, what makes The Dolar Shop distinctive? According to management, hot pot broadly falls into two categories: Sichuan spicy hot pot and Hong Kong-style seafood hot pot. Dolar hot pot belongs to the Hong Kong style, using the freshest seafood sliced thin, paired with the highest-quality beef and a secret house sauce, finished off with a nourishing hot pot soup to drink. The Dolar Shop is a premium hot pot brand, using only the best ingredients available — because good ingredients make for good flavor. The Dolar Shop's decor is also cutting-edge, and its service is top-notch, always putting guests first. The Dolar Shop even pays close attention to details guests never see, in the kitchen — even the copper pipes under the sink are required to be polished to a shine. It's precisely because of this relentless commitment to consistent quality that, since founding the brand in Shanghai in 2004, The Dolar Shop has opened 52 company-owned locations worldwide, including four overseas — in Seattle, New York, Vancouver, and Sydney.

Our heartfelt thanks to the entire team at The Dolar Shop for proactively giving back to society and helping the community even during this most difficult time for the restaurant industry amid the pandemic. We wholeheartedly wish The Dolar Shop a century-long legacy as a world-renowned brand! Blessings to The Dolar Shop!

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop, Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
由华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议，豆捞坊中餐厅、IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“抗击疫 情爱心午餐募捐活动” 得到了⻄雅图餐饮届的热烈响应。至4月2日晚，除了豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐 厅，又有颐和园、蓉城老火锅、沸腾⻥乡、刘一手等4家餐厅新加入到捐赠爱心午餐的队伍中来，承诺捐 赠午餐14,150份，并已制作完成1,515份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的 社区成员手中。 当被问到为什么主动发起“抗击新冠疫情爱心午餐”捐赠活动的初心时，豆捞坊⻄雅图分店负责人回答非常 简洁:“一锅一世界:昨日人渡我，今日我渡人。” 我理解他的意思是，自2018年10月进入⻄雅图以来，人 们的喜爱支撑了企业的发展。当今正直美国新冠疫情严重，饭店被迫关店歇业之时，豆捞坊仍然希望能为 当地社区做些什么，以回馈社区一年半以来的厚爱。所以，豆捞坊决定向社区所有需要的人免费提供爱心 午餐。豆捞坊全体员工以实际行动表达“昨日人渡我，今日我渡人”的感恩。 ⺠以⻝为天，疫情隔离之下，很多饭店关⻔，导致警察、社区工作人员、医护人员、出租⻋司机、居家工 作和学习的人们、无人照料的老人都遇到了吃饭问题。最初豆捞坊⻄雅图店自愿捐献爱心午餐，任何需要 的人都可以到店里领取一份免费爱心午餐。可能是因为传播有限，或者人们并不相信有这样的好事，来主 动领取爱心午餐的人并不多。后来华盛顿州中国总商会了解到这个情况，主动联系大⻄雅图地区其他公益 组织联系医院系统以及更多的饭店，为冲在抗疫救灾第一线的医护人员送上爱心午餐，让更多需要的人受 益。

佛曰:一花一世界，一木一浮生，一草一天堂，一叶一如来，一砂一极乐，一方一净土，一笑一尘缘，一 念一清静。豆捞坊也提出了自己的理念:一锅一世界。每人一锅，更干净卫生，每个人都可以选择自己的 口味和菜品，大家又都聚在一个餐桌上，一边品味美⻝，一边谈笑⻛生。人们甚至常常要排2小时的队才能吃到心爱的豆捞火锅。 豆捞坊品牌背后有什么样的故事呢?据豆捞坊负责人介绍豆捞的概念来自澳⻔，以前人们吃不起好的⻝ 材，就把海鲜做成滑类，这样既美味又便宜实惠，很受澳⻔人⺠的喜爱。而且豆捞的谐音是“都捞”，寓意 吉祥富贵，也能讨个好口彩。后来，澳⻔豆捞传到大陆，成了奢侈高端火锅的代名词，商务宴请的重要选择。 火锅品牌众多，豆捞坊有什么自己的特色呢?豆捞坊负责人介绍，火锅大致可以分为两类，四川麻辣火锅 和港式海鲜火锅。豆捞就属于港式火锅，用最新鲜的海鲜做成滑类，选择最高品质的牛肉，配以秘制酱 料，吃完还可以喝滋补的火锅靓汤。豆捞坊是高端火锅，选用的都是能 找到的最好的⻝材，⻝材好，味道才能更好。豆捞坊的装修也是最超前的，服务也是最好的， 永远把客人放在第一位。豆捞坊还很注意在客人看不到的后厨下功夫，连 下水道的铜管都要求擦得铮明瓦亮。正因为豆捞坊对品质一致性的高要 求，自2004年在上海创立品牌至今，豆捞坊在全世界开了52家分店都是直营，其中海外有四家店，分别在 ⻄雅图、纽约、温哥华和悉尼。 衷心感谢豆捞坊全体同仁在疫情之下餐饮业最艰难的时刻，仍然主动回馈社会，帮助社区。衷心祝愿豆捞 坊成为百年老店，世界品牌!祝福豆捞!

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection)） Chowbus Inc. 颐和园 （Imperial Garden） 蓉城老火锅 （CHENGDU MEMORY) 沸腾渔乡 (FRYING FISH) 刘一手 （LIUYISHOU HOT POT) 西雅图创业协会 （Seattle Entrepreneurship Club) 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.) 太平洋日升国际公司 (Pacific Sunrise International Corp)

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: The 2nd 'Star of the Week' Livestream Continues! Ms. Frances Chen Gives a Special Presentation on How to Do Online Marketing in the US Market
items.title_zh: 第二期CCCWA“每周一星“热线继续热播！Frances Chen女士为大家专题分享美国市场如何进行网络推广
items.summary_en: This episode's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Frances Chen, adSage's US Marketing Director, who introduced the business value of digital advertising powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising in China and the US.
items.summary_zh: ​ 本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了adSage美国市场营销总监Frances...
items.body_en:
This episode's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Frances Chen, adSage's US Marketing Director, who introduced the business value of digital advertising powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising in China and the US. Amid the current global pandemic, many company employees have been forced to work from home and retail stores have shut down — in these extraordinary times, digital online marketing has shown its remarkable power, letting businesses across every industry reach their audiences and buyers across borders. Frances introduced several platforms and ad formats well suited for this.

Frances Chen shared with online attendees the services of adSage, a globally leading digital marketing company, introducing its major clients including Amazon, Microsoft, Vipshop, Uber, Ashford, Blue Nile, and GoDaddy, giving everyone a broader understanding of the development of the internet advertising industry.
items.body_zh:
本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了adSage美国市场营销总监Frances Chen女士向大家介绍网络营销借助通信和数字媒体技术推动的数字广告的商业价值,中美两地数字广告的发展现状及展望。在全球这次疫情爆发的当下，很多公司员工被迫在家办公，零售商店暂停营业，在特殊时期数字化网络营销发挥神奇力量，让各个行业跨国界联系到企业的受众群以及买家。Frances 介绍了一些比较适合大家的投放平台以及广告投放形式。

Frances Chen与在线的朋友们分享了全球领先的数字营销公司adSage 的服务，并向大家介绍主要的客户为亚马逊、微软、唯品会、Uber,Ashford、Blue Nile、Go Daddy等， 为大家普及了互联网广告行业的发展。

items.title_en: April 3 CCCWA Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch Charity Follow-Up Report
items.title_zh: 4月3日CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐公益追踪报道
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 4, 2020 12:22_ __ _ _ _ _ The **"Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch Fundraising Campaign"**—initiated by the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (CCCWA), with lead donations from The Dolar Shop Chinese restaurant (together with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito Japanese restaurant—has received an enthusiastic response from all sectors of Seattle. Over the past few days, the frontline anti-pandemic units that received caring lunches include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital. This campaign selected safe and reliable food and delivery businesses, producing and transporting the food in strict accordance with Washington State food safety standards to deliver nutritious and delicious caring lunches into the hands of medical staff. All food purchased was coordinated closely with local medical institutions at every level and delivered through point-to-point contact with the recipient hospitals. The caring-lunch fundraising initiative drew an enthusiastic response, with many organizations such as the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club giving strong support and assistance. Following the lead donations from The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi, as of the evening of April 2, four more restaurants—Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou—had joined the ranks of donors, together pledging to fully fund 14,150 lunches. They had already prepared 1,515 caring lunches, delivered into the hands of medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need, and had raised $21,085 in cash donations. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State calls on more restaurants to join, and on more institutions, companies, and individuals to join, to help more medical staff and community members in need. Our fundraising campaign is completely open and transparent, strictly complies with U.S. law, and operates strictly according to nonprofit financial regulations; donation amounts and donated food will be published in real time. Let's all take action! Love is not measured by size, nor by amount—let us use concrete action to express the courage and responsibility of our people of all ethnicities to fight the pandemic together and share the burden together! **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** Asian Family Market, Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory Hot Pot, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Jing Wei LLC, Cai & Cai Associates, and Pacific Sunrise International Corp. **Donation Receiving Account:** By check: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. Please mail checks to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li). Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. To donate directly, click the website: gf.me/u/xruzbv (please click from the server). If donating through your company's internal donation website, please search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. ***Donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt.*** The Dolar Shop (Bruce.zixuan.lin@thedolarshop.com); IJ Sushi Burrito (kevin100118@gmail.com); Chowbus Inc.; Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404); Create World America Real Estate Inc. Payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Account Number: 83021876; Routing Number: 1222-0395-0. PayPal transfer info: sunshineyouthassociation@gmail.com

items.title_en: April 3rd Update: Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Charity Tracking Report
items.title_zh: 4月3日CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐公益追踪报道
items.summary_en: The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from across Seattle.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA发起倡议、豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐的“ 抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐活动”...
items.body_en:
The 'Fighting COVID-19 Love Lunch Fundraising Drive,' initiated by CCCWA and led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito, has received an enthusiastic response from across Seattle. Over the past few days, organizations on the front lines of the pandemic response that have received love lunches include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital. This drive carefully selected trusted, reliable restaurants and food delivery partners, strictly following Washington State food safety standards for preparation and transport, delivering nutritious, delicious love lunches directly to medical staff. All purchased food is coordinated closely with local medical institutions at every level, maintaining point-to-point contact with recipient hospitals.

The Love Lunch fundraising call received an enthusiastic response, with organizations such as the Seattle Entrepreneurship Club providing strong support and assistance. Following the lead of The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito, as of the evening of April 2nd, four more restaurants — Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, and Liuyishou — have joined as donors, together pledging to fully fund 14,150 lunches, with 1,515 love lunches already prepared and delivered to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. $21,085 in cash donations have been raised.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Supporting organizations for this event: The Dolar Shop (contact via email), Asian Family Market, IJ Sushi Burrito (contact via email), Chowbus Inc., Imperial Garden, Chengdu Memory, Frying Fish, Liuyishou Hot Pot, Seattle Entrepreneurship Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404), Cai & Cai Associates, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Pacific Sunrise International Corp

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.

items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _April 1, 2020 07:39_ __ _ _ _ _ Founded in 2007, adSage (Adsage Technology Co., Ltd.) is known for big-data mining and precision marketing. Headquartered in Beijing, with branch offices in Shanghai, Wuxi, Shenzhen, Seattle, Los Angeles, and elsewhere, the company is dedicated to providing clients with one-stop integrated "brand-plus-performance" marketing services in the digital media marketing field. Advertising is information, serving both brand communication and demand conversion, and all advertising is measurable. Good ads that fit the audience's interests and ads that can be measured both require continuous, cutting-edge technology investment. adSage firmly believes technology can transform marketing, and we continuously invest substantial R&D effort into this great work to better serve our clients. **Innovation + Execution:** Innovation is the foundation of a technology company's existence and the engine of its growth, but innovation must be put into practice, not remain merely a concept—so execution is the key element that ensures innovation is realized. In this fast-developing tech era, digitizing products and services has become a necessary process. Especially amid this pandemic outbreak, many companies have been forced to work from home, and many traditional retailers have been hit hard, forced to close or lay off staff, with some even going bankrupt. How can you reach your audience and buyers across distances and borders during special times? This is where digital online marketing works its magic. Today we'll introduce some platforms and ad formats well suited to everyone. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State has invited adSage's U.S. marketing director Frances Chen to introduce the business value of digital advertising driven by communication and digital media technology, and the current state and outlook of digital advertising in both China and the U.S. Since joining the company in 2017, Frances has helped many clients such as Blue Nile, Zillow, and TD Ameritrade expand their global market share, drawing on her skills and experience in brand management, building partnerships, and performance marketing. **Frances manages adSage's media partners | OnlineTimes Corporation,** **including Tencent, North America's Money Saving Express, TikTok, Baidu, and more. Everyone is welcome to register!** Registration: This event is livestream only. To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: Join Zoom Meeting https://zoom.us/j/292364477 Meeting ID: 292 364 477
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年04月01日 07:39_ __ _ _ _ _ 艾德思奇科技有限公司（艾德思奇/adSage）成立于2007年，以大数据挖掘和精准营销著称。公司总部位于北京，于上海、无锡、深圳、西雅图、洛杉矶等地设有分支机构，致力于为客户提供数字媒体营销领域的“品效合一”一站式整合营销服务。 广告就是信息，兼具品牌传播和需求转化的作用，但任何广告都是可衡量的。贴合受众兴趣的好广告和能够衡量的广告，都需要持续并且尖端的科技投入。adSage坚信科技可以改变营销，我们为持续的为这一伟大的工作投入大量研发精力来为客户更好的服务。 ** 创新力+执行力 ** ** ： ** 创新是科技公司存在的根本和发展的动力，但创新必须付诸实践，而不仅是概念，因此执行力是保障创新被实现的关键要素。 在高速发展的科技时代，把产品以及服务电子化已成为一个必要的过程。尤其是在这次疫情爆发的前提下，很多公司被迫在家办公，很多传统零售业受到重创，不得不关门乃至裁员，有一些甚至破产。如何在特殊时期跨低于跨国界联系到你的受众群以及买家？这就是数字化网络营销发挥神奇力量的地方。今天我们就来介绍一下一些比较适合大家的投放平台以及广告投放形式。 华盛顿州中国总商会邀请adSage美国营销总监Frances Chen向大家介绍网络营销借助 通信和数字媒体技术推动的数字广告的商业价值,中美两地数字广告的发展现状及展望。 自2017年加入公司以来，Frances凭借其在品牌管理，建立伙伴关系和绩效营销方面的技能和经验，已帮助Blue Nile，Zillow，TDAmeritrade等众多客户扩大了全球市场额。 **Frances管理adSage的媒体合作伙伴| OnlineTimes Corporation，** ** 包括腾讯，北美省钱快报，Tiktok，百度等。欢迎大家报名参加！ ** ** ** ** ** 报名方式: 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接 ：

items.body_en:
adSage was founded in 2007 and is known for big-data mining and precision marketing. Headquartered in Beijing, with branch offices in Shanghai, Wuxi, Shenzhen, Seattle, and Los Angeles, adSage is dedicated to providing clients with one-stop integrated 'brand plus performance' digital media marketing services. Advertising is information — it serves both brand communication and demand conversion, but every ad must be measurable. Good advertising that resonates with its audience and can be measured requires sustained, cutting-edge technology investment. adSage firmly believes technology can transform marketing, and we continue to invest heavily in R&D toward this important work to better serve our clients. Innovation plus execution: innovation is the foundation and driving force behind any tech company's existence and growth, but innovation must be put into practice, not remain just a concept — execution is the key to making innovation real.

In today's fast-moving tech era, digitizing products and services has become a necessity. Especially with the outbreak of this pandemic, many companies have been forced to work from home, and many traditional retailers have taken a severe hit, being forced to close or even lay off staff, some going bankrupt. How do you reach your audience and buyers across borders during such extraordinary times? This is where digital online marketing shows its power. Today we'll introduce some platforms and ad formats well suited for this.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State invited adSage US Marketing Director Frances Chen to introduce the business value of digital advertising, powered by communications and digital media technology, along with the current state and outlook for digital advertising development in China and the US. Since joining the company in 2017, Frances has used her skills and experience in brand management, partnership building, and performance marketing to help clients such as Blue Nile, Zillow, and TD Ameritrade expand their global market share. Frances manages adSage's media partners at OnlineTimes Corporation, including Tencent, Fatecoupon, TikTok, Baidu, and others. Everyone was welcome to register and attend!

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: Friday 8:00–9:15 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:15 PM Beijing Time). Join Zoom Meeting: https://zoom.us/j/292364477 Meeting ID: 292 364 477
