items.title_en: CCCWA Anti-Pandemic Caring Lunch Fundraising Proposal
items.title_zh: CCCWA抗击疫情爱心午餐募捐倡议书
items.body_en: Original CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _March 31, 2020 09:04_ __ _ _ _ _ **COVID-19 has now become a disaster faced by people around the world. Washington State—our second hometown where we live—has begun to see shortages of medical supplies such as masks and protective suits. Many restaurants have closed, and frontline medical staff are overloaded with work, sometimes with no time even to eat.** At this once-in-a-century moment of crisis, CCCWA (the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) and several other organizations, after their campaign to raise funds and purchase medical supplies, have once again launched a charitable campaign to deliver free caring lunches to frontline medical staff. CCCWA will join with several organizations and mobilize the strength of all sectors to select safe, reliable food and delivery businesses, produce and transport the food in strict accordance with Washington State food safety standards, and deliver nutritious, delicious caring meal boxes into the hands of medical staff; in staffing, in donation channels, and in the use of funds, it strictly complies with U.S. donation law. All food purchased is coordinated closely with local medical institutions at every level and delivered through point-to-point contact with the recipient hospitals. **This campaign is led in donations by The Dolar Shop Chinese restaurant (together with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito Japanese restaurant:** 1. The Dolar Shop, together with Asian Family Market, pledged $120,000. 2. The Dolar Shop separately pledged an additional $84,000. 3. IJ Sushi Burrito pledged $108,000. 4. Chowbus Inc.'s professional delivery service pledged $30,000. Recipient organizations already lined up include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital. This campaign plans to raise $400,000 within one month and make 30,000 caring lunches to deliver into the hands of medical staff at healthcare institutions, community service workers, and community members in need. Encouragingly, even before the proposal was issued, Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm and Ms. Sylvia Chin did a great deal of work in the campaign's early stages; the Washington Chamber has received over $10,000 in cash donations from Li Ruoyao and Zhang Shuo of Jing Wei LLC and from other businesses and individuals; and The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito had already provided a week of free caring lunches to all sectors of society, to an enthusiastic response. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State calls on more restaurants to join, and on more institutions, companies, and individuals to join, to help more medical staff and community members in need. Our fundraising campaign is completely open and transparent, strictly complies with U.S. law, and operates strictly according to nonprofit financial regulations; donation amounts and donated food will be published in real time. Though mountains and rivers separate us, we share the same moon and sky. We love our motherland thousands of miles away, and we also love this land beneath our feet. Fellow Washingtonians, let us cheer on our second hometown—this is the home where we work and live, the happy land where our children grow up healthy. Now we need to stand together with Americans of all ethnicities, work with one heart, and fight the pandemic together. We will do our utmost to give back to the community and express the love and dedication of us Chinese Americans to our second hometown. May heaven bestow compassion and grant peace; may the world be well and humanity harmonious. Let's all take action! Love is not measured by size, nor by amount—let us use concrete action to express the courage and responsibility of our people of all ethnicities to fight the pandemic together and share the burden together! **Host of This Event: CCCWA (Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State)** **Supporting Organizations for This Event:** Asian Family Market; Seattle Real Estate Investment Club; Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center; Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association; Jing Wei LLC; Cai & Cai Associates; SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404). **Donation Receiving Account:** Bank account transfer: Cathay Bank. If donating through a company donation website: please also search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association. Check mailing address: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li). **Donors, please be sure to note your name, address, email, and contact phone number so we can promptly provide your tax-deductible donation receipt.** **Volunteer group contacts for this event:** **For restaurant donation participation and institutional cooperation, please contact:** Overall commander: CCCWA President Lily Lyu, email: lvlili0219@sina.com, WeChat: lili2999. Chief attorney: Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Firm, email: Alex.cai@cai-law.com, Tel: 425-753-5188. Delivery group leader. **To donate funds as a company or individual, please contact** finance group leader Li Xiaoyan (Sunshine Youth Education Foundation / Seattle Real Estate Club), eli@create-world.us. **Medical institutions needing caring meal boxes, please contact** the outreach group leader. **For media and CCCWA chamber matters, please contact:** Lei, email: info@ccc-wa.org, WeChat: gloriachatting.
items.body_zh: 原创 CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年03月31日 09:04_ __ _ _ _ _ ** 目前新冠病毒已成为全世界人民共同面对的灾难。我们生活居住的第二故乡华盛顿州开始出现口罩、防护服等医用物品告急。很多饭店歇业，一线医护人员超负荷工作，甚至连饭都没时间吃。 ** 值此百年不遇之危难时刻，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会等多家机构在募捐采购医用物资活动之后再次发起为一线医护人员免费配送爱心午餐的公益活动。 CCCWA将联合多家机构、发动各界力量，挑选安全可靠的餐饮企业和食品配送企业，严格按照华州食品安全标准生产和运输，将营养美味的爱心便当送到医护人员手上；在人员调配上，在受赠渠道上，在善款使用上，均严格遵守美国捐赠法律的规定。所采购食品，均通过与本地各级医疗机构密切沟通后，与受赠医院保持点对点联系。 **此活动由豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐** ： 1，豆捞坊联合百佳超市认捐价值12万美金, 2，豆捞坊独自额外认捐价值8.4万美金。3，IJ Sushi Burrito认捐价值10.8万美金。4, Chowbus Inc 专业配送服务认捐价值3万美金。目前已联系好的的受赠单位包括：UW Virology 华大病毒实验室、Swedish Hospital 瑞士医院、Overlake Hospital 欧弗莱克医院、Evergreen Hospital 长青医院。 此活动计划在一个月内募集40万美元，制作3万份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。可喜的是，在倡议书尚未发出之际，蔡和蔡律师事务所的蔡清律师和Sylvia Chin女士在活动初期做了大量的工作，华盛顿总商会已收到美国经纬有限公司李若垚、张硕夫妇及其他企业个人捐赠的超过1万美金现金，豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito已为社会各界提供了一周的免费爱心午餐，反响热烈。 华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 山川异域，风月同天。我们爱万里之遥的祖国，也爱脚下的这片土地。华州的父老乡亲们，让我们为第二故乡加油，这里是我们工作生活的家园，这里是我们的孩子健康成长的乐土。现在，我们需要和美国的各族裔站在一起，齐心协力、共同抵抗疫情。我们尽最大的努力，回馈社区，表达我们美国华人对第二故乡的爱和奉献。愿天降怜爱，赐予太平；愿世界安好，人类祥和。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！ ** 本次活动主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 ** ** Chinese Chamber of ** ** Commerce in Washington State ** ** ** **本次活动** **支持单位** ： 百家超市 (Asian Family Market) 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） SC Intl Realty （2062289404） **325捐款接收账号** ： \- 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank \- 如果通过公司捐款网站捐赠：亦请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票邮寄地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) **请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。** ** 本次活动义工小组联系方式： ** ** 餐厅参与捐赠及机构合作请联系 ** ： 总指挥 ： CCCWA 会长:吕莉莉, 邮箱： lvlili0219@sina.com , 微信：lili2999 总律师： 蔡和蔡律师事务所， 蔡清，邮箱：Alex.cai@cai-law.com Tel: 425-7535188 配送组组长： ** 公司或个人捐赠资金，请联系 ** 财务组组长： 阳光青少年教育基金会/西雅图房地产俱乐部李晓艳 eli@create-world.us ** 医疗机构如需爱心便当，请联系 ** 外联组组长： ** 媒体及CCCWA商会事务请联系 **

This drive is led by The Dolar Shop (jointly with Asian Family Market) and IJ Sushi Burrito. Recipient organizations already confirmed include: UW Virology, Swedish Hospital, Overlake Hospital, and Evergreen Hospital.

The drive plans to raise $400,000 within a month and prepare 30,000 love lunches, delivering them to medical staff, community service workers, and community members in need. Even before this call for donations was formally published, Attorney Cai Qing of Cai & Cai Law Office and Ms. Sylvia Chin had already done substantial early groundwork — CCCWA has already received over $10,000 in cash donations from Ruoyao Li and Shuo Zhang of Jing Wei LLC and other companies and individuals, and The Dolar Shop and IJ Sushi Burrito have already provided a full week of free love lunches to the community, to an enthusiastic response.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State calls on more restaurants, organizations, companies, and individuals to join in, to help more medical workers and community members in need. Our fundraising drive is fully transparent, strictly complies with US law, and strictly follows nonprofit financial regulations — donation amounts and donated food will be published on an ongoing basis in real time.

Though separated by mountains and rivers, we share the same moon and sky. We love our homeland thousands of miles away, and we love the land beneath our feet. Fellow Washingtonians — let's cheer on our second hometown; this is where we live and work, and where our children grow up healthy and happy. Now, we need to stand together with people of all backgrounds in America and fight this epidemic together. We will do our utmost to give back to our community, and to express Chinese Americans' love for and devotion to our second home. May heaven show mercy and grant peace; may the world be well and humanity live in harmony. Let's all take action! No act of love is too small — let's show, through real action, our courage and shared responsibility in fighting this epidemic together across all communities.

Hosted by: CCCWA — Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

Supporting organizations: The Dolar Shop, IJ Sushi Burrito, Asian Family Market, Chowbus Inc., Seattle Real Estate Investment Club, Seattle Chinese New Immigrants Center, Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club, Jing Wei LLC, Create World America Real Estate Inc., Cai & Cai Associates, SC Intl Realty (206-228-9404)

Donation accounts:
- By check: payable to Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, mailed to: 325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li)
- Bank transfer: Cathay Bank, payee: Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association, Account Number: 83021876, Routing Number: 1222-0395-0
- PayPal: [contact via email]
- Direct online donation: gf.me/u/xruzbv
- If donating through your company's internal giving platform: search for Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***Donors are asked to include their name, address, email, and phone number so a tax-deductible donation receipt can be provided promptly.
items.body_zh:
此活动由豆捞坊中餐厅（联合百家超市）和IJ Sushi Burrito日餐厅领捐：1，豆捞坊联合百佳超市认捐价值12万美金, 2，豆捞坊独自额外认捐价值8.4万美金3，IJ Sushi Burrito认捐价值10.8万美金。4, Chowbus Inc 专业配送服务认捐价值3万美金。目前已联系好的的受赠单位包括：UW Virology 华大病毒实验室、Swedish Hospital 瑞士医院、Overlake Hospital 欧弗莱克医院、Evergreen Hospital 长青医院。 此活动计划在一个月内募集40万美元，制作3万份爱心午餐，送到医疗机构的医护人员、社区服务人员及需要救助的社区成员手里。可喜的是，在倡议书尚未发出之际，蔡和蔡律师事务所的蔡清律师和Sylvia Chin女士在活动初期做了大量的工作，华盛顿总商会已收到美国经纬有限公司李若垚、张硕夫妇及其他企业个人捐赠的超过1万美金现金，豆捞坊和IJ Sushi Burrito已为社会各界提供了一周的免费爱心午餐，反响热烈。

华盛顿州中国总商会倡议更多的餐饮企业加入进来，倡议更多的机构、公司和个人加入进来，为更多的医护人员和社区里需要救助的群体提供帮助。我们的募捐活动完全公开透明，严格遵守美国法律，且严格按照非营利机构的财务规定运作，捐款数目和捐助食品都将实时公布。 山川异域，风月同天。我们爱万里之遥的祖国，也爱脚下的这片土地。华州的父老乡亲们，让我们为第二故乡加油，这里是我们工作生活的家园，这里是我们的孩子健康成长的乐土。现在，我们需要和美国的各族裔站在一起，齐心协力、共同抵抗疫情。我们尽最大的努力，回馈社区，表达我们美国华人对第二故乡的爱和奉献。愿天降怜爱，赐予太平；愿世界安好，人类祥和。 大家行动起来吧！爱心不在大小，数额不在多少，让我们以实际行动表达我们各族裔民众共抗疫情，共同担当的勇气和责任！

本次活动主办单位：CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State

本次活动支持单位： 豆捞坊 THE DOLAR SHOP（[email protected]） IJ SUSHI BURRITO（[email protected]） 百家超市 (ASIAN FAMILY MARKET) Chowbus Inc. 西雅图地产投资俱乐部（Seattle Real Estate Investment Club ） 西雅图移民之家（Seattle Chinese New immigrants Center） 阳光青少年教育发展基金会（Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association ） Issaquah Highlands Chinese Heritage Club 美国经纬有限公司（Jing Wei LLC） 拓宏美国（Create World America Real Estate Inc.） 蔡和蔡律师事务所（ Cai & Cai Associates） SC Intl Realty （2062289404）

捐款接收账号： - 支票支付：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association 支票请邮寄到地址：325 118th AVE SE #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 (Attn: Xiaoyan Li) - 银行账户转账信息：Cathay Bank 收款人：Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association Account Number: 83021876； Routing Number: 1222-0395-0 - PayPal 转账信息: [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) - 直接捐款请点击网站：gf.me/u/xruzbv （请从服务器点击） - 如果通过您的公司内部捐款网站捐赠：请搜索 Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association

***请捐款人务必注明：捐款人姓名、地址、email 及联系电话，以便及时为您提供捐款免税证明。

items.title_en: CCCWA Launches the "Weekly Star" Online Livestream Series
items.title_zh: CCCWA推出 ​“每周一星” 网络直播活动
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _March 28, 2020 13:12_ __ _ _ _ _ **"Weekly Star" Online Livestream Series** CCCWA members: No matter which corner of the world you're in, let's gather more often during this "stay-at-home" period. Each week, one member organization will share professional knowledge and introduce their company's products and services via Zoom. We hope that in 2020 we can get to know more members in greater depth—to exchange, share, cooperate, and win together! For friends preparing to invest and start businesses in Seattle: the expert advisory team of CCCWA (the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State in the USA) will draw on their own experience to answer your questions about U.S.-China culture and communication, business cooperation, real estate and investment, law, tax, and more. **Recent Schedule:** **3/26/2020** Xia Yinglin — "Differences and Communication in U.S.-China Corporate Culture" (in partnership with the Sunshine Youth Education Development Foundation) **4/03/2020** Frances Chen (adSage) — How to do online marketing in the U.S. market **4/10/2020** Cao Xiaohe — "2020 Changes in U.S. Immigration Policy" (covering EB-5, H-1B, L-1) **4/17/2020** Annie Zheng — "2020 Tax Filing Considerations" (in partnership with the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club) **4/24/2020** Zhang Ming (MZA Design) — "Analysis of the U.S. Real Estate Development Permitting Process" (in partnership with the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club) **5/01/2020** Grace Chen (Maxim Financial) — Diversified investment opportunities in a down market **5/08/2020** Holly Yang (Kidder Mathews) — "Case Studies of Commercial Real Estate Investment in the Seattle Area" **5/15/2020** Qinghua Pei (Competitive Capabilities International) — "Characteristics of Modern Multinational Operations Management" **Upcoming Preview:** * Onelin Capital * Li Jing (GC2 Design) * Jason Moore (Windermere) — "Data Analysis and Outlook of the U.S. Real Estate Market Amid Economic Volatility"
items.body_zh: ** ** “每周一星” 网络直播活动 ** CCCWA会员们： 无论你在世界的哪个角落, “宅“”家期间，我们多聚聚吧。 通过Zoom每周一个会员单位视频分享专业知识、介绍公司产品与服务。 希望我们的2020年能更深入地了解更多会员，交流、分享、合作、共赢！ 准备来西雅图投资创业的朋友们：CCCWA美国华盛顿州中国企业总商会专家顾问团将以亲身经历为您解答有关中美文化与沟通、商业合作、地产及投资、法律、税务等问题。 ** 近期活动安排 ： ** ** 3/36/2020 ** 夏映林 ''中美企业文化的差异与沟通（本次活动与阳光青少年教育发展基金会合作） **4/03/2020** Frances Chen ( adSage ) 美国市场如何进行网络推 ** 4/10/2020 ** 曹霄鹤 “2020美国移民政策的新变化”（涉及EB5\H1B\L1 ** 4/17/2020 ** Annie Zheng ”2020纳税申报注意事项“” （本次活动与西雅图地产投资俱乐部合作） ** 4/24/2020 ** 张铭 （MZA设计事务所） “美国房地产开发报建流程解析” （本次活动与西雅图地产投资俱乐部合作） ** 5/01/2020 ** Grace Chen（美信金融） 在市场下行环境下多元化分散的投资机会 ** 5/08/2020 ** Holly Yang (Kidder Mathews )“西雅图地区商业地产投资案例分析” ** 5/15/2020 ** 裴庆华 （竞能咨询国际 Competitive Capability International）“现代跨国公司运营管理的特点”。 ** 后续 活动预告 ： ** * 一林资本 Onelin Capital * 李静 （构成设计 ） * Jason Moore （Windermere地产经纪公司 ）“经济波动下美国房地产市场数据分析及展望”

items.title_en: First Episode of CCCWA's "Star of the Week" Hotline Launches! Mr. Xia Yinglin Shares a Special Presentation on "Differences and Communication in Chinese and American Corporate Culture"
items.title_zh: 首期CCCWA“每周一星“热线开播！夏映林先生为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _March 28, 2020, 13:12_ __ _ _ _ _ **CCCWA's weekly video sharing series officially launched on March 23. Member companies and enterprise representatives from home and abroad shared professional knowledge and introduced their company's products and services through an online platform.** **The guest for the first episode of CCCWA's (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) "Star of the Week" was Mr. Xia Yinglin, who has extensive work and entrepreneurial experience in China, Japan, Canada, the United States, and many other countries around the world. He gave a special presentation on "Differences and Communication in Chinese and American Corporate Culture." Mr. Xia systematically shared his understanding of what constitutes good and effective communication within American culture, covering topics such as culture and personality, teamwork, in-person and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports, and answered practical questions about Chinese-American cultural communication and business cooperation. Drawing on his extensive work experience and real-world case studies, this professional promptly addressed questions raised by attendees, and the nearly 40 participants online were inspired in many ways. Everyone looks forward to CCCWA continuing to host various themed lectures in the future, in order to receive the latest industry information from professionals. CCCWA hopes to get to know more members and provide everyone with a platform for exchange, sharing, and cooperation — working together for a win-win 2020!**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年03月28日 13:12_ __ _ _ _ _ ** CCCWA 每周视频分享于3月23日正式开播了，会员单位和海内外的企业代表通过网络平台 分享专业知识 、介绍公司产品与服务。 ** ** ** 第一期 CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通 ，并 解答有关中美文化与沟通、商业合作中遇到的实际问题 。 ** 专业人士结合丰富的工作经历和实际案例的分享，及时解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 近40位在线参会人员受到多方面的启发。大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。CCCWA 希望能 了解更多会员，为大家提供交流、分享、合作的平台、共赢 2020年 ！ **

items.title_en: CCCWA's First 'Star of the Week' Livestream Launches! Mr. Yinglin Xia Shares 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies'
items.title_zh: 首期CCCWA“每周一星“热线开播！夏映林先生为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》
items.summary_en: CCCWA's weekly video series officially launched on March 23rd, with member companies and enterprise representatives from home and abroad sharing professional knowledge and introducing their company's products and services through an online platform.
items.summary_zh: ​CCCWA 每周视频分享于3月23日正式开播了，会员单位和海内外的企业代表通过网络平台 分享专业知识 、介绍公司产品与服务。
items.body_en:
CCCWA's weekly video series officially launched on March 23rd, with member companies and enterprise representatives from home and abroad sharing professional knowledge and introducing their company's products and services through an online platform.

The guest for the first episode of CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series was Mr. Yinglin Xia, who brings rich work and entrepreneurial experience from China, Japan, Canada, the US, and other countries, sharing a special presentation on 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies.' Mr. Xia systematically shared his understanding of what makes for good and effective communication within American culture, covering culture and personality, teamwork, in-person and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports, and answered practical questions about US-China cultural and communication issues encountered in business cooperation.

Drawing on his rich work experience and real case studies, Mr. Xia promptly answered attendees' questions, and the nearly 40 online participants came away with insights on multiple fronts. Everyone hopes CCCWA will continue to host similar special lectures in the future to obtain the latest industry information from professionals. CCCWA hopes to get to know more of its members and provide a platform for exchange, sharing, and cooperation — a win-win for everyone in 2020!
items.body_zh:
CCCWA 每周视频分享于3月23日正式开播了，会员单位和海内外的企业代表通过网络平台分享专业知识、介绍公司产品与服务。

第一期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通，并解答有关中美文化与沟通、商业合作中遇到的实际问题 。

专业人士结合丰富的工作经历和实际案例的分享，及时解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 近40位在线参会人员受到多方面的启发。 大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。CCCWA 希望能了解更多会员，为大家提供交流、分享、合作的平台、共赢2020年！

items.title_en: CCCWA March 26 Preview: Differences and Communication in U.S.-China Corporate Culture | "Weekly Star" Online Livestream
items.title_zh: CCCWA 3月26日活动预告：中美企业文化的差异与沟通 ｜“每周一星” 网络直播活动
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _March 26, 2020 03:54_ __ _ _ _ _ **As the world's two largest economies, the U.S. and China have increasingly frequent economic and social exchanges. Along with this come more political and economic frictions, epitomized by the trade war. So, in our work, life, entrepreneurship, and business in the U.S., is there anything we need to keep in mind when it comes to cross-cultural communication?** **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_jpg/wXPgjx9iaH97CBbhFyccGVYYX05FVAH7VaROKA5YxUG0GJ26gEelU9ZncAuBcBvqGV1vtJMZHDfWMXgkmvrLxsw/640?wx_fmt=jpeg)** For this session of CCCWA's **"Weekly Star"**, we have specially invited Mr. Xia Yinglin, who has rich work and entrepreneurial experience in many countries around the world including China, Japan, Canada, and the United States, to share a special session on "Differences and Communication in U.S.-China Corporate Culture." Mr. Xia will systematically share his understanding of what good and effective American cultural communication looks like, covering culture and personality, teamwork, face-to-face and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports. We hope Mr. Xia's wonderful lecture will help everyone in their work and life in the U.S. **Xia Yinglin: Founder and President of Dilato Infotech Limited** Mr. **Xia Yinglin** received a master's degree in computer science from Beijing Jiaotong University in 1987. Before founding his company, he worked as a software engineer at China's Ministry of Railways, as a software engineer at Tokyo Systems Laboratories in Tokyo, Japan, as a software engineer at DATT Japan in Vancouver, Canada, as a software localization engineer at SimulTrans in Mountain View, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Adobe Systems in San Jose, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Netscape in Mountain View, USA, as a software localization engineer at Microsoft in Redmond, USA, and as director of product globalization services at hiSoft Technology International Limited in Seattle, USA. **Pacific Time, every Thursday 7:00-9:00 pm (Beijing time, every Friday 10:00am-12:00pm)—see you there!** Registration: This event is livestream only. To watch this livestream on Zoom, please click the link below: **https://zoom.us/j/4696970869** **Meeting ID: 469 697 0869**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年03月26日 03:54_ __ _ _ _ _ **中美作为世界上两个最大的经济体，经济社会交往越来越频繁。随之而来，以贸易战为代表的政治经济摩擦也越来越多。那么我们在美国工作、生活以及创业、营商过程中，在跨文化沟通方面有什么需要注意的吗？** **![](https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_jpg/wXPgjx9iaH97CBbhFyccGVYYX05FVAH7VaROKA5YxUG0GJ26gEelU9ZncAuBcBvqGV1vtJMZHDfWMXgkmvrLxsw/640?wx_fmt=jpeg) ** 本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “ **每周一星** “的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生将从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通。希望夏先生的精彩讲座对大家在美工作和生活带来帮助。 ** ** **夏映林 ：Dilato Infotech Limited公司创始人、总裁 ** ** 夏映林 ** 先生于1987年获得北京交通大学计算机科学硕士学位。 创业前，他曾在中国铁道部任软件工程师，在日本东京Tokyo Systems Laboratories任软件工程师，在加拿大温哥华DATT Japan任软件工程师，在美国山景城SimulTrans任软件本地化工程师，在美国圣何塞Adobe Systems任高级本地化工程师，在美国山景城Netscape任高级本地化工程师，在美国雷德蒙德微软任软件本地化工程师，在美国西雅图hiSoft Technology International Limited任产品全球化服务总监。 **美西时间每周四晚上7:00-9:00 （北京时间每周五上午10:00-12:00 ）不见不散！** 报名方式 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： ****

items.title_en: CCCWA Star of the Week — March 26th Event Preview: Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies
items.title_zh: CCCWA 每周一星-3月26日活动预告：中美企业文化的差异与沟通
items.summary_en: As the world's two largest economies, the US and China have increasingly frequent economic and social exchange. Along with this comes growing political and economic friction, such as the trade war. So what should we keep in mind about cross-cultural communication while working, living, starting businesses, and doing business in the US?
items.summary_zh: 中美作为世界上两个最大的经济体，经济社会交往越来越频繁。随之而来，以贸易战为代表的政治经济摩擦也越来越多。那么我们在美国工作、生活以及创业、营商过程中，在跨文化沟通方面有什么需要注意的吗？
items.body_en:
As the world's two largest economies, the US and China have increasingly frequent economic and social exchange. Along with this comes growing political and economic friction, such as the trade war. So what should we keep in mind about cross-cultural communication while working, living, starting businesses, and doing business in the US?

This week's guest for CCCWA's 'Star of the Week' series is Mr. Yinglin Xia, who brings rich work and entrepreneurial experience from China, Japan, Canada, the US, and other countries around the world, sharing a special presentation on 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies.' Mr. Xia will systematically share his understanding of what makes for good and effective communication within American culture, covering topics such as culture and personality, teamwork, in-person and phone meetings, and how to write emails and work reports. We hope Mr. Xia's excellent lecture will be helpful for everyone's work and life in the US.

Yinglin Xia: Founder and President of Dilato Infotech Limited. Mr. Xia earned his master's degree in Computer Science from Beijing Jiaotong University in 1987. Before founding his own company, he worked as a software engineer at China's Ministry of Railways, as a software engineer at Tokyo Systems Laboratories in Tokyo, Japan, as a software engineer at DATT Japan in Vancouver, Canada, as a software localization engineer at SimulTrans in Mountain View, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Adobe Systems in San Jose, USA, as a senior localization engineer at Netscape in Mountain View, USA, as a software localization engineer at Microsoft in Redmond, USA, and as Director of Product Globalization Services at hiSoft Technology International Limited in Seattle, USA.

How to join: This event is livestream-only. To watch the livestream, please click the following link: https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869
items.body_zh:
中美作为世界上两个最大的经济体，经济社会交往越来越频繁。随之而来，以贸易战为代表的政治经济摩擦也越来越多。那么我们在美国工作、生活以及创业、营商过程中，在跨文化沟通方面有什么需要注意的吗？

本期CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会 “每周一星“的做客嘉宾，我们特别邀请了在中国、日本、加拿大、美国等世界多个国家都有丰富工作和创业经验的夏映林先生，为大家专题分享《中美企业文化的差异与沟通》。夏先生将从文化与个性、团队合作、面对面会议和电话会议，如何写电子邮件和工作报告等几个方面，为大家系统分享他理解的什么是好的和有效的美国文化沟通。希望夏先生的精彩讲座对大家在美工作和生活带来帮助。

夏映林：Dilato Infotech Limited公司创始人、总裁 夏映林先生于1987年获得北京交通大学计算机科学硕士学位。 创业前，他曾在中国铁道部任软件工程师，在日本东京Tokyo Systems Laboratories任软件工程师，在加拿大温哥华DATT Japan任软件工程师，在美国山景城SimulTrans任软件本地化工程师，在美国圣何塞Adobe Systems任高级本地化工程师，在美国山景城Netscape任高级本地化工程师，在美国雷德蒙德微软任软件本地化工程师，在美国西雅图hiSoft Technology International Limited任产品全球化服务总监。

报名方式 本次活动仅限直播 zoom观看本次直播请点击以下链接： https://zoom.us/j/4696970869 Meeting ID: 469 697 0869

items.title_en: CCCWA Launches 'Star of the Week' Livestream Series
items.title_zh: CCCWA推出“每周一星”网络直播活动
items.summary_en: To all CCCWA members: no matter which corner of the world you're in, let's connect more often while staying home. Each week, one member company will share professional knowledge and introduce their company's products and services via a Zoom video session. We hope 2020 brings us closer to more of our members, with exchange, sharing, cooperation, and mutual success!
items.summary_zh: CCCWA会员们：无论你在世界的哪个角落, “宅“”家期间，我们多聚聚吧。通过Zoom每周一个会员单位视频分享专业知识、介绍公司产品与服务。希望我们的2020年能更深入地了解更多会员，交流、分享、合作、共赢！ ...
items.body_en:
To all CCCWA members: no matter which corner of the world you're in, let's connect more often while staying home. Each week, one member company will share professional knowledge and introduce their company's products and services via a Zoom video session. We hope 2020 brings us closer to more of our members, with exchange, sharing, cooperation, and mutual success!

For friends planning to invest or start a business in Seattle: CCCWA's expert advisory panel will draw on their firsthand experience to answer your questions about US-China culture and communication, business cooperation, real estate and investment, law, taxes, and more. Every Friday, 8:00–9:30 PM Pacific Time (Saturday 11:00 AM–12:30 PM Beijing Time). See you there!

Upcoming schedule:
3/26/2020 — Yinglin Xia, 'Cultural Differences and Communication Between US and Chinese Companies' (co-hosted with the Sunshine Youth Culture and Education Development Association)
4/03/2020 — Frances Chen (adSage), 'How to Do Online Marketing in the US Market'
4/10/2020 — Lani Cao, 'New Changes to 2020 US Immigration Policy' (covering EB5, H1B, L1, etc.)
4/16/2020 — Annie Zheng, 'Key Points for 2020 Tax Filing' (co-hosted with the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club)
4/24/2020 — Ming Zhang (MZA Design Firm), 'Understanding the US Real Estate Development Permitting Process' (co-hosted with the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club)
5/01/2020 — Grace Chen (American Express Financial), 'Diversified Investment Opportunities in a Down Market'
5/08/2020 — Holly Yang (Kidder Mathews), 'Case Studies in Seattle-Area Commercial Real Estate Investment'
5/15/2020 — Qinghua Pei (Competitive Capability International), 'Characteristics of Modern Multinational Corporate Operations Management'

More upcoming sessions: Onelin Capital, Jing Li (Gouchen Design), Jason Moore (Windermere Real Estate), 'US Real Estate Market Data Analysis and Outlook Amid Economic Volatility'
items.body_zh:
CCCWA会员们：无论你在世界的哪个角落, “宅“”家期间，我们多聚聚吧。通过Zoom每周一个会员单位视频分享专业知识、介绍公司产品与服务。希望我们的2020年能更深入地了解更多会员，交流、分享、合作、共赢！ 准备来西雅图投资创业的朋友们：CCCWA美国华盛顿州中国企业总商会专家顾问团将以亲身经历为您解答有关中美文化与沟通、商业合作、地产及投资、法律、税务等问题。 美西时间每周五晚上8:00-9:30 （北京时间每周六上午11:00-12:30 ）不见不散！

近期活动安排： 3/26/2020 夏映林 ''中美企业文化的差异与沟通（本次活动与阳光青少年教育发展基金会合作） 4/03/2020 Frances Chen ( adSage ) 美国市场如何进行网络推广 4/10/2020 曹霄鹤 “2020美国移民政策的新变化”（涉及EB5\H1B\L1等） 4/16/2020 Annie Zheng ”2020纳税申报注意事项“” （本次活动与西雅图地产投资俱乐部合作） 4/24/2020 张铭 （MZA设计事务所） “美国房地产开发报建流程解析” （本次活动与西雅图地产投资俱乐部合作） 5/01/2020 Grace Chen（美信金融） 在市场下行环境下多元化分散的投资机会 5/08/2020 Holly Yang (Kidder Mathews )“西雅图地区商业地产投资案例分析” 5/15/2020 裴庆华 （竞能咨询国际 Competitive Capability International）“现代跨国公司运营管理的特点”。

后续活动预告： 一林资本 Onelin Capital 李静 （构成设计 ） Jason Moore （Windermere地产经纪公司 ）“经济波动下美国房地产市场数据分析及展望”

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Officially Launches COVID-19 Donation Channel
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会抗击新冠捐赠通道正式启动
items.body_en: Original CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _March 24, 2020, 06:00_ __ _ _ _ _ As COVID-19 spreads worldwide, the number of confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State is rising sharply by the day. Frontline hospitals fighting the epidemic, such as Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Hospital, Swedish Hospital, and Seattle Children's Hospital, have all experienced severe shortages of basic protective supplies such as masks and hand sanitizer. To support community public health and relieve the urgent needs of frontline medical institutions, the CCCWA Foundation (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State Foundation) urgently formed a donation task force, racing against time to mobilize resources from all sectors of society, and issued a call for donations to Chamber member companies, alumni associations, and other organizations to overcome this challenge together. On March 20, the day the donation channel officially launched, the CCCWA Foundation received a donation from member company SystImmune Inc. (Baili Pharmaceutical) of 2,000 3M N95 masks, 2,000 medical-grade masks, 400 protective goggles, and 100 sets of protective suits, and delivered them that same afternoon to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center. **The donation channel is now open, and details of donors, donated items, quantities, and recipients will be transparently disclosed to the public on an ongoing basis.** **Please stay tuned for further updates on the CCCWA Foundation's donation efforts.** **"Every drop joins the river; every small effort helps the community."** Ways to donate funds: 1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, e-mail: info@ccc-wa.org 2. Online wire transfer/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation, checking account number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024, Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040 Ways to donate supplies: Please contact any of the following task force member organizations to coordinate further: 1. CCCWA Foundation Working Group: info@ccc-wa.org, Phone: 206-661-8187 2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: xmuaainseattle@gmail.com, Phone: 302-358-0366 Text and images courtesy of: CCCWA Foundation (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State Foundation)
items.body_zh: 原创 CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年03月24日 06:00_ __ _ _ _ _ 随着新冠肺炎蔓延全球，华盛顿州的确诊与死亡人数逐日剧增。一线抗疫医院如 Evergreen Hospital, Overlake hospital, Swedish hospital, Seattle Children’s hospital等都出现了口罩、洗手液等基本防护用品严重紧缺的情况。 为支援社区公共卫生，解一线医疗机构的燃眉之急，华盛顿州中国总商会基金 (CCCWA Foundation)紧急成立捐款工作组，争分夺秒沟通社会各界资源，并向商会会员企业、校友会等机构发出捐赠倡议，共克难关。 3月20日，在捐赠通道正式启动当日，CCCWA Foundation就收到会员单位Systimmune Inc/百利药业捐赠的2000个3M N95口罩、2000个医用级别口罩、400个护目镜以及100套防护服。并已于当日下午前往Everett Providence Hospital以及Overlake medical center进行了捐赠。 **捐赠通道已经开启，捐赠者、捐赠物及数量及受赠明细都将陆续透明公布给大家。** **请持续关注CCCWAFoundation捐赠活动详情.** ** " 滴水汇江河，绵力助社区 " ** 资金捐赠方式： 1\. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation e-mail: info@ccc-wa.org 2\. 网上电汇/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024 地址:Bank of America , 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA98040 物资捐赠方式： 请联络以下任一工作组成员机构进一步对接： 1、华盛顿州中国总商会基金会工作小组：info@ccc-wa.org, 电话：2066618187 2、厦门大学西雅图校友会：xmuaainseattle@gmail.com，电话：3023580366 图文来源：华盛顿州中国总商会基金会 CCCWA Foundation

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Calls On All Member Organizations and Caring Community Members to Unite as One
items.title_zh: ​CCCWA FOUNDATION 特此倡议各会员单位及社区热心人士众志成城
items.body_en: ** ** Host: ** CCCWA FOUNDATION ** Partners: ** Xiamen University Alumni Association Seattle (XMUAA Seattle); ICBC USA; Modern Land Seattle LLC; MY International Real Estate; Onelin Capital Corporation; Create World Real Estate; Systimmune Inc.; iSoftStone; Adsage; Washington Property; 505 Group; China-US-Canada Friendship Association The Novel Coronavirus (COVID-19), recognized as an unprecedented global threat, is raging around the world and causing major crisis. According to CDC data, the number of diagnoses and deaths in Washington State has increased sharply, which became the second highest number compared to other states just within half a month. As the pandemic continues to evolve, major hospitals, children’s hospitals and healthcare facilities are running out of essential supplies, including medical masks and hand sanitizers. Support from the communities is highly essential in terms of collaboration inorder to mitigate the risk of infection.It is the high time for the community and the medical professionals work together to defend public health. ** CCCWA FOUNDATION ** dedicated to promote Chinese Americans communities involvement. The goal is to make resources available to support local hospitals and life care centers. As we can see, during the past few months, many first generation of immigrants work tirelessly to support their families and friends in the homeland. But now is the time again to support the land we dwell and love. We want to contribute to the planning and recovery. ** CCCWA FOUNDATION ** is calling for donation and all types of support from members and friends. With plan, determination and action, we can move mountains. ** For Monetary Donation: ** 1\. BOA Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation e-mail: info@ccc-wa.org 2\. Online banking/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024 Address：BOA, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA98040 ** For Supplies Donation: ** Please contact listing organization for further information: 1\. **CCCWA Foundation Fundraising Board** : info@ccc-wa.org Cell：2066618287 2\. **Xiamen University Alumni Association Seattle** ： xmuaainseattle@gmail.com Cell：3023580366 Every dollar of your donation will be used to COVID-19 relive. The whole process will be transparent. The fundraising board will insure the promptness and authenticity for each donor. We sincerely appreciate your support and look forward to the joint efforts. ** Sponso ** ** r ** : CCCWA FOUNDATION Modern Land Seattle LLC ** Co- Sponsor ** : ICBC USA MY International Real Estate Modern Land Seattle LLC Onelin Capital Corporation Create World Real Estate Systimmune lnc. Adsage Washington Property 505 Group Xiamen University Alumni Association in Seattle China-US-Canada Friendship Association
items.body_zh: 原创 CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年03月22日 03:30_ __ _ _ _ _ 美国华盛顿州中国总商会基金会 CCCWA FOUNDATION 2020 年这场猝不及防的新型冠状病毒 COVID-19 正在肆虐全球，而我们所处的华盛顿州 确诊病例数量在短短的半个月内就排到了美国第二。随着疫情不断扩大，目前西雅图地区 口罩、洗手液等防护刚需用品严重匮乏。一线医护工作者们都将面临被感染的危险，许多 医院已向社会各界发出公告寻求支援。 此刻，物资短缺的困局已实实在在地发生在我们身边，如果不能及时改善局面，这将会 给医疗资源、社区安全带来沉重的打击。华盛顿州中国总商会基金会(以下称 CCCWA FOUNDATION )作为连接在美中资企业/在美华商及服务社区的纽带，正在争分夺秒联 络社会各界资源，希望尽吾之所能支援一线医院及社区的防护抗灾工作，解西雅图各大医 院、老年中心的燃眉之急。 CCCWA FOUNDATION 特此倡议各会员单位及社区热心人士众志成城。滴水可汇江， 薪火可燎原，让我们为吾之社区各尽其能，为吾之医护人员担当后盾，为弱势群体遮风挡雨，为吾生活之土地齐心协力! ** 资金捐赠方式: ** 1\. BOA Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation e-mail: info@ccc-wa.org 2\. 网上电汇/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024地址:BOA, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA98040 ** ** ** 物资捐赠方式: 请联络以下任一工作组成员机构进一步对接: ** 1、 ** 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会工作小组 ** ： info@ccc-wa.org, 电话： 2066618187 2、 **厦门大学西雅图校友会** ：xmuaainseattle@gmail.com，电话：3023580366 在此，CCCWA FOUNDATION 诚挚地感谢大家的爱心和支持！捐赠工作组将透明公示 所有捐赠信息，保障捐赠的及时性和有效性。 疫不待我，吾辈定当积极行动，共度难关！ **

items.body_en:
As COVID-19 spreads across the globe, confirmed cases and deaths in Washington State have been rising daily. Frontline hospitals such as Evergreen Hospital, Overlake Hospital, Swedish Hospital, and Seattle Children's Hospital have all faced severe shortages of basic protective supplies such as masks and hand sanitizer. To support community public health and address the urgent needs of frontline medical institutions, the CCCWA Foundation urgently formed a donation task force, racing against time to mobilize resources across the community, and issued a call for donations to Chamber member companies, alumni associations, and other organizations to help overcome this challenge together.

On March 20th, the day the donation channel officially launched, the CCCWA Foundation received a donation from member company Systimmune of 2,000 3M N95 masks, 2,000 medical-grade masks, 400 goggles, and 100 sets of protective gowns. That same afternoon, the donations were delivered to Everett Providence Hospital and Overlake Medical Center.

The donation channel is now open. Donors, donated items and quantities, and recipient details will be transparently published on an ongoing basis. Please continue to follow the CCCWA Foundation for details on the donation drive. 'Every drop joins the river — small efforts help the community!'

Ways to donate funds:
1. Zelle Quick Pay to CCCWA Foundation, email: [contact via email]
2. Online wire transfer/ACH: To: CCCWA Foundation, Checking number: 1381 2768 3476, Routing number: 125000024. Address: Bank of America, 2830 80th Ave SE, Mercer Island, WA 98040.

Ways to donate supplies:
Please contact any of the following task force member organizations to coordinate:
1. CCCWA Foundation Task Force: [contact via email]
2. Xiamen University Seattle Alumni Association: [contact via email], Phone: 302-358-0366

Text and photos courtesy of: CCCWA Foundation

items.title_en: United as One to Fight the Epidemic; A Global Community Working Together for Relief! CCCWA Member Companies Mobilize Resources Across China and the US to Combat the Outbreak!
items.title_zh: 四海同心举力抗疫；全球一体协助救援！CCCWA单位集结中美两国资源鼎力防控、奋战抗击疫情！
items.body_en: Original CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _February 14, 2020, 04:20_ __ _ _ _ _ The China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit organization voluntarily founded by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State. The Chamber aims to provide a platform for Chinese-invested enterprises to communicate in the United States, promote trade cooperation between China and the Pacific Northwest, and support and help more Chinese-invested enterprises invest and develop in the United States. At the same time, CCCWA is also committed to advancing social welfare causes; in the past, CCCWA has held special charity auctions of children's artwork at Chamber dinners, donating the proceeds to relevant welfare organizations in the United States to support activities helping Chinese-American children who were adopted at a young age and now live in the US to return to China to search for their birth parents. In the face of the sudden outbreak of the novel coronavirus pneumonia epidemic, CCCWA members across various fields have demonstrated a strong sense of corporate social responsibility, actively coordinating with their branches at home and abroad to procure relevant supplies and donate them free of charge to severely affected areas in need. CCCWA Board member companies are currently mobilizing resources across China and the United States to fight the epidemic: * SystImmune Inc. (Baili Pharmaceutical), the company's Seattle office, has spared no effort in seeking procurement channels across North America, and has raised surgical masks, N95 masks, medical goggles, and medical protective suits, with the first batch of supplies already arriving in stages at designated recipient hospitals (Sichuan Provincial People's Hospital, West China Second Hospital of Sichuan University, Wenjiang District People's Hospital in Chengdu, Leshan People's Hospital, Mianyang 404 Hospital, Wuhan Children's Hospital in Hubei, and Wuhan Asia Heart Hospital). * Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) swiftly allocated more than RMB 30 million in cash to ensure the orderly operation of transportation, hospitals, and other essential services, and, through an expedited approval process, provided approximately RMB 1.6 billion in financing to enterprises involved in epidemic prevention and control. * iSoftStone donated RMB 10 million to the city of Wuhan. * Modern Land (MOMΛ) has donated RMB 2 million to Wuhan and established a charitable fund pool with a RMB 10 million allocation. Other CCCWA member companies have also been providing assistance to compatriots back home through various channels. The virus is merciless, but the world is full of love; let us stay firm in our resolve to fight the epidemic and win this war without gunsmoke. ## Options for High School Students to Take College Courses: How Does the Running Start Program, Compared with AP/IB, Select Outstanding Washington State High School Students to Advance Directly into College? ## Recently, CCCWA (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) invited special guest Mr. Lei He, Assistant Director of International Education at Bellevue College, to introduce the community to one of the options for local high school students to take college courses: Running Start. The Running Start program began in 1990, sponsored by the Washington State government with assistance from the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, with the goal of selecting outstanding Washington State high school students to advance directly into college. For students participating in Running Start on a full-time basis, they no longer take high school classes but instead use college coursework to fulfill the corresponding high school credit requirements; second, full-time participating students can enter college at age 16 and complete their bachelor's degree by age 20, saving 1-2 years of study time; third, students participating in Running Start do not need to pay college tuition, saving 1-2 years of college costs; fourth, students who complete the program enter directly as juniors, giving them a relatively higher acceptance rate than applying as freshmen. Over the past 30 years, the Running Start program has continued to grow, and now at Bellevue College alone, more than 2,500 Running Start students are enrolled, mostly from local high schools on the East Side, having cultivated a large number of outstanding talents for Washington State.
items.body_zh: 原创 CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2020年02月14日 04:20_ __ _ _ _ _ 华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA），是由华盛顿州的中资企业自愿发起组成的非营利性组织。商会旨在为中资企业在美国的交流提供平台，促进中国和美西北地区贸易合作，支持和帮助更多的中资企业对美投资和发展。同时，CCCWA也致力推动社会公益福利事业，过去CCCWA在商会举办的晚宴中特设儿童作品义卖，将所得善款捐赠给美国相关福利机构以资助在美国生活、从小被领养的华裔儿童回到中国寻找亲生父母的活动。 面对当下突如其来的新型冠状病毒感染的肺炎疫情，华盛顿州中国总商会会员在各个领域发挥出了企业社会责任感，积极协调公司海内分支机构进行相关物资采购，并无偿捐赠给有需求的疫情严重的地区。 目前CCCWA理事会单位集结中美两国资源奋力抗击疫情： * 百利药业Systimmune西雅图公司，倾力在北美寻求采购途径,已筹集到医用外科口罩和N95口罩、医用护目镜、医用防护服等，第一批物资已经陆续到达定点捐赠医院(四川省人民医院、四川大学华西第二医院、成都市温江区人民医院、乐山市人民医院、绵阳404医, 湖北武汉市儿童医院和武汉亚洲心脏病医院) * 工商银行（ICBC）迅速调拨人民币3000多万元现金，保障交通运输、医院等有序运行，同时通过绿色通道，为疫情防控领域相关企业提供融资约16亿元. * 软通动力（iSoftStone) 向武汉市捐款人民币1000万元. * 当代置业（MOMΛ）已经向武汉捐赠人民币200万元，并设立1000万元慈善基金额度资金池. CCCWA其他单位也已经通过各种渠道方式为国内同胞们提供帮助。 病魔无情，人间有爱，坚定信心对抗疫情，打赢这场没有硝烟的战争。 ## 高中生学习大学课程的选择：与AP/IB 相比较，Running Start项目如何选拔华盛顿州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学. ## 近期， CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会特邀嘉宾Bellevue College 国际教育部主管 Mr Lei He (Assistant Director of International Education from Bellevue College) 为社区介绍本地高中生学习大学课程的选择项目之一：Running Start. Running Start项目始于1990年，由华盛顿州政府主持、比尔盖茨基金会协助，目的是选拔华州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学. 参加Running Start项目，如果是全日制，学生就不再上高中课程，而是以大学课程抵相应的高中课程；2是全日制参与的学生完全可以做到16岁入大学，20岁本科毕业，节省学生1-2年的学习时间；3是参与Running Start项目，学生无需支付大学学费，节省1-2年大学费用；4是学生完成学习直入大三，比申请大一录取率相对高。30年以来，Running Start项目规模不断扩大，现在仅在贝尔维学院，就有超过2,500名Running Start项目学生就读，主要来自本地东区(East Side)的高中学生，为华州培养了大批优秀人才.

items.title_en: Standing Together Against the Epidemic, United in Overcoming Hardship
items.title_zh: 齐心协力抗疫情，众志成城渡难关
items.summary_en: The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit organization voluntarily founded by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State. The Chamber aims to provide a platform for Chinese-invested enterprises to network in the US, promote trade cooperation between China and the US Pacific Northwest, and support and help more Chinese enterprises invest and grow in the US. CCCWA is also committed to advancing public welfare causes.
items.summary_zh: 华 盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA），是由华盛顿州的中资企业自愿发起组成的非营利性组织。商会旨在为中资企业在美国的交流提供平台，促进中国和美西北地区贸易合作，支持和帮助更多的中资企业对美投资和发展。同时，CCCWA也致力推动社会公益福利事业，过去CCCWA在商会举办的晚宴中特设儿童作品义卖，将所得善款捐赠给美国相关福利机构以资助在美国生活、从小被领养的华裔儿童回到中国寻找亲生父母的活动。...
items.body_en:
The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) is a nonprofit organization voluntarily founded by Chinese-invested enterprises in Washington State. The Chamber aims to provide a platform for Chinese-invested enterprises to network in the US, promote trade cooperation between China and the US Pacific Northwest, and support and help more Chinese enterprises invest and grow in the US. CCCWA is also committed to advancing public welfare causes — in past Chamber galas, children's artwork charity sales raised funds donated to US welfare organizations supporting adopted Chinese-American children in reconnecting with their birth parents in China.

In the face of the sudden outbreak of the novel coronavirus pneumonia epidemic, CCCWA members across many industries have stepped up with corporate social responsibility, actively coordinating with their companies' domestic and overseas branches to procure supplies and donate them free of charge to hard-hit regions in need.

Currently, CCCWA board member companies are mobilizing resources across both China and the US to fight the epidemic: ICBC quickly allocated over RMB 30 million in cash to ensure the smooth operation of transportation, hospitals, and other essential services, and provided approximately RMB 1.6 billion in financing through an expedited approval process for companies involved in epidemic prevention and control. iSoftStone donated RMB 10 million to the city of Wuhan. Systimmune donated medical protective supplies to Sichuan Provincial People's Hospital, West China Second University Hospital of Sichuan University, Wenjiang District People's Hospital in Chengdu, Leshan People's Hospital, Mianyang 404 Hospital, Wuhan Children's Hospital, and Wuhan Asia Heart Hospital. MOMA (Modern Land) has already donated RMB 2 million to Wuhan and established a charitable fund pool of RMB 10 million. Other CCCWA member companies have also provided assistance to compatriots back home through various channels. The virus is merciless, but there is love in this world — let us hold firm and united to defeat this war without gunsmoke.

items.title_en: CCCWA Delegation Visits San Francisco
items.title_zh: CCCWA代表团访问旧金山
items.body_en: _November 22, 2019, 03:04_ __ _ _ _ _ On November 18, 2019, a delegation from CCCWA (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) traveled to San Francisco for talks with the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California. Mr. Kang Jiande, President of the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California and head of the West Coast market for Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (USA), introduced the association's development. Mr. Kang noted that the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California currently has 197 member companies spanning finance, real estate, transportation, telecommunications, technology, logistics, law firms, new energy, media, and other industries, and operates six professional committees: the Real Estate Committee, Finance Committee, New Energy Committee, High-Tech Committee, Urban Institutions Alliance, and Infrastructure Committee. The association is committed to serving Chinese enterprises in Northern California and the surrounding consular district, building a platform for communication and exchange, and continually strengthening the association's local influence. Mr. Zhang Zailing, General Manager of China Youth Travel Service USA and a two-term former president of the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California, together with Mr. Liu Yang, President of the San Francisco branch of Bank of Communications and a representative of a member company, shared their management insights on the governance and development of the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California as a nonprofit organization. Representatives from both sides engaged in in-depth discussion on topics such as the development of Chinese enterprises in the United States, the organization of member activities at nonprofit organizations, and resource-sharing between Chinese-American entrepreneurs in Seattle and San Francisco. Ms. Lily Lyu, President of CCCWA (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State), introduced the general situation and future development direction of CCCWA, and expressed hope for cross-regional collaboration with the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California in the future, so that the two organizations can jointly leverage their respective influence, further establish a positive image for Chinese enterprises, and contribute concrete work to the development of US-China trade and economic relations. (CCCWA and the Chinese Enterprises Association of Northern California hold talks) That same day, the CCCWA delegation and the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club also visited the headquarters of Propriis, a real estate development company, where they held a discussion with the Silicon Valley Sand Hill Real Estate Investment Club. At the discussion, Mr. Carlson Chan, President of Propriis, introduced the projects the company is currently developing and managing. Ms. Ocean Pan, CEO of the Silicon Valley Sand Hill Real Estate Investment Club, introduced the club's general background, and participants engaged in in-depth discussion on hot topics in real estate investment and development, including land prices, cost of capital, and development cost control. Ms. Lily Lyu, President of CCCWA, introduced two high-end apartment projects currently under development by Tuohong USA Development Management Company — The Emerald and Mira Flats — and, from the perspective of return-on-investment analysis, also introduced development land in Bellevue and land at the University of Washington acquired under the leadership of the Tuohong USA Real Estate Fund. Developers and investors in the San Francisco area expressed strong interest in real estate projects in the Greater Seattle area, noting that land prices in Greater Seattle still have considerable room to rise, and expressed hope to visit the Greater Seattle area for investment consideration in the future. The two clubs agreed to hold their next resource-matching discussion in Seattle. (CCCWA and the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club hold discussions with the Sand Hill Real Estate Club)
items.body_zh: _2019年11月22日 03:04_ __ _ _ _ _ 2019 年 11 月 18 日， CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会代表团一行到访旧金山与北加州中国企业协会进行会谈。 北加州中国企业协会会长、中国工商银行（美国）美西市场负责人康建德先生介绍了北加州中国企业协会的发展。康建德先生提到，北加州中国企业协会目前共有会员企业 197 家，涉及金融、地产、交通、通讯、科技、物流、律所、新能源、传媒等多个行业，下设 6 大专业委员会：房地产委员会、金融委员会、新能源委员会、高科技委员会、城市机构联盟以及基础设施委员会。协会致力于为北加州及领区中国企业提供服务，搭建沟通和交流平台，不断提升协会在当地的影响力。 曾在北加州中国企业协会担任两任会长的美国中青旅总经理张再龄先生和会员单位代表交通银行旧金山分行行长刘洋先生，分享了关于北加州中国企业协会作为非营利组织治理与发展的管理心得。 双方会员代表就中国企业在美发展、非营利组织的会员活动组织、西雅图与旧金山两个城市的华裔企业家资源共享等问题进行了深度的沟通交流。 华盛顿州中国总商会会长吕莉莉女士介绍了华盛顿州中国总商会的基本情况和未来发展方向，希望未来能与北加州中国企业协会跨区域联合发展，共同发挥各自影响，进一步树立中国企业良好形象，以实实在在的工作，为中美两国经贸关系发展贡献力量。 （华盛顿州中国总商会与北加州中国企业协会进行会谈） 当日，华盛顿州中国总商会及西雅图房地产投资俱乐部代表团还到访 Propriis 房地产开发公司总部，并在这里与硅谷沙丘地产投资俱乐部进行了交流座谈。 座谈会上， Propriis 房地产开发公司总裁 Carlson Chan 先生介绍了公司正在开发管理的项目。硅谷沙丘地产投资俱乐部首席执行官 Ocean Pan 女士介绍了沙丘地产投资俱乐部的基本情况，大家对房地产投资及开发过程中的土地价格、资金成本、开发成本控制等热点问题进行了深度交流。 CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会会长吕莉莉女士介绍了拓宏美国开发管理公司正在开发中的 The Emerald 及 Mira Flats 两个高端公寓项目，也从投资回报分析的角度介绍了拓宏美国房地产基金主导收购的 Bellevue 开发土地、华盛顿大学开发土地等项目。旧金山当地的开发商及投资人均表示对大西雅图地区的房地产项目有浓厚的兴趣，认为大西雅图地区的土地价格仍有较大的上涨空间，希望未来有机会到大西雅图地区考察投资。两个俱乐部约定将在西雅图举行下次双方资源对接座谈会。 （华盛顿州中国总商会及西雅图房地产投资俱乐部与沙丘地产俱乐部进行座谈）

items.title_en: CCCWA Delegation Attends China-US Agricultural Resources Matchmaking Forum in California
items.title_zh: CCCWA代表团赴加州参加中美农业资源对接论坛活动
items.body_en: _November 22, 2019, 03:04_ __ _ _ _ _ On November 19, 2019, the CCCWA (China Chamber of Commerce in Washington State) delegation participated in the China-US Agricultural Resources Matchmaking and Food Safety Policy Exchange Forum in Sacramento, jointly hosted by the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco, the California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development, and the City of Sacramento. The forum aimed to strengthen the exchange of food safety experience and policy between California and China, promote trade exchange in agricultural products between California and China, and build a bridge for people-to-people exchange between California and China. Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco attended the forum. The Director of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, a California State Assembly member, and a Senior Advisor for International Affairs and Trade at the Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development (GO-Biz) introduced the state of California's agricultural development and California-China agricultural trade. Dr. Wang, a food safety policy expert at UC Davis, was invited to introduce California's food safety policies and their implementation. The exchange forum also featured business matchmaking activities between major California agricultural producers and Chinese-invested enterprises. After the forum concluded, the delegation was invited to visit local companies for on-site inspections. (The CCCWA delegation poses for a photo with Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang) (The CCCWA delegation is invited to tour local companies) (The CCCWA delegation poses for a group photo in front of the venue)
items.body_zh: _2019年11月22日 03:04_ __ _ _ _ _ 2019 年 11 月 19 日，华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在萨克拉门托市参与了由中国驻旧金山总领馆、美国加州商务厅、萨克拉门托市政府联合举办的中美农业资源对接及食品安全政策交流论坛。 此次论坛旨在加强加州与中国双方食品安全相关经验与政策交流、促进加州与中国农业产品贸易交流、并为加州与中国的人文交流搭建桥梁。 中国驻旧金山总领馆杨依杭商务参赞参与此次论坛。加州农业厅厅长、加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（ GoBiz ）国际事务和贸易高级顾问介绍了加州农业发展情况和加州与中国农业贸易情况。加州大学戴维斯分校食品安全政策专家王博士受邀介绍了加州食品安全政策和执行情况。此次交流论坛针对加州主要农产品生产企业与中资企业开展了业务对接活动。论坛结束后代表团受邀赴当地企业进行了实地考察。 （ CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会代表团与杨依杭商务参赞合影留念） （ CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会代表团受邀到当地企业实地考察） （ CCCWA 华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在会场门前合影留念）

items.title_en: Choices for High Schoolers Taking College Courses: How Running Start Compares to AP/IB in Selecting Washington State's Top High Schoolers to Advance Directly to College
items.title_zh: 高中生学习大学课程的选择：与AP/IB 相比较，Running Start项目如何选拔华盛顿州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学.
items.summary_en: Recently, CCCWA invited special guest Mr. Lei He, Assistant Director of International Education at Bellevue College, to introduce the community to one option for local high schoolers to take college courses: the Running Start program.
items.summary_zh: 近期， CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会特邀嘉宾Bellevue College 国际教育部主管 Mr Lei He ( Assistant Director of International Education from Bellevue College)...
items.body_en:
Recently, CCCWA invited special guest Mr. Lei He, Assistant Director of International Education at Bellevue College, to introduce the community to one option for local high schoolers to take college courses: the Running Start program.

The Running Start program began in 1990, led by the Washington State government with assistance from the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, with the goal of selecting outstanding Washington State high schoolers to advance directly into college. In the Running Start program, full-time participating students no longer take high school classes, instead using college courses to fulfill the equivalent high school requirements. Second, full-time participants can enter college at age 16 and graduate with a bachelor's degree by age 20, saving 1–2 years of study time. Third, participants in Running Start pay no college tuition, saving 1–2 years of college costs. Fourth, students who complete the program can enter directly as juniors, which carries a relatively higher acceptance rate than applying as a freshman. Over the past 30 years, the Running Start program has continued to grow — at Bellevue College alone, there are now more than 2,500 Running Start students enrolled, mostly from local Eastside high schools, cultivating a large pool of outstanding talent for Washington State.
items.body_zh:
近期， CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会特邀嘉宾Bellevue College 国际教育部主管 Mr Lei He (Assistant Director of International Education from Bellevue College) 为社区介绍本地高中生学习大学课程的选择项目之一：Running Start.

Running Start项目始于1990年，由华盛顿州政府主持、比尔盖茨基金会协助，目的是选拔华州优秀的高中生跳级直入大学. 参加Running Start项目，如果是全日制，学生就不再上高中课程，而是以大学课程抵相应的高中课程；2是全日制参与的学生完全可以做到16岁入大学，20岁本科毕业，节省学生1-2年的学习时间；3是参与Running Start项目，学生无需支付大学学费，节省1-2年大学费用；4是学生完成学习直入大三，比申请大一录取率相对高。30年以来，Running Start项目规模不断扩大，现在仅在贝尔维学院，就有超过2,500名Running Start项目学生就读，主要来自本地东区(East Side)的高中学生，为华州培养了大批优秀人才.

The forum aimed to strengthen the exchange of food safety experience and policy between California and China, promote agricultural trade between the two, and build a bridge for cultural exchange.
items.summary_zh: 2019年11月19日，华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在萨克拉门托市参与了由美国加州商务厅、萨克拉门托市政府联合举办的中美农业资源对接及食品安全政策交流论坛。此次论坛旨在加强加州与中国双方食品安全相关经验与政策交流、促进加州与中国农业产品贸易交流、并为加州与中国的人文交流搭建桥梁。...
items.body_en:
On November 19, 2019, a CCCWA delegation attended the US-China Agricultural Resources Matchmaking and Food Safety Policy Exchange Forum in Sacramento, jointly hosted by the California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development (GO-Biz) and the City of Sacramento. The forum aimed to strengthen the exchange of food safety experience and policy between California and China, promote agricultural product trade between California and China, and build a bridge for cultural exchange between the two. Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco attended the forum. The Director of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, a California State Assemblymember, and a Senior Advisor for International Affairs and Trade at GO-Biz introduced California's agricultural development and its agricultural trade with China. Dr. Wang, a food safety policy expert from UC Davis, was invited to present on California's food safety policy and enforcement. The exchange forum also facilitated business matchmaking between major California agricultural producers and Chinese-invested enterprises. After the forum, the delegation was invited to tour local businesses.

Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco and UC Davis food safety policy expert Dr. Wang speaking at the forum

A California State Assemblymember and a Senior Advisor for International Affairs and Trade at GO-Biz speaking at the forum

The CCCWA delegation was invited to tour local businesses

The CCCWA delegation poses for a photo in front of the venue
items.body_zh:
2019年11月19日，华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在萨克拉门托市参与了由美国加州商务厅、萨克拉门托市政府联合举办的中美农业资源对接及食品安全政策交流论坛。此次论坛旨在加强加州与中国双方食品安全相关经验与政策交流、促进加州与中国农业产品贸易交流、并为加州与中国的人文交流搭建桥梁。中国驻旧金山总领馆杨依杭商务参赞参与此次论坛。加州农业厅厅长、加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）国际事务和贸易高级顾问介绍了加州农业发展情况和加州与中国农业贸易情况。加州大学戴维斯分校食品安全政策专家王博士受邀介绍了加州食品安全政策和执行情况。此次交流论坛针对加州主要农产品生产企业与中资企业开展了业务对接活动。论坛结束后代表团受邀赴当地企业进行了实地考察。

中国驻旧金山总领馆杨依杭商务参赞、加州大学戴维斯分校食品安全政策专家王博士在论坛上发言在论坛上发言

加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）国际事务和贸易高级顾问在论坛上发言

CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会代表团受邀到当地企业实地考察

CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会代表团在会场门前合影留念

items.title_en: CCCWA Council Member Seattle Real Estate Investment Club Celebrates Its 4th Anniversary
items.title_zh: CCCWA理事单位西雅图地产投资俱乐部成立四周年庆典
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _November 1, 2019, 06:50_ On October 26, 2019, the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club — a CCCWA council member organization — held a celebration marking its 4th anniversary. In addition to numerous club members, guests at the celebration included friends from the Washington State China Chamber of Commerce (CCCWA), the 808 Golf Club, the Seattle Entrepreneurs Club, and other associations and organizations. The Seattle Real Estate Investment Club was founded in 2015 as a nonprofit organization registered in Washington State. Its membership consists of real estate investors, development and management companies, design firms, attorneys, accountants, real estate brokers, and other professionals across the real estate industry's supply chain. In the four years since its founding, members have voluntarily teamed up on the club's platform to successfully invest in a number of commercial real estate projects. The celebration was co-hosted by rotating club chairs Ms. Li Xiaoyan and Ms. Zhang Xiaohong. During the event, several members shared the achievements and lessons they had gained over the past year. The Seattle Real Estate Investment Club is also actively engaged in community charitable work; at the celebration, attorney Cai Qing introduced the Eastside Arts Center charitable project. The celebration proceeded in a warm and friendly atmosphere, with attendees expressing how much they enjoyed the opportunity — and how grateful they were — to make new friends and business partners through the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club's 4th anniversary. All extended their wishes for continued success for both the Seattle Real Estate Investment Club and the Washington State China Chamber of Commerce (CCCWA), and for their continued delivery of quality support and service to members.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年11月01日 06:50_ __ _ _ _ _ 2019 年 10 月 26 日， CCCWA 理事单位西雅图地产投资俱乐部举行了成立四周年庆典活动。参加此次庆典活动的嘉宾除了众多俱乐部会员以外，还有来自华盛顿州中国总商会（ CCCWA ）， 808 高尔夫球俱乐部，西雅图创业协会等协会和单位的会员朋友们。 西雅图房地产俱乐部成立于 2015 年，是在华盛顿州注册成立的非盈利机构；其会员由房地产投资人、开发管理公司、设计公司、律师、会计师、房地产经纪人以及地产专业上下游从业人士组成。俱乐部成立四年以来，会员们已经在其平台上自愿组合，成功投资了多个商业地产项目。 西雅图地产投资俱乐部轮值主席李晓艳女士、张小红女士共同主持此次庆典。庆典活动过程中，多位会员分享了在过去一年中取得的成就和收获的心得。 西雅图房地产投资俱乐部还积极参与社区公益事业，庆典当日蔡清律师介绍了东区艺术中心公益项目。 整场庆典活动在友好和热烈的气氛下进行，参与庆典的嘉宾们纷纷表示很享受也很感谢能够通过西雅图房地产投资俱乐部成立四周年这个契机结交到新朋友和商业合作伙伴。共同祝愿西雅图房地产投资俱乐部和华盛顿州中国总商会（ CCCWA ）协会平台越办越好，为会员朋友们持续提供优质帮助与服务。

items.title_en: Notice on the China-Funded Enterprises and California Agricultural Resources Matchmaking Conference and California Food Safety Policy Exchange
items.title_zh: 关于举办中资企业与加州农业资源对接会暨加州食品安全政策交流会的通知
items.body_en: San Francisco Business Bulletin San Francisco Business Bulletin [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _October 29, 2019, 10:53_ To all relevant China-funded enterprises: In order to further serve China-funded enterprises, help them connect with agricultural resources in California, and promote local-city cooperation and agricultural trade between China and the United States, the Economic and Commercial Office of the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco will co-host, together with the Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development (GoBiz) and the government of Sacramento — California's state capital — a matchmaking conference between China-funded enterprises and California agricultural resources, alongside a California food safety policy exchange. The event will feature the Secretary of the California Department of Food and Agriculture, members of the California State Legislature, and a senior advisor for international affairs and trade at GoBiz, who will introduce California's agricultural development and China-California agricultural trade. Experts from the University of California, Davis will also present on California's food safety policies and their implementation. The event will arrange business matchmaking between major California agricultural producers and China-funded enterprises, and will organize site visits for China-funded enterprises to relevant local companies. China-funded enterprises with an interest in attending — including but not limited to those in agriculture, food and beverage, and e-commerce — are welcome to join. Details are as follows: **Time:** November 19, 2019. **Location:** California State Capitol (10th and L Streets, State Capitol, Sacramento, CA 95814). **Registration:** Please submit the following to the Economic and Commercial Office by November 8: 1. Attendee information (title, name, contact details, etc.); 2. An English-language company profile (1–2 pages). **Contact:** Wang Han, Deputy Consul, Economic and Commercial Office of the Consulate-General. Email: wanghan@mofcom.gov.cn. Phone: (415) 852-5975. Economic and Commercial Office, Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco. October 22, 2019
items.body_zh: 旧金山商务通 旧金山商务通 [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年10月29日 10:53_ __ _ _ _ _ 各有关中资企业： 为进一步服务中资企业，帮助中资企业对接加利福尼亚州农业资源，促进中美地方城市合作和农产品贸易合作，中国驻旧金山总领馆经商处将联合加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）及加州首府萨克拉门托市政府共同举办中资企业与加州农业资源对接会暨加州食品安全政策交流会。届时，将邀请加州农业厅厅长、加州议会议员、加州州长商业和经济发展办公室（GoBiz）国际事务和贸易高级顾问介绍加州农业发展情况和加州与中国农业贸易情况，邀请加州大学戴维斯分校专家介绍加州食品安全政策和执行情况，安排加州主要农产品生产企业与中资企业开展业务对接，并组织中资企业赴有关当地企业实地考察。欢迎感兴趣的中资企业（包括但不限于农业、食品饮料、电子商务等行业）参加。具体安排如下： **时间：** 2019年11月19日 **地点：** California State Capitol (10th and L Streets, State Capitol, Sacramento, CA 95814) **报名方式：** 请各企业于11月8日前将1.参加人员信息（职务、姓名、联系方式等）；2.企业英文简介（1-2页）报送至经商处。 **联系人：** 总领馆经商处 王瀚 副领事 邮箱： wanghan@mofcom.gov.cn 电话：（415）852-5975 驻旧金山总领馆经商处 2019年10月22日

items.title_en: Commercial Counselor Yang Yihang and Deputy Consul Zhang Taiming Visit CCCWA Member Companies
items.title_zh: 杨依杭商务参赞和张泰铭副领事走访CCCWA部分会员企业
items.body_en: _October 29, 2019, 10:53_ On October 24, 2019, Mr. Yang Yihang, Commercial Counselor at the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco, and Deputy Consul Zhang Taiming attended an entrepreneurs' roundtable hosted by the Washington State China Chamber of Commerce (CCCWA), and afterward visited several of the Chamber's member companies. (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang engage in warm conversation with business representatives from the greater Seattle area.) The roundtable was held at the "Meilidu" luxury condominiums, a project developed by member company Tuohong USA Real Estate Development Corporation. Tuohong USA was founded in Seattle in 2014, with its core business in the investment and development management of large-scale commercial and residential real estate projects. The Meilidu luxury condominium project is located at the heart of Bellevue, at the intersection of 103rd Street and 10th Street. Phase One consists of 6 stories and 162 units, with a total floor area of approximately 110,000 square feet, and was completed and occupied in July 2018. Phase Two is planned as a 17-story tower, with construction slated to begin in 2020. (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang pose for a group photo with greater Seattle business representatives in front of the Meilidu luxury condominiums.) (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang pose for a group photo with greater Seattle business representatives on the rooftop of the Meilidu luxury condominiums.) The roundtable was moderated by CCCWA President Ms. Lu Lili and Seattle Real Estate Investment Club Chair Ms. Li Xiaoyan, and Counselor Yang engaged in in-depth discussion with the entrepreneur representatives in attendance. Counselor Yang shared his views and outlook on the recent state of China's economy, the development of China-U.S. economic and trade relations, and the services and support the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco can offer to businesses in the greater Seattle area. Representatives from joint development platforms including the Seattle Entrepreneurs Club (SEC), the Hong Kong Chamber of Commerce, and the China-America Chamber of Commerce also attended the roundtable. After the roundtable concluded, Counselor Yang, together with President Lu and the business representatives, visited two Chamber member companies: MZA Architecture and Onelin Capital. MZA Architecture is renowned worldwide for its outstanding achievements in mixed-use complexes, office buildings, wellness centers, hospitality design, residential design, and urban design. The firm's founder, Ming Zhang, is a Fellow of the American Institute of Architects — the first mainland Chinese architect to receive this honor since the founding of the People's Republic of China. Mr. Zhang will join CCCWA's panel of expert advisors, providing pro bono guidance to member companies in the real estate industry. (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang pose for a group photo with greater Seattle business representatives, together with MZA Architecture founder Ming Zhang and staff.) Onelin Capital is a company of considerable strength, engaged in real estate development, venture capital, and fund investment, while also operating incubator, co-working, and co-living businesses. As Onelin restructures its North American corporate framework, it is rapidly expanding its North American operations. (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang engage in warm conversation with the core Onelin Capital team, joined by greater Seattle business representatives.) (Counselor Yang and Consul Zhang pose for a group photo with the core Onelin Capital team and greater Seattle business representatives.) Mr. Yang Yihang praised the member companies visited for their outstanding contributions to local community economic development and employment, and spoke highly of CCCWA's friendly cooperation with nonprofit organizations across various industries and fields in both China and the Seattle area. He noted that such cooperation has, to a great extent, promoted the development of Chinese and American businesses, exchange and collaboration, and the sharing of talent and information, and stated that the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco will continue to step up its efforts to provide greater support to Chinese and American businesses through the chamber platform.
items.body_zh: _2019年10月29日 10:53_ __ _ _ _ _ 2019 年 10 月 24 日，中国驻旧金山总领馆经济商务参赞杨依杭先生与张泰铭副领事出席了由华盛顿州中国总商会（ CCCWA ）举办的企业家座谈活动，并在会后走访了商会的部分会员企业。 （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们热切交谈） 座谈活动在会员企业 \- 拓宏美国房地产开发公司开发的美丽都市高端公寓举行。拓宏美国 2014 年成立于西雅图，核心业务为大型商用及民用房地产项目的投资和开发管理。 美丽都高端公寓项目位于贝尔维尤市心脏位置 \--103 街和 10 街交汇处。项目一期 6 层共计 162 套公寓，建筑面积约为 11 万平方尺，已于 2018 年 7 月竣工入住。项目二期计划建造 17 层，计划于 2020 年开工建设。 （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们在美丽都高端公寓前合影留念） （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们在美丽都高端公寓天台合影留念） 华盛顿州中国总商会（ CCCWA ）会长吕莉莉女士和西雅图地产投资俱乐部主席李晓艳女士主持座谈活动，杨依杭参赞同参与活动的企业家代表们进行了深度的沟通交流。 杨参赞对近期中国经济形势，中美两国经济贸易关系发展，以及中国驻旧金山总领馆对大西雅图地区企业所能提供的服务与帮助等方面分享了看法与展望。 西雅图创业协会（ SEC ）、香港商会、中美总商会等联合发展平台也派代表参加了座谈会。 座谈会结束后，杨参赞与吕莉莉会长及商界代表们一起走访了 MZA Architecture ， Onelin Capital 两家商会会员企业。 MZA Architecture 建筑设计公司，在世界范围内以其在综合体、办公建筑、养生中心，酒店设计、住宅设计及都市设计的卓越成就而闻名。公司的创立者张铭是美国建筑师学院院士，他是新中国成立后第一位大陆华人建筑师获此殊荣。未来张铭先生将参加 CCCWA 专家智囊团，义务为地产行业的会员单位提供服务。 （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们同 MZA Architecture 创始人张铭院士及员工合影留念） Onelin Capital 实力雄厚，从事房地产开发、风险投资和基金投资，同时拥有孵化器、共享办公、共享居住等业务。随着 Onelin 在北美公司架构的重新整合， Onelin 正迅速扩大北美业务。 （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们同 Onelin Capital 核心团队热切交谈） （杨参赞和张领事与大西雅图地区商界代表们同 Onelin Capital 核心团队合影留念） 杨依杭先生称赞走访的几家会员企业为当地社区经济发展、就业等方面作出的杰出贡献，并高度评价 CCCWA 与中国及西雅图地区的不同行业和领域的非盈利组织开展的友好合作，这些合作更大程度上促进了中美企业发展、交流合作、人才及信息共享，表示中国驻旧金山总领馆将持续加大力度通过商会平台为中美两国企业提供更多帮助。

items.title_en: CCCWA Special Seminar on Labor Law Standards and Regulations
items.title_zh: CCCWA 劳工法标准条例专题讲座
items.body_en: Lani Cao Law Office, the Chief Legal Counsel for the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State(CCCWA), recently invited attorney Mr. John Lee to give a seminar to the local community regarding labor and employment law. Those in attendance were very appreciative of the professional advice shared by Mr. Lee. We hope for more opportunities in the future to host similar seminars with informative special topics from our community's leading professionals.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年10月17日 04:56_ __ _ _ _ _ 近日， 华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）法律总顾问曹霄鹤律师事务所特邀律师John Lee 为社区作劳工法标准条例专题讲座。 出席讲座的人士们非常感谢律师提供的专业信息，期待今后有机会参与更多社区组织的专题讲座，以便获取最新的专业信息。

items.title_en: CCCWA Invites U.S. Professionals to Explain the "1031 Tax-Deferred Exchange," a Must-Know in Real Estate Transactions
items.title_zh: CCCWA特邀美国专业人士解析房地产买卖过程中须知的“1031税务递延交换”
items.body_en: Speaker: Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, Frist American Exchange Company · What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications? · Who is considered a qualified intermediary? · Property identification rules · How vesting should be held and related party issues · Reverse and improvement type exchanges · What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange · Lesser known exchange alternatives - Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121 and vacation homes; and examples of how to apply them Everyone enthusiastically attended the seminar that day.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年10月17日 04:56_ __ _ _ _ _ 买卖物业时，“1031 税务递延交换”是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略 ，“1031”是对投资收益有很大影响的一个税务政策，如同借用政府的免息资金去做地产投资，也可说是杠杆原理的一种。 华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA与西雅图地产俱乐部近期邀请First American 专家做一次有关房地产省税利器1031交换条款的讲座: 内容包括：
