items.title_en: Seattle | In the Face of Market Turmoil, How Do We Hedge Risk?
items.title_zh: 西雅图 | 市场动荡面前，我们如何对冲风险？
items.body_en: Maxim North America Maxim North America [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _September 12, 2019 06:44_ __ _ _ _ _ - This article is for informational exchange only and does not constitute any transaction advice. - A lecture by CCCWA member organization "Maxim Financial." 2019 was undoubtedly a turbulent year for the global economy. Trade disputes between regions intensified, and the IMF once again lowered its forecast for this year's world economic growth in its latest report. Affected by the inversion of short- and long-term bond yields and the U.S.-China trade dispute, U.S. stocks in August just experienced their largest monthly decline of the year. Facing a possible impending global economic downturn, everyone faces a severe test: **How do you protect your assets amid market turmoil?** 01 The TINA Effect. TINA is the abbreviation for **"There is no alternative,"** meaning **"there is no better choice."** In today's investment field, TINA is often used to describe investors' **"less-than-ideal asset allocation"**—meaning that when investors cannot find quality investment targets, they have to put their money into certain assets because other targets perform even worse. The resulting **TINA effect** occurs when enough people in the market hold a similar mindset and large amounts of capital pour into a few investment targets, ultimately driving those targets up without any other support. This July, although various U.S. economic indicators were falling, the S&P 500 index rose against the current, at one point reaching a historic high of **3,000 points.** Such gains seemed exciting, yet nearly **19% of the rise** was supported by just four tech stocks: Facebook, Microsoft, Apple, and Amazon. This shows that **the market's capital could not find other more attractive products and could only keep concentrating funds into these four stocks;** the TINA effect ultimately drove up their prices. For ordinary individual investors, the stocks of the four big tech companies might still be a passable choice. But for employees working at tech companies, such asset allocation is clearly **too concentrated,** and they urgently need other investment targets to **diversify risk.** 02 Allocate alternative assets to effectively diversify risk. **Risk management** has always been a key focus for institutional investors. The more they face a turbulent market, the more cautious institutional investors with trillions of dollars become. Recently, they have put more attention on risk control in **asset allocation,** trying to minimize possible losses. To effectively diversify risk, in their asset allocation—besides the stocks and bonds familiar to individual investors—**alternative investment** plays an indispensable role. Alternative assets come in many kinds, covering different industries and investment vehicles, including **private equity funds, hedge funds,** and **real estate funds.** Compared with traditional assets, alternative assets can usually bring investors excess returns under **superior professional investment decisions** and **risk management.** The market has proven that alternative assets can provide **long-term stable returns** and **effective risk diversification.** **So—what kind of alternative investment is suitable for individual investors? How can individuals invest in alternative assets?** CCCWA member organization "Maxim Financial" will present a two-day lecture on alternative investment on September 12 and 13, 2019. You will learn: * How to correctly understand **risk exposure** and reduce volatility in asset returns? * In **asset allocation,** how can small individual investors **learn from institutional investors**? * What is alternative investment, and what are the benefits of allocating to it? * Hedging weapons for a down market—**distressed debt** & **life settlements.** **Lecture Times:** Wednesday, September 11, 6:30-8:30 pm; Thursday, September 12, 6:30-8:30 pm. **Lecture Location:** 325 118th Avenue Southeast, Suite 208, Bellevue, WA 98005. **Registration:** Scroll to the end, click **Read Original,** and register on Eventbrite: bit.ly/mxinvest, or scan the QR code below and **reply "Seattle" to register for the lecture.** Maxim Financial, based on internet platform technology, connects with **high-quality global asset management firms** to bring alternative investment opportunities—once available only to institutions—to individual investors, helping them achieve **diversified** asset allocation. Maxim Financial's **core team members** all previously served at major global financial institutions such as UBS, Merrill Lynch, Barclays, Deutsche Bank, and Partners Capital. As of 2018, more than **1,000 active qualified investors** had made alternative asset allocations through Maxim Financial, with cumulative transaction volume exceeding **$150 million.** **▼ Related Product Introduction ▼** DMG South Carolina Student Apartment Development Fund · LSAF Life Settlement Fund · B-REIT Blackstone Real Estate Investment Trust. **Follow us to unlock more investment information. Maxim Financial offers free customized financial investment knowledge lectures on an ongoing basis. If your company or organization has investment guidance needs, you're welcome to message "lecture cooperation" on our official account or contact our WeChat customer service.** For details, see the reference links: https://www.nytimes.com/2019/07/11/business/stock-market-record.html https://www.wsj.com/articles/tech-rally-powers-record-gains-for-stocks-11563701401 https://www.ft.com/content/364e380a-277c-11e4-be5a-00144feabdc0 https://www.investopedia.com/terms/t/tina-there-no-alternative.asp **CCCWA**
items.body_zh: 美信北美 美信北美 [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年09月12日 06:44_ __ _ _ _ _ \- 本文仅为信息交流之用，不构成任何交易建议。- CCCWA会员单位“美信金融”讲座 > 2019年无疑是全球经济形势动荡的一年。地区之间的贸易争端愈演愈烈、世界银行（IMF）在最新的报告中再次下调对今年世界经济增长的预期。 > > 受到长短期债券收益率倒挂、中美贸易争端影响，8月的美股刚刚经历今年以来最大月度跌幅。 > > 面对可能即将发生的全球经济下行周期，每一个人都在面临着严峻的考验： **如何在市场动荡中守护住自己的资产？** 01 TINA效应 TINA是 **“There is no alternative”** 的缩写，翻译成中文指的是 **“没有更好的选择”** 。 在今天的投资领域，TINA常常被用来形容投资者 **“不够理想的资产配置”** ，意思是：当投资人无法找到优质的投资标的时，不得不将资金投入于一些资产中，因为其他的投资标的表现更差。 而由此引发的 **TINA效应** ， 即是当市场上有足够多的人都保持着类似的心态时，大量资金涌入少数投资标的，最终导致该标的在没有其他助推的情况下上涨。 今年7月，尽管美国的各项经济数据都在下跌，标准普尔500指数却逆流而上，一度站上 **3000点** 的历史高位。这样的涨幅看似振奋人心，然而其中有近 **19%的上涨** 都是靠Facebook、Microsoft、苹果和Amazon这四支科技股支撑起来的。 这表明， **市场上的资金找不到其他更吸引人的商品，只能将资金不断集中地投入这四支股票之中** ，TINA效应最终推高了他们的价格。 对于普通个人投资者来说，四大科技公司的股票或许仍旧是一个还过得去的选择。 但对于就职于科技公司的员工来说，这样的资产配置显然 **过于集中** ， 急需其他投资标的以 **分散风险** 。 02 配置另类资产，有效分散风险 **风险管控** ，一直是机构投资者的关注重点。 越是面对震荡的市场，拥有上万亿美金的机构投资者就越谨慎。近一段时间以来，他们将更多的注意力放在 **资产配置** 的风险控管上，试图把有可能的损失降到最低。 为了有效分散风险，在他们的资产配置中，除了个人投资者所熟悉的股票和债券以外， **另类投资（Alternative Investment）** 更是不可或缺的角色。 另类资产种类繁多，涵盖不同产业及投资工具，类型包括 **私募基金** ， **对冲基金** ， **房地产基金** 等。 与传统资产相比，另类资产通常可以在 **更优的专业投资决策** 和 **风险管理** 下，为投资人带来超额回报。 市场证明，另类资产可以提供 **长期稳定收益** 和 ** **有效风险分散** 。 ** **那么——** **什么样的另类投资适合个人投资者？** **个人如何投资另类资产？** CCCWA会员单位“美信金融”讲座 将于2019年9月12日、9月13日 连续两日带来另类投资相关讲座 你将了解到： * _ 如何正确理解 ** **风险敞口，** ** 降低资产收益上的波动？ _ * _ ** **资产配置** ** _ _ 方面， _ _ 小额个人投资者如何 _ _ ** **向机构投资者学习** ** _ _ ？ _ * _ 什么是另类投资？配置另类投资有什么好处？ _ * _市场下行的对冲武器 ——_ _ ** **不良资产债 ** ** _ _ & _ _ ** **保单贴现** ** _ **讲座时间** **** 9月11日 周三 晚上 6:30-8:30 9月12日 周四 晚上 6:30-8:30 ****讲座** 地点 ** **** 325 118th Avenue Southeast, Suite 208 Bellevue, WA 98005 **报名方式** 拉到文末，点击 **阅读原文** ，进入Eventbrite报名： bit.ly/mxinvest 或扫描下方二维码， **回复“ **西雅图** ”，报名参加讲座。 ** * * * 美信金融基于互联网平台技术，对接 **高质量全球资产管理公司** ，将原本只有机构才能参与的另类投资机会，带给广大个人投资者，帮助实现 **多元分散** 的资产配置。 美信金融 **核心团队成员** 均曾服务于瑞银，美林，巴克莱，德意志银行，Partners Capital等全球各大金融机构。 截至2018年，有超过 ** **1000名活跃** ** ** **的合格投资人** ** 通过美信金融进行了另类资产配置，累计交易规模超过 **1.5亿美元** 。 **长** **按** **关** **注** **解锁更多投资资讯** **美信金融长期免费定制金融投资知识讲座。** **如果您所在的公司或组织有投资指导需求,** **欢迎在公众号后台留言“讲座合作”或联系微信客服** 详情请见参考链接： https://www.nytimes.com/2019/07/11/business/stock-market-record.html https://www.wsj.com/articles/tech-rally-powers-record-gains-for- stocks-11563701401?fbclid=IwAR2hdAMeFNE_C5ibxSRB8ojEdX_31Ti9R6PuSJpOiEGco1mToowCapG36_8 https://www.ft.com/content/364e380a-277c-11e4-be5a-00144feabdc0 https://www.investopedia.com/terms/t/tina-there-no-alternative.asp **CCCWA**

items.title_en: Dance Drama "The Butterfly Lovers" (Liang Shanbo and Zhu Yingtai)
items.title_zh: 舞劇《梁山伯與祝英台》
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _August 21, 2019 10:04_ __ _ _ _ _ On the occasion of the 40th anniversary of the establishment of U.S.-China diplomatic relations, the American Asian Performing Arts Theatre (AAPAT), the Beijing Dance Academy, and the Seattle Huaxing Arts Troupe will jointly present a dance drama adapted from "The Butterfly Lovers" (Liang Shanbo and Zhu Yingtai), one of China's four great folk love legends. Li Hengda, director of the Seattle Huaxing Arts Troupe and artistic director of AAPAT, was invited by the Beijing Dance Academy to serve as screenwriter and chief director to complete the creation of the dance drama "The Butterfly Lovers" for the academy. This dance drama is a National Arts Fund project and won 5 major awards at the 2019 Beijing Dance Competition. This golden autumn, the dance drama "The Butterfly Lovers" will bring its honors and its mission of promoting Chinese culture and art to three performances at McCaw Hall in Seattle on September 5, 6, and 7. To promote Chinese culture and art and bring together everyone's passion for the arts, CCCWA (the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State) is honored to serve as the designated promotional platform for this event. Everyone is welcome to purchase tickets—click the link: https://www.ticketmaster.com/search?q=The+Butterfly+Lovers+-+Liang+Zhu or visit www.asianperformingarts.org for details; you may also call AAPAT directly to reserve: 425.830.8054 (Serena). Group tickets of ten or more receive a 10% discount.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年08月21日 10:04_ __ _ _ _ _ 中美建交 40 週年之際，美國亞洲表演藝術劇院（American Asian Performing Arts Theatre, AAPAT），北京舞蹈學院，西雅圖華星藝術團將聯合推出根據中國四大民間愛情故事傳說之一的《梁山伯與祝英台》編創的舞劇。西雅圖 華星藝術團團長，和亞洲表演藝術劇院藝術總監李恆達得到北京舞蹈學院的邀 請，作為編劇和總導演為北京舞蹈學院完成了舞劇《梁山伯與祝英台》的創 作。這部舞劇是國家藝術基金項目，並在 2019 年北京舞蹈比賽中榮獲 5 項大 獎。今年金秋時節，舞劇《梁祝》將帶著榮耀，帶著弘揚中國文化藝術的使命 將 於 9 月 5，6，7 日在西雅圖 McCaw Hall 表演三場。 弘揚中國文化藝術，凝聚大家对艺术的热情，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会荣邀作为活动指定宣传平台，欢迎各位踊跃购票，点击链接网站：https://www.ticketmaster.com/search?q=The+Butterfly+Lovers+-+Liang+Zhu 或者登陸：www.asianperformingarts.org查看詳情；也可以直接打电话AAPAT预定：425.8308054 (Serena)，十张以上团体票可享有10% 优惠。

items.title_en: Onelin Capital Open House
items.title_zh: Onelin Capital Open House
items.body_en: _August 6, 2019, 07:59_ On August 8, CCCWA member company Onelin Capital Corporation will be holding an open house! Over the past few years, Onelin has grown from real estate development, venture capital, and fund investment to also operating incubators, co-working spaces, and co-living space management. As Onelin restructures its North American corporate framework, it is rapidly expanding its North American business. We welcome everyone to visit our Seattle office, meet our U.S. team, and learn about our projects. We would also like to take this opportunity to thank everyone for your continued support and encouragement of Onelin. ## About this Event Over the past two years, we have grown from real estate development, venture and fund investments, to also include incubators and real estate services (co-working, co-living and property management). Previously, we operated under separate entities, but now, with great pride, we are bringing all brands and entities together under one umbrella with Onelin Capital Corporation. This signifies a big milestone for Onelin as we continue to grow our presence in North America. So please join us in celebrating this great milestone together! Refreshments will be served at this drop-in style event. When: Thursday, August 8, 2019, 2:00 PM–7:00 PM. Where: 1525 4th Ave, Suite 400, Seattle, WA 98101. What: Open House! Tour the new Seattle office, meet our growing team, and learn about our notable and new projects. **CCCWA**

Previously, we operated under separate entities but now with great pride, we are bringing all brands and entities together under one umbrella with Onelin Capital Corporation. This signifies a big milestone for Onelin as we continue to grow our presence in North America. So please join us in celebrating this great milestone together! items.title_en: A Special Benefit for CCCWA Members Has Arrived!
items.title_zh: CCCWA商会会员的福利来啦 !
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _July 18, 2019, 07:06_ To celebrate the successful topping-out of "The Emerald," the waterview condominium project it invests in and manages, CCCWA council member company Tuohong USA Real Estate Development & Management Corporation is offering three specially discounted purchase allocations to CCCWA council members, as a way of giving back for everyone's support of CCCWA. To register: WeChat ID gloriachatting, or email info@ccc-wa.org; on-site viewings can be arranged. Limited to three units, first come, first served. Project website: https://theemeraldseattle.com/ **The Emerald — Project Overview** The Emerald waterview condominium project sits at the very heart of Seattle, right beside the world-famous Pike Place Market — a genuinely premium project in a genuinely scarce location (2nd Ave and Stewart St, Seattle, WA 98101). It is surrounded by major shopping destinations (Macy's, Nordstrom, Westlake, AMC, and Pacific Place), with an abundance of both Western and Chinese dining options nearby. In your leisure time, the Elliott Bay waterfront is just across the street, offering breathtakingly close contact with nature. The Emerald was designed and built through the dedicated efforts of renowned design firm Hewitt and developer DCWS. The project's design uses angled corners so that as many units as possible face the water, with an all-glass exterior — like an emerald set into Seattle's coastline. Every angle offers a pleasing view of Seattle, from the nearby bay to the distant mountains... Aerial view of The Emerald's 28th floor. The Emerald is planned as a 40-story, 265-unit condominium tower standing 133 meters tall, with delivery expected in mid-2020. The building's floors are divided into three zones: floors 4–16 offer city views, floors 17–33 offer panoramic views, and floors 34–38 house grand waterview suites. Live at The Emerald and enjoy the ultimate in Seattle city living, with permanently unobstructed water views. Rendering of The Emerald. § Developer: Daniels Real Estate Seattle § Construction: Andersen § Design firm: Hewitt § Interior design firm: Susan Marinello Interiors Inc § Project address: 121 Stewart St, Seattle, WA 98101 **Amenities and Services** § Resident lounge § Rooftop indoor and outdoor waterview common areas § Media room and shared kitchen § Outdoor fire feature and grilling stations § Guest suites § Indoor and outdoor fitness centers § Yoga studio § Ground-floor retail space § Guest reception desk § EV charging stations § Outdoor pet area and washing station § Free WiFi throughout common areas § Building-wide central air conditioning § 24-hour dedicated concierge § Individual mail lockers The Emerald offers a VIP private retreat where you, your family, and friends can find another green oasis amid the bustle of the city. The 39th-floor sky lounge sits 133.4 meters above Seattle, overlooking the city's waterfront. Floor-to-ceiling 7.1-meter windows across three glass walls take in a stunning view of Elliott Bay. Interior rendering of The Emerald. Full-perimeter glass construction fills every corner of the room with sunlight. Designed around quartz stone with grey-toned furniture accents, the refined, minimalist setting is eye-catching and ideal for relaxation — capturing the essence of life at The Emerald through elements of sky and sea. Interior rendering of The Emerald. The Emerald's city-view and panoramic-view residences come fully equipped with Bosch kitchen appliances and Whirlpool laundry appliances, along with TOTO and Kohler bath fixtures. The top-floor waterview residences feature top-tier luxury finishes, including a full suite of Miele kitchen appliances, Whirlpool laundry appliances, Kohler and contemporary TOTO bath fixtures, and extensive use of natural marble and European hardwood finishing materials. **Floor Plans** **CCCWA**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年07月18日 07:06_ __ _ _ _ _ 华盛顿州中国总商会理事会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发管理公司为庆祝其投资管理的“美丽岸”（ The Emerald ）海景公寓项目顺利封顶，面向 CCCWA 理事会员提供三套特惠购房指标，回馈大家对 CCCWA 的支持。 报名方式：微信 gloriachatting 或邮箱 info@ccc-wa.org 可安排现场看房。仅限三套，先到先得。 项目网址： https://theemeraldseattle.com/ ** 美丽岸（ ** ** The Emerald ** ** ） ** ** ** ** 项目概况 ** ** ** 美丽岸海景公寓项目就位于西雅图心脏位置，全球闻名派克市场旁边，是名副其实稀缺地段里的优质项目（2nd Ave and Stewart St，Seattle，WA 98101）。各种大型购物中心（ Macy’s、Nordstorm、Westlake、AMC和Pacific Place ）环伺周围，中西方饕餮美食尽皆品尝。闲暇时，街道对面就是艾略特湾滨海区，零距离接触自然，美到令人窒息。 美丽岸海景公寓项目从设计到完成由著名的设计公司HEWITT和开发商DCWS倾力完成。项目设计采用了转角的设计，尽量使更多单元面向大海，全玻璃外观，犹如西雅图海岸线的一颗祖母绿，任何角度观赏到的西雅图景色都是赏心悦目的，从附近的海湾到远处的山脉…… 美丽岸项目28层航拍实景 美丽岸海景公寓项目计划建造 40层 共计 265套 公寓，高133米，预计将于2020年年中交付 项目楼层设计分为3个区域，其中4-16层为城市景观层，17-33层为全景观楼层，34-38层为海景大套房公寓楼层。 生活在美丽岸，享受极致西雅图城市风情，永久无遮挡海景观。 美丽岸项目效果图 § 开 发 商 ：Daniels Real Estate Seattle § 建筑公司：Andersen § 设计公司：Hewitt § 室内设计公司：Susan Marinello Interiors Inc § 项目地址：121 Stewart St，Seattle，WA 98101 ** ** ** ** ** 配套设施及服 ** ** 务 ** ** ** ** ** ** ** § 休闲会所 § 顶层室内外海景公共空间 § 多媒体区域及公共厨房 § 室外炉火及烧烤设备 § 宾客套房 § 室内外健身中心 § 瑜伽工作室 § 项目低层商业空间 § 宾客接待前台 § 电动车辆充电桩 § 室外宠物空间及洗澡设施 § 大楼公共区域免费WiFi § 全楼中央空调 § 24小时全职管家 § 个人信报箱 美丽岸项目打造VIP私人领空，可与家人、朋友寻找喧闹城市里的另一片绿洲。39层的空中会所在西雅图133.4米的高空俯视西雅图城市海滨。三面玻璃的7.1米落地窗享受绝美艾略特湾海景。 美丽岸项目室内效果图 全方位玻璃结构，让房间每一处角落铺满阳光。采用以石英石为主题，灰色系家具辅助设计，令人眼前一亮，精致简约的环境可以更好的放松身心、感受着用天空、海水元素诠释的西雅图美丽岸生活。 美丽岸项目室内效果图 美丽岸 城景公寓和全景公寓 配备全套 博世厨房电器 和 惠而浦洗衣设备，以及TOTO、科勒卫浴设施 。 顶层海景公寓 配备顶级奢华家装， 全套美诺厨房电器 、 惠而浦洗衣设备，当代、TOTO、科勒卫浴设施 ，更多采用天然大理石和欧洲实木的装修材料。 ** 户型鉴 ** ** 赏 ** ** ** **CCCWA**

items.title_en: CCCWA Invites US Professionals to Break Down the '1031 Tax-Deferred Exchange' Every Real Estate Buyer/Seller Should Know
items.title_zh: CCCWA特邀美国专业人士解析房地产买卖过程中须知的“1031税务递延交换”
items.summary_en: When buying or selling property, the '1031 tax-deferred exchange' is a tax strategy the IRS allows taxpayers to use to legally defer taxes.
items.summary_zh: 买卖物业时，“1031 税务递延交换”是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略...
items.body_en:
When buying or selling property, the '1031 tax-deferred exchange' is a tax strategy the IRS allows taxpayers to use to legally defer taxes. '1031' is a tax policy with major implications for investment returns — effectively like borrowing interest-free funds from the government to invest in real estate, a form of leverage.

The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA), together with the Seattle Real Estate Club, recently invited an expert from First American to give a lecture on the 1031 exchange, a powerful real estate tax-saving tool.

Speaker: Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, First American Exchange Company

Topics included:
- What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications?
- Who is considered a qualified intermediary?
- Property identification rules
- How vesting should be held and related party issues
- Reverse and improvement type exchanges
- What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange
- Lesser known exchange alternatives — Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121, and vacation homes — and examples of how to apply them

Attendees enthusiastically participated in this lecture.
items.body_zh:
买卖物业时，“1031 税务递延交换”是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略 ，“1031”是对投资收益有很大影响的一个税务政策，如同借用政府的免息资金去做地产投资，也可说是杠杆原理的一种。 华盛顿州中国总商会CCCWA与西雅图地产俱乐部近期邀请First American 专家做一次有关房地产省税利器1031交换条款的讲座: 主讲人：Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, Frist American Exchange Company 内容包括： · What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications? · Who is considered a qualified intermediary? · Property identification rules · How vesting should be held and related party issues · Reverse and improvement type exchanges · What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange · Lesser known exchange alternatives - Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121 and vacation homes; and examples of how to apply them

当日大家踊跃参加了这次讲座。

items.title_en: Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) Members' Latest Benefit:
items.title_zh: 华盛州中国总商会（CCCWA）商会会员的最新福利:
items.summary_en: CCCWA board member company Tuohong US Real Estate Development & Management is celebrating the successful topping-out of its 'The Emerald' waterfront condo project by offering three special-priced purchase slots to CCCWA board members as a thank-you for their support.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会理事会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发管理公司为庆祝其投资管理的“美丽岸”（TheEmerald）海景公寓项目顺利封顶，面向CCCWA...
items.body_en:
CCCWA board member company Tuohong US Real Estate Development & Management is celebrating the successful topping-out of its investment and management project, 'The Emerald' waterfront condominiums, by offering three special-priced purchase slots to CCCWA board members, as a thank-you for their support of CCCWA.

To register: WeChat gloriachatting or email [contact via email]
Project website: https://theemeraldseattle.com/

The Emerald — Project Overview

The Emerald waterfront condominium project is located right in the heart of Seattle, next to the world-famous Pike Place Market — a genuinely premium project in a genuinely scarce location (2nd Ave and Stewart St, Seattle, WA 98101). It's surrounded by major shopping destinations (Macy's, Nordstrom, Westlake, AMC, and Pacific Place), offering a full range of Eastern and Western cuisine nearby. In your free time, the Elliott Bay waterfront is right across the street — a breathtakingly beautiful, up-close connection to nature.

The Emerald was designed and built from start to finish by renowned design firm HEWITT and developer DCWS. The project's design uses a corner layout to maximize the number of units facing the water, with an all-glass exterior — like an emerald set into Seattle's coastline. Seattle's views are stunning from every angle of the building, from the nearby bay to the distant mountains...

The Emerald creates a VIP private retreat where you can find another oasis with family and friends amid the bustle of the city. The 39th-floor sky lounge sits 133.4 meters above Seattle, overlooking the city's waterfront. Its floor-to-ceiling, 7.1-meter glass windows on three sides offer stunning views of Elliott Bay. The fully glass structure fills every corner of the room with sunlight. Designed around quartz stone with complementary gray-toned furniture, the refined, minimalist environment is ideal for relaxing and unwinding, capturing the beauty of Seattle waterfront living through the elements of sky and sea.
items.body_zh:
华盛顿州中国总商会理事会员单位拓宏美国房地产开发管理公司为庆祝其投资管理的“美丽岸”（TheEmerald）海景公寓项目顺利封顶，面向CCCWA 理事会员提供三套特惠购房指标，回馈大家对CCCWA的支持。 报名方式：微信gloriachatting或邮箱[[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) 项目网址：https://theemeraldseattle.com/

美丽岸（The Emerald） 项目概况 美丽岸海景公寓项目就位于西雅图心脏位置，全球闻名派克市场旁边，是名副其实稀缺地段里的优质项目（2nd Ave and Stewart St，Seattle，WA 98101）。各种大型购物中心（Macy’s、Nordstorm、Westlake、AMC和Pacific Place）环伺周围，中西方饕餮美食尽皆品尝。闲暇时，街道对面就是艾略特湾滨海区，零距离接触自然，美到令人窒息。

美丽岸海景公寓项目从设计到完成由著名的设计公司HEWITT和开发商DCWS倾力完成。项目设计采用了转角的设计，尽量使更多单元面向大海，全玻璃外观，犹如西雅图海岸线的一颗祖母绿，任何角度观赏到的西雅图景色都是赏心悦目的，从附近的海湾到远处的山脉……

美丽岸项目打造VIP私人领空，可与家人、朋友寻找喧闹城市里的另一片绿洲。39层的空中会所在西雅图133.4米的高空俯视西雅图城市海滨。三面玻璃的7.1米落地窗享受绝美艾略特湾海景。 全方位玻璃结构，让房间每一处角落铺满阳光。采用以石英石为主题，灰色系家具辅助设计，令人眼前一亮，精致简约的环境可以更好的放松身心、感受着用天空、海水元素诠释的西雅图美丽岸生活。

items.title_en: A Seminar on the "1031 Tax-Deferred Exchange," a Must-Know Real Estate Tax-Saving Tool in U.S. Property Transactions
items.title_zh: 美国房地产买卖中必须懂得的有关房地产省税利器“1031税务递延交换”的讲座
items.body_en: _June 8, 2019 05:20_ __ _ _ _ _ When buying and selling property, the 1031 tax-deferred exchange is a tax strategy the IRS allows taxpayers to use to legally defer taxes. To become a successful real estate investor, you must know how to make good use of leverage in property investment. In other words, use as little of your own capital as possible and make more use of bank loans—an investment approach that does more with less—and use the "1031" tax code to defer taxes, much like borrowing the government's interest-free funds to invest in real estate, which is itself a form of leverage. The Seattle Real Estate Club, together with the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State, will soon invite an expert from First American to give a seminar on the 1031 exchange, a powerful real estate tax-saving tool. Speaker: Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, First American Exchange Company. Topics include: · What is a 1031 Exchange and what are the requirements and qualifications? · Who is considered a qualified intermediary? · Property identification rules · How vesting should be held and related party issues · Reverse and improvement type exchanges · What to expect regarding closing costs related to a 1031 exchange · Lesser known exchange alternatives - Delaware Statutory Trust, IRC Section 121 and vacation homes; and examples of how to apply them. The 1031 is a tax policy that greatly affects investment returns—everyone is welcome to attend this seminar. Free for members of the Seattle Real Estate Club and the Chinese Chamber of Commerce of Washington State (members register free at: info@ccc-wa.org). Public registration fee: $30 (snacks, fruit, and drinks provided). **CCCWA**
items.body_zh: _2019年06月08日 05:20_ __ _ _ _ _ 买卖物业时，1031 税务递延交换是国税局允许纳税人合法避税的一种税务策略。想成为一位成功的地产投资者，就要懂得善用杠杆原理投资地产。换句话说，尽量少用自己的资金，多利用银行的贷款，以小搏大的投资方式，并利用「1031」税法来延税，就如同借用政府的免息资金去做地产投资，也可说是杠杆原理的一种。 西雅图地产俱乐部近期将会同华盛顿州中国总商会邀请First American 专家为我们做一次有关房地产省税利器1031交换条款的讲座: 主讲人：Milissa Ormiston, Business Development Manager, Frist American Exchange Company 内容包括： 1031是对投资收益有很大影响的一个税务政策，欢迎大家踊跃参加这次讲座。 西雅图地产俱乐部、华盛顿州中国总商会会员免费参加 （会员免费报名邮箱：info@ccc-wa.org) 公众报名费：$30 （备有点心、水果、饮料） **CCCWA**

items.title_en: CCCWA Foundation Joins Hands with the Hong Kong Chamber of Commerce Foundation to Celebrate the 2019 Lunar New Year, Welcoming the Year of the Pig
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会携手香港商会基金会：同庆2019年春节迎己亥
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _January 19, 2019, 06:01_ The Washington State China Chamber of Commerce Foundation, together with the Hong Kong Chamber of Commerce Foundation, will co-host a charity gala dinner celebrating the 2019 Lunar New Year. Leaders from Washington State's political, business, and cultural communities will gather to celebrate the New Year together. During the dinner, CCCWA's President will hold a fireside chat with special guest Ms. Gao Wei, Vice President at Amazon, and the two will discuss the technology and research outlook for the IT industry. Gao Wei, Vice President, serves as a technical advisor to Amazon CEO Jeff Bezos. Having worked at Amazon for 13 years, she has led products and programs in e-commerce, Kindle, and supply chain technology. Most recently, she has led the market forecasting and strategic planning team, providing customer demand forecasting and long-term business outlook analysis for Amazon's global consumer business. Vice President Gao's technical expertise spans artificial intelligence, big data analytics, and cloud computing. Date: February 2, 2019, 5:30 PM. Location: Sheraton Seattle Hotel, Grand Ballroom, 1400 6th Ave, Seattle, WA 98101. Guests: Leaders from Washington State's political, business, and cultural communities. 5:30 PM: Guest check-in. 6:45 PM: Lion dance to welcome the New Year. 7:00 PM: Opening remarks. 7:15 PM: Dinner and mingling, special guest interview, charity auction. Formal attire; registration fee $280. Please RSVP by email to info@ccc-wa.org before Sunday, January 27, 2019. **CCCWA**
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2019年01月19日 06:01_ __ _ _ _ _ 华盛顿州中国总商会基金会携手香港商会基金会共同举办2019年春节慈善晚宴。华盛顿州政、商、文化界人士将欢聚一堂，同庆新春佳节。晚宴中，华州中国总商会会长将与特邀嘉宾Amazon副总裁高威女士进行炉边会谈，二位将对话IT行业的技术与研究前景。 高威，副总裁，Amazon首席执行官CEO Jeff Bezos的技术顾问。高威 在亚马逊工作了13年，她主持开展了电子商务，Kindle和供应链技术方面的产品和项目。 最近，她领导市场预测和战略规划团队,为亚马逊全球消费业务提供客户需求预测和长期业务前景展望分析。高威副总裁的技术专长涵盖人工智能，大数据分析和云计算。 日期:2019 年2月2 日下午5点30分 地点: Sheraton Seattle Hotel Grand Ballroom 1400 6th AVE, Seattle, WA 98101 来宾: 华盛顿州政、商、文化界人士 5:30pm 来宾签到 6:45pm 舞狮迎春 7:00pm 晚宴主持致辞 7:15pm 交流晚宴，特邀嘉宾访谈，慈善拍卖 正装晚宴，报名费$280 请于2019年1月27日（周日）前邮件回复至info@ccc-wa.org **CCCWA**

items.title_en: 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit
items.title_zh: 2018年西雅图创新峰会 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit
items.summary_en: The 'Seattle Global Innovation Partnership Summit 2018,' hosted by the City of Seattle, was successfully held last week. Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening day.
items.summary_zh: 西雅图市政府主办的 "2018西雅图全球创新合作伙伴峰会"上周顺利举行。 开幕当日 市长 Durkan 和前州长 Gregoire 出席。 西雅图国际业务发展总监Carlton...
items.body_en:
The 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit was held last week. This event was organized by the World Affairs Council of Seattle. Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening session. Carlton Vann, Seattle's Director of International Business Development, opened the event, and Washington State Lieutenant Governor Habib spoke, highly praising Seattle's development over more than a decade and its future plans.

The Summit presented a strong sense of the Seattle region's strengths in health innovation, global health, information technology, e-commerce, infrastructure development, aerospace, and workforce training.

More than 50 representatives from over 30 countries and regions participated in the summit, from the local Seattle region as well as from San Francisco and Los Angeles. Members from CCCWA and the local community also participated in the event, taking advantage of expanded opportunities for networking.
items.body_zh:
西雅图市政府主办的"2018西雅图全球创新合作伙伴峰会"上周顺利举行。开幕当日市长Durkan和前州长Gregoire出席。西雅图国际业务发展总监Carlton Vann主持开幕，华盛顿州副州长Habib发言高度肯定十几年西雅图的大发展和未来的规划宏图。 2018 Seattle Innovation Summit was held last week. This event was organized by the World Affairs Council of Seattle, Mayor Durkan and former Governor Gregoire attended the opening session. Carlton Vann, Seattle's director of international business development, opened the event, and Washington State Deputy Governor Habib highly praised of Seattle's development and future plans for more than a decade.

峰会清楚地展示了西雅图地区在医疗创新、全球健康卫生、信息技术、电子商务、基础设施发展、航空航天和劳动力培训方面的优势。 The Summit presented a stronger sense of the Seattle region’s strengths in health innovation, global health, information technology, e-commerce, infrastructure development, aerospace, and workforce training.

来自30多个国家和地区的近50名代表参加了峰会。来自旧金山和洛杉矶企业代表也出席了活动，CCCWA华盛顿州中国总商会和西雅图本地区的代表也应邀出席，大家在各个环节中扩展了交流互动的机会。 More than 50 representatives from over 30 countries and regions participate in the summit, from the local Seattle region, as well as from San Francisco and Los Angeles. Members from CCCWA and local community also participated the event, took the expanded opportunities for networking.

items.title_en: Consul General Wang Donghua Welcome Dinner
items.title_zh: Consul General Wang Donghua Welcome Dinner 欢迎中国驻旧金山王东华总领事晚宴
items.body_en: Consul General Wang dong Hua; Economic & Counselor Yang Yi Hang from Chinese Consulate in San Francisco; Lieutenant Governor Cyrus Habib of Washington State; , Director of International Relations and Protocol Schuyler Hoss, State of Washington; Mayor of Bellevue John Chelminiak; Economic and Trade Director Carlton Vann, City of Seattle; Former Governor of Washington State, Former Commercial minister of Federal Government, Former US ambassador to China, Gary Locke; , CEO Marilyn Strickland of Seattle Metropolitan Chamber of Commerce, and approximately 100 guests who are political, business and community representatives from the greater Seattle region attended the banquet. The President of Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington state, Ms. Cathy Zhou was the host of the banquet。Consul General Wang Dong Hua gave the keynote, he had made strong and firm comment on the relation and recent economic and trade development between the two nations. The remark of Lieutenant Governor Habib highly confirmed the importance that Washington state attached to China-US relation, and its endeavor which is full of promising prospects. Consul General Wang Dong Hua emphases that, Washington state is a close partner of China. For many years, both sides carried out continuous and deep exchange in the areas of economy, trade and culture. Microsoft, Boeing, Starbucks, Amazon, Costco are stationed in Washington state, they accelerated the growth and expansion of the economy of Washington state. Next year would be the 40th anniversary of China & US established diplomatic relation, under current background, China and Washington state should keep close partner relationship, to maintain and continue develop relations further. Habib also stressed the close relation between Washington state and China：for many years, the trade volume of Washington State to China always ranked as the top among all US states. Although we are facing current rigorous challenge, but Washington state government would continue to dedicate to promote the province-state cooperation between China and US. During the interview, Consul General Wang Dong Hua expressed that, during this trip, five members of consulate general, and over 20 entrepreneurs from various industries of California State came to Seattle. Besides visiting famous enterprises of Washington State, they are looking for new opportunities to better enhance the exchange and cooperation in various fields between China and US. BellevueMayor Mr. Chelmeniak, City of Bellevue and Former Mayor of Tacoma, Present of Seattle Metropolitan Chamber of Commerce, Ms. Strickland both expressed their warm welcome on Chinese enterprises to strengthen the exchange with various cities of Washington state, and expected more deep cooperation. Political, business and community representatives from the greater Seattle region attended the banquet.
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [ CCCWA ](javascript:void\(0\);) _2018年11月09日 07:39_ __ _ _ _ _ 近日，美国华盛顿州中国总商会举办晚宴热烈欢迎来自中国驻旧金山总领馆新任总领事王东华大使莅临西雅图。 Recently, Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State hosted a dinner banquet to warmly welcome Consul General Wang dong Hua, Consulate General of P.R.China in San Francisco to visit Seattle. 王东华总领事和总领馆经济商务参赞杨依杭等领馆官员，与华盛顿州副州长Cyrus Habib、华盛顿州国际事务及办公厅厅长Schuyler Hoss、贝尔维尤市长John Chelminiak、西雅图国际业务发展总监卡尔顿·凡Carlton Vann、华盛顿州前州长、也是联邦商务部前部长，美国前驻华大使骆家辉 Gary Locke、西雅图市商会首席执行官兼总裁Marilyn Strickland，以及来自大西雅图地区政界、商界及社区代表等近百位嘉宾出席晚宴 王东华总领事强调，华州是中国的亲密伙伴。多年来，双方在经贸、文化等方面不断深入交流。微软、波音、星巴克、亚马逊等大公司坐落于华州，促进了华州快速的成长壮大。明年将是中美建交40周年，在当前的大背景下，中国与华州更应该保持紧密的合作伙伴关系，共同维护双方在各领域良好、持续发展关系。 Habib也强调了华盛顿州与中国之间的密切关系: 多年来, 华盛顿州与中国的贸易额一直位居美国所有州之首。虽然我们面临着当前的严峻挑战,但华盛顿州政府将继续致力于推动中美省州间的多领域、全方位的合作。 王东华总领事在接受采访中表示，这次总领馆一行五人与二十多位来自加州各行业的企业家来到西雅图，在参访华州知名企业的同时，也在寻找新的机会,更好地促进中美双方在各个领域的交流合作。 经济商务参赞杨依杭与大家亲切交流互动中，骆家辉与大家热烈交流. Mr. Yang Yi Hang, the commercial counselor had close conversations with all the guests. Gary Locke carried out friendly communication with the audience. 以及来自大西雅图地区政界、商界及社区代表等近百位嘉宾出席晚宴

items.title_en: Beijing Dance Academy's Chinese Classical Dance Department to Perform in Seattle
items.title_zh: 北京舞蹈學院中國古典舞系西雅圖演出
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _September 19, 2018, 06:56_ The Chinese Classical Dance Department of the Beijing Dance Academy traveled to the U.S. West Coast to take part in the 5th "Trans-Pacific China Arts Festival," hosted by the Chinese Consulate-General in San Francisco, and the 2nd Seattle Huaxing Arts Festival, hosted by the Seattle Huaxing Arts Troupe. As the world's foremost institution of higher dance education, the Beijing Dance Academy is today's largest, most professionally rigorous, and most comprehensively equipped academy of its kind. As leading representatives of this top dance institution, the group crossed the Pacific to North America to take part in the China Arts Festival, presenting an evening of classic Chinese classical dance works as well as a showcase of classical dance fundamentals, rhyme, and technique. A troupe of 30 dancers from the Beijing Dance Academy's Chinese Classical Dance Department will present "China in Dance – 2018" in Seattle from October 4 to 6, featuring two high-caliber evening performances: an evening of classic Chinese classical dance works (7:30 PM, October 4–6, at the Meydenbauer Center Theater in Bellevue) and a showcase of classical dance fundamentals, rhyme, and technique (2:30 PM, October 6). Ticket prices are $35, $45, $60, and $100. **Seattle performance times and location:** Thursday–Saturday, 7:30 PM, October 4–6; Saturday, October 6, 2:30 PM (classical dance technique showcase). Meydenbauer Center Theater, 11100 NE 6th St, Bellevue, WA 98004. Ticket hotline: 206.830.8054 / 206.605.6787 (call for group ticket discounts). Ticket links: http://www.hengdadance.com/ https://www.bpt.me/3605018 https://www.bpt.me/3609858 (For Technique Show) https://goo.gl/forms/YcXPH1RAPYL3R8x63 (book tickets through this link with no service fee)

items.title_en: CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 18: Legal and Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会“西雅图大讲坛”第18期：人工智能法律和道德问题研究
items.summary_en: Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge at the Shanghai office of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, hosted a CCCWA workshop on legal issues in artificial intelligence.
items.summary_zh: ​日前,美国戴维斯.莱特.特里梅因律师事务所上海代表处主任律师，蔡荣伟主持CCCWA“西雅图大讲坛”...
items.body_en:
Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge at the Shanghai office of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, hosted a CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' workshop, sharing on 'Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence.'

The content included: Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence — Industry/Profession Regulation, Joint Development, Privacy & Security, Potential Legal Liabilities, Bias & Discrimination; and Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence — Unemployment, Inequality, Humanity, Robot Rights, Control.

Mr. Cai focused on the impact of AI development on various industries, analyzed several cases provided by attendees, and addressed their questions and concerns on the spot. The workshop was well received.

Attendees expressed hope that CCCWA would continue to organize workshops on a wide range of specialized topics so the Chinese business community could share knowledge and keep pace with industry trends. CCCWA's efforts in serving the community were highly appreciated and recognized by attendees.
items.body_zh:
日前,美国戴维斯.莱特.特里梅因律师事务所上海代表处主任律师，蔡荣伟主持CCCWA“西雅图大讲坛” 与专业人士分享“人工智能法律和道德问题研究” Recently, Ron Cai, Partner-in-Charge, Davis Wright Tremaine LLP, Shanghai Office hosted a CCCWA Workshop: "Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence." 内容包含了： Legal Issues in Artificial Intelligence:人工智能法律问题研究 Industry/Profession Regulation行业规制 Joint Development联合开发 Privacy & Security隐私和安全 Potential Legal Liabilities潜在法律责任 Bias & Discrimination偏见和歧视 Ethical Issues in Artificial Intelligence:人工智能道德问题研究 Unemployment 失业 Inequality 不平等 Humanity 人性 Robot rights 机器人权益 Control 控制

针对当下热点人工智能的发展和对各个行业的影响，蔡律师根据与会者提供的实际案例进行了分析，并且当场解答了参会者提出的一些疑问，参会人员受到了启发。 Mr. Cai focused on the impact of AI development on various industries, analyzed several cases provided by attendees, and addressed the concerns and questions. The workshop was well received.

大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座，以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息。同时, 大家肯定了CCCWA对服务社区的努力。 Attendees hope that CCCWA continuously organize workshops in wide range of specialized topics for Chinese business community to share and catch up with the industry trend. CCCWA’s efforts in serving community was highly appreciated and recognized by attendees.

items.title_en: 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador and International Paralympic Committee Image Ambassador Hou Bin's Keynote Speech: Carrying Forward the Olympic Spirit, Overcoming Yourself Through Unwavering Perseverance, and Pursuing Your Dreams to Achieve Success
items.title_zh: 2022年北京冬奥会形象大使、国际残奥委会形象大使侯斌先生主题演讲：弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功
items.summary_en: Recently, three-time World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador Hou Bin attended the CCCWA Seattle Lecture Series, delivering a keynote speech on carrying forward the Olympic spirit and pursuing dreams through perseverance.
items.summary_zh: 近日，世界残奥会三届男子跳高冠军、2022年北京冬奥会形象大使侯斌出席CCCWA西雅图大讲坛，带来“弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功”的主题演讲。...
items.body_en:
Recently, CCCWA's workshop series featured Mr. Hou Bin's public speech on 'Carry Forward the Olympic Spirit, Pursue Dreams and Ambitions.' Mr. Hou is a three-time World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics Image Ambassador.

Hou Bin shared the story of his journey: at the age of 9, he lost his left leg in an accident, but the hardship of growing up never dimmed his hopes for the future. At the age of 21, he became a Paralympian, representing China at the 1996 Summer Paralympics in Atlanta and winning the gold medal in high jump with a record of 1.92 meters. He went on to defend his title at both the 2000 and 2004 Paralympic Games. During the opening ceremony of the 2008 Beijing Summer Paralympics, Hou Bin served as the final torchbearer, lighting the Paralympic cauldron by pulling himself up a rope while secured to his wheelchair bracket. Hou Bin said: 'People have to keep striving to surpass themselves — all technology, ideas, the future, and life itself are created, not waited for. We should live with hope and dreams in our hearts. Don't let anyone steal your dream — where there is a dream, there is a future.' (Quoted from a report by The China Press.)

Since retiring, Hou has become a motivational speaker. In 2013, he launched 'Stand Up Again,' a fundraising project for children needing prosthetic limbs after the Ya'an and Wenchuan earthquakes.

Hou Bin's story moved and inspired everyone in attendance. The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State hoped that, through this speech, local Chinese community members would come away with something meaningful, while also bringing the community closer together. After the speech, CCCWA presented Hou Bin with the 'CCCWA Social Responsibility Award.'

Hou Bin's story of perseverance was full of positive energy, inspiring everyone in attendance.
items.body_zh:
近日，世界残奥会三届男子跳高冠军、2022年北京冬奥会形象大使侯斌出席CCCWA西雅图大讲坛，带来“弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力超越自我，追求梦想挑战成功”的主题演讲。 Recently, CCCWA workshop series featured Mr. Hou Bin’s public speech on “Carry Forward the Olympic Spirit, Pursue Dreams and Ambitions". Mr. Hou is the three-time winner of the World Paralympic Games men's high jump champion and the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympic Games Image Ambassador.

侯斌讲述他的奋足迹：9岁那年的一场意外让侯斌失去了左腿，但成长的艰辛并没有磨灭侯斌对未来的憧憬。1996年，只有21岁的侯斌在亚特兰大残奥会上，以1米92的成绩打破世界纪录，获得男子跳高金牌，此后侯斌在2000年和2004年的两届残奥中卫冕，2008年北京夏季残奥会开幕中，侯斌通过拉拽绳索自行攀爬的方式点燃了残奥会的主火炬。侯斌这样说“人就是要不断去超越，所有的科技、思想、未来、人生都是创造出来而不是等待出来的。我们要活在希望和梦想当中，不要让人偷走你的梦, 有梦想，就有未来。” 引自“侨报”报导 Hou Bing shared his footprint of endeavor: at the age of 9, he lost his left leg due to an accident, however he’d never given up the hope of future despite of the hardship. At the age of 21, he became a Paralympian, and represented China at the 1996 Summer Paralympics in Atlanta and won the gold medal of high jump with the record of 1.92 meters. In 2008, Hou Bin became the first International Paralympic ambassador launched by the International Paralympic Committee. Since then, Hou Bin defended his title at both year 2000 and 2004 Paralympic Games. During the opening ceremony of year 2008 Beijing summer Paralympics' Games, Hou Bin served as Beijing Paralympic Main Torch hand. He lit up the main torch of Paralympic Games by of placing the torch in the wheelchair special bracket and tightening himself to the rope, pulling the rope and climbing up. Hou Bin said: "People have to keep striving and excel. Future and life can be created but waiting. We should live a life with hope and dream in our heart. If there is a dream, there is a future”. The story of Hou Bin’s endeavor is full of aspiration.

自退役以来，侯已成为一名励志演说家，并于2013年推出了“Stand Up Again”，这是一项针对雅安和汶川地震后需要修复截肢的受伤儿童的筹款项目。 Since retirement, Hou has become a motivational speaker. In 2013, he launched "Stand Up Again," a fundraising project for injured children who needed prosthetics after the [Ya'an](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2013_Lushan_earthquake) and [Wenchuan earthquakes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2008_Sichuan_earthquake).

侯斌与大家分享他的故事鼓舞人心, 华盛顿州中国总商会希望通过这次的演讲让本地的华人们能有所收获，同时希望能通过这样的方式凝聚本地的华人社区。演讲结束后，华盛顿州中国总商会给侯斌颁发了“CCCWA社会责任贡献奖”。 The speech was extremely well received and appreciated. Chinese community thanks Mr. Hou’s sharing his story with Chinese community during his family vacation in Seattle. CCCWA hopes the speech will inspire us and through the event to unite the local Chinese community.". After the speech,Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State, presented Hou Bin with the “Excellent Social Responsibility Award”.

侯斌的奋斗故事充满着正能量，激发斗志，大家备受鼓舞。 The story of Hou Bin’s endeavor is full of positive energy, and inspired us to persevere with our goals.

items.title_en: Paralympic Ambassador Hou Bin Keynote: Promoting the Olympic Spirit
items.title_zh: 残奥形象大使侯斌主题演讲：弘扬奥运精神
items.summary_en: CCCWA hosted Paralympic ambassador Hou Bin for a keynote speech on the Olympic spirit.
items.summary_zh: CCCWA主办残奥会形象大使侯斌先生主题演讲，分享奥运精神与国际合作理念。
items.body_en:
The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) hosted a keynote address by Hou Bin (侯斌), the renowned Chinese Paralympic champion who was named an image ambassador for the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics and the International Paralympic Committee. The event — the 18th installment of CCCWA's popular "Seattle Lecture Series" (西雅图大讲坛) — drew a packed audience of members and community guests.

Hou Bin's story is one of extraordinary determination. A high-altitude jump athlete who lost his leg in an accident as a young man, he went on to win Paralympic gold medals and became one of China's most celebrated disabled athletes. His journey — from injury and adversity to Olympic glory and international ambassadorship — made him an ideal speaker for CCCWA's community, many of whom had built their own lives and businesses across cultural and personal barriers.

## The Keynote: Promoting the Olympic Spirit

Titled "Promoting the Olympic Spirit, Strengthening Perseverance, and Pursuing Dreams" (弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力，追求梦想), Hou Bin's keynote drew on his personal experience as an elite athlete and a public figure representing China on the world stage. He spoke about the values that had sustained him through recovery and competition: discipline, resilience, the refusal to be defined by circumstance.

For members of the Chinese business community in Seattle — many of whom had immigrated, built companies from scratch, and navigated the challenges of operating across two very different business cultures — Hou Bin's message carried a direct resonance. The qualities that make a champion athlete, he argued, are the same qualities that make a community thrive: commitment, teamwork, and the long view.

## International Cooperation and the 2022 Beijing Olympics

As an ambassador for the upcoming Beijing 2022 Winter Games, Hou Bin also spoke about the significance of the Olympics as a platform for international connection and understanding. He discussed the role that events like the Games — and organizations like CCCWA — play in building genuine bridges between China and the rest of the world, beyond trade and politics, into shared human experience.

The event was one of the most attended in CCCWA's lecture series history, reflecting both the appeal of Hou Bin as a public figure and the community's hunger for inspiring stories from the broader Chinese and Chinese-American world.

## About the Seattle Lecture Series

CCCWA's Seattle Lecture Series (西雅图大讲坛) brings expert speakers to the community on a rotating basis, covering topics from business and law to science, culture, and public affairs. Launched in early 2017, the series has become one of CCCWA's most valued member programs, offering substantive, bilingual programming that connects the Seattle Chinese-American community to ideas and expertise from across both countries.
items.body_zh:
华州中华总商会（CCCWA）邀请了中国著名残奥会冠军侯斌发表主题演讲，他曾被任命为2022年北京冬奥会及国际残奥委会的形象大使。此次活动是华州中华总商会广受欢迎的“西雅图大讲坛”系列讲座的第十八期，吸引了众多会员及社区嘉宾到场，座无虚席。

侯斌的故事是一段非凡毅力的写照。他年轻时曾是一名跳高运动员，因意外事故失去了一条腿，此后却在残奥会上屡获金牌，成为中国最受赞誉的残疾人运动员之一。从伤病与逆境，到奥运荣耀与国际形象大使的身份，他的这段历程使他成为华州中华总商会社区理想的演讲嘉宾——本会众多会员也都是在跨越文化与个人重重障碍中，一步步建立起自己的事业与生活。

## 主题演讲：弘扬奥运精神

侯斌以“弘扬奥运精神，坚定毅力，追求梦想”为题发表演讲，结合自身作为顶尖运动员及代表中国站上世界舞台的公众人物的亲身经历，讲述了支撑他走过康复与竞技历程的种种价值观：自律、坚韧，以及不被境遇所定义的信念。

对于西雅图华人商界的会员们而言——他们中许多人都曾经历移民、白手起家创办企业，并在两种截然不同的商业文化中摸索前行——侯斌所传达的信息引发了强烈共鸣。他认为，成就一名冠军运动员的品质，与成就一个繁荣社区的品质并无二致：那便是坚定的信念、团队协作精神，以及长远的眼光。

## 国际合作与2022年北京冬奥会

作为即将举行的2022年北京冬奥会形象大使，侯斌还谈到了奥运会作为国际交流与理解平台的重要意义。他探讨了像冬奥会这样的大型赛事，以及像华州中华总商会这样的机构，在中国与世界其他地区之间架设真正桥梁方面所发挥的作用——这种联结超越了贸易与政治，深入到人类共通的情感与经验层面。

此次活动是华州中华总商会讲座系列历史上参与人数最多的活动之一，既体现了侯斌作为公众人物的号召力，也反映出社区对来自更广泛华人及华裔美国人世界的励志故事的渴求。

## 关于西雅图大讲坛

华州中华总商会“西雅图大讲坛”定期邀请各领域专家学者与社区分享真知灼见，内容涵盖商业、法律、科学、文化及公共事务等诸多主题。该系列讲座于2017年初启动，已成为华州中华总商会最受重视的会员项目之一，通过内容扎实的双语讲座，将西雅图华裔美国人社区与来自中美两国的思想和专业知识紧密相连。

items.title_zh: 西雅图大讲坛第十六期：中国企业海外投资
items.body_en: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _June 20, 2018 04:57_ __ _ _ _ _ CCCWA invites FDI research expert Professor Dr. Chen Taotao from Tsinghua University to share her insights on Chinese companies investing abroad, especially in the US. Dr. Chen is a professor at the School of Economics & Management, Tsinghua University. Her main research areas are "Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)," "International Business," and "Globalization and Strategy." She has published more than 30 papers on the topics of FDI spillover and Chinese companies investing abroad, and has presided over research projects supported by the National Science Foundation, the Ministry of Education, and the Ministry of Commerce, among others. In recent years, Prof. Chen Taotao has put more effort into topics such as Chinese companies investing in the US, the business environment in the US and Latin America, and the capability of young Chinese MNCs. During her research, Professor Chen has visited US think tanks and universities such as the Heritage Foundation and Georgetown University, as well as more than 30 branches of Chinese companies that have invested in the US and Latin American countries. She has also been invited to attend international forums, such as the World Economic Forum and Emerging Market Forums, giving speeches and engaging in various debates. ### DATE AND TIME ### Fri, June 29, 2018 ### 9:00 AM – 11:00 AM PDT ### LOCATION ### iSoftStone ### 5808 Lake Washington Boulevard Northeast ### #400 ### Kirkland, WA 98033
items.body_zh: CCCWA CCCWA [CCCWA](javascript:void(0);) _2018年06月20日 04:57_ __ _ _ _ _ 华盛顿州中国总商会（CCCWA）特邀中国对外直接投资研究专家、清华大学经济管理学院陈涛涛教授，分享她对"中国企业的海外投资"方面的见地。陈博士的主要研究领域是"国际直接投资""国际商务"和"全球化与战略"。她发表了30多篇关于外商直接投资溢出效应及中国企业在海外投资的论文，并主持了多项国家自然科学基金、教育部和商务部支持的研究项目。近年来，陈教授着重研究中国企业投资美国、美国和拉美的商业环境以及中国年轻跨国公司的能力等方面。期间，陈教授访问了美国的智库和大学，如传统基金会、乔治敦大学和在美国和拉美国家有投资的30多家中国公司的分支机构。此外，她应邀参加了各种国际论坛发表演讲或进行辩论，如世界经济论坛、新兴市场论坛等。 ### 时间 ### 2018年6月29日（周五）### 上午9:00 – 11:00（太平洋夏令时）### 地点 ### iSoftStone ### 5808 Lake Washington Boulevard Northeast ### #400 ### Kirkland, WA 98033

items.body_en: _June 15, 2018, 07:16_ On the afternoon of the 19th of this month, the "Seattle Forum" will address two topics of general interest: 1) What you need to know when purchasing homeowner's, investment property, and auto insurance — what is umbrella insurance, and how does it further protect your assets? What are the main factors affecting insurance premiums? 2) A Seattle apartment rental market update and an introduction to rental property management services. Event Time: TUE, JUNE 19, 2018, 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM PDT. Address: Create World Real Estate Inc., 325 118th Avenue Southeast #100, Bellevue, WA 98005. Everyone is welcome to click "Read the Original Article" at the bottom of this post, or copy the link below into your browser to register: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/46728033807 Description: ## Part I: Seattle Real Estate Market Update * Forecast of housing market supply and demand / bidding war analysis * Seattle Apartment Rental Market Update / analysis of the rental investment market * Introduction to rental property management ## Part II: Overview of the Importance of Home and Auto Insurance * Policy coverage contents and their importance; the difference between homeowner's insurance and rental property insurance * What is umbrella insurance, and how does it further protect your assets * How rates are determined, and how to ask about discounts * What to do in the event of an accident or claim * Claims process: things to note * Exclusions: special circumstances ## **Follow CCCWA by scanning the QR code**
items.body_zh: _2018年06月15日 07:16_ __ _ _ _ _ 本月19日下午“西雅图大讲坛”为大家解析普遍关心的问题：1）购买自住房与投资房保险和车辆保险时需要注意和了解的内容，何为综合险保险，它如何加强保护您的资产？影响保险费用的主要因素是什么？2）西雅图公寓出租市场更新及出租物业管理服务 活动时间 ：TUE, JUNE 19, 2018 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM PDT 地址 ：Create World Real Estate Inc. 325 118th Avenue Southeast #100, Bellevue, WA 98005 欢迎大家点击文章最下方"阅读原文"或复制链接到浏览器报名参加 https://www.eventbrite.com/e/46728033807 Description 介绍: ## Part I: Seattle Real Estate Market Update ## 西雅图房地产市场更新 * Forecast of housing market supply and demand/Bidding War 未来房屋市场供给与需求预测/市场竞价数据分析 * Seattle Apartment Rental Market Update/ analysis of rental investment Market 西雅图公寓出租市场更新/投资市场数据分析 * Introduction of Rental Management 介绍出租物业管理 ## Part II: Overview of Importance of Home and Auto Insurance ## 了解房屋保险和汽车保险的内容和重要性 * Policy coverage contents and its importance.Difference between Home Insurance and Rental House Insurance 解析房屋和汽车保险覆盖内容细节和重要性. 家庭自住房屋保险与出租房屋保险的区别 * What is Umbrella Insurance: How is it protecting your assets 何为综合险保险：它如何加强保护您的资产 * How rate is determine, How to ask About Discounts 保险费用价格的决定因素 , 如何询问各项折扣 * What to Do in Case of Accident/Claim? 在发生意外/索赔时应做什么 * Claim Process：Things to take notes 索赔流程: 需要注意的事项 * Exclusions：特殊情况 ## **长按二维码关注CCCWA**

items.title_en: Delegation from the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade Visits Seattle
items.title_zh: 中国国际贸易促进会代表来访西雅图
items.body_en: Recently, China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT)US delegation team came to Seattle and paid a visit to Mr. Schuyler Hoss, the director of International Relations and Protocol, State of Washington .The CCPIT delegation also met and discussed with members of the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) on Chinese companies' business development in greater Seattle region. The representatives of the CCPIT discussed and learned the business scope, challenges of facing and the future development of various businesses. CCPIT committed to try its best to expand its overseas networks and to provide more effective services to all Chinese community. Seattle has close ties with China, China is also the largest export market of Washington state . As the largest export state to China, its manufacturing, hi-tech and agriculture are ranking top throughout the nation. In the past two years, Seattle, as the center of Cloud Computing, aviation, great health and new technology industries has attracted many IT high-tech talents . It has become a new force which drives regional economy in many aspects such as real estate, medical, business, manufacture, travel, education, and culture exchange. Seattle is an important hub connecting China and US economy. CCCWA welcomes CCTIP to facilitate and promote the cooperation and partnership between Chinese and the US companies.
items.body_zh: _2018年06月02日 05:24_ __ _ _ _ _ 近日，中国国际贸易促进会（美国代表团）来到西雅图，拜访了华盛顿州国际关系部主任SchuylerHoss先生，并与华盛顿州中国总商会(CCCWA)部分会员座谈，探讨沟通中资企业在华盛顿州大西雅图地区的业务开展情况。 中国国际贸易促进会的服务范围包含（但不局限于）：促进国际贸易，投资，经济及技术合作交流；联络国际和国内工商界提供各方主管和领导人出访接待事项、承办国内外商业展览、以及为海外大公司提供在华投资运营和相关知识产权的法律服务等等。 The service scope of the CCPIT includes (but not limited to): promote foreign trade, bilateral investment and economic & technological cooperation; international cooperation, undertaking domestic and international commercial exhibitions ;carry forward cooperation with overseas trade promotion counterparts; carry out legal consulting, commercial conciliation, etc. 贸易促进会代表们了解了各行业代表在美国公司的业务范围、面临的实际问题和困难以及今后的发展目标。代表团表示将扩大海外工作网络，更健全，更好地为大家服务。 西雅图与中国联系紧密，中国也是华盛顿州产品出口的最大市场。华盛顿州作为美国对华的第一出口大州，其制造业、科技业、与农业都名列前茅；近两年，西雅图以云计算中心，航空，大健康，高科技行业全球领先的科技优势吸引了大量IT高科技人才，同时带动了本地区房地产、医疗、商业、娱乐、旅游、留学、文化等全方面的经济腾飞，成为中美企业之间的重要枢纽！CCCWA欢迎中国国际贸易促进会来西雅图，以推动和促进中美两国企业的合作与发展。

items.summary_en: On March 29th, CCCWA representatives visited Costco, which will open a new store in Shanghai in mid-2019. That same day, other members and entrepreneur representatives held a roundtable discussion at iSoftStone.

items.body_en:
On March 29th, members of CCCWA visited Costco, which will open a new store in Shanghai in mid-2019. On the same day, other members visited iSoftStone and held discussions with local entrepreneur representatives.

CCCWA is dedicated to uniting Chinese-invested enterprises and entrepreneurs in Washington State, maintaining strong relationships with local businesses and the community, and actively contributing to economic development.
items.body_zh: 3月29日，华盛顿州中国总商会部分代表拜访了明年年中将在上海开门店的COSTCO，同日，会部分会员和企业家代表在软通动力进行了座谈交流。 March29th, members of CCCWA visited COSTCO which will open a new store in Shanghai mid next year. On the same day, members visited ISoftStone, and communicated with representatives from local entrepreneurs. 总商会积极团结华州的中资企业和企业家，与当地企业、社区搞好关系、对经济发展做出了积极的贡献。 CCCWA has dedicated to united local business and enterprises, interacted and kept good relationship with local community, business and actively contributed to economic development。

items.title_en: CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 12: How the 2018 New US Tax Law Dramatically Incentivizes Investors to Use LLCs for Real Estate Investment
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会 “西雅图大讲坛”---第12期 :        2018年美国新税法如何极大地刺激投资人使用LLC进行房地产投资
items.summary_en: Recently, CCCWA legal advisor Mr. Alex Cai (an international business attorney with over 20 years of experience practicing in Washington State) and Mr. Moses Wan (President of M Squared Tax PLLC and adjunct tax professor at Seattle University) held a special seminar analyzing the impact of the new 2018 tax law on LLC real estate investment.
items.summary_zh: 日前, CCCWA法律顾问 Mr. Alex Cai (华盛顿州执业20多年，具有丰富 经验 的国际商务律师), 与 Mr. Moses Wan (M Squared Tax...
items.body_en:
Last week, CCCWA's legal advisor, Mr. Cai from Cai & Associates who has 20 years of legal work experience in international business transactions, and Mr. Moses Wan, President of M Squared Tax PLLC and adjunct tax professor at Seattle University, held a professional seminar at the Create World (USA) office analyzing the impact of the new 2018 tax law on LLC real estate investment.

Mr. Cai discussed how to take title to investment real estate properties, considerations in choosing a proper LLC management structure, practical issues for Chinese investors when forming LLCs, and the basic structure of an operating agreement.

Moses provided a high-level overview of the tax law changes under the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act and their impact on foreign real estate investments. He also discussed common holding structures for US real estate investments such as an LLC and a C Corporation, and the advantages and disadvantages of each structure in light of the new tax laws. He further discussed important US tax filing requirements related to foreign nationals investing in US real estate.

Both professionals provided precise data and shared practical case studies, and answered attendees' questions on the spot. All participants were inspired, and expressed hope that CCCWA would continue to organize these professional seminars so they could obtain the latest industry information. They also affirmed CCCWA's contribution to the community.

The workshop PPT slides are provided as follows:

cccwa_real_estate_presentation_[alex_cai].pptx

File Size: 1508 kb

File Type: pptx

[Download File](/assets/uploads/news/archive-2018-03--12-2018llc-attachment-1.pptx)

cccwa_real_estate_presentation_3_22_18__alex_edit.pptx

File Size: 87 kb

File Type: pptx

[Download File](/assets/uploads/news/archive-2018-03--12-2018llc-attachment-2.pptx)
items.body_zh:
日前, CCCWA法律顾问 Mr. Alex Cai (华盛顿州执业20多年，具有丰富经验的国际商务律师), 与 Mr. Moses Wan (M Squared Tax PLLC税务咨询公司总裁,西雅图大学兼职税务教授) 在拓宏房地产公司为大家举行了一场专题讲座，解析2018新税法对LLC房地产投资的影响。 Last week, CCCWA's legal advisor, Mr. Cai from Cai & Associates who has 20 years of legal work experience in international business transactions and Mr. Moses Wan, the CEO of M Squared Tax PLLC/ adjunct tax professor at Seattle University, held a professional seminar at the Create World (USA) office.

蔡律师介绍房地产投资时的持有类型、选择LLC公司投资时的适当管理结构、在成立LLC公司时应关注的实际问题、以及运营协议基本结构。 Mr. Cai discussed how to take titles to investment real estate properties, consideration in choosing proper LLC management structure, practical issues for Chinese investors when forming LLCs, and basic structure of an operating agreement.

Mr.MosesWan介绍新税法生效后的重大变化，包括对外国人投资美国不动产的影响，选择LLC公司及C-corporation公司利弊以及投资美国不动产的税务申报要求。 Moses provided a high level overview of the tax law changes under the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act and their impact on foreign real estate investments. He also discussed common holding structures for US real estate investments such as an LLC and a C Corporation and advantages and disadvantages of each structure in light of the new tax laws. Further, he discussed important US tax filing requirements related to foreign nationals investing in US real estate.

两位专业人士提供了精准的数据和实际案例的分享，并且当场解答了参会者提出的一些疑问， 参会人员受到了启发。 大家非常期待CCCWA今后继续举办各类专题讲座， 以便获得专业人士提供的最新业内信息 。 同时, 大家肯定了CCCWA对服务社区的努力。 Two professionals provided accurate data , shared practical case studies with us and answered relevant questions on the spot. All participants were inspired. In addition, participates are expecting CCCWA to continue to organize these professional seminars so that them can obtain the latest information from the industry. At the same time, they affirmed the contribution of CCCWA to society.

items.title_en: CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 11: Changes to 2018 Trump-Era Immigration Policy for Work and Investment/Entrepreneur Visas
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会主办 “西雅图大讲坛”第11期： 2018特朗普移民政策在工作与投资/创业签证等方面的变化
items.summary_en: Under the new policy of Trump's administration, immigration regulations changed frequently — how could those affected adjust in time? Cao Xiaohe Law Office, a CCCWA member firm, recently gave the most cutting-edge and professional lecture on hot immigration topics.
items.summary_zh: 特朗普新政下移民政策频频改变，相关人士如何对新的政策及时做出调整？华盛顿州中国总商会会员单位曹霄鹤律师事务所近期为大家带来了最前沿，最专业的移民热点问题讲座。内容包含：...
items.body_en:
Under the new policy of Trump's administration, immigration regulations changed frequently — how could related personnel adjust to the new policies in time? The Lani Cao Law Office gave a seminar on the latest and most professional hot topics on immigration. The content included: 1. 2019 H1B employment visa: what type of profession can apply for H1B, when to contact an employer, contacting a lawyer, what changes occurred under the new regulations, and how to deal with not being selected in the H1B lottery. 2. Investment immigration: increases to the required investment amount — when this increase would occur, how much it would increase by, changes to TEA regional center regulations, and the impact on green card applications already submitted. 3. The difference between the investor/entrepreneur visa 'EB6' and EB5 investment immigration, and the difference from the L1A intracompany executive transfer visa.

All participants of this seminar expressed that they had benefited a lot from attending the lecture on how to plan for visa applications, and expected CCCWA to host more such lectures to promote professional knowledge of specific policy changes around investment and employment visas.
items.body_zh:
特朗普新政下移民政策频频改变，相关人士如何对新的政策及时做出调整？华盛顿州中国总商会会员单位曹霄鹤律师事务所近期为大家带来了最前沿，最专业的移民热点问题讲座。内容包含： 1. 2019 H1B工作签证: 什么工作可以申请H1B,什么时候开始找雇主, 联系律师, 新规定在哪些方面有变化,如何准备抽不上的应对方法 2. 投资移民：金额的增加：什么时候增加，增加多少,区域中心TEA 的规定有什么变化对已经递交的绿卡申请的影响 3. 投资者/创业者签证 “EB6”: 和EB5投资移民的差别,和L1A跨国高管的差别 .

参加活动的各行业人士纷纷表示通过聆听讲座对于如何规划签证申请得益匪浅，并期待华盛顿州中国总商会主办更多的类似讲座提高投资与工作签证等方面具体政策变化的专业认知。

Under the new policy of Trump reign, his regulations on immigration changed frequently, how can related personnel adjust to the new policies? The Lani Cao Law Office had given the seminar about the latest and most professional hot topics on immigration. The content included: 1. 2019 H1B employment visa: what type of profession can apply for H1B, when to contact the employer, contact lawyer, what changes occurred in the new regulation? How to deal with the failure of drawing H1B visa. 2. Investment immigration: increase on the amount of investment: when this increase will occur, how much increase will occur, the TEA regulation, regional center, what changes can impact on the green card application which is already submitted. 3. The difference between Investor/start-ups visa “EB6”&“EB5” investment immigration, and the difference of L1A cross country senior management. All the participants of this seminar expressed that they had benefited a lot from attending the lecture on how to plan for visa application, and expected CCCWA can host more such lectures to promote on the professional knowledge on the application of investment and employment visa.

items.title_en: 2018 Chinese New Year Gala Highlights
items.title_zh: 2018年华人新春晚会精彩回顾
items.summary_en: Hundreds of members and guests gathered to celebrate the Chinese New Year with performances, a gala banquet, and award presentations.
items.summary_zh: 数百位会员和宾客欢聚一堂，共贺春节，举行文艺表演、晚会大餐和颁奖典礼。
items.body_en:
The Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State (CCCWA) welcomed the Year of the Dog with its 2018 Chinese New Year Gala — one of the organization's flagship annual events and a celebration that brought together hundreds of members, partners, and guests from across the Greater Seattle area.

The evening was a vibrant showcase of Chinese culture, community achievement, and the growing presence of Chinese-American businesses in Washington State. Held at a premier Seattle venue, the gala combined traditional celebration with modern ceremony, reflecting the dual identity of a community that bridges two cultures.

## Performances and Entertainment

The gala featured a program of cultural performances highlighting classical Chinese artistry alongside contemporary talent. Traditional Chinese dance, instrumental performances, and vocal acts drew enthusiastic applause from the assembled guests. The performances were organized to reflect the spirit of the new year — vibrant, hopeful, and celebratory.

The evening's program was carefully curated to appeal to both Chinese-speaking members and English-speaking guests, making the event an accessible introduction to Chinese cultural traditions for attendees from all backgrounds.

## Gala Banquet and Networking

A multi-course gala banquet gave members and guests the opportunity to enjoy traditional Chinese cuisine while networking with peers from across Washington State's Chinese-American business community. The banquet reflected the chamber's commitment to creating space for genuine connection — beyond formal business settings — that strengthens the bonds within the community.

The event brought together entrepreneurs, investors, legal and financial professionals, technology executives, and community leaders, creating one of the most diverse gatherings in CCCWA's calendar year.

## Award Presentations

A highlight of the gala was the annual award presentation, recognizing outstanding contributions to the CCCWA community by individual members and partner organizations. Awards acknowledged excellence across categories including business leadership, community service, cultural contribution, and support for CCCWA's mission of bridging US-China commerce and culture.

The 2018 gala marked another successful chapter in CCCWA's tradition of annual celebrations that build community pride and strengthen the organization's identity as a cornerstone of Chinese-American business life in the Pacific Northwest.
items.body_zh:
华州中华总商会（CCCWA）以2018年华人新春晚会喜迎狗年新春——这是本会年度旗舰活动之一，汇聚了来自大西雅图地区数百名会员、合作伙伴及嘉宾共襄盛举。

当晚活动生动展现了中华文化、社区成就，以及华裔美国人企业在华盛顿州日益壮大的影响力。晚会在西雅图一处顶级场馆举行，将传统庆典与现代仪式相结合，展现了这个横跨两种文化的社区所具有的双重身份特质。

## 文艺表演

晚会精心编排了一系列文艺演出，将中国古典艺术与当代才艺交相辉映。传统中国舞蹈、器乐演奏及声乐表演赢得了在场嘉宾的阵阵热烈掌声。整场演出的编排旨在展现新年的精神气象——朝气蓬勃、充满希望、喜气洋洋。

当晚的节目安排经过精心策划，既照顾到讲中文的会员，也顾及讲英语的宾客，使这场活动成为不同背景的与会者了解中华文化传统的一次亲切契机。

## 晚宴与交流联谊

多道菜式的晚宴让会员及嘉宾在品尝传统中华美食的同时，也有机会与来自华盛顿州华裔美国人商界的同行相互交流。这场晚宴体现了本会致力于在正式商务场合之外，营造真诚交流空间、强化社区凝聚力的一贯理念。

此次活动汇聚了企业家、投资人、法律与金融专业人士、科技行业高管及社区领袖，成为华州中华总商会年度活动中最具多元色彩的一场聚会。

## 颁奖典礼

晚会的一大亮点是年度颁奖典礼，旨在表彰个人会员及合作机构为华州中华总商会社区做出的杰出贡献。奖项涵盖多个类别，包括商业领导力、社区服务、文化贡献，以及对本会“架起中美商贸文化桥梁”这一使命的支持。

2018年晚会为华州中华总商会一年一度的庆典传统再添成功篇章，进一步凝聚了社区自豪感，巩固了本会作为太平洋西北地区华裔美国人商业生活重要基石的地位。

items.title_en: CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 10: The Culture, History, and Appreciation of Wine
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会“西雅图大讲坛”第10期: 葡萄酒的文化,历史和品鉴
items.summary_en: At the start of the new year, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State organized its 10th 'Seattle Lecture Series' event. Chamber member and GIYA International Chairwoman hosted a small New Year wine tasting to welcome 2018 and share wine knowledge.
items.summary_zh: 新年伊始，华盛顿州中国总商会组织举办了第十期“西雅图大讲坛”。商会会员、吉雅国际公司董事长为大家举办了迎接”2018“小型新年品酒会，分享红酒知识。...
items.body_en:
At the start of the new year, the Chinese Chamber of Commerce in Washington State organized its 10th 'Seattle Lecture Series' event. Chamber member and GIYA International Chairwoman hosted a small New Year wine tasting to welcome 2018 and share wine knowledge.

Headquartered in Seattle, Washington, GIYA brought fine Washington State wines to the event, including wine served at White House state dinners. GIYA gave attendees a detailed introduction to the varieties of wine, explaining the differences between Old World and New World wines and other specialized topics. The GIYA chairwoman also shared wine etiquette, the steps of tasting, the layers of flavor in appreciation, food and wine pairing, and the practical value of wine collecting.

At the tasting, the Chamber offered attendees dry reds and whites from traditional Old World winemaking countries such as France and Italy, as well as New World countries such as the US, Australia, New Zealand, and Chile, allowing everyone to taste and compare on the spot. Guided by the professionals, attendees together explored and appreciated the differing flavors and rich qualities of Old World and New World wines.

This event was held at the lakeview offices of Chamber members iSoftStone and Vestlink. Through deep interaction during the event, attendees learned about wine while improving their quality of life, and deepened their understanding of one another as fellow members.
items.body_zh:
新年伊始，华盛顿州中国总商会组织举办了第十期“西雅图大讲坛”。商会会员、吉雅国际公司董事长为大家举办了迎接”2018“小型新年品酒会，分享红酒知识。 总部设在美国华盛顿州西雅图，吉雅国际（GIYA）带来了华盛顿州的优质佳酿，特别是美国白宫元首国宴招待用酒。 吉雅向来宾详尽介绍了葡萄酒的种类，解释了旧世界和新世界葡萄酒的区别等专业领域信息。吉雅董事长同时分享葡萄酒礼仪，品酒的步骤和品鉴的口感层次，以及酒餐搭配，红酒的收藏价值等等实用知识。

品酒会上，商会为来宾提供了法国、意大利等传统酿造国（旧世界）和美国、澳大利亚、新西兰、智利等（新世界）的干红和干白让大家现场品茗增加认知。大家在专业人士的引导下一起分享品鉴旧世界和新世界葡萄酒不同的口味、细尝浓郁的品质。

本次活动在商会会员IsoftStone、Vestlink公司的湖景办公室举行。 活动中大家进行了深层互动，学习红酒知识提高生活品质的同时，加深了会员间的相互了解。

items.title_en: November 14th, 2017
items.title_zh: November 14th, 2017
items.summary_en: CCCWA member firm Cai & Cai Law Office invited senior planner Mr. Corbett, who specializes in estate, tax, and business succession planning, to speak at the Chamber's Seattle Lecture Series.
items.summary_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会会员单位蔡和蔡律师事务邀请专注财产、税务和商业继承的高级规划师Mr...
items.body_en:
CCCWA 'Seattle Lecture Series' Episode 9: Tax-Efficient Investment Strategies in the US for High-Net-Worth Chinese Families and Businesses.

CCCWA member firm Cai & Cai Law Office invited senior planner Mr. Corbett, who specializes in estate, tax, and business succession planning, to present on personal estate tax planning for US immigrants, tax-efficient structuring for domestic real estate and business investments in the US, and family topics including multi-generational wealth transfer, and the establishment and management of charitable foundations and family offices.

Attendees from various industries reported gaining a much clearer understanding of tax planning and wealth management through the lecture, and expressed hope that CCCWA would host more similar lectures to raise awareness of financial planning topics.
items.body_zh: 华盛顿州中国总商会“西雅图大讲坛”第9期:中国高净值家庭和企业在美国高节税投资策略 华盛顿州中国总商会会员单位蔡和蔡律师事务邀请专注财产、税务和商业继承的高级规划师Mr Corbett介绍了美国移民的个人遗产税规划，在美国的不动产和企业的境内投资的节税结构的设计，以及围绕于家庭方面有关子孙及多辈之间的财富传承、慈善机构和家族办公的建立和管理。 参加活动的各行业人士纷纷表示通过聆听讲座对于如何规划节税、理财有了的了解，并期待华盛顿州中国总商会主办更多的类似讲座提高金融管理方面的认知。

items.title_en: CCCWA Invites Friends from All Walks of Life on a Moon-Viewing Cruise to Celebrate the Mid-Autumn Festival
items.title_zh: 美国华盛顿州中国总商会邀请各界友好人士出游赏月庆中秋佳节
items.summary_en: The full moon is rarest on the 15th but roundest on the 16th. On October 5th, the 16th day of the 8th lunar month, many CCCWA members and friends from all walks of life boarded a cruise on Lake Washington together to watch the sunset and admire the full moon.
items.summary_zh: 一年几见当头月，十五的月亮十六圆。10月5号农历八月十六，华盛顿州中国总商会的众多会员与各界人士共乘遊船泛舟华盛顿湖，观日落，赏明月。初升的皓月形如银盘，西雅图沐浴在金子般光芒下，明月与太空针的霓虹闪烁相映成辉，月湖共影，美轮美奂。总商会的会员和家人、朋友在紧张的工作之后吃月饼品佳餚，欢歌笑语，欢度一年中团圆之夜。​
items.body_en: The full moon is rarest on the 15th but roundest on the 16th. On October 5th, the 16th day of the 8th lunar month, many CCCWA members and friends from all walks of life boarded a cruise together on Lake Washington to watch the sunset and admire the full moon. The rising moon, round as a silver plate, bathed Seattle in golden light, its glow mingling beautifully with the Space Needle's shimmering lights, reflected together on the lake in a stunning scene. After a busy season of work, Chamber members and their families and friends enjoyed mooncakes and fine food together, filled with laughter and song, celebrating this night of reunion that comes but once a year.
items.body_zh: 一年几见当头月，十五的月亮十六圆。10月5号农历八月十六，华盛顿州中国总商会的众多会员与各界人士共乘遊船泛舟华盛顿湖，观日落，赏明月。初升的皓月形如银盘，西雅图沐浴在金子般光芒下，明月与太空针的霓虹闪烁相映成辉，月湖共影，美轮美奂。总商会的会员和家人、朋友在紧张的工作之后吃月饼品佳餚，欢歌笑语，欢度一年中团圆之夜。

items.body_en:
On September 30th, the Seattle Technology & Trade Summit, hosted by Nanhai Group, was successfully held at the Hyatt Regency Bellevue. This year's summit featured keynote remarks from Baidu's president and Amazon's vice president. Held annually, the Nanhai Technology & Trade Summit is a major gathering for US and Chinese tech companies, innovation teams, and business professionals, drawing over a thousand US and Chinese industry attendees and keynote speeches from industry pioneers.

Representatives from several CCCWA member companies attended the event and gave dedicated presentations.
items.body_zh: 9月30日，由南海集团主办的西雅图科技商贸高峰会在Bellevue凯悦酒店成功召开，今年的峰会上百度总裁和亚马逊副总裁做了主题发言。一年一度的南海科技商贸高峰会是美中两国科技公司、创新团队和商贸人士的交流盛会，吸引上千位美中行业人士出席，业界先锋作主题发言。 商会的多个会员代表单位出席活动并作专场发言。
